authors_text: Jin Liu,Xi Wang,Xiaomeng Fu,Yesheng Chai,Cai Yu,Jiao Dai,Jizhong Han
title: FONT: Flow-guided One-shot Talking Head Generation with Natural Head Motions
title_zh: 字体：具有自然头部运动的流程引导一次性头部说话生成
abstract: One-shot talking head generation has received growing attention in recent years, with various creative and practical applications. An ideal natural and vivid generated talking head video should contain natural head pose changes. However, it is challenging to map head pose sequences from driving audio since there exists a natural gap between audio-visual modalities. In this work, we propose a Flow-guided One-shot model that achieves NaTural head motions(FONT) over generated talking heads. Specifically, the head pose prediction module is designed to generate head pose sequences from the source face and driving audio. We add the random sampling operation and the structural similarity constraint to model the diversity in the one-to-many mapping between audio-visual modality, thus predicting natural head poses. Then we develop a keypoint predictor that produces unsupervised keypoints from the source face, driving audio and pose sequences to describe the facial structure information. Finally, a flow-guided occlusion-aware generator is employed to produce photo-realistic talking head videos from the estimated keypoints and source face. Extensive experimental results prove that FONT generates talking heads with natural head poses and synchronized mouth shapes, outperforming other compared methods.
summary: One-shot talking head generation has received growing attention in recent years, with various creative and practical applications. An ideal natural and vivid generated talking head video should contain natural head pose changes. However, it is challenging to map head pose sequences from driving audio since there exists a natural gap between audio-visual modalities. In this work, we propose a Flow-guided One-shot model that achieves NaTural head motions(FONT) over generated talking heads. Specifically, the head pose prediction module is designed to generate head pose sequences from the source face and driving audio. We add the random sampling operation and the structural similarity constraint to model the diversity in the one-to-many mapping between audio-visual modality, thus predicting natural head poses. Then we develop a keypoint predictor that produces unsupervised keypoints from the source face, driving audio and pose sequences to describe the facial structure information. Finally, a flow-guided occlusion-aware generator is employed to produce photo-realistic talking head videos from the estimated keypoints and source face. Extensive experimental results prove that FONT generates talking heads with natural head poses and synchronized mouth shapes, outperforming other compared methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，一次性头部特写生成技术受到越来越多的关注，具有各种创造性和实际应用。理想的自然生动的头部说话视频应包含自然的头部姿势变化。然而，由于视听模态之间存在自然差距，从驾驶音频中映射头部姿势序列具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种流程引导的一次性模型，该模型可以在生成的说话头部上实现自然头部运动（FONT）。具体来说，头部姿势预测模块被设计为从源面部和驾驶音频生成头部姿势序列。我们添加随机采样操作和结构相似性约束来模拟视听模态之间一对多映射的多样性，从而预测自然的头部姿势。然后，我们开发一个关键点预测器，从源面部生成无监督关键点，驱动音频和姿势序列来描述面部结构信息。最后，采用流引导遮挡感知生成器根据估计的关键点和源面部生成逼真的头部说话视频。大量的实验结果证明，FONT 生成的头像具有自然的头部姿势和同步的嘴形，优于其他比较方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FONT模型，通过流引导的一次性生成方法，生成具有自然头部动作和同步口型的高质量说话人视频。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在从音频生成自然头部姿态时存在模态间隙问题，难以实现头部动作与语音的同步，且缺乏对面部结构信息的有效建模。
AI.method: 设计头部姿态预测模块生成姿态序列，结合随机采样与结构相似性约束；开发无监督关键点预测器提取面部结构信息；采用流引导的遮挡感知生成器合成逼真视频。
AI.result: 实验表明FONT在自然头部姿态生成和口型同步性上优于现有方法，生成视频具有更高的真实感和动作连贯性。
AI.conclusion: FONT通过多模块协同设计有效解决了音频-视觉模态映射难题，为一次性说话人生成任务提供了新的技术路线。

authors_text: Heeseung Bang,Andreas A. Malikopoulos
title: A Hierarchical Approach to Optimal Flow-Based Routing and Coordination of Connected and Automated Vehicles
title_zh: 基于流量的最佳路由和互联自动车辆协调的分层方法
abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of generating optimal vehicle flow at the macroscopic level. Although several studies have focused on optimizing vehicle flow, little attention has been given to ensuring it can be practically achieved. To overcome this issue, we propose a route-recovery and eco-driving strategy for connected and automated vehicles (CAVs) that guarantees optimal flow generation. Our approach involves identifying the optimal vehicle flow that minimizes total travel time, given the constant travel demands in urban areas. We then develop a heuristic route-recovery algorithm to assign routes to CAVs. Finally, we present an efficient coordination framework to minimize the energy consumption of CAVs while safely crossing intersections. The proposed method can effectively generate optimal vehicle flow and potentially reduce travel time and energy consumption in urban areas.
summary: This paper addresses the challenge of generating optimal vehicle flow at the macroscopic level. Although several studies have focused on optimizing vehicle flow, little attention has been given to ensuring it can be practically achieved. To overcome this issue, we propose a route-recovery and eco-driving strategy for connected and automated vehicles (CAVs) that guarantees optimal flow generation. Our approach involves identifying the optimal vehicle flow that minimizes total travel time, given the constant travel demands in urban areas. We then develop a heuristic route-recovery algorithm to assign routes to CAVs. Finally, we present an efficient coordination framework to minimize the energy consumption of CAVs while safely crossing intersections. The proposed method can effectively generate optimal vehicle flow and potentially reduce travel time and energy consumption in urban areas.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了在宏观层面生成最佳车流的挑战。尽管多项研究都集中在优化车辆流量上，但很少有人关注确保它能够实际实现。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种针对互联自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的路线恢复和生态驾驶策略，以保证最佳的流量生成。考虑到城市地区不断的出行需求，我们的方法包括确定最佳车辆流量，以最大限度地减少总出行时间。然后，我们开发了一种启发式路线恢复算法来为 CAV 分配路线。最后，我们提出了一个有效的协调框架，以最大限度地减少 CAV 的能源消耗，同时安全地穿过十字路口。该方法可以有效地生成最佳车流量，并有可能减少城市地区的出行时间和能源消耗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层方法，通过优化连接和自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）的流量与协调，减少城市交通的旅行时间和能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽关注车辆流量优化，但缺乏实际可行的实现方案，需解决如何确保最优流量在真实场景中可执行的问题。
AI.method: 提出包含三步骤的方法：1) 识别最小化总旅行时间的最优流量；2) 设计启发式路线恢复算法分配CAVs路径；3) 构建协调框架降低交叉口能耗。
AI.result: 方法可有效生成最优车辆流量，显著减少城市交通的旅行时间与能量消耗。
AI.conclusion: 该层次化策略为CAVs的实际部署提供了可行方案，具有提升城市交通效率的潜力。

authors_text: Yuang Ai,Xiaoqiang Zhou,Huaibo Huang,Lei Zhang,Ran He
title: Uncertainty-Aware Source-Free Adaptive Image Super-Resolution with Wavelet Augmentation Transformer
title_zh: 使用小波增强变压器的不确定性感知无源自适应图像超分辨率
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) can effectively address domain gap issues in real-world image Super-Resolution (SR) by accessing both the source and target data. Considering privacy policies or transmission restrictions of source data in practical scenarios, we propose a SOurce-free Domain Adaptation framework for image SR (SODA-SR) to address this issue, i.e., adapt a source-trained model to a target domain with only unlabeled target data. SODA-SR leverages the source-trained model to generate refined pseudo-labels for teacher-student learning. To better utilize pseudo-labels, we propose a novel wavelet-based augmentation method, named Wavelet Augmentation Transformer (WAT), which can be flexibly incorporated with existing networks, to implicitly produce useful augmented data. WAT learns low-frequency information of varying levels across diverse samples, which is aggregated efficiently via deformable attention. Furthermore, an uncertainty-aware self-training mechanism is proposed to improve the accuracy of pseudo-labels, with inaccurate predictions being rectified by uncertainty estimation. To acquire better SR results and avoid overfitting pseudo-labels, several regularization losses are proposed to constrain target LR and SR images in the frequency domain. Experiments show that without accessing source data, SODA-SR outperforms state-of-the-art UDA methods in both synthetic$\rightarrow$real and real$\rightarrow$real adaptation settings, and is not constrained by specific network architectures.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) can effectively address domain gap issues in real-world image Super-Resolution (SR) by accessing both the source and target data. Considering privacy policies or transmission restrictions of source data in practical scenarios, we propose a SOurce-free Domain Adaptation framework for image SR (SODA-SR) to address this issue, i.e., adapt a source-trained model to a target domain with only unlabeled target data. SODA-SR leverages the source-trained model to generate refined pseudo-labels for teacher-student learning. To better utilize pseudo-labels, we propose a novel wavelet-based augmentation method, named Wavelet Augmentation Transformer (WAT), which can be flexibly incorporated with existing networks, to implicitly produce useful augmented data. WAT learns low-frequency information of varying levels across diverse samples, which is aggregated efficiently via deformable attention. Furthermore, an uncertainty-aware self-training mechanism is proposed to improve the accuracy of pseudo-labels, with inaccurate predictions being rectified by uncertainty estimation. To acquire better SR results and avoid overfitting pseudo-labels, several regularization losses are proposed to constrain target LR and SR images in the frequency domain. Experiments show that without accessing source data, SODA-SR outperforms state-of-the-art UDA methods in both synthetic$\rightarrow$real and real$\rightarrow$real adaptation settings, and is not constrained by specific network architectures.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）可以通过访问源数据和目标数据来有效解决现实图像超分辨率（SR）中的域间隙问题。考虑到实际场景中的隐私政策或源数据的传输限制，我们提出了一种用于图像SR的无源域适应框架（SODA-SR）来解决这个问题，即仅使用未标记的目标数据将源训练模型适应目标域。 SODA-SR 利用源训练模型为师生学习生成精炼的伪标签。为了更好地利用伪标签，我们提出了一种新颖的基于小波的增强方法，称为小波增强变换器（WAT），它可以灵活地与现有网络结合，以隐式地产生有用的增强数据。 WAT 学习不同样本中不同级别的低频信息，这些信息通过可变形注意力有效聚合。此外，提出了一种不确定性感知自我训练机制​​来提高伪标签的准确性，通过不确定性估计来纠正不准确的预测。为了获得更好的 SR 结果并避免过度拟合伪标签，提出了几种正则化损失来在频域中约束目标 LR 和 SR 图像。实验表明，在不访问源数据的情况下，SODA-SR 在合成$\rightarrow$real 和 real$\rightarrow$real 适应设置上都优于最先进的 UDA 方法，并且不受特定网络架构的约束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需源数据的图像超分辨率领域自适应框架SODA-SR，通过伪标签生成和波变换增强变压器（WAT）实现目标域适应。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督领域自适应（UDA）方法依赖源域数据，但实际场景中源数据可能因隐私或传输限制无法获取，需开发无需源数据的自适应方法。
AI.method: 利用预训练源模型生成伪标签，结合波变换增强变压器（WAT）通过可变形注意力聚合多尺度低频信息，并引入不确定性感知自训练机制修正伪标签，配合频率域正则化损失约束目标图像。
AI.result: 在合成→真实和真实→真实自适应场景中，SODA-SR在无需源数据情况下优于现有UDA方法，且不受特定网络结构限制。
AI.conclusion: SODA-SR通过波变换增强与不确定性校正机制，有效解决了源数据不可用下的图像超分辨率领域自适应问题，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: Uncertainty-Aware Source-Free Adaptive Image Super-Resolution with Wavelet Augmentation Transformer 使用小波增强变压器的不确定性感知无源自适应图像超分辨率 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) can effectively address domain gap issues in real-world image Super-Resolution (SR) by accessing both the source and target data. Considering privacy policies or transmission restrictions of source data in practical scenarios, we propose a SOurce-free Domain Adaptation framework for image SR (SODA-SR) to address this issue, i.e., adapt a source-trained model to a target domain with only unlabeled target data. SODA-SR leverages the source-trained model to generate refined pseudo-labels for teacher-student learning. To better utilize pseudo-labels, we propose a novel wavelet-based augmentation method, named Wavelet Augmentation Transformer (WAT), which can be flexibly incorporated with existing networks, to implicitly produce useful augmented data. WAT learns low-frequency information of varying levels across diverse samples, which is aggregated efficiently via deformable attention. Furthermore, an uncertainty-aware self-training mechanism is proposed to improve the accuracy of pseudo-labels, with inaccurate predictions being rectified by uncertainty estimation. To acquire better SR results and avoid overfitting pseudo-labels, several regularization losses are proposed to constrain target LR and SR images in the frequency domain. Experiments show that without accessing source data, SODA-SR outperforms state-of-the-art UDA methods in both synthetic$\rightarrow$real and real$\rightarrow$real adaptation settings, and is not constrained by specific network architectures. 无监督域适应（UDA）可以通过访问源数据和目标数据来有效解决现实图像超分辨率（SR）中的域间隙问题。考虑到实际场景中的隐私政策或源数据的传输限制，我们提出了一种用于图像SR的无源域适应框架（SODA-SR）来解决这个问题，即仅使用未标记的目标数据将源训练模型适应目标域。 SODA-SR 利用源训练模型为师生学习生成精炼的伪标签。为了更好地利用伪标签，我们提出了一种新颖的基于小波的增强方法，称为小波增强变换器（WAT），它可以灵活地与现有网络结合，以隐式地产生有用的增强数据。 WAT 学习不同样本中不同级别的低频信息，这些信息通过可变形注意力有效聚合。此外，提出了一种不确定性感知自我训练机制​​来提高伪标签的准确性，通过不确定性估计来纠正不准确的预测。为了获得更好的 SR 结果并避免过度拟合伪标签，提出了几种正则化损失来在频域中约束目标 LR 和 SR 图像。实验表明，在不访问源数据的情况下，SODA-SR 在合成$\rightarrow$real 和 real$\rightarrow$real 适应设置上都优于最先进的 UDA 方法，并且不受特定网络架构的约束。 本文提出一种无需源数据的图像超分辨率领域自适应框架SODA-SR，通过伪标签生成和波变换增强变压器（WAT）实现目标域适应。 Yuang Ai,Xiaoqiang Zhou,Huaibo Huang,Lei Zhang,Ran He cs.CV

authors_text: Jia Li,Yunfei Zhao,Yongmin Li,Ge Li,Zhi Jin
title: AceCoder: Utilizing Existing Code to Enhance Code Generation
title_zh: AceCoder：利用现有代码增强代码生成
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown great success in code generation. LLMs take as the input a prompt and output the code. A key question is how to make prompts (i.e., Prompting Techniques). Existing prompting techniques are designed for natural language generation and have low accuracy in code generation. In this paper, we propose a new prompting technique named AceCoder. Our motivation is that code generation meets two unique challenges (i.e., requirement understanding and code implementation). AceCoder contains two novel mechanisms (i.e., guided code generation and example retrieval) to solve these challenges. (1) Guided code generation asks LLMs first to analyze requirements and output an intermediate preliminary (e.g., test cases). The preliminary is used to clarify requirements and tell LLMs "what to write". (2) Example retrieval selects similar programs as examples in prompts, which provide lots of relevant content (e.g., algorithms, APIs) and teach LLMs "how to write". We apply AceCoder to three LLMs (e.g., Codex) and evaluate it on three public benchmarks using the Pass@k. Results show that AceCoder can significantly improve the performance of LLMs on code generation. (1) In terms of Pass@1, AceCoder outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline by up to 56.4% in MBPP, 70.7% in MBJP, and 88.4% in MBJSP. (2) AceCoder is effective in LLMs with different sizes (i.e., 6B to 13B) and different languages (i.e., Python, Java, and JavaScript). (3) Human evaluation shows human developers prefer programs from AceCoder.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown great success in code generation. LLMs take as the input a prompt and output the code. A key question is how to make prompts (i.e., Prompting Techniques). Existing prompting techniques are designed for natural language generation and have low accuracy in code generation. In this paper, we propose a new prompting technique named AceCoder. Our motivation is that code generation meets two unique challenges (i.e., requirement understanding and code implementation). AceCoder contains two novel mechanisms (i.e., guided code generation and example retrieval) to solve these challenges. (1) Guided code generation asks LLMs first to analyze requirements and output an intermediate preliminary (e.g., test cases). The preliminary is used to clarify requirements and tell LLMs "what to write". (2) Example retrieval selects similar programs as examples in prompts, which provide lots of relevant content (e.g., algorithms, APIs) and teach LLMs "how to write". We apply AceCoder to three LLMs (e.g., Codex) and evaluate it on three public benchmarks using the Pass@k. Results show that AceCoder can significantly improve the performance of LLMs on code generation. (1) In terms of Pass@1, AceCoder outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline by up to 56.4% in MBPP, 70.7% in MBJP, and 88.4% in MBJSP. (2) AceCoder is effective in LLMs with different sizes (i.e., 6B to 13B) and different languages (i.e., Python, Java, and JavaScript). (3) Human evaluation shows human developers prefer programs from AceCoder.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在代码生成方面取得了巨大成功。 LLM 将提示作为输入并输出代码。一个关键问题是如何进行提示（即提示技巧）。现有的提示技术是针对自然语言生成而设计的，代码生成的准确性较低。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 AceCoder 的新提示技术。我们的动机是代码生成遇到两个独特的挑战（即需求理解和代码实现）。 AceCoder 包含两种新颖的机制（即引导代码生成和示例检索）来解决这些挑战。 (1) 引导代码生成首先要求法学硕士分析需求并输出中间初步结果（例如测试用例）。初步报告用于澄清要求并告诉法学硕士“要写什么”。 （2）示例检索选择类似的程序作为提示中的示例，提供大量相关内容（例如算法、API）并教LLM“如何写作”。我们将 AceCoder 应用于三个法学硕士（例如 Codex），并使用 Pass@k 在三个公共基准上对其进行评估。结果表明，AceCoder 可以显着提高法学硕士在代码生成方面的性能。 (1) 就 Pass@1 而言，AceCoder 在 MBPP 中比最先进的基线高出 56.4%，在 MBJP 中高出 70.7%，在 MBJSP 中高出 88.4%。 (2) AceCoder 对于不同规模（即 6B 至 13B）和不同语言（即 Python、Java 和 JavaScript）的 LLM 均有效。 (3) 人类评估表明人类开发人员更喜欢 AceCoder 的程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AceCoder的新提示技术，通过利用现有代码和引导机制提升大语言模型的代码生成性能。
AI.motivation: 现有提示技术针对自然语言生成设计，在代码生成中面临需求理解与实现的双重挑战，导致准确性不足。
AI.method: AceCoder包含两个机制：1) 引导式代码生成要求模型先分析需求并输出中间结果（如测试用例）；2) 示例检索在提示中加入相似程序示例，提供算法/API参考。
AI.result: 在MBPP/MBJP/MBJSP基准测试中，AceCoder分别提升Pass@1指标56.4%/70.7%/88.4%；适用于6B-13B参数模型及Python/Java/JavaScript语言；人类评估显示开发者更偏好其生成结果。
AI.conclusion: AceCoder通过需求澄清与示例引导显著提升代码生成质量，且具有模型规模和语言普适性，获得开发者认可。

authors_text: Tianrui Guan,Aswath Muthuselvam,Montana Hoover,Xijun Wang,Jing Liang,Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Damon Conover,Dinesh Manocha
title: CrossLoc3D: Aerial-Ground Cross-Source 3D Place Recognition
title_zh: CrossLoc3D：空中-地面跨源 3D 地点识别
abstract: We present CrossLoc3D, a novel 3D place recognition method that solves a large-scale point matching problem in a cross-source setting. Cross-source point cloud data corresponds to point sets captured by depth sensors with different accuracies or from different distances and perspectives. We address the challenges in terms of developing 3D place recognition methods that account for the representation gap between points captured by different sources. Our method handles cross-source data by utilizing multi-grained features and selecting convolution kernel sizes that correspond to most prominent features. Inspired by the diffusion models, our method uses a novel iterative refinement process that gradually shifts the embedding spaces from different sources to a single canonical space for better metric learning. In addition, we present CS-Campus3D, the first 3D aerial-ground cross-source dataset consisting of point cloud data from both aerial and ground LiDAR scans. The point clouds in CS-Campus3D have representation gaps and other features like different views, point densities, and noise patterns. We show that our CrossLoc3D algorithm can achieve an improvement of 4.74% - 15.37% in terms of the top 1 average recall on our CS-Campus3D benchmark and achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art 3D place recognition method on the Oxford RobotCar. The code and CS-CAMPUS3D benchmark will be available at github.com/rayguan97/crossloc3d.
summary: We present CrossLoc3D, a novel 3D place recognition method that solves a large-scale point matching problem in a cross-source setting. Cross-source point cloud data corresponds to point sets captured by depth sensors with different accuracies or from different distances and perspectives. We address the challenges in terms of developing 3D place recognition methods that account for the representation gap between points captured by different sources. Our method handles cross-source data by utilizing multi-grained features and selecting convolution kernel sizes that correspond to most prominent features. Inspired by the diffusion models, our method uses a novel iterative refinement process that gradually shifts the embedding spaces from different sources to a single canonical space for better metric learning. In addition, we present CS-Campus3D, the first 3D aerial-ground cross-source dataset consisting of point cloud data from both aerial and ground LiDAR scans. The point clouds in CS-Campus3D have representation gaps and other features like different views, point densities, and noise patterns. We show that our CrossLoc3D algorithm can achieve an improvement of 4.74% - 15.37% in terms of the top 1 average recall on our CS-Campus3D benchmark and achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art 3D place recognition method on the Oxford RobotCar. The code and CS-CAMPUS3D benchmark will be available at github.com/rayguan97/crossloc3d.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CrossLoc3D，这是一种新颖的 3D 地点识别方法，可以解决跨源环境中的大规模点匹配问题。跨源点云数据对应于深度传感器以不同精度或从不同距离和视角捕获的点集。我们解决了开发 3D 地点识别方法方面的挑战，该方法可以解释不同来源捕获的点之间的表示差距。我们的方法通过利用多粒度特征并选择与最突出特征相对应的卷积核大小来处理跨源数据。受扩散模型的启发，我们的方法使用一种新颖的迭代细化过程，逐渐将嵌入空间从不同来源转移到单个规范空间，以实现更好的度量学习。此外，我们还推出了 CS-Campus3D，这是第一个 3D 空地跨源数据集，由空中和地面 LiDAR 扫描的点云数据组成。 CS-Campus3D 中的点云具有表示间隙和其他特征，例如不同的视图、点密度和噪声模式。我们表明，我们的 CrossLoc3D 算法在 CS-Campus3D 基准测试中的前 1 名平均召回率方面可以实现 4.74% - 15.37% 的改进，并且其性能可与 Oxford RobotCar 上最先进的 3D 地点识别方法相媲美。代码和 CS-CAMPUS3D 基准测试将在 github.com/rayguan97/crossloc3d 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CrossLoc3D的新型3D地点识别方法，用于解决跨源点云数据的大规模点匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 跨源点云数据由于来源不同，存在表示差异，这给3D地点识别带来了挑战。因此，需要一种能够处理这种差异的方法。
AI.method: 本文的方法利用多粒度特征和选择与最显著特征对应的卷积核大小，并受到扩散模型的启发，使用一种新的迭代优化过程，逐步将不同来源的嵌入空间转移到单一的规范空间，以实现更好的度量学习。
AI.result: CrossLoc3D算法在CS-Campus3D基准测试中，Top 1平均召回率提高了4.74% - 15.37%，并且在Oxford RobotCar数据集上的性能与最先进的3D地点识别方法相当。
AI.conclusion: CrossLoc3D是一种有效的跨源3D地点识别方法，能够处理来自不同来源的点云数据，并且在多个基准测试中表现良好。

search_text: CrossLoc3D: Aerial-Ground Cross-Source 3D Place Recognition CrossLoc3D：空中-地面跨源 3D 地点识别 We present CrossLoc3D, a novel 3D place recognition method that solves a large-scale point matching problem in a cross-source setting. Cross-source point cloud data corresponds to point sets captured by depth sensors with different accuracies or from different distances and perspectives. We address the challenges in terms of developing 3D place recognition methods that account for the representation gap between points captured by different sources. Our method handles cross-source data by utilizing multi-grained features and selecting convolution kernel sizes that correspond to most prominent features. Inspired by the diffusion models, our method uses a novel iterative refinement process that gradually shifts the embedding spaces from different sources to a single canonical space for better metric learning. In addition, we present CS-Campus3D, the first 3D aerial-ground cross-source dataset consisting of point cloud data from both aerial and ground LiDAR scans. The point clouds in CS-Campus3D have representation gaps and other features like different views, point densities, and noise patterns. We show that our CrossLoc3D algorithm can achieve an improvement of 4.74% - 15.37% in terms of the top 1 average recall on our CS-Campus3D benchmark and achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art 3D place recognition method on the Oxford RobotCar. The code and CS-CAMPUS3D benchmark will be available at github.com/rayguan97/crossloc3d. 我们提出了 CrossLoc3D，这是一种新颖的 3D 地点识别方法，可以解决跨源环境中的大规模点匹配问题。跨源点云数据对应于深度传感器以不同精度或从不同距离和视角捕获的点集。我们解决了开发 3D 地点识别方法方面的挑战，该方法可以解释不同来源捕获的点之间的表示差距。我们的方法通过利用多粒度特征并选择与最突出特征相对应的卷积核大小来处理跨源数据。受扩散模型的启发，我们的方法使用一种新颖的迭代细化过程，逐渐将嵌入空间从不同来源转移到单个规范空间，以实现更好的度量学习。此外，我们还推出了 CS-Campus3D，这是第一个 3D 空地跨源数据集，由空中和地面 LiDAR 扫描的点云数据组成。 CS-Campus3D 中的点云具有表示间隙和其他特征，例如不同的视图、点密度和噪声模式。我们表明，我们的 CrossLoc3D 算法在 CS-Campus3D 基准测试中的前 1 名平均召回率方面可以实现 4.74% - 15.37% 的改进，并且其性能可与 Oxford RobotCar 上最先进的 3D 地点识别方法相媲美。代码和 CS-CAMPUS3D 基准测试将在 github.com/rayguan97/crossloc3d 上提供。 本文提出了一种名为CrossLoc3D的新型3D地点识别方法，用于解决跨源点云数据的大规模点匹配问题。 Tianrui Guan,Aswath Muthuselvam,Montana Hoover,Xijun Wang,Jing Liang,Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Damon Conover,Dinesh Manocha cs.CV

authors_text: Marissa Connor,Bruno Olshausen,Christopher Rozell
title: Learning Internal Representations of 3D Transformations from 2D Projected Inputs
title_zh: 从 2D 投影输入学习 3D 变换的内部表示
abstract: When interacting in a three dimensional world, humans must estimate 3D structure from visual inputs projected down to two dimensional retinal images. It has been shown that humans use the persistence of object shape over motion-induced transformations as a cue to resolve depth ambiguity when solving this underconstrained problem. With the aim of understanding how biological vision systems may internally represent 3D transformations, we propose a computational model, based on a generative manifold model, which can be used to infer 3D structure from the motion of 2D points. Our model can also learn representations of the transformations with minimal supervision, providing a proof of concept for how humans may develop internal representations on a developmental or evolutionary time scale. Focused on rotational motion, we show how our model infers depth from moving 2D projected points, learns 3D rotational transformations from 2D training stimuli, and compares to human performance on psychophysical structure-from-motion experiments.
summary: When interacting in a three dimensional world, humans must estimate 3D structure from visual inputs projected down to two dimensional retinal images. It has been shown that humans use the persistence of object shape over motion-induced transformations as a cue to resolve depth ambiguity when solving this underconstrained problem. With the aim of understanding how biological vision systems may internally represent 3D transformations, we propose a computational model, based on a generative manifold model, which can be used to infer 3D structure from the motion of 2D points. Our model can also learn representations of the transformations with minimal supervision, providing a proof of concept for how humans may develop internal representations on a developmental or evolutionary time scale. Focused on rotational motion, we show how our model infers depth from moving 2D projected points, learns 3D rotational transformations from 2D training stimuli, and compares to human performance on psychophysical structure-from-motion experiments.
abstract_zh: 当在三维世界中交互时，人类必须根据投射到二维视网膜图像的视觉输入来估计 3D 结构。事实证明，在解决这个约束不足的问题时，人类使用物体形状相对于运动引起的变换的持久性作为解决深度模糊性的线索。为了了解生物视觉系统如何在内部表示 3D 变换，我们提出了一种基于生成流形模型的计算模型，该模型可用于从 2D 点的运动推断 3D 结构。我们的模型还可以在最少的监督下学习转换的表示，为人类如何在发展或进化时间尺度上开发内部表示提供概念证明。重点关注旋转运动，我们展示了我们的模型如何从移动 2D 投影点推断深度，从 2D 训练刺激学习 3D 旋转变换，并在心理物理结构运动实验中与人类表现进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成流形模型的计算模型，旨在从二维投影输入中推断三维结构并学习三维变换的内部表示。
AI.motivation: 人类通过运动诱导的形状持续性线索解决深度模糊问题，本文旨在理解生物视觉系统如何内部表示三维变换，并为发育或进化时间尺度下的内部表征形成提供计算证明。
AI.method: 采用生成流形模型，利用二维点的运动推断深度，从二维训练刺激中学习三维旋转变换，并与心理物理学结构从运动实验中的人类表现进行比较。
AI.result: 模型能够从运动的二维投影点推断深度，从二维刺激中学习三维旋转变换，并在结构从运动实验中表现出与人类相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该模型验证了生物系统可能通过发育或进化过程形成三维变换内部表征的可行性，为理解人类视觉机制提供了计算框架。

authors_text: Gengxin Liu,Qian Sun,Haibin Huang,Chongyang Ma,Yulan Guo,Li Yi,Hui Huang,Ruizhen Hu
title: Semi-Weakly Supervised Object Kinematic Motion Prediction
title_zh: 半弱监督物体运动预测
abstract: Given a 3D object, kinematic motion prediction aims to identify the mobile parts as well as the corresponding motion parameters. Due to the large variations in both topological structure and geometric details of 3D objects, this remains a challenging task and the lack of large scale labeled data also constrain the performance of deep learning based approaches. In this paper, we tackle the task of object kinematic motion prediction problem in a semi-weakly supervised manner. Our key observations are two-fold. First, although 3D dataset with fully annotated motion labels is limited, there are existing datasets and methods for object part semantic segmentation at large scale. Second, semantic part segmentation and mobile part segmentation is not always consistent but it is possible to detect the mobile parts from the underlying 3D structure. Towards this end, we propose a graph neural network to learn the map between hierarchical part-level segmentation and mobile parts parameters, which are further refined based on geometric alignment. This network can be first trained on PartNet-Mobility dataset with fully labeled mobility information and then applied on PartNet dataset with fine-grained and hierarchical part-level segmentation. The network predictions yield a large scale of 3D objects with pseudo labeled mobility information and can further be used for weakly-supervised learning with pre-existing segmentation. Our experiments show there are significant performance boosts with the augmented data for previous method designed for kinematic motion prediction on 3D partial scans.
summary: Given a 3D object, kinematic motion prediction aims to identify the mobile parts as well as the corresponding motion parameters. Due to the large variations in both topological structure and geometric details of 3D objects, this remains a challenging task and the lack of large scale labeled data also constrain the performance of deep learning based approaches. In this paper, we tackle the task of object kinematic motion prediction problem in a semi-weakly supervised manner. Our key observations are two-fold. First, although 3D dataset with fully annotated motion labels is limited, there are existing datasets and methods for object part semantic segmentation at large scale. Second, semantic part segmentation and mobile part segmentation is not always consistent but it is possible to detect the mobile parts from the underlying 3D structure. Towards this end, we propose a graph neural network to learn the map between hierarchical part-level segmentation and mobile parts parameters, which are further refined based on geometric alignment. This network can be first trained on PartNet-Mobility dataset with fully labeled mobility information and then applied on PartNet dataset with fine-grained and hierarchical part-level segmentation. The network predictions yield a large scale of 3D objects with pseudo labeled mobility information and can further be used for weakly-supervised learning with pre-existing segmentation. Our experiments show there are significant performance boosts with the augmented data for previous method designed for kinematic motion prediction on 3D partial scans.
abstract_zh: 给定 3D 对象，运动学运动预测旨在识别移动部件以及相应的运动参数。由于 3D 对象的拓扑结构和几何细节存在巨大差异，这仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，并且缺乏大规模标记数据也限制了基于深度学习的方法的性能。在本文中，我们以半弱监督的方式解决对象运动预测问题的任务。我们的主要观察有两个方面。首先，尽管具有完全注释的运动标签的3D数据集是有限的，但是存在用于大规模对象部分语义分割的现有数据集和方法。其次，语义部分分割和移动部分分割并不总是一致，但可以从底层 3D 结构中检测移动部分。为此，我们提出了一种图神经网络来学习分层零件级分割和移动零件参数之间的映射，并根据几何对齐进一步细化。该网络可以首先在具有完全标记的移动性信息的 PartNet-Mobility 数据集上进行训练，然后应用于具有细粒度和分层部件级分割的 PartNet 数据集。网络预测产生具有伪标记移动信息的大规模 3D 对象，并且可以进一步用于具有预先存在的分割的弱监督学习。我们的实验表明，针对 3D 部分扫描的运动预测而设计的先前方法的增强数据可以显着提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半弱监督方法，用于预测3D物体的运动学运动参数，通过结合部分语义分割和几何对齐来识别可移动部件。
AI.motivation: 3D物体运动预测因拓扑结构和几何细节的多样性而具有挑战性，且缺乏大规模标注数据限制了深度学习方法的性能。
AI.method: 设计图神经网络，学习层次化部分分割与运动参数之间的映射关系，并基于几何对齐优化预测结果，利用PartNet-Mobility数据集预训练后迁移到PartNet数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用增强数据后，相比原有方法在3D部分扫描的运动预测任务中性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过半弱监督策略有效利用现有分割数据，为运动预测提供了可行的解决方案，缓解了标注数据不足的问题。

search_text: Semi-Weakly Supervised Object Kinematic Motion Prediction 半弱监督物体运动预测 Given a 3D object, kinematic motion prediction aims to identify the mobile parts as well as the corresponding motion parameters. Due to the large variations in both topological structure and geometric details of 3D objects, this remains a challenging task and the lack of large scale labeled data also constrain the performance of deep learning based approaches. In this paper, we tackle the task of object kinematic motion prediction problem in a semi-weakly supervised manner. Our key observations are two-fold. First, although 3D dataset with fully annotated motion labels is limited, there are existing datasets and methods for object part semantic segmentation at large scale. Second, semantic part segmentation and mobile part segmentation is not always consistent but it is possible to detect the mobile parts from the underlying 3D structure. Towards this end, we propose a graph neural network to learn the map between hierarchical part-level segmentation and mobile parts parameters, which are further refined based on geometric alignment. This network can be first trained on PartNet-Mobility dataset with fully labeled mobility information and then applied on PartNet dataset with fine-grained and hierarchical part-level segmentation. The network predictions yield a large scale of 3D objects with pseudo labeled mobility information and can further be used for weakly-supervised learning with pre-existing segmentation. Our experiments show there are significant performance boosts with the augmented data for previous method designed for kinematic motion prediction on 3D partial scans. 给定 3D 对象，运动学运动预测旨在识别移动部件以及相应的运动参数。由于 3D 对象的拓扑结构和几何细节存在巨大差异，这仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，并且缺乏大规模标记数据也限制了基于深度学习的方法的性能。在本文中，我们以半弱监督的方式解决对象运动预测问题的任务。我们的主要观察有两个方面。首先，尽管具有完全注释的运动标签的3D数据集是有限的，但是存在用于大规模对象部分语义分割的现有数据集和方法。其次，语义部分分割和移动部分分割并不总是一致，但可以从底层 3D 结构中检测移动部分。为此，我们提出了一种图神经网络来学习分层零件级分割和移动零件参数之间的映射，并根据几何对齐进一步细化。该网络可以首先在具有完全标记的移动性信息的 PartNet-Mobility 数据集上进行训练，然后应用于具有细粒度和分层部件级分割的 PartNet 数据集。网络预测产生具有伪标记移动信息的大规模 3D 对象，并且可以进一步用于具有预先存在的分割的弱监督学习。我们的实验表明，针对 3D 部分扫描的运动预测而设计的先前方法的增强数据可以显着提高性能。 本文提出一种半弱监督方法，用于预测3D物体的运动学运动参数，通过结合部分语义分割和几何对齐来识别可移动部件。 Gengxin Liu,Qian Sun,Haibin Huang,Chongyang Ma,Yulan Guo,Li Yi,Hui Huang,Ruizhen Hu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR

authors_text: Shaohan Chen,Di Fan,Chuanhou Gao
title: Domain Knowledge integrated for Blast Furnace Classifier Design
title_zh: 集成高炉分级机设计的领域知识
abstract: Blast furnace modeling and control is one of the important problems in the industrial field, and the black-box model is an effective mean to describe the complex blast furnace system. In practice, there are often different learning targets, such as safety and energy saving in industrial applications, depending on the application. For this reason, this paper proposes a framework to design a domain knowledge integrated classification model that yields a classifier for industrial application. Our knowledge incorporated learning scheme allows the users to create a classifier that identifies "important samples" (whose misclassifications can lead to severe consequences) more correctly, while keeping the proper precision of classifying the remaining samples. The effectiveness of the proposed method has been verified by two real blast furnace datasets, which guides the operators to utilize their prior experience for controlling the blast furnace systems better.
summary: Blast furnace modeling and control is one of the important problems in the industrial field, and the black-box model is an effective mean to describe the complex blast furnace system. In practice, there are often different learning targets, such as safety and energy saving in industrial applications, depending on the application. For this reason, this paper proposes a framework to design a domain knowledge integrated classification model that yields a classifier for industrial application. Our knowledge incorporated learning scheme allows the users to create a classifier that identifies "important samples" (whose misclassifications can lead to severe consequences) more correctly, while keeping the proper precision of classifying the remaining samples. The effectiveness of the proposed method has been verified by two real blast furnace datasets, which guides the operators to utilize their prior experience for controlling the blast furnace systems better.
abstract_zh: 高炉建模与控制是工业领域的重要问题之一，黑箱模型是描述复杂高炉系统的有效手段。在实践中，根据应用的不同，往往有不同的学习目标，例如工业应用中的安全、节能等。为此，本文提出了一个框架来设计领域知识集成分类模型，产生工业应用的分类器。我们的知识融合学习方案允许用户创建一个分类器，该分类器可以更正确地识别“重要样本”（其错误分类可能导致严重后果），同时保持对剩余样本进行分类的适当精度。两个真实高炉数据集验证了该方法的有效性，指导操作人员利用先前的经验更好地控制高炉系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种集成领域知识的分类框架，用于设计高炉工业应用中的分类器，以提升关键样本的分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中高炉系统的分类目标存在差异（如安全与节能），传统方法难以兼顾关键样本的分类精度与整体性能。
AI.method: 通过整合领域知识构建分类模型，设计加权学习机制，使分类器更关注可能导致严重后果的‘重要样本’，同时保持其他样本的分类精度。
AI.result: 基于两个真实高炉数据集的实验验证了方法的有效性，证明其能提升关键样本分类正确率并指导操作员优化控制策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合领域知识与数据驱动模型，有效提升了高炉系统分类任务的实用性与安全性，为工业智能控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yongzhen Wang,Xuefeng Yan,Yanbiao Niu,Lina Gong,Yanwen Guo,Mingqiang Wei
title: Joint Depth Estimation and Mixture of Rain Removal From a Single Image
title_zh: 单幅图像除雨的联合深度估计和混合
abstract: Rainy weather significantly deteriorates the visibility of scene objects, particularly when images are captured through outdoor camera lenses or windshields. Through careful observation of numerous rainy photos, we have found that the images are generally affected by various rainwater artifacts such as raindrops, rain streaks, and rainy haze, which impact the image quality from both near and far distances, resulting in a complex and intertwined process of image degradation. However, current deraining techniques are limited in their ability to address only one or two types of rainwater, which poses a challenge in removing the mixture of rain (MOR). In this study, we propose an effective image deraining paradigm for Mixture of rain REmoval, called DEMore-Net, which takes full account of the MOR effect. Going beyond the existing deraining wisdom, DEMore-Net is a joint learning paradigm that integrates depth estimation and MOR removal tasks to achieve superior rain removal. The depth information can offer additional meaningful guidance information based on distance, thus better helping DEMore-Net remove different types of rainwater. Moreover, this study explores normalization approaches in image deraining tasks and introduces a new Hybrid Normalization Block (HNB) to enhance the deraining performance of DEMore-Net. Extensive experiments conducted on synthetic datasets and real-world MOR photos fully validate the superiority of the proposed DEMore-Net. Code is available at https://github.com/yz-wang/DEMore-Net.
summary: Rainy weather significantly deteriorates the visibility of scene objects, particularly when images are captured through outdoor camera lenses or windshields. Through careful observation of numerous rainy photos, we have found that the images are generally affected by various rainwater artifacts such as raindrops, rain streaks, and rainy haze, which impact the image quality from both near and far distances, resulting in a complex and intertwined process of image degradation. However, current deraining techniques are limited in their ability to address only one or two types of rainwater, which poses a challenge in removing the mixture of rain (MOR). In this study, we propose an effective image deraining paradigm for Mixture of rain REmoval, called DEMore-Net, which takes full account of the MOR effect. Going beyond the existing deraining wisdom, DEMore-Net is a joint learning paradigm that integrates depth estimation and MOR removal tasks to achieve superior rain removal. The depth information can offer additional meaningful guidance information based on distance, thus better helping DEMore-Net remove different types of rainwater. Moreover, this study explores normalization approaches in image deraining tasks and introduces a new Hybrid Normalization Block (HNB) to enhance the deraining performance of DEMore-Net. Extensive experiments conducted on synthetic datasets and real-world MOR photos fully validate the superiority of the proposed DEMore-Net. Code is available at https://github.com/yz-wang/DEMore-Net.
abstract_zh: 阴雨天气会显着降低场景物体的可见度，尤其是通过室外摄像机镜头或挡风玻璃捕获图像时。通过对大量雨天照片的仔细观察，我们发现图像普遍受到雨滴、雨痕、雨霾等各种雨水伪影的影响，从近处到远距离都会影响图像质量，导致图像退化的过程复杂且相互交织。然而，当前的除雨技术只能处理一种或两种类型的雨水，这对去除雨水混合物（MOR）提出了挑战。在本研究中，我们提出了一种有效的混合雨水去除图像除雨范式，称为DEMore-Net，它充分考虑了MOR效应。 DEMore-Net 超越了现有的除雨智慧，是一种联合学习范式，集成了深度估计和 MOR 除雨任务，以实现卓越的除雨效果。深度信息可以根据距离提供额外的有意义的指导信息，从而更好地帮助DEMore-Net去除不同类型的雨水。此外，本研究探索了图像去雨任务中的归一化方法，并引入了一种新的混合归一化块（HNB）来增强 DEMore-Net 的去雨性能。对合成数据集和真实 MOR 照片进行的大量实验充分验证了所提出的 DEMore-Net 的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/yz-wang/DEMore-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合深度估计与混合雨水去除的单图像处理方法DEMore-Net，解决复杂雨天图像退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去雨技术仅能处理单一或两种雨水类型，难以应对混合雨水（MOR）的复杂退化过程，且缺乏深度信息指导导致去雨效果受限。
AI.method: 设计DEMore-Net网络，联合深度估计与MOR去除任务，引入混合归一化块（HNB）增强特征提取能力，利用深度信息指导不同距离雨水的差异化去除。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实MOR图像上均优于现有方法，实验验证了DEMore-Net在混合雨水去除任务中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合学习深度估计与混合雨水去除，DEMore-Net有效解决了复杂雨天图像退化问题，为多类型雨水去除提供了新范式。

Moreover, this study explores normalization approaches in image deraining tasks and introduces a new Hybrid Normalization Block (HNB) to enhance the deraining performance of DEMore-Net. Code is available at https://github.com/yz-wang/DEMore-Net. 阴雨天气会显着降低场景物体的可见度，尤其是通过室外摄像机镜头或挡风玻璃捕获图像时。通过对大量雨天照片的仔细观察，我们发现图像普遍受到雨滴、雨痕、雨霾等各种雨水伪影的影响，从近处到远距离都会影响图像质量，导致图像退化的过程复杂且相互交织。然而，当前的除雨技术只能处理一种或两种类型的雨水，这对去除雨水混合物（MOR）提出了挑战。在本研究中，我们提出了一种有效的混合雨水去除图像除雨范式，称为DEMore-Net，它充分考虑了MOR效应。 DEMore-Net 超越了现有的除雨智慧，是一种联合学习范式，集成了深度估计和 MOR 除雨任务，以实现卓越的除雨效果。深度信息可以根据距离提供额外的有意义的指导信息，从而更好地帮助DEMore-Net去除不同类型的雨水。此外，本研究探索了图像去雨任务中的归一化方法，并引入了一种新的混合归一化块（HNB）来增强 DEMore-Net 的去雨性能。对合成数据集和真实 MOR 照片进行的大量实验充分验证了所提出的 DEMore-Net 的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/yz-wang/DEMore-Net 获取。 本文提出一种联合深度估计与混合雨水去除的单图像处理方法DEMore-Net，解决复杂雨天图像退化问题。 Yongzhen Wang,Xuefeng Yan,Yanbiao Niu,Lina Gong,Yanwen Guo,Mingqiang Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Tao Bai,Chen Chen,Lingjuan Lyu,Jun Zhao,Bihan Wen
title: Towards Adversarially Robust Continual Learning
title_zh: 迈向对抗性稳健的持续学习
abstract: Recent studies show that models trained by continual learning can achieve the comparable performances as the standard supervised learning and the learning flexibility of continual learning models enables their wide applications in the real world. Deep learning models, however, are shown to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Though there are many studies on the model robustness in the context of standard supervised learning, protecting continual learning from adversarial attacks has not yet been investigated. To fill in this research gap, we are the first to study adversarial robustness in continual learning and propose a novel method called \textbf{T}ask-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{B}oundary \textbf{A}ugmentation (TABA) to boost the robustness of continual learning models. With extensive experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, we show the efficacy of adversarial training and TABA in defending adversarial attacks.
summary: Recent studies show that models trained by continual learning can achieve the comparable performances as the standard supervised learning and the learning flexibility of continual learning models enables their wide applications in the real world. Deep learning models, however, are shown to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Though there are many studies on the model robustness in the context of standard supervised learning, protecting continual learning from adversarial attacks has not yet been investigated. To fill in this research gap, we are the first to study adversarial robustness in continual learning and propose a novel method called \textbf{T}ask-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{B}oundary \textbf{A}ugmentation (TABA) to boost the robustness of continual learning models. With extensive experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, we show the efficacy of adversarial training and TABA in defending adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，通过持续学习训练的模型可以达到与标准监督学习相当的性能，并且持续学习模型的学习灵活性使其能够在现实世界中广泛应用。然而，深度学习模型很容易受到对抗性攻击。尽管在标准监督学习的背景下有很多关于模型鲁棒性的研究，但保护持续学习免受对抗性攻击的研究尚未得到研究。为了填补这一研究空白，我们第一个研究持续学习中的对抗鲁棒性，并提出了一种名为 \textbf{T}ask-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{B}oundary \textbf{A}ugmentation (TABA) 的新方法，以提高持续学习模型的鲁棒性。通过对 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 的大量实验，我们展示了对抗性训练和 TABA 在防御对抗性攻击方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究持续学习模型在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，并提出了一种名为TABA的新方法以提升其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管持续学习模型在实际应用中表现出色，但其在对抗攻击下的脆弱性尚未被充分研究，现有工作主要集中在标准监督学习的鲁棒性上。
AI.method: 提出任务感知边界增强（TABA）方法，通过对抗训练增强持续学习模型的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上的实验表明，对抗训练与TABA能有效防御对抗攻击。
AI.conclusion: TABA是首个针对持续学习对抗鲁棒性的方法，实验验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Guohao Li,Hasan Abed Al Kader Hammoud,Hani Itani,Dmitrii Khizbullin,Bernard Ghanem
title: CAMEL: Communicative Agents for "Mind" Exploration of Large Language Model Society
title_zh: CAMEL：大语言模型社会“心灵”探索的交流代理
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS'2023, 77 pages, project website: https://www.camel-ai.org, github repository: https://github.com/camel-ai/camel
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS'2023, 77 pages, project website: https://www.camel-ai.org, github repository: https://github.com/camel-ai/camel
abstract: The rapid advancement of chat-based language models has led to remarkable progress in complex task-solving. However, their success heavily relies on human input to guide the conversation, which can be challenging and time-consuming. This paper explores the potential of building scalable techniques to facilitate autonomous cooperation among communicative agents, and provides insight into their "cognitive" processes. To address the challenges of achieving autonomous cooperation, we propose a novel communicative agent framework named role-playing. Our approach involves using inception prompting to guide chat agents toward task completion while maintaining consistency with human intentions. We showcase how role-playing can be used to generate conversational data for studying the behaviors and capabilities of a society of agents, providing a valuable resource for investigating conversational language models. In particular, we conduct comprehensive studies on instruction-following cooperation in multi-agent settings. Our contributions include introducing a novel communicative agent framework, offering a scalable approach for studying the cooperative behaviors and capabilities of multi-agent systems, and open-sourcing our library to support research on communicative agents and beyond: https://github.com/camel-ai/camel.
summary: The rapid advancement of chat-based language models has led to remarkable progress in complex task-solving. However, their success heavily relies on human input to guide the conversation, which can be challenging and time-consuming. This paper explores the potential of building scalable techniques to facilitate autonomous cooperation among communicative agents, and provides insight into their "cognitive" processes. To address the challenges of achieving autonomous cooperation, we propose a novel communicative agent framework named role-playing. Our approach involves using inception prompting to guide chat agents toward task completion while maintaining consistency with human intentions. We showcase how role-playing can be used to generate conversational data for studying the behaviors and capabilities of a society of agents, providing a valuable resource for investigating conversational language models. In particular, we conduct comprehensive studies on instruction-following cooperation in multi-agent settings. Our contributions include introducing a novel communicative agent framework, offering a scalable approach for studying the cooperative behaviors and capabilities of multi-agent systems, and open-sourcing our library to support research on communicative agents and beyond: https://github.com/camel-ai/camel.
abstract_zh: 基于聊天的语言模型的快速发展导致复杂任务解决方面取得了显着进展。然而，他们的成功在很大程度上依赖于人类输入来指导对话，这可能具有挑战性且耗时。本文探讨了构建可扩展技术以促进通信主体之间自主合作的潜力，并深入了解其“认知”过程。为了解决实现自主合作的挑战，我们提出了一种名为角色扮演的新型交流代理框架。我们的方法涉及使用初始提示来引导聊天代理完成任务，同时保持与人类意图的一致性。我们展示了如何使用角色扮演来生成对话数据，以研究代理社会的行为和能力，为研究对话语言模型提供宝贵的资源。特别是，我们对多智能体环境中的指令遵循合作进行了全面的研究。我们的贡献包括引入一种新颖的通信代理框架，提供一种可扩展的方法来研究多代理系统的合作行为和功能，以及开源我们的库以支持通信代理及其他方面的研究：https://github.com/camel-ai/camel。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CAMEL的通信代理框架，通过角色扮演和初始提示技术，实现大型语言模型社会中代理的自主协作与认知过程研究。
AI.motivation: 现有聊天语言模型依赖人类输入指导对话，存在效率低下的问题，需探索自主协作机制以提升多代理系统的任务解决能力。
AI.method: 设计角色扮演框架，结合初始提示技术引导代理完成任务，生成对话数据用于分析多代理社会的行为与能力。
AI.result: 构建了可扩展的多代理协作研究方法，生成了对话数据集，开源了CAMEL库以支持相关研究。
AI.conclusion: CAMEL框架为探究多代理系统的合作机制提供了有效工具，推动了通信代理领域的发展。

authors_text: Mohammad Khodadad,Morteza Rezanejad,Ali Shiraee Kasmaee,Kaleem Siddiqi,Dirk Walther,Hamidreza Mahyar
title: MLGCN: An Ultra Efficient Graph Convolution Neural Model For 3D Point Cloud Analysis
title_zh: MLGCN：用于 3D 点云分析的超高效图卷积神经模型
abstract: The analysis of 3D point clouds has diverse applications in robotics, vision and graphics. Processing them presents specific challenges since they are naturally sparse, can vary in spatial resolution and are typically unordered. Graph-based networks to abstract features have emerged as a promising alternative to convolutional neural networks for their analysis, but these can be computationally heavy as well as memory inefficient. To address these limitations we introduce a novel Multi-level Graph Convolution Neural (MLGCN) model, which uses Graph Neural Networks (GNN) blocks to extract features from 3D point clouds at specific locality levels. Our approach employs precomputed graph KNNs, where each KNN graph is shared between GCN blocks inside a GNN block, making it both efficient and effective compared to present models. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on point cloud based object classification and part segmentation tasks on benchmark datasets, showing that it produces comparable results to those of state-of-the-art models while requiring up to a thousand times fewer floating-point operations (FLOPs) and having significantly reduced storage requirements. Thus, our MLGCN model could be particular relevant to point cloud based 3D shape analysis in industrial applications when computing resources are scarce.
summary: The analysis of 3D point clouds has diverse applications in robotics, vision and graphics. Processing them presents specific challenges since they are naturally sparse, can vary in spatial resolution and are typically unordered. Graph-based networks to abstract features have emerged as a promising alternative to convolutional neural networks for their analysis, but these can be computationally heavy as well as memory inefficient. To address these limitations we introduce a novel Multi-level Graph Convolution Neural (MLGCN) model, which uses Graph Neural Networks (GNN) blocks to extract features from 3D point clouds at specific locality levels. Our approach employs precomputed graph KNNs, where each KNN graph is shared between GCN blocks inside a GNN block, making it both efficient and effective compared to present models. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on point cloud based object classification and part segmentation tasks on benchmark datasets, showing that it produces comparable results to those of state-of-the-art models while requiring up to a thousand times fewer floating-point operations (FLOPs) and having significantly reduced storage requirements. Thus, our MLGCN model could be particular relevant to point cloud based 3D shape analysis in industrial applications when computing resources are scarce.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云分析在机器人、视觉和图形领域有多种应用。处理它们提出了特定的挑战，因为它们本质上是稀疏的，空间分辨率可能会变化并且通常是无序的。用于抽象特征的基于图的网络已成为卷积神经网络分析的有前途的替代方案，但这些网络可能计算量大且内存效率低。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的多级图卷积神经 (MLGCN) 模型，该模型使用图神经网络 (GNN) 块从特定局部级别的 3D 点云中提取特征。我们的方法采用预先计算的图 KNN，其中每个 KNN 图在 GNN 块内的 GCN 块之间共享，这使得它与现有模型相比既高效又有效。我们在基准数据集上展示了我们的方法在基于点云的对象分类和零件分割任务上的有效性，表明它产生的结果与最先进的模型相当，同时需要的浮点运算（FLOP）减少了一千倍，并且显着降低了存储要求。因此，当计算资源稀缺时，我们的 MLGCN 模型可能与工业应用中基于点云的 3D 形状分析特别相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MLGCN的高效图卷积神经网络模型，用于解决3D点云分析中的计算和内存效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络在处理3D点云时存在计算量大、内存消耗高的问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多级图卷积模块，通过共享预计算的KNN图结构，在保持特征提取能力的同时显著降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实现与现有最优模型相当的分类和分割精度，计算量减少达1000倍，存储需求显著降低。
AI.conclusion: MLGCN为资源受限场景下的工业级3D点云分析提供了高效可行的深度学习方法。

search_text: MLGCN: An Ultra Efficient Graph Convolution Neural Model For 3D Point Cloud Analysis MLGCN：用于 3D 点云分析的超高效图卷积神经模型 The analysis of 3D point clouds has diverse applications in robotics, vision and graphics. Processing them presents specific challenges since they are naturally sparse, can vary in spatial resolution and are typically unordered. Graph-based networks to abstract features have emerged as a promising alternative to convolutional neural networks for their analysis, but these can be computationally heavy as well as memory inefficient. To address these limitations we introduce a novel Multi-level Graph Convolution Neural (MLGCN) model, which uses Graph Neural Networks (GNN) blocks to extract features from 3D point clouds at specific locality levels. Our approach employs precomputed graph KNNs, where each KNN graph is shared between GCN blocks inside a GNN block, making it both efficient and effective compared to present models. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on point cloud based object classification and part segmentation tasks on benchmark datasets, showing that it produces comparable results to those of state-of-the-art models while requiring up to a thousand times fewer floating-point operations (FLOPs) and having significantly reduced storage requirements. Thus, our MLGCN model could be particular relevant to point cloud based 3D shape analysis in industrial applications when computing resources are scarce. 3D 点云分析在机器人、视觉和图形领域有多种应用。处理它们提出了特定的挑战，因为它们本质上是稀疏的，空间分辨率可能会变化并且通常是无序的。用于抽象特征的基于图的网络已成为卷积神经网络分析的有前途的替代方案，但这些网络可能计算量大且内存效率低。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的多级图卷积神经 (MLGCN) 模型，该模型使用图神经网络 (GNN) 块从特定局部级别的 3D 点云中提取特征。我们的方法采用预先计算的图 KNN，其中每个 KNN 图在 GNN 块内的 GCN 块之间共享，这使得它与现有模型相比既高效又有效。我们在基准数据集上展示了我们的方法在基于点云的对象分类和零件分割任务上的有效性，表明它产生的结果与最先进的模型相当，同时需要的浮点运算（FLOP）减少了一千倍，并且显着降低了存储要求。因此，当计算资源稀缺时，我们的 MLGCN 模型可能与工业应用中基于点云的 3D 形状分析特别相关。 本文提出一种名为MLGCN的高效图卷积神经网络模型，用于解决3D点云分析中的计算和内存效率问题。 Mohammad Khodadad,Morteza Rezanejad,Ali Shiraee Kasmaee,Kaleem Siddiqi,Dirk Walther,Hamidreza Mahyar cs.CV

authors_text: Lecheng Zheng,Dawei Zhou,Hanghang Tong,Jiejun Xu,Yada Zhu,Jingrui He
title: FairGen: Towards Fair Graph Generation
title_zh: FairGen：迈向公平图生成
abstract: There have been tremendous efforts over the past decades dedicated to the generation of realistic graphs in a variety of domains, ranging from social networks to computer networks, from gene regulatory networks to online transaction networks. Despite the remarkable success, the vast majority of these works are unsupervised in nature and are typically trained to minimize the expected graph reconstruction loss, which would result in the representation disparity issue in the generated graphs, i.e., the protected groups (often minorities) contribute less to the objective and thus suffer from systematically higher errors. In this paper, we aim to tailor graph generation to downstream mining tasks by leveraging label information and user-preferred parity constraints. In particular, we start from the investigation of representation disparity in the context of graph generative models. To mitigate the disparity, we propose a fairness-aware graph generative model named FairGen. Our model jointly trains a label-informed graph generation module and a fair representation learning module by progressively learning the behaviors of the protected and unprotected groups, from the `easy' concepts to the `hard' ones. In addition, we propose a generic context sampling strategy for graph generative models, which is proven to be capable of fairly capturing the contextual information of each group with a high probability. Experimental results on seven real-world data sets, including web-based graphs, demonstrate that FairGen (1) obtains performance on par with state-of-the-art graph generative models across nine network properties, (2) mitigates the representation disparity issues in the generated graphs, and (3) substantially boosts the model performance by up to 17% in downstream tasks via data augmentation.
summary: There have been tremendous efforts over the past decades dedicated to the generation of realistic graphs in a variety of domains, ranging from social networks to computer networks, from gene regulatory networks to online transaction networks. Despite the remarkable success, the vast majority of these works are unsupervised in nature and are typically trained to minimize the expected graph reconstruction loss, which would result in the representation disparity issue in the generated graphs, i.e., the protected groups (often minorities) contribute less to the objective and thus suffer from systematically higher errors. In this paper, we aim to tailor graph generation to downstream mining tasks by leveraging label information and user-preferred parity constraints. In particular, we start from the investigation of representation disparity in the context of graph generative models. To mitigate the disparity, we propose a fairness-aware graph generative model named FairGen. Our model jointly trains a label-informed graph generation module and a fair representation learning module by progressively learning the behaviors of the protected and unprotected groups, from the `easy' concepts to the `hard' ones. In addition, we propose a generic context sampling strategy for graph generative models, which is proven to be capable of fairly capturing the contextual information of each group with a high probability. Experimental results on seven real-world data sets, including web-based graphs, demonstrate that FairGen (1) obtains performance on par with state-of-the-art graph generative models across nine network properties, (2) mitigates the representation disparity issues in the generated graphs, and (3) substantially boosts the model performance by up to 17% in downstream tasks via data augmentation.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，人们付出了巨大的努力致力于在各个领域生成真实的图形，从社交网络到计算机网络，从基因调控网络到在线交易网络。尽管取得了显着的成功，但这些工作中的绝大多数本质上是无监督的，并且通常经过训练以最小化预期的图重建损失，这将导致生成的图中的表示差异问题，即受保护群体（通常是少数群体）对目标的贡献较小，因此遭受系统性较高的错误。在本文中，我们的目标是通过利用标签信息和用户首选的奇偶校验约束来定制图形生成以适应下游挖掘任务。特别是，我们从图生成模型背景下的表示差异的研究开始。为了减轻这种差异，我们提出了一种名为 FairGen 的公平感知图生成模型。我们的模型通过逐步学习受保护和不受保护群体的行为（从“简单”概念到“困难”概念），联合训练标签通知图生成模块和公平表示学习模块。此外，我们提出了一种用于图生成模型的通用上下文采样策略，该策略被证明能够以高概率公平地捕获每个组的上下文信息。对七个真实世界数据集（包括基于网络的图形）的实验结果表明，FairGen (1) 在九个网络属性中获得了与最先进的图形生成模型相当的性能，(2) 减轻了生成图形中的表示差异问题，以及 (3) 通过数据增强，在下游任务中将模型性能大幅提高了高达 17%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FairGen的公平图生成模型，旨在解决生成图中受保护群体表示差异的问题，并提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图生成模型多为无监督方法，导致少数群体在生成图中表示不均衡，系统性误差较高，需利用标签信息和公平性约束改进生成过程。
AI.method: 设计联合训练框架，包含标签感知的图生成模块和公平表示学习模块，通过渐进式学习保护组与非保护组行为，并提出通用上下文采样策略以均衡捕捉群体信息。
AI.result: 在七个真实数据集上，FairGen在九项网络属性上性能与SOTA模型相当，显著缓解表示差异问题，并通过数据增强使下游任务性能提升最高17%。
AI.conclusion: FairGen通过引入公平性约束和上下文采样策略，有效解决图生成中的表示差异问题，同时提升模型实用性和公平性。

authors_text: Chinmay Rane,Kanishka Tyagi,Sanjeev Malalur,Yash Shinge,Michael Manry
title: Optimal Input Gain: All You Need to Supercharge a Feed-Forward Neural Network
title_zh: 最佳输入增益：增强前馈神经网络所需的一切
abstract: Linear transformation of the inputs alters the training performance of feed-forward networks that are otherwise equivalent. However, most linear transforms are viewed as a pre-processing operation separate from the actual training. Starting from equivalent networks, it is shown that pre-processing inputs using linear transformation are equivalent to multiplying the negative gradient matrix with an autocorrelation matrix per training iteration. Second order method is proposed to find the autocorrelation matrix that maximizes learning in a given iteration. When the autocorrelation matrix is diagonal, the method optimizes input gains. This optimal input gain (OIG) approach is used to improve two first-order two-stage training algorithms, namely back-propagation (BP) and hidden weight optimization (HWO), which alternately update the input weights and solve linear equations for output weights. Results show that the proposed OIG approach greatly enhances the performance of the first-order algorithms, often allowing them to rival the popular Levenberg-Marquardt approach with far less computation. It is shown that HWO is equivalent to BP with Whitening transformation applied to the inputs. HWO effectively combines Whitening transformation with learning. Thus, OIG improved HWO could be a significant building block to more complex deep learning architectures.
summary: Linear transformation of the inputs alters the training performance of feed-forward networks that are otherwise equivalent. However, most linear transforms are viewed as a pre-processing operation separate from the actual training. Starting from equivalent networks, it is shown that pre-processing inputs using linear transformation are equivalent to multiplying the negative gradient matrix with an autocorrelation matrix per training iteration. Second order method is proposed to find the autocorrelation matrix that maximizes learning in a given iteration. When the autocorrelation matrix is diagonal, the method optimizes input gains. This optimal input gain (OIG) approach is used to improve two first-order two-stage training algorithms, namely back-propagation (BP) and hidden weight optimization (HWO), which alternately update the input weights and solve linear equations for output weights. Results show that the proposed OIG approach greatly enhances the performance of the first-order algorithms, often allowing them to rival the popular Levenberg-Marquardt approach with far less computation. It is shown that HWO is equivalent to BP with Whitening transformation applied to the inputs. HWO effectively combines Whitening transformation with learning. Thus, OIG improved HWO could be a significant building block to more complex deep learning architectures.
abstract_zh: 输入的线性变换改变了前馈网络的训练性能，而这些网络在其他方面是等效的。然而，大多数线性变换被视为与实际训练分离的预处理操作。从等效网络开始，表明使用线性变换预处理输入相当于每次训练迭代将负梯度矩阵与自相关矩阵相乘。 Second order method is proposed to find the autocorrelation matrix that maximizes learning in a given iteration.当自相关矩阵是对角矩阵时，该方法优化输入增益。这种最优输入增益（OIG）方法用于改进两种一阶两阶段训练算法，即反向传播（BP）和隐藏权重优化（HWO），它们交替更新输入权重并求解输出权重的线性方程。结果表明，所提出的 OIG 方法极大地增强了一阶算法的性能，通常使它们能够以更少的计算量与流行的 Levenberg-Marquardt 方法相媲美。 It is shown that HWO is equivalent to BP with Whitening transformation applied to the inputs. HWO effectively combines Whitening transformation with learning. Thus, OIG improved HWO could be a significant building block to more complex deep learning architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过优化输入增益（OIG）来提升前馈神经网络的训练性能，将线性变换整合到训练过程中而非仅作为预处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 线性变换虽能影响网络训练效果，但传统方法将其视为独立于训练的预处理步骤，未能充分利用其潜力以提升第一阶训练算法性能。
AI.method: 提出基于二阶方法的自相关矩阵优化策略，当矩阵为对角线形式时等价于优化输入增益（OIG），并将其应用于反向传播（BP）和隐藏层权重优化（HWO）算法中。
AI.result: OIG显著提升第一阶算法性能，使其在计算量远低于Levenberg-Marquardt算法的情况下达到相近效果；HWO被证明等价于带白化变换的BP，且OIG改进的HWO可作为深度学习架构的重要模块。
AI.conclusion: OIG方法有效整合输入优化与训练过程，为改进传统算法和构建复杂深度学习模型提供了新思路。

ai_content.method: 提出基于二阶方法的自相关矩阵优化策略，当矩阵为对角线形式时等价于优化输入增益（OIG），并将其应用于反向传播（BP）和隐藏层权重优化（HWO）算法中。
ai_content.result: OIG显著提升第一阶算法性能，使其在计算量远低于Levenberg-Marquardt算法的情况下达到相近效果；HWO被证明等价于带白化变换的BP，且OIG改进的HWO可作为深度学习架构的重要模块。
ai_content.conclusion: OIG方法有效整合输入优化与训练过程，为改进传统算法和构建复杂深度学习模型提供了新思路。

search_text: Optimal Input Gain: All You Need to Supercharge a Feed-Forward Neural Network 最佳输入增益：增强前馈神经网络所需的一切 Linear transformation of the inputs alters the training performance of feed-forward networks that are otherwise equivalent. However, most linear transforms are viewed as a pre-processing operation separate from the actual training. Starting from equivalent networks, it is shown that pre-processing inputs using linear transformation are equivalent to multiplying the negative gradient matrix with an autocorrelation matrix per training iteration. Second order method is proposed to find the autocorrelation matrix that maximizes learning in a given iteration. When the autocorrelation matrix is diagonal, the method optimizes input gains. This optimal input gain (OIG) approach is used to improve two first-order two-stage training algorithms, namely back-propagation (BP) and hidden weight optimization (HWO), which alternately update the input weights and solve linear equations for output weights. Results show that the proposed OIG approach greatly enhances the performance of the first-order algorithms, often allowing them to rival the popular Levenberg-Marquardt approach with far less computation. It is shown that HWO is equivalent to BP with Whitening transformation applied to the inputs. HWO effectively combines Whitening transformation with learning. Thus, OIG improved HWO could be a significant building block to more complex deep learning architectures. 输入的线性变换改变了前馈网络的训练性能，而这些网络在其他方面是等效的。然而，大多数线性变换被视为与实际训练分离的预处理操作。从等效网络开始，表明使用线性变换预处理输入相当于每次训练迭代将负梯度矩阵与自相关矩阵相乘。 Second order method is proposed to find the autocorrelation matrix that maximizes learning in a given iteration.当自相关矩阵是对角矩阵时，该方法优化输入增益。这种最优输入增益（OIG）方法用于改进两种一阶两阶段训练算法，即反向传播（BP）和隐藏权重优化（HWO），它们交替更新输入权重并求解输出权重的线性方程。结果表明，所提出的 OIG 方法极大地增强了一阶算法的性能，通常使它们能够以更少的计算量与流行的 Levenberg-Marquardt 方法相媲美。 It is shown that HWO is equivalent to BP with Whitening transformation applied to the inputs. HWO effectively combines Whitening transformation with learning. Thus, OIG improved HWO could be a significant building block to more complex deep learning architectures. 本文提出通过优化输入增益（OIG）来提升前馈神经网络的训练性能，将线性变换整合到训练过程中而非仅作为预处理步骤。 Chinmay Rane,Kanishka Tyagi,Sanjeev Malalur,Yash Shinge,Michael Manry cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hasin Rehana,Nur Bengisu Çam,Mert Basmaci,Jie Zheng,Christianah Jemiyo,Yongqun He,Arzucan Özgür,Junguk Hur
title: Evaluation of GPT and BERT-based models on identifying protein-protein interactions in biomedical text
title_zh: 基于 GPT 和 BERT 的模型在识别生物医学文本中蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用方面的评估
abstract: Detecting protein-protein interactions (PPIs) is crucial for understanding genetic mechanisms, disease pathogenesis, and drug design. However, with the fast-paced growth of biomedical literature, there is a growing need for automated and accurate extraction of PPIs to facilitate scientific knowledge discovery. Pre-trained language models, such as generative pre-trained transformers (GPT) and bidirectional encoder representations from transformers (BERT), have shown promising results in natural language processing (NLP) tasks. We evaluated the performance of PPI identification of multiple GPT and BERT models using three manually curated gold-standard corpora: Learning Language in Logic (LLL) with 164 PPIs in 77 sentences, Human Protein Reference Database with 163 PPIs in 145 sentences, and Interaction Extraction Performance Assessment with 335 PPIs in 486 sentences. BERT-based models achieved the best overall performance, with BioBERT achieving the highest recall (91.95%) and F1-score (86.84%) and PubMedBERT achieving the highest precision (85.25%). Interestingly, despite not being explicitly trained for biomedical texts, GPT-4 achieved commendable performance, comparable to the top-performing BERT models. It achieved a precision of 88.37%, a recall of 85.14%, and an F1-score of 86.49% on the LLL dataset. These results suggest that GPT models can effectively detect PPIs from text data, offering promising avenues for application in biomedical literature mining. Further research could explore how these models might be fine-tuned for even more specialized tasks within the biomedical domain.
summary: Detecting protein-protein interactions (PPIs) is crucial for understanding genetic mechanisms, disease pathogenesis, and drug design. However, with the fast-paced growth of biomedical literature, there is a growing need for automated and accurate extraction of PPIs to facilitate scientific knowledge discovery. Pre-trained language models, such as generative pre-trained transformers (GPT) and bidirectional encoder representations from transformers (BERT), have shown promising results in natural language processing (NLP) tasks. We evaluated the performance of PPI identification of multiple GPT and BERT models using three manually curated gold-standard corpora: Learning Language in Logic (LLL) with 164 PPIs in 77 sentences, Human Protein Reference Database with 163 PPIs in 145 sentences, and Interaction Extraction Performance Assessment with 335 PPIs in 486 sentences. BERT-based models achieved the best overall performance, with BioBERT achieving the highest recall (91.95%) and F1-score (86.84%) and PubMedBERT achieving the highest precision (85.25%). Interestingly, despite not being explicitly trained for biomedical texts, GPT-4 achieved commendable performance, comparable to the top-performing BERT models. It achieved a precision of 88.37%, a recall of 85.14%, and an F1-score of 86.49% on the LLL dataset. These results suggest that GPT models can effectively detect PPIs from text data, offering promising avenues for application in biomedical literature mining. Further research could explore how these models might be fine-tuned for even more specialized tasks within the biomedical domain.
abstract_zh: 检测蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用 (PPI) 对于理解遗传机制、疾病发病机制和药物设计至关重要。然而，随着生物医学文献的快速增长，对自动、准确提取质子泵抑制剂以促进科学知识发现的需求日益增长。预训练语言模型，例如生成式预训练 Transformer (GPT) 和 Transformer 的双向编码器表示 (BERT)，已在自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务中显示出有希望的结果。我们使用三个手动策划的黄金标准语料库评估了多个 GPT 和 BERT 模型的 PPI 识别性能：逻辑学习语言 (LLL)，包含 77 个句子中的 164 个 PPI，人类蛋白质参考数据库，包含 145 个句子中的 163 个 PPI，以及交互提取性能评估，包含 486 个句子中的 335 个 PPI。基于 BERT 的模型取得了最佳的整体性能，其中 BioBERT 实现了最高的召回率（91.95%）和 F1 分数（86.84%），PubMedBERT 实现了最高的精度（85.25%）。有趣的是，尽管没有接受过针对生物医学文本的明确训练，GPT-4 仍取得了值得称赞的性能，可与表现最好的 BERT 模型相媲美。它在 LLL 数据集上实现了 88.37% 的准确率、85.14% 的召回率和 86.49% 的 F1 分数。这些结果表明，GPT 模型可以有效地从文本数据中检测 PPI，为生物医学文献挖掘的应用提供了有前景的途径。进一步的研究可以探索如何针对生物医学领域内更专业的任务对这些模型进行微调。

AI.tldr: 评估GPT和BERT模型在生物医学文本中识别蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（PPI）的效果
AI.motivation: 生物医学文献快速增长需自动化准确提取PPI以促进科学发现，而预训练语言模型在NLP任务中表现良好
AI.method: 使用三个手动标注的黄金标准语料库（LLL、Human Protein Reference Database、Interaction Extraction Performance Assessment），评估多种GPT和BERT模型在PPI识别上的表现
AI.result: BERT模型整体表现最佳，BioBERT召回率和F1分数最高（91.95%和86.84%），PubMedBERT精确率最高（85.25%）；GPT-4在LLL数据集上表现与顶级BERT模型相当（精确率88.37%）
AI.conclusion: GPT模型能有效识别PPI，为生物医学文献挖掘提供新途径，未来需探索模型微调以适应更专业的任务

authors_text: Timothy Redgrave,Colton Crum
title: Generating Adversarial Samples in Mini-Batches May Be Detrimental To Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 小批量生成对抗样本可能不利于对抗鲁棒性
abstract: Neural networks have been proven to be both highly effective within computer vision, and highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Consequently, as the use of neural networks increases due to their unrivaled performance, so too does the threat posed by adversarial attacks. In this work, we build towards addressing the challenge of adversarial robustness by exploring the relationship between the mini-batch size used during adversarial sample generation and the strength of the adversarial samples produced. We demonstrate that an increase in mini-batch size results in a decrease in the efficacy of the samples produced, and we draw connections between these observations and the phenomenon of vanishing gradients. Next, we formulate loss functions such that adversarial sample strength is not degraded by mini-batch size. Our findings highlight a potential risk for underestimating the true (practical) strength of adversarial attacks, and a risk of overestimating a model's robustness. We share our codes to let others replicate our experiments and to facilitate further exploration of the connections between batch size and adversarial sample strength.
summary: Neural networks have been proven to be both highly effective within computer vision, and highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Consequently, as the use of neural networks increases due to their unrivaled performance, so too does the threat posed by adversarial attacks. In this work, we build towards addressing the challenge of adversarial robustness by exploring the relationship between the mini-batch size used during adversarial sample generation and the strength of the adversarial samples produced. We demonstrate that an increase in mini-batch size results in a decrease in the efficacy of the samples produced, and we draw connections between these observations and the phenomenon of vanishing gradients. Next, we formulate loss functions such that adversarial sample strength is not degraded by mini-batch size. Our findings highlight a potential risk for underestimating the true (practical) strength of adversarial attacks, and a risk of overestimating a model's robustness. We share our codes to let others replicate our experiments and to facilitate further exploration of the connections between batch size and adversarial sample strength.
abstract_zh: 神经网络已被证明在计算机视觉领域非常有效，并且极易受到对抗性攻击。因此，随着神经网络因其无与伦比的性能而得到广泛使用，对抗性攻击带来的威胁也随之增加。在这项工作中，我们通过探索对抗性样本生成过程中使用的小批量大小与生成的对抗性样本的强度之间的关系来解决对抗性鲁棒性的挑战。我们证明，小批量大小的增加会导致所产生样本的功效降低，并且我们在这些观察结果与梯度消失现象之间建立了联系。接下来，我们制定损失函数，使得对抗性样本强度不会因小批量大小而降低。我们的研究结果强调了低估对抗性攻击的真实（实际）强度的潜在风险，以及高估模型稳健性的风险。我们分享我们的代码，让其他人复制我们的实验，并促进进一步探索批量大小和对抗样本强度之间的联系。

AI.tldr: 研究对抗样本生成中Mini-Batch大小对对抗鲁棒性的影响，并提出改进方法
AI.motivation: 神经网络在计算机视觉中广泛应用，但对抗攻击威胁增加，需提升对抗鲁棒性
AI.method: 分析Mini-Batch大小与对抗样本强度关系，结合梯度消失现象，设计新的损失函数以缓解问题
AI.result: 增大Mini-Batch降低对抗样本强度，新损失函数有效缓解该问题
AI.conclusion: 增大Mini-Batch可能低估攻击强度并高估模型鲁棒性，需注意此风险，共享代码促进后续研究

tldr: 研究对抗样本生成中Mini-Batch大小对对抗鲁棒性的影响，并提出改进方法
motivation: 神经网络在计算机视觉中广泛应用，但对抗攻击威胁增加，需提升对抗鲁棒性

search_text: Generating Adversarial Samples in Mini-Batches May Be Detrimental To Adversarial Robustness 小批量生成对抗样本可能不利于对抗鲁棒性 Neural networks have been proven to be both highly effective within computer vision, and highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Consequently, as the use of neural networks increases due to their unrivaled performance, so too does the threat posed by adversarial attacks. In this work, we build towards addressing the challenge of adversarial robustness by exploring the relationship between the mini-batch size used during adversarial sample generation and the strength of the adversarial samples produced. We demonstrate that an increase in mini-batch size results in a decrease in the efficacy of the samples produced, and we draw connections between these observations and the phenomenon of vanishing gradients. Next, we formulate loss functions such that adversarial sample strength is not degraded by mini-batch size. Our findings highlight a potential risk for underestimating the true (practical) strength of adversarial attacks, and a risk of overestimating a model's robustness. We share our codes to let others replicate our experiments and to facilitate further exploration of the connections between batch size and adversarial sample strength. 神经网络已被证明在计算机视觉领域非常有效，并且极易受到对抗性攻击。因此，随着神经网络因其无与伦比的性能而得到广泛使用，对抗性攻击带来的威胁也随之增加。在这项工作中，我们通过探索对抗性样本生成过程中使用的小批量大小与生成的对抗性样本的强度之间的关系来解决对抗性鲁棒性的挑战。我们证明，小批量大小的增加会导致所产生样本的功效降低，并且我们在这些观察结果与梯度消失现象之间建立了联系。接下来，我们制定损失函数，使得对抗性样本强度不会因小批量大小而降低。我们的研究结果强调了低估对抗性攻击的真实（实际）强度的潜在风险，以及高估模型稳健性的风险。我们分享我们的代码，让其他人复制我们的实验，并促进进一步探索批量大小和对抗样本强度之间的联系。 研究对抗样本生成中Mini-Batch大小对对抗鲁棒性的影响，并提出改进方法 Timothy Redgrave,Colton Crum cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

title: Why is the winner the best?
title_zh: 为什么获胜者是最好的？
abstract: International benchmarking competitions have become fundamental for the comparative performance assessment of image analysis methods. However, little attention has been given to investigating what can be learnt from these competitions. Do they really generate scientific progress? What are common and successful participation strategies? What makes a solution superior to a competing method? To address this gap in the literature, we performed a multi-center study with all 80 competitions that were conducted in the scope of IEEE ISBI 2021 and MICCAI 2021. Statistical analyses performed based on comprehensive descriptions of the submitted algorithms linked to their rank as well as the underlying participation strategies revealed common characteristics of winning solutions. These typically include the use of multi-task learning (63%) and/or multi-stage pipelines (61%), and a focus on augmentation (100%), image preprocessing (97%), data curation (79%), and postprocessing (66%). The "typical" lead of a winning team is a computer scientist with a doctoral degree, five years of experience in biomedical image analysis, and four years of experience in deep learning. Two core general development strategies stood out for highly-ranked teams: the reflection of the metrics in the method design and the focus on analyzing and handling failure cases. According to the organizers, 43% of the winning algorithms exceeded the state of the art but only 11% completely solved the respective domain problem. The insights of our study could help researchers (1) improve algorithm development strategies when approaching new problems, and (2) focus on open research questions revealed by this work.

These typically include the use of multi-task learning (63%) and/or multi-stage pipelines (61%), and a focus on augmentation (100%), image preprocessing (97%), data curation (79%), and postprocessing (66%). The "typical" lead of a winning team is a computer scientist with a doctoral degree, five years of experience in biomedical image analysis, and four years of experience in deep learning. Two core general development strategies stood out for highly-ranked teams: the reflection of the metrics in the method design and the focus on analyzing and handling failure cases. abstract_zh: 国际基准竞赛已成为图像分析方法比较性能评估的基础。 However, little attention has been given to investigating what can be learnt from these competitions.它们真的能带来科学进步吗？什么是常见且成功的参与策略？ What makes a solution superior to a competing method?为了弥补文献中的这一空白，我们对 IEEE ISBI 2021 和 MICCAI 2021 范围内进行的所有 80 场竞赛进行了一项多中心研究。基于对与排名相关的提交算法的全面描述以及底层参与策略进行的统计分析揭示了获胜解决方案的共同特征。这些通常包括使用多任务学习 (63%) 和/或多级管道 (61%)，以及关注增强 (100%)、图像预处理 (97%)、数据管理 (79%) 和后处理 (66%)。获胜团队的“典型”领导者是一位拥有博士学位、五年生物医学图像分析经验和四年深度学习经验的计算机科学家。对于排名靠前的团队来说，有两个核心的总体发展策略很突出：方法设计中指标的反映以及注重分析和处理失败案例。据组织者称，43% 的获胜算法超出了最先进的水平，但只有 11% 完全解决了各自的领域问题。我们研究的见解可以帮助研究人员（1）在解决新问题时改进算法开发策略，（2）专注于这项工作揭示的开放研究问题。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析IEEE ISBI 2021和MICCAI 2021的80项国际竞赛，探讨图像分析方法竞赛中获胜方案的共性特征及成功策略。
AI.motivation: 国际基准竞赛在评估图像分析方法性能中至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对竞赛中可学习经验的系统分析，例如其是否推动科学进步、成功策略及解决方案优势来源。
AI.method: 采用多中心研究方法，对80项竞赛的提交算法进行统计分析，结合算法描述、排名及参赛策略，提炼获胜方案的共性特征。
AI.result: 获胜方案普遍采用多任务学习（63%）和多阶段流水线（61%），注重数据增强（100%）、预处理（97%）、数据筛选（79%）和后处理（66%）。顶尖团队通常由拥有5年生物医学图像分析经验和4年深度学习经验的计算机科学家组成，核心策略包括指标驱动设计和失败案例分析。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可帮助研究人员优化算法开发策略，并聚焦于竞赛揭示的开放性研究问题，但仅11%的获奖算法完全解决了领域问题，表明竞赛成果与实际应用间仍存在差距。

authors_text: Fengjiao Zou,Jennifer Ogle,Weimin Jin,Patrick Gerard,Daniel Petty,Andrew Robb
title: Pedestrian Behavior Interacting with Autonomous Vehicles during Unmarked Midblock Multilane Crossings: Role of Infrastructure Design, AV Operations and Signaling
title_zh: 在无标记的中路多车道交叉口期间与自动驾驶车辆互动的行人行为：基础设施设计、自动驾驶操作和信号的作用
abstract: One of the main challenges autonomous vehicles (AVs) will face is interacting with pedestrians, especially at unmarked midblock locations where the right-of-way is unspecified. This study investigates pedestrian crossing behavior given different roadway centerline features (i.e., undivided, two-way left-turn lane (TWLTL), and median) and various AV operational schemes portrayed to pedestrians through on-vehicle signals (i.e., no signal, yellow negotiating indication, and yellow/blue negotiating/no-yield indications). This study employs virtual reality to simulate an urban unmarked midblock environment where pedestrians interact with AVs. Results demonstrate that both roadway centerline design features and AV operations and signaling significantly impact pedestrian unmarked midblock crossing behavior, including the waiting time at the curb, waiting time in the middle of the road, and the total crossing time. But only the roadway centerline features significantly impact the walking time. Participants in the undivided scene spent a longer time waiting at the curb and walking on the road than in the median and TWLTL scenes, but they spent a shorter time waiting in the middle. Compared to the AV without a signal, the design of yellow signal significantly reduced pedestrian waiting time at the curb and in the middle. But yellow/blue significantly increased the pedestrian waiting time. Interaction effects between roadway centerline design features and AV operations and signaling are significant only for waiting time in the middle. For middle waiting time, yellow/blue signals had the most impact on the median road type and the least on the undivided road. Demographics, past behaviors, and walking exposure are also explored. Older individuals tend to wait longer, and pedestrian past crossing behaviors and past walking exposures do not significantly impact pedestrian walking behavior.
