This study investigates pedestrian crossing behavior given different roadway centerline features (i.e., undivided, two-way left-turn lane (TWLTL), and median) and various AV operational schemes portrayed to pedestrians through on-vehicle signals (i.e., no signal, yellow negotiating indication, and yellow/blue negotiating/no-yield indications). This study employs virtual reality to simulate an urban unmarked midblock environment where pedestrians interact with AVs. Results demonstrate that both roadway centerline design features and AV operations and signaling significantly impact pedestrian unmarked midblock crossing behavior, including the waiting time at the curb, waiting time in the middle of the road, and the total crossing time. But only the roadway centerline features significantly impact the walking time. Participants in the undivided scene spent a longer time waiting at the curb and walking on the road than in the median and TWLTL scenes, but they spent a shorter time waiting in the middle. Compared to the AV without a signal, the design of yellow signal significantly reduced pedestrian waiting time at the curb and in the middle. But yellow/blue significantly increased the pedestrian waiting time. Interaction effects between roadway centerline design features and AV operations and signaling are significant only for waiting time in the middle. For middle waiting time, yellow/blue signals had the most impact on the median road type and the least on the undivided road. Demographics, past behaviors, and walking exposure are also explored. Older individuals tend to wait longer, and pedestrian past crossing behaviors and past walking exposures do not significantly impact pedestrian walking behavior.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 将面临的主要挑战之一是与行人互动，尤其是在未指定通行权的无标记中段位置。本研究调查了不同道路中心线特征（即不分隔的双向左转车道 (TWLTL) 和中间带）下的行人过路行为，以及通过车载信号（即无信号、黄色协商指示和黄色/蓝色协商/不让行指示）向行人描绘的各种自动驾驶操作方案。 This study employs virtual reality to simulate an urban unmarked midblock environment where pedestrians interact with AVs.结果表明，道路中心线设计特征以及自动驾驶操作和信号系统都会显着影响行人无标记的中路过马路行为，包括路边等待时间、道路中间等待时间以及总过马路时间。 But only the roadway centerline features significantly impact the walking time.与中线和 TWLTL 场景相比，未分隔场景中的参与者在路边等待和在路上行走的时间更长，但他们在中间等待的时间更短。 Compared to the AV without a signal, the design of yellow signal significantly reduced pedestrian waiting time at the curb and in the middle. But yellow/blue significantly increased the pedestrian waiting time.道路中心线设计特征与自动驾驶操作和信号之间的相互作用影响仅对中间的等待时间很重要。 For middle waiting time, yellow/blue signals had the most impact on the median road type and the least on the undivided road. Demographics, past behaviors, and walking exposure are also explored.老年人往往等待时间更长，行人过去的过路行为和过去的步行暴露不会显着影响行人的步行行为。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究自动驾驶车辆（AV）与行人于无标记的多车道中段交叉口的互动行为，探讨道路基础设施设计、AV操作及信号对行人过街行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在无明确路权的无标记中段交叉口与行人互动存在挑战，需明确道路设计与AV信号如何影响行人行为以提升安全性。
AI.method: 通过虚拟现实技术模拟城市无标记中段交叉环境，测试不同道路中心线设计（无分隔、双向左转车道、中央隔离带）及AV信号方案（无信号、黄色协商信号、黄蓝协商/不礼让信号）对行人行为的影响。
AI.result: 道路设计与AV信号显著影响行人等待时间和过街时间。无分隔道路使行人候车时间更长，但中间等待时间更短；黄色信号减少等待时间，黄蓝信号则增加。道路设计与信号的交互作用仅对中间等待时间显著，且黄蓝信号对中央隔离带影响最大。
AI.conclusion: 道路基础设施设计与AV信号策略对行人行为有显著影响，优化设计可提升无标记交叉口的行人安全与效率，未来需结合年龄等因素进一步细化方案。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文研究自动驾驶车辆（AV）与行人于无标记的多车道中段交叉口的互动行为，探讨道路基础设施设计、AV操作及信号对行人过街行为的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在无明确路权的无标记中段交叉口与行人互动存在挑战，需明确道路设计与AV信号如何影响行人行为以提升安全性。
ai_content.method: 通过虚拟现实技术模拟城市无标记中段交叉环境，测试不同道路中心线设计（无分隔、双向左转车道、中央隔离带）及AV信号方案（无信号、黄色协商信号、黄蓝协商/不礼让信号）对行人行为的影响。
ai_content.result: 道路设计与AV信号显著影响行人等待时间和过街时间。无分隔道路使行人候车时间更长，但中间等待时间更短；黄色信号减少等待时间，黄蓝信号则增加。道路设计与信号的交互作用仅对中间等待时间显著，且黄蓝信号对中央隔离带影响最大。
ai_content.conclusion: 道路基础设施设计与AV信号策略对行人行为有显著影响，优化设计可提升无标记交叉口的行人安全与效率，未来需结合年龄等因素进一步细化方案。

search_text: Pedestrian Behavior Interacting with Autonomous Vehicles during Unmarked Midblock Multilane Crossings: Role of Infrastructure Design, AV Operations and Signaling 在无标记的中路多车道交叉口期间与自动驾驶车辆互动的行人行为：基础设施设计、自动驾驶操作和信号的作用 One of the main challenges autonomous vehicles (AVs) will face is interacting with pedestrians, especially at unmarked midblock locations where the right-of-way is unspecified. This study investigates pedestrian crossing behavior given different roadway centerline features (i.e., undivided, two-way left-turn lane (TWLTL), and median) and various AV operational schemes portrayed to pedestrians through on-vehicle signals (i.e., no signal, yellow negotiating indication, and yellow/blue negotiating/no-yield indications). This study employs virtual reality to simulate an urban unmarked midblock environment where pedestrians interact with AVs. Results demonstrate that both roadway centerline design features and AV operations and signaling significantly impact pedestrian unmarked midblock crossing behavior, including the waiting time at the curb, waiting time in the middle of the road, and the total crossing time. But only the roadway centerline features significantly impact the walking time. Participants in the undivided scene spent a longer time waiting at the curb and walking on the road than in the median and TWLTL scenes, but they spent a shorter time waiting in the middle. Compared to the AV without a signal, the design of yellow signal significantly reduced pedestrian waiting time at the curb and in the middle. But yellow/blue significantly increased the pedestrian waiting time. Interaction effects between roadway centerline design features and AV operations and signaling are significant only for waiting time in the middle. For middle waiting time, yellow/blue signals had the most impact on the median road type and the least on the undivided road. Demographics, past behaviors, and walking exposure are also explored. Older individuals tend to wait longer, and pedestrian past crossing behaviors and past walking exposures do not significantly impact pedestrian walking behavior. 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 将面临的主要挑战之一是与行人互动，尤其是在未指定通行权的无标记中段位置。本研究调查了不同道路中心线特征（即不分隔的双向左转车道 (TWLTL) 和中间带）下的行人过路行为，以及通过车载信号（即无信号、黄色协商指示和黄色/蓝色协商/不让行指示）向行人描绘的各种自动驾驶操作方案。 This study employs virtual reality to simulate an urban unmarked midblock environment where pedestrians interact with AVs.结果表明，道路中心线设计特征以及自动驾驶操作和信号系统都会显着影响行人无标记的中路过马路行为，包括路边等待时间、道路中间等待时间以及总过马路时间。 But only the roadway centerline features significantly impact the walking time.与中线和 TWLTL 场景相比，未分隔场景中的参与者在路边等待和在路上行走的时间更长，但他们在中间等待的时间更短。 Compared to the AV without a signal, the design of yellow signal significantly reduced pedestrian waiting time at the curb and in the middle. But yellow/blue significantly increased the pedestrian waiting time.道路中心线设计特征与自动驾驶操作和信号之间的相互作用影响仅对中间的等待时间很重要。 For middle waiting time, yellow/blue signals had the most impact on the median road type and the least on the undivided road. Demographics, past behaviors, and walking exposure are also explored.老年人往往等待时间更长，行人过去的过路行为和过去的步行暴露不会显着影响行人的步行行为。 该论文研究自动驾驶车辆（AV）与行人于无标记的多车道中段交叉口的互动行为，探讨道路基础设施设计、AV操作及信号对行人过街行为的影响。 Fengjiao Zou,Jennifer Ogle,Weimin Jin,Patrick Gerard,Daniel Petty,Andrew Robb cs.RO

authors_text: Haoyu Wu,Alexandros Graikos,Dimitris Samaras
title: S-VolSDF: Sparse Multi-View Stereo Regularization of Neural Implicit Surfaces
title_zh: S-VolSDF：神经隐式曲面的稀疏多视图立体正则化
abstract: Neural rendering of implicit surfaces performs well in 3D vision applications. However, it requires dense input views as supervision. When only sparse input images are available, output quality drops significantly due to the shape-radiance ambiguity problem. We note that this ambiguity can be constrained when a 3D point is visible in multiple views, as is the case in multi-view stereo (MVS). We thus propose to regularize neural rendering optimization with an MVS solution. The use of an MVS probability volume and a generalized cross entropy loss leads to a noise-tolerant optimization process. In addition, neural rendering provides global consistency constraints that guide the MVS depth hypothesis sampling and thus improves MVS performance. Given only three sparse input views, experiments show that our method not only outperforms generic neural rendering models by a large margin but also significantly increases the reconstruction quality of MVS models. Project page: https://hao-yu-wu.github.io/s-volsdf/.
summary: Neural rendering of implicit surfaces performs well in 3D vision applications. However, it requires dense input views as supervision. When only sparse input images are available, output quality drops significantly due to the shape-radiance ambiguity problem. We note that this ambiguity can be constrained when a 3D point is visible in multiple views, as is the case in multi-view stereo (MVS). We thus propose to regularize neural rendering optimization with an MVS solution. The use of an MVS probability volume and a generalized cross entropy loss leads to a noise-tolerant optimization process. In addition, neural rendering provides global consistency constraints that guide the MVS depth hypothesis sampling and thus improves MVS performance. Given only three sparse input views, experiments show that our method not only outperforms generic neural rendering models by a large margin but also significantly increases the reconstruction quality of MVS models. Project page: https://hao-yu-wu.github.io/s-volsdf/.
abstract_zh: 隐式表面的神经渲染在 3D 视觉应用中表现良好。然而，它需要密集的输入视图作为监督。当只有稀疏输入图像可用时，由于形状辐射模糊问题，输出质量显着下降。我们注意到，当 3D 点在多个视图中可见时，这种模糊性可能会受到限制，就像多视图立体 (MVS) 中的情况一样。因此，我们建议使用 MVS 解决方案来规范神经渲染优化。 MVS 概率卷和广义交叉熵损失的使用导致了噪声容忍优化过程。此外，神经渲染提供了全局一致性约束来指导 MVS 深度假设采样，从而提高 MVS 性能。仅给定三个稀疏输入视图，实验表明我们的方法不仅大幅优于通用神经渲染模型，而且还显着提高了 MVS 模型的重建质量。项目页面：https://hao-yu-wu.github.io/s-volsdf/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出S-VolSDF方法，通过多视图立体视觉（MVS）正则化改进神经隐式曲面的神经渲染，解决稀疏输入视图下的形状-辐射模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 神经隐式曲面渲染在密集视图下表现良好，但稀疏输入会导致重建质量下降。多视图立体视觉（MVS）中多视角可见性可约束形状-辐射模糊，从而激发了结合MVS与神经渲染的动机。
AI.method: 融合MVS概率体积与广义交叉熵损失，构建噪声鲁棒优化过程；利用神经渲染的全局一致性约束指导MVS深度假设采样，形成双向优化框架。
AI.result: 仅使用三张稀疏输入视图时，该方法在神经渲染模型和MVS模型的重建质量上均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化神经渲染与MVS，S-VolSDF有效解决了稀疏视图下的重建难题，为隐式曲面建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shih-Hong Huang,Chieh-Yang Huang,Ya-Fang Lin,Ting-Hao 'Kenneth' Huang
title: What Types of Questions Require Conversation to Answer? A Case Study of AskReddit Questions
title_zh: 哪些类型的问题需要通过对话来回答？ AskReddit 问题的案例研究
comment: To appear in CHI 2023 Late-Breaking Work
comments: To appear in CHI 2023 Late-Breaking Work
abstract: The proliferation of automated conversational systems such as chatbots, spoken-dialogue systems, and smart speakers, has significantly impacted modern digital life. However, these systems are primarily designed to provide answers to well-defined questions rather than to support users in exploring complex, ill-defined questions. In this paper, we aim to push the boundaries of conversational systems by examining the types of nebulous, open-ended questions that can best be answered through conversation. We first sampled 500 questions from one million open-ended requests posted on AskReddit, and then recruited online crowd workers to answer eight inquiries about these questions. We also performed open coding to categorize the questions into 27 different domains. We found that the issues people believe require conversation to resolve satisfactorily are highly social and personal. Our work provides insights into how future research could be geared to align with users' needs.
summary: The proliferation of automated conversational systems such as chatbots, spoken-dialogue systems, and smart speakers, has significantly impacted modern digital life. However, these systems are primarily designed to provide answers to well-defined questions rather than to support users in exploring complex, ill-defined questions. In this paper, we aim to push the boundaries of conversational systems by examining the types of nebulous, open-ended questions that can best be answered through conversation. We first sampled 500 questions from one million open-ended requests posted on AskReddit, and then recruited online crowd workers to answer eight inquiries about these questions. We also performed open coding to categorize the questions into 27 different domains. We found that the issues people believe require conversation to resolve satisfactorily are highly social and personal. Our work provides insights into how future research could be geared to align with users' needs.
abstract_zh: 聊天机器人、口语对话系统和智能扬声器等自动对话系统的激增极大地影响了现代数字生活。然而，这些系统的主要目的是为定义明确的问题提供答案，而不是支持用户探索复杂的、定义不明确的问题。在本文中，我们的目标是通过检查最能通过对话来回答的模糊、开放式问题的类型，从而突破对话系统的界限。我们首先从 AskReddit 上发布的 100 万个开放式请求中抽取了 500 个问题，然后招募了在线众包工作人员来回答有关这些问题的 8 个询问。我们还进行了开放编码，将问题分为 27 个不同的领域。我们发现，人们认为需要通过对话才能令人满意地解决的问题具有高度的社会性和个人性。我们的工作为未来的研究如何适应用户的需求提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析AskReddit上的开放性问题，探讨哪些类型的问题需要通过对话来解答。
AI.motivation: 当前对话系统主要处理明确问题，但用户对复杂、模糊问题的需求未被满足，需探索适合对话解决的问题类型。
AI.method: 从AskReddit的100万条开放请求中抽取500个问题，招募在线工作者回答八个问题，并通过开放编码将其归类为27个领域。
AI.result: 研究发现，用户认为需要通过对话解决的问题高度涉及社会和个人层面的议题。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究应聚焦用户需求，设计更契合复杂问题解决的对话系统。

search_text: What Types of Questions Require Conversation to Answer? A Case Study of AskReddit Questions 哪些类型的问题需要通过对话来回答？ AskReddit 问题的案例研究 The proliferation of automated conversational systems such as chatbots, spoken-dialogue systems, and smart speakers, has significantly impacted modern digital life. However, these systems are primarily designed to provide answers to well-defined questions rather than to support users in exploring complex, ill-defined questions. In this paper, we aim to push the boundaries of conversational systems by examining the types of nebulous, open-ended questions that can best be answered through conversation. We first sampled 500 questions from one million open-ended requests posted on AskReddit, and then recruited online crowd workers to answer eight inquiries about these questions. We also performed open coding to categorize the questions into 27 different domains. We found that the issues people believe require conversation to resolve satisfactorily are highly social and personal. Our work provides insights into how future research could be geared to align with users' needs. 聊天机器人、口语对话系统和智能扬声器等自动对话系统的激增极大地影响了现代数字生活。然而，这些系统的主要目的是为定义明确的问题提供答案，而不是支持用户探索复杂的、定义不明确的问题。在本文中，我们的目标是通过检查最能通过对话来回答的模糊、开放式问题的类型，从而突破对话系统的界限。我们首先从 AskReddit 上发布的 100 万个开放式请求中抽取了 500 个问题，然后招募了在线众包工作人员来回答有关这些问题的 8 个询问。我们还进行了开放编码，将问题分为 27 个不同的领域。我们发现，人们认为需要通过对话才能令人满意地解决的问题具有高度的社会性和个人性。我们的工作为未来的研究如何适应用户的需求提供了见解。 本文通过分析AskReddit上的开放性问题，探讨哪些类型的问题需要通过对话来解答。 Shih-Hong Huang,Chieh-Yang Huang,Ya-Fang Lin,Ting-Hao 'Kenneth' Huang cs.HC,cs.CL

authors_text: Michael Correll
title: Teru Teru Bōzu: Defensive Raincloud Plots
title_zh: Teru Teru Bōzu：防御性雨云图
abstract: Univariate visualizations like histograms, rug plots, or box plots provide concise visual summaries of distributions. However, each individual visualization may fail to robustly distinguish important features of a distribution, or provide sufficient information for all of the relevant tasks involved in summarizing univariate data. One solution is to juxtapose or superimpose multiple univariate visualizations in the same chart, as in Allen et al.'s "raincloud plots." In this paper I examine the design space of raincloud plots, and, through a series of simulation studies, explore designs where the component visualizations mutually "defend" against situations where important distribution features are missed or trivial features are given undue prominence. I suggest a class of "defensive" raincloud plot designs that provide good mutual coverage for surfacing distributional features of interest.
summary: Univariate visualizations like histograms, rug plots, or box plots provide concise visual summaries of distributions. However, each individual visualization may fail to robustly distinguish important features of a distribution, or provide sufficient information for all of the relevant tasks involved in summarizing univariate data. One solution is to juxtapose or superimpose multiple univariate visualizations in the same chart, as in Allen et al.'s "raincloud plots." In this paper I examine the design space of raincloud plots, and, through a series of simulation studies, explore designs where the component visualizations mutually "defend" against situations where important distribution features are missed or trivial features are given undue prominence. I suggest a class of "defensive" raincloud plot designs that provide good mutual coverage for surfacing distributional features of interest.
abstract_zh: 单变量可视化（例如直方图、地毯图或箱线图）提供了分布的简明视觉摘要。然而，每个单独的可视化可能无法稳健地区分分布的重要特征，或者无法为汇总单变量数据所涉及的所有相关任务提供足够的信息。一种解决方案是在同一个图表中并置或叠加多个单变量可视化，如 Allen 等人的“雨云图”。在本文中，我研究了雨云图的设计空间，并通过一系列模拟研究，探索了组件可视化相互“防御”的设计，以防止错过重要分布特征或过分突出琐碎特征的情况。我建议一类“防御性”雨云图设计，为呈现感兴趣的分布特征提供良好的相互覆盖。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种名为'防御性雨云图'的可视化设计，旨在通过组合多种单变量图表更全面地展示数据分布特征。
AI.motivation: 传统单变量可视化方法（如直方图、箱线图）可能遗漏关键分布特征或过度强调次要特征，导致数据总结不充分。
AI.method: 通过模拟研究探索雨云图组件间的协同效应，提出防御性设计框架以增强分布特征的可视化覆盖度。
AI.result: 验证了防御性雨云图能有效平衡不同分布特征的可视化表现，提升对重要统计特征的识别能力。
AI.conclusion: 防御性雨云图设计为单变量数据分析提供了更稳健的可视化方案，可作为传统方法的有效补充。

authors_text: Weina Jin,Xiaoxiao Li,Ghassan Hamarneh
title: Why is plausibility surprisingly problematic as an XAI criterion?
title_zh: 为什么作为 XAI 标准的合理性会出现令人惊讶的问题？
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) is motivated by the problem of making AI predictions understandable, transparent, and responsible, as AI becomes increasingly impactful in society and high-stakes domains. The evaluation and optimization criteria of XAI are gatekeepers for XAI algorithms to achieve their expected goals and should withstand rigorous inspection. To improve the scientific rigor of XAI, we conduct a critical examination of a common XAI criterion: plausibility. Plausibility assesses how convincing the AI explanation is to humans, and is usually quantified by metrics of feature localization or feature correlation. Our examination shows that plausibility is invalid to measure explainability, and human explanations are not the ground truth for XAI, because doing so ignores the necessary assumptions underpinning an explanation. Our examination further reveals the consequences of using plausibility as an XAI criterion, including increasing misleading explanations that manipulate users, deteriorating users' trust in the AI system, undermining human autonomy, being unable to achieve complementary human-AI task performance, and abandoning other possible approaches of enhancing understandability. Due to the invalidity of measurements and the unethical issues, this position paper argues that the community should stop using plausibility as a criterion for the evaluation and optimization of XAI algorithms. We also delineate new research approaches to improve XAI in trustworthiness, understandability, and utility to users, including complementary human-AI task performance.
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) is motivated by the problem of making AI predictions understandable, transparent, and responsible, as AI becomes increasingly impactful in society and high-stakes domains. The evaluation and optimization criteria of XAI are gatekeepers for XAI algorithms to achieve their expected goals and should withstand rigorous inspection. To improve the scientific rigor of XAI, we conduct a critical examination of a common XAI criterion: plausibility. Plausibility assesses how convincing the AI explanation is to humans, and is usually quantified by metrics of feature localization or feature correlation. Our examination shows that plausibility is invalid to measure explainability, and human explanations are not the ground truth for XAI, because doing so ignores the necessary assumptions underpinning an explanation. Our examination further reveals the consequences of using plausibility as an XAI criterion, including increasing misleading explanations that manipulate users, deteriorating users' trust in the AI system, undermining human autonomy, being unable to achieve complementary human-AI task performance, and abandoning other possible approaches of enhancing understandability. Due to the invalidity of measurements and the unethical issues, this position paper argues that the community should stop using plausibility as a criterion for the evaluation and optimization of XAI algorithms. We also delineate new research approaches to improve XAI in trustworthiness, understandability, and utility to users, including complementary human-AI task performance.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能在社会和高风险领域的影响力越来越大，可解释人工智能（XAI）的动机是使人工智能预测变得可理解、透明和负责任。 XAI的评估和优化标准是XAI算法实现预期目标的把关人，应该经受严格的检验。为了提高 XAI 的科学严谨性，我们对常见的 XAI 标准进行了严格的检查：合理性。合理性评估人工智能解释对人类的说服力，通常通过特征定位或特征相关性的指标来量化。我们的研究表明，合理性对于衡量可解释性是无效的，并且人类的解释并不是 XAI 的基本事实，因为这样做忽略了支撑解释的必要假设。我们的研究进一步揭示了使用合理性作为 XAI 标准的后果，包括增加操纵用户的误导性解释、恶化用户对 AI 系统的信任、破坏人类自主性、无法实现人类与 AI 任务性能的互补，以及放弃其他可能的增强可理解性的方法。由于测量的无效性和不道德问题，该立场文件认为社区应该停止使用合理性作为评估和优化 XAI 算法的标准。我们还描述了新的研究方法，以提高 XAI 的可信度、可理解性和对用户的实用性，包括补充人类与人工智能的任务性能。

AI.tldr: 本文批判性地审视了可解释人工智能（XAI）中常用的'可信度'标准，指出其作为评估准则的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在高风险领域的应用增加，XAI的评估标准需经严格检验，而现有'可信度'标准可能无法准确衡量解释性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与后果推导，检验'可信度'标准的测量有效性及伦理影响。
AI.result: '可信度'无法准确评估解释性，可能导致误导性解释、降低用户信任、损害人类自主性等负面后果。
AI.conclusion: 建议停止将'可信度'作为XAI评估标准，并提出提升XAI可信度、可理解性及实用性的新研究方向。

authors_text: Finlay G. C. Hudson,William A. P. Smith
title: If At First You Don't Succeed: Test Time Re-ranking for Zero-shot, Cross-domain Retrieval
title_zh: 如果一开始没有成功：零样本跨域检索的测试时间重新排序
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel method for zero-shot, cross-domain image retrieval. Our key contribution is a test-time Iterative Cluster-free Re-ranking process that leverages gallery-gallery feature information to establish semantic links between query and gallery images. This enables the retrieval of relevant images even when they do not exhibit similar visual features but share underlying semantic concepts. This can be combined with any pre-existing cross-domain feature extraction backbone to improve retrieval performance. However, when combined with a carefully chosen Vision Transformer backbone and combination of zero-shot retrieval losses, our approach yields state-of-the-art results on the Sketchy, TU-Berlin and QuickDraw sketch-based retrieval benchmarks. We show that our re-ranking also improves performance with other backbones and outperforms other re-ranking methods applied with our backbone. Importantly, unlike many previous methods, none of the components in our approach are engineered specifically towards the sketch-based image retrieval task - it can be generally applied to any cross-domain, zero-shot retrieval task. We therefore also present new results on zero-shot cartoon-to-photo and art-to-product retrieval using the Office-Home dataset. Project page: finlay-hudson.github.io/icfrr, code available at: github.com/finlay-hudson/ICFRR
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel method for zero-shot, cross-domain image retrieval. Our key contribution is a test-time Iterative Cluster-free Re-ranking process that leverages gallery-gallery feature information to establish semantic links between query and gallery images. This enables the retrieval of relevant images even when they do not exhibit similar visual features but share underlying semantic concepts. This can be combined with any pre-existing cross-domain feature extraction backbone to improve retrieval performance. However, when combined with a carefully chosen Vision Transformer backbone and combination of zero-shot retrieval losses, our approach yields state-of-the-art results on the Sketchy, TU-Berlin and QuickDraw sketch-based retrieval benchmarks. We show that our re-ranking also improves performance with other backbones and outperforms other re-ranking methods applied with our backbone. Importantly, unlike many previous methods, none of the components in our approach are engineered specifically towards the sketch-based image retrieval task - it can be generally applied to any cross-domain, zero-shot retrieval task. We therefore also present new results on zero-shot cartoon-to-photo and art-to-product retrieval using the Office-Home dataset. Project page: finlay-hudson.github.io/icfrr, code available at: github.com/finlay-hudson/ICFRR
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种零样本跨域图像检索的新方法。我们的主要贡献是测试时迭代无集群重排序过程，该过程利用图库-图库特征信息在查询和图库图像之间建立语义链接。即使相关图像没有表现出相似的视觉特征但共享底层语义概念，这也能够检索相关图像。这可以与任何预先存在的跨域特征提取主干相结合，以提高检索性能。然而，当与精心选择的 Vision Transformer 主干和零样本检索损失相结合时，我们的方法在 Sketchy、TU-Berlin 和 QuickDraw 基于草图的检索基准上产生了最先进的结果。我们表明，我们的重新排名还提高了其他骨干网的性能，并且优于我们骨干网应用的其他重新排名方法。重要的是，与许多以前的方法不同，我们的方法中的任何组件都不是专门针对基于草图的图像检索任务而设计的 - 它通常可以应用于任何跨域、零样本检索任务。因此，我们还使用 Office-Home 数据集展示了零镜头卡通到照片和艺术到产品检索的新结果。项目页面：finlay-hudson.github.io/icfrr，代码位于：github.com/finlay-hudson/ICFRR

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种测试时迭代重排序方法，用于零样本、跨域图像检索，通过利用画廊-画廊特征信息建立查询与画廊图像间的语义关联。
AI.motivation: 现有跨域检索方法在视觉特征不匹配但语义相关的情况下表现不佳，需设计通用且无需任务特定工程的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出迭代无聚类重排序框架，结合画廊特征信息建立语义链接，可与任意跨域特征提取主干网络兼容，并采用Vision Transformer与零样本损失优化。
AI.result: 在Sketchy、TU-Berlin和QuickDraw基准测试中达到SOTA性能，优于其他重排序方法，并扩展至Office-Home数据集的卡通-照片和艺术-商品检索任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需针对特定任务设计组件，可泛化到任意跨域零样本检索场景，为多模态检索提供了通用解决方案。

search_text: If At First You Don't Succeed: Test Time Re-ranking for Zero-shot, Cross-domain Retrieval 如果一开始没有成功：零样本跨域检索的测试时间重新排序 In this paper, we introduce a novel method for zero-shot, cross-domain image retrieval. Our key contribution is a test-time Iterative Cluster-free Re-ranking process that leverages gallery-gallery feature information to establish semantic links between query and gallery images. This enables the retrieval of relevant images even when they do not exhibit similar visual features but share underlying semantic concepts. This can be combined with any pre-existing cross-domain feature extraction backbone to improve retrieval performance. However, when combined with a carefully chosen Vision Transformer backbone and combination of zero-shot retrieval losses, our approach yields state-of-the-art results on the Sketchy, TU-Berlin and QuickDraw sketch-based retrieval benchmarks. We show that our re-ranking also improves performance with other backbones and outperforms other re-ranking methods applied with our backbone. Importantly, unlike many previous methods, none of the components in our approach are engineered specifically towards the sketch-based image retrieval task - it can be generally applied to any cross-domain, zero-shot retrieval task. We therefore also present new results on zero-shot cartoon-to-photo and art-to-product retrieval using the Office-Home dataset. authors_text: Gorkem Can Ates,Prasoon Mohan,Emrah Celik
title: Dual Cross-Attention for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 医学图像分割的双重交叉注意力
abstract: We propose Dual Cross-Attention (DCA), a simple yet effective attention module that is able to enhance skip-connections in U-Net-based architectures for medical image segmentation. DCA addresses the semantic gap between encoder and decoder features by sequentially capturing channel and spatial dependencies across multi-scale encoder features. First, the Channel Cross-Attention (CCA) extracts global channel-wise dependencies by utilizing cross-attention across channel tokens of multi-scale encoder features. Then, the Spatial Cross-Attention (SCA) module performs cross-attention to capture spatial dependencies across spatial tokens. Finally, these fine-grained encoder features are up-sampled and connected to their corresponding decoder parts to form the skip-connection scheme. Our proposed DCA module can be integrated into any encoder-decoder architecture with skip-connections such as U-Net and its variants. We test our DCA module by integrating it into six U-Net-based architectures such as U-Net, V-Net, R2Unet, ResUnet++, DoubleUnet and MultiResUnet. Our DCA module shows Dice Score improvements up to 2.05% on GlaS, 2.74% on MoNuSeg, 1.37% on CVC-ClinicDB, 1.12% on Kvasir-Seg and 1.44% on Synapse datasets. Our codes are available at: https://github.com/gorkemcanates/Dual-Cross-Attention
summary: We propose Dual Cross-Attention (DCA), a simple yet effective attention module that is able to enhance skip-connections in U-Net-based architectures for medical image segmentation. DCA addresses the semantic gap between encoder and decoder features by sequentially capturing channel and spatial dependencies across multi-scale encoder features. First, the Channel Cross-Attention (CCA) extracts global channel-wise dependencies by utilizing cross-attention across channel tokens of multi-scale encoder features. Then, the Spatial Cross-Attention (SCA) module performs cross-attention to capture spatial dependencies across spatial tokens. Finally, these fine-grained encoder features are up-sampled and connected to their corresponding decoder parts to form the skip-connection scheme. Our proposed DCA module can be integrated into any encoder-decoder architecture with skip-connections such as U-Net and its variants. We test our DCA module by integrating it into six U-Net-based architectures such as U-Net, V-Net, R2Unet, ResUnet++, DoubleUnet and MultiResUnet. Our DCA module shows Dice Score improvements up to 2.05% on GlaS, 2.74% on MoNuSeg, 1.37% on CVC-ClinicDB, 1.12% on Kvasir-Seg and 1.44% on Synapse datasets. Our codes are available at: https://github.com/gorkemcanates/Dual-Cross-Attention
abstract_zh: 我们提出了双重交叉注意力（DCA），这是一种简单而有效的注意力模块，能够增强基于 U-Net 的医学图像分割架构中的跳跃连接。 DCA 通过顺序捕获跨多尺度编码器特征的通道和空间依赖性来解决编码器和解码器特征之间的语义差距。首先，通道交叉注意力（CCA）通过利用多尺度编码器特征的跨通道令牌的交叉注意力来提取全局通道依赖性。然后，空间交叉注意（SCA）模块执行交叉注意以捕获空间标记之间的空间依赖性。最后，这些细粒度编码器特征被上采样并连接到其相应的解码器部分以形成跳跃连接方案。我们提出的 DCA 模块可以集成到任何具有跳跃连接的编码器-解码器架构中，例如 U-Net 及其变体。我们通过将 DCA 模块集成到 U-Net、V-Net、R2Unet、ResUnet++、DoubleUnet 和 MultiResUnet 等六种基于 U-Net 的架构中来测试它。我们的 DCA 模块显示，GlaS 上的 Dice 得分提高了 2.05%，MoNuSeg 提高了 2.74%，CVC-ClinicDB 提高了 1.37%，Kvasir-Seg 提高了 1.12%，Synapse 数据集提高了 1.44%。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/gorkemcanates/Dual-Cross-Attention

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双交叉注意力（DCA）模块，用于增强基于U-Net的医学图像分割架构中的跳跃连接。
AI.motivation: 现有U-Net变体在处理编码器与解码器间的语义差异时存在局限，需更有效的机制捕捉多尺度特征间的通道与空间依赖关系。
AI.method: DCA模块包含通道交叉注意力（CCA）和空间交叉注意力（SCA）两部分，分别提取通道级和空间级依赖关系，并将增强的特征上采样后连接至解码器。
AI.result: 在GlaS、MoNuSeg等5个医学数据集上，DCA模块使Dice分数提升1.12%-2.74%，且兼容U-Net等多种架构。
AI.conclusion: DCA通过双路径注意力机制有效缓解语义差异问题，代码开源验证了方法的普适性与实用性。

authors_text: Aiyu Cui,Sen He,Tao Xiang,Antoine Toisoul
title: Learning Garment DensePose for Robust Warping in Virtual Try-On
title_zh: 学习 Garment DensePose 在虚拟试穿中实现稳健变形
abstract: Virtual try-on, i.e making people virtually try new garments, is an active research area in computer vision with great commercial applications. Current virtual try-on methods usually work in a two-stage pipeline. First, the garment image is warped on the person's pose using a flow estimation network. Then in the second stage, the warped garment is fused with the person image to render a new try-on image. Unfortunately, such methods are heavily dependent on the quality of the garment warping which often fails when dealing with hard poses (e.g., a person lifting or crossing arms). In this work, we propose a robust warping method for virtual try-on based on a learned garment DensePose which has a direct correspondence with the person's DensePose. Due to the lack of annotated data, we show how to leverage an off-the-shelf person DensePose model and a pretrained flow model to learn the garment DensePose in a weakly supervised manner. The garment DensePose allows a robust warping to any person's pose without any additional computation. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art equivalent on virtual try-on benchmarks and shows warping robustness on in-the-wild person images with hard poses, making it more suited for real-world virtual try-on applications.
summary: Virtual try-on, i.e making people virtually try new garments, is an active research area in computer vision with great commercial applications. Current virtual try-on methods usually work in a two-stage pipeline. First, the garment image is warped on the person's pose using a flow estimation network. Then in the second stage, the warped garment is fused with the person image to render a new try-on image. Unfortunately, such methods are heavily dependent on the quality of the garment warping which often fails when dealing with hard poses (e.g., a person lifting or crossing arms). In this work, we propose a robust warping method for virtual try-on based on a learned garment DensePose which has a direct correspondence with the person's DensePose. Due to the lack of annotated data, we show how to leverage an off-the-shelf person DensePose model and a pretrained flow model to learn the garment DensePose in a weakly supervised manner. The garment DensePose allows a robust warping to any person's pose without any additional computation. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art equivalent on virtual try-on benchmarks and shows warping robustness on in-the-wild person images with hard poses, making it more suited for real-world virtual try-on applications.
abstract_zh: Virtual try-on, i.e making people virtually try new garments, is an active research area in computer vision with great commercial applications. Current virtual try-on methods usually work in a two-stage pipeline. First, the garment image is warped on the person's pose using a flow estimation network. Then in the second stage, the warped garment is fused with the person image to render a new try-on image.不幸的是，这种方法严重依赖于服装变形的质量，在处理困难姿势（例如，人举起或交叉双臂）时，这种方法通常会失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于学习的服装 DensePose 的强大的虚拟试穿变形方法，该方法与人的 DensePose 直接对应。由于缺乏注释数据，我们展示了如何利用现成的人物 DensePose 模型和预训练的流模型以弱监督的方式学习服装 DensePose。 The garment DensePose allows a robust warping to any person's pose without any additional computation.我们的方法在虚拟试穿基准上达到了最先进的水平，并在具有硬姿势的野外人物图像上显示出扭曲鲁棒性，使其更适合现实世界的虚拟试穿应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习服装DensePose的鲁棒变形方法，用于提升虚拟试衣效果。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟试衣方法在复杂姿态（如抬臂、交叉手臂）下易失效，因服装变形依赖于姿态估计质量。
AI.method: 利用现成的人体DensePose模型和预训练流模型，通过弱监督学习获得服装DensePose，实现与人体姿态的直接对应关系。
AI.result: 方法在虚拟试衣基准测试中达到SOTA水平，并在复杂姿态的真实图像中展现鲁棒性。

search_text: Learning Garment DensePose for Robust Warping in Virtual Try-On 学习 Garment DensePose 在虚拟试穿中实现稳健变形 Virtual try-on, i.e making people virtually try new garments, is an active research area in computer vision with great commercial applications. Current virtual try-on methods usually work in a two-stage pipeline. First, the garment image is warped on the person's pose using a flow estimation network. Then in the second stage, the warped garment is fused with the person image to render a new try-on image. Unfortunately, such methods are heavily dependent on the quality of the garment warping which often fails when dealing with hard poses (e.g., a person lifting or crossing arms). In this work, we propose a robust warping method for virtual try-on based on a learned garment DensePose which has a direct correspondence with the person's DensePose. Due to the lack of annotated data, we show how to leverage an off-the-shelf person DensePose model and a pretrained flow model to learn the garment DensePose in a weakly supervised manner. The garment DensePose allows a robust warping to any person's pose without any additional computation. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art equivalent on virtual try-on benchmarks and shows warping robustness on in-the-wild person images with hard poses, making it more suited for real-world virtual try-on applications. Virtual try-on, i.e making people virtually try new garments, is an active research area in computer vision with great commercial applications. Current virtual try-on methods usually work in a two-stage pipeline. First, the garment image is warped on the person's pose using a flow estimation network. Then in the second stage, the warped garment is fused with the person image to render a new try-on image.不幸的是，这种方法严重依赖于服装变形的质量，在处理困难姿势（例如，人举起或交叉双臂）时，这种方法通常会失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于学习的服装 DensePose 的强大的虚拟试穿变形方法，该方法与人的 DensePose 直接对应。由于缺乏注释数据，我们展示了如何利用现成的人物 DensePose 模型和预训练的流模型以弱监督的方式学习服装 DensePose。 The garment DensePose allows a robust warping to any person's pose without any additional computation.我们的方法在虚拟试穿基准上达到了最先进的水平，并在具有硬姿势的野外人物图像上显示出扭曲鲁棒性，使其更适合现实世界的虚拟试穿应用。 本文提出一种基于学习服装DensePose的鲁棒变形方法，用于提升虚拟试衣效果。 Aiyu Cui,Sen He,Tao Xiang,Antoine Toisoul cs.CV

authors_text: Aarohi Srivastava,David Chiang
title: Fine-Tuning BERT with Character-Level Noise for Zero-Shot Transfer to Dialects and Closely-Related Languages
title_zh: 使用字符级噪声微调 BERT，以实现方言和密切相关语言的零样本迁移
abstract: In this work, we induce character-level noise in various forms when fine-tuning BERT to enable zero-shot cross-lingual transfer to unseen dialects and languages. We fine-tune BERT on three sentence-level classification tasks and evaluate our approach on an assortment of unseen dialects and languages. We find that character-level noise can be an extremely effective agent of cross-lingual transfer under certain conditions, while it is not as helpful in others. Specifically, we explore these differences in terms of the nature of the task and the relationships between source and target languages, finding that introduction of character-level noise during fine-tuning is particularly helpful when a task draws on surface level cues and the source-target cross-lingual pair has a relatively high lexical overlap with shorter (i.e., less meaningful) unseen tokens on average.
summary: In this work, we induce character-level noise in various forms when fine-tuning BERT to enable zero-shot cross-lingual transfer to unseen dialects and languages. We fine-tune BERT on three sentence-level classification tasks and evaluate our approach on an assortment of unseen dialects and languages. We find that character-level noise can be an extremely effective agent of cross-lingual transfer under certain conditions, while it is not as helpful in others. Specifically, we explore these differences in terms of the nature of the task and the relationships between source and target languages, finding that introduction of character-level noise during fine-tuning is particularly helpful when a task draws on surface level cues and the source-target cross-lingual pair has a relatively high lexical overlap with shorter (i.e., less meaningful) unseen tokens on average.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们在微调 BERT 时引入了各种形式的字符级噪声，以实现向未见过的方言和语言的零样本跨语言迁移。我们在三个句子级分类任务上对 BERT 进行微调，并在各种未见过的方言和语言上评估我们的方法。我们发现，在某些条件下，字符级噪声可以成为跨语言迁移的极其有效的媒介，而在其他条件下则没有那么有用。具体来说，我们在任务的性质以及源语言和目标语言之间的关系方面探索了这些差异，发现当任务利用表面级别的线索并且源目标跨语言对具有相对较高的词汇重叠和平均较短（即意义较小）的未见标记时，在微调期间引入字符级噪声特别有用。

AI.tldr: 本文通过在微调BERT时引入字符级噪声，提升模型在零样本跨语言迁移任务中的性能，特别是在方言和相关语言上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理未见过的方言或相关语言时表现不佳，而字符级噪声可能帮助模型学习更通用的语言表示以促进迁移。
AI.method: 在微调BERT的三个句子分类任务中注入字符级噪声，并评估其在多种未见过的方言和语言上的零样本迁移效果。
AI.result: 字符级噪声在依赖表面线索的任务及源目标语言词汇重叠度高且目标语言含短词时效果显著，其他情况下效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 字符级噪声可作为有效的跨语言迁移工具，但其效果受任务类型和语言关系影响，需针对性应用。

authors_text: Thomas Lew,Riccardo Bonalli,Marco Pavone
title: Convex Hulls of Reachable Sets
title_zh: 可达集的凸包
comment: 20 pages. IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control 2025. Simplified maximality condition (no minus sign)
comments: 20 pages. IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control 2025. Simplified maximality condition (no minus sign)
abstract: We study the convex hulls of reachable sets of nonlinear systems with bounded disturbances and uncertain initial conditions. Reachable sets play a critical role in control, but remain notoriously challenging to compute, and existing over-approximation tools tend to be conservative or computationally expensive. In this work, we characterize the convex hulls of reachable sets as the convex hulls of solutions of an ordinary differential equation with initial conditions on the sphere. This finite-dimensional characterization unlocks an efficient sampling-based estimation algorithm to accurately over-approximate reachable sets. We also study the structure of the boundary of the reachable convex hulls and derive error bounds for the estimation algorithm. We give applications to neural feedback loop analysis and robust MPC.
summary: We study the convex hulls of reachable sets of nonlinear systems with bounded disturbances and uncertain initial conditions. Reachable sets play a critical role in control, but remain notoriously challenging to compute, and existing over-approximation tools tend to be conservative or computationally expensive. In this work, we characterize the convex hulls of reachable sets as the convex hulls of solutions of an ordinary differential equation with initial conditions on the sphere. This finite-dimensional characterization unlocks an efficient sampling-based estimation algorithm to accurately over-approximate reachable sets. We also study the structure of the boundary of the reachable convex hulls and derive error bounds for the estimation algorithm. We give applications to neural feedback loop analysis and robust MPC.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有有界扰动和不确定初始条件的非线性系统可达集的凸包。可达集在控制中发挥着关键作用，但众所周知，计算仍然具有挑战性，并且现有的过度逼近工具往往比较保守或计算成本昂贵。在这项工作中，我们将可达集的凸包描述为球面上具有初始条件的常微分方程解的凸包。这种有限维表征解锁了一种有效的基于采样的估计算法，以准确地过度近似可达集。我们还研究了可达凸包边界的结构并推导了估计算法的误差界限。我们将应用应用于神经反馈环路分析和稳健的 MPC。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有有界干扰和不确定初始条件的非线性系统的可达集凸包计算问题，提出了一种基于微分方程解的高效估计方法。
AI.motivation: 可达集在控制领域至关重要，但现有计算方法存在保守性强或计算成本高的问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将可达集凸包表征为微分方程解的凸包（初始条件位于球面），并设计基于采样的估计算法，同时分析边界结构与误差界。
AI.result: 开发了高效采样算法，推导了误差界限，并成功应用于神经反馈环分析与鲁棒MPC场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有限维表征实现了可达集凸包的精确过估计，在保证计算效率的同时拓展了控制理论的应用边界。

authors_text: Nicholas Milikich
title: Utilizing Remote Sensing to Analyze Land Usage and Rice Planting Patterns
title_zh: 利用遥感分析土地利用和水稻种植模式
abstract: The cooperative management of rice terraces in Bali reveals an interesting phenomenon that stems from the feedback loop between human decisions and the ecosystem process. In particular, spatial patterning is observed, which is heavily reliant on the farmer's decision to plant crops as well as the response from the physical environment like pest damage and water shortage. A recent study proposed an evolutionary game theoretic model to infer particular power laws governing this spatial patterning along the Bali region. In this paper, we show a snapshot of rice patches in Bali with colors to indicate the different stages of rice growth
summary: The cooperative management of rice terraces in Bali reveals an interesting phenomenon that stems from the feedback loop between human decisions and the ecosystem process. In particular, spatial patterning is observed, which is heavily reliant on the farmer's decision to plant crops as well as the response from the physical environment like pest damage and water shortage. A recent study proposed an evolutionary game theoretic model to infer particular power laws governing this spatial patterning along the Bali region. In this paper, we show a snapshot of rice patches in Bali with colors to indicate the different stages of rice growth

AI.motivation: 研究巴厘岛梯田管理中人类决策与环境因素（如虫害、缺水）的相互作用，揭示空间模式形成机制以支持可持续农业管理。

search_text: Utilizing Remote Sensing to Analyze Land Usage and Rice Planting Patterns 利用遥感分析土地利用和水稻种植模式 The cooperative management of rice terraces in Bali reveals an interesting phenomenon that stems from the feedback loop between human decisions and the ecosystem process. In particular, spatial patterning is observed, which is heavily reliant on the farmer's decision to plant crops as well as the response from the physical environment like pest damage and water shortage. A recent study proposed an evolutionary game theoretic model to infer particular power laws governing this spatial patterning along the Bali region. authors_text: Muntabir Hasan Choudhury,Lamia Salsabil,Himarsha R. Jayanetti,Jian Wu,William A. Ingram,Edward A. Fox
title: MetaEnhance: Metadata Quality Improvement for Electronic Theses and Dissertations of University Libraries
title_zh: MetaEnhance：大学图书馆电子学位论文元数据质量提升
comment: 7 pages, 3 tables, and 1 figure. Accepted by 2023 ACM/IEEE Joint Conference on Digital Libraries (JCDL '23) as a short paper
comments: 7 pages, 3 tables, and 1 figure. Accepted by 2023 ACM/IEEE Joint Conference on Digital Libraries (JCDL '23) as a short paper
abstract: Metadata quality is crucial for digital objects to be discovered through digital library interfaces. However, due to various reasons, the metadata of digital objects often exhibits incomplete, inconsistent, and incorrect values. We investigate methods to automatically detect, correct, and canonicalize scholarly metadata, using seven key fields of electronic theses and dissertations (ETDs) as a case study. We propose MetaEnhance, a framework that utilizes state-of-the-art artificial intelligence methods to improve the quality of these fields. To evaluate MetaEnhance, we compiled a metadata quality evaluation benchmark containing 500 ETDs, by combining subsets sampled using multiple criteria. We tested MetaEnhance on this benchmark and found that the proposed methods achieved nearly perfect F1-scores in detecting errors and F1-scores in correcting errors ranging from 0.85 to 1.00 for five of seven fields.
summary: Metadata quality is crucial for digital objects to be discovered through digital library interfaces. However, due to various reasons, the metadata of digital objects often exhibits incomplete, inconsistent, and incorrect values. We investigate methods to automatically detect, correct, and canonicalize scholarly metadata, using seven key fields of electronic theses and dissertations (ETDs) as a case study. We propose MetaEnhance, a framework that utilizes state-of-the-art artificial intelligence methods to improve the quality of these fields. To evaluate MetaEnhance, we compiled a metadata quality evaluation benchmark containing 500 ETDs, by combining subsets sampled using multiple criteria. We tested MetaEnhance on this benchmark and found that the proposed methods achieved nearly perfect F1-scores in detecting errors and F1-scores in correcting errors ranging from 0.85 to 1.00 for five of seven fields.
abstract_zh: 元数据质量对于通过数字图书馆界面发现数字对象至关重要。 However, due to various reasons, the metadata of digital objects often exhibits incomplete, inconsistent, and incorrect values.我们以电子论文 (ETD) 的七个关键领域作为案例研究，研究自动检测、纠正和规范化学术元数据的方法。 We propose MetaEnhance, a framework that utilizes state-of-the-art artificial intelligence methods to improve the quality of these fields.为了评估 MetaEnhance，我们通过组合使用多个标准采样的子集，编制了包含 500 个 ETD 的元​​数据质量评估基准。我们在此基准上测试了 MetaEnhance，发现所提出的方法在七个字段中的五个字段中在检测错误和纠正错误方面实现了近乎完美的 F1 分数，范围从 0.85 到 1.00。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaEnhance框架，利用人工智能方法自动检测并修正电子论文元数据中的错误，以提升大学图书馆数字对象的可发现性。
AI.motivation: 元数据质量直接影响数字图书馆中学术资源的检索效果，但现有元数据常存在不完整、不一致和错误等问题，需自动化方法提升其质量。
AI.method: 开发MetaEnhance框架，采用先进人工智能技术对电子论文的七个关键元数据字段进行错误检测、修正和标准化处理，并构建包含500篇电子论文的基准数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，MetaEnhance在错误检测任务中接近完美（F1分数近1.0），五个字段的错误修正F1分数达到0.85至1.00，展现出显著效果。
AI.conclusion: MetaEnhance有效提升了电子论文元数据质量，验证了人工智能在学术元数据自动化处理中的潜力，为数字图书馆资源管理提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Noah Fleischmann,Walter Bennette,Nathan Inkawhich
title: Establishing baselines and introducing TernaryMixOE for fine-grained out-of-distribution detection
title_zh: 建立基线并引入 TernaryMixOE 进行细粒度的分布外检测
abstract: Machine learning models deployed in the open world may encounter observations that they were not trained to recognize, and they risk misclassifying such observations with high confidence. Therefore, it is essential that these models are able to ascertain what is in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD), to avoid this misclassification. In recent years, huge strides have been made in creating models that are robust to this distinction. As a result, the current state-of-the-art has reached near perfect performance on relatively coarse-grained OOD detection tasks, such as distinguishing horses from trucks, while struggling with finer-grained classification, like differentiating models of commercial aircraft. In this paper, we describe a new theoretical framework for understanding fine- and coarse-grained OOD detection, we re-conceptualize fine grained classification into a three part problem, and we propose a new baseline task for OOD models on two fine-grained hierarchical data sets, two new evaluation methods to differentiate fine- and coarse-grained OOD performance, along with a new loss function for models in this task.
summary: Machine learning models deployed in the open world may encounter observations that they were not trained to recognize, and they risk misclassifying such observations with high confidence. Therefore, it is essential that these models are able to ascertain what is in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD), to avoid this misclassification. In recent years, huge strides have been made in creating models that are robust to this distinction. As a result, the current state-of-the-art has reached near perfect performance on relatively coarse-grained OOD detection tasks, such as distinguishing horses from trucks, while struggling with finer-grained classification, like differentiating models of commercial aircraft. In this paper, we describe a new theoretical framework for understanding fine- and coarse-grained OOD detection, we re-conceptualize fine grained classification into a three part problem, and we propose a new baseline task for OOD models on two fine-grained hierarchical data sets, two new evaluation methods to differentiate fine- and coarse-grained OOD performance, along with a new loss function for models in this task.
abstract_zh: 在开放世界中部署的机器学习模型可能会遇到未经训练来识别的观察结果，并且它们可能会以高置信度对此类观察结果进行错误分类。因此，这些模型必须能够确定什么是分布内 (ID) 和分布外 (OOD)，以避免这种错误分类。近年来，在创建能够适应这种区别的模型方面取得了巨大进步。因此，当前最先进的技术在相对粗粒度的 OOD 检测任务（例如区分马和卡车）上已经达到了近乎完美的性能，但在更细粒度的分类（例如区分商用飞机的型号）方面却遇到了困难。在本文中，我们描述了一个用于理解细粒度和粗粒度 OOD 检测的新理论框架，我们将细粒度分类重新概念化为三部分问题，并提出了两个细粒度分层数据集上的 OOD 模型的新基线任务、两种区分细粒度和粗粒度 OOD 性能的新评估方法，以及该任务中模型的新损失函数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的理论框架和方法TernaryMixOE，用于改进细粒度分布外检测（OOD）任务的基线性能。
AI.motivation: 当前模型在粗粒度OOD检测（如区分马和卡车）表现优异，但在细粒度分类（如区分商用飞机型号）中效果不佳，需解决细粒度OOD检测的挑战。
AI.method: 将细粒度分类重构为三部分问题，提出新的基线任务和两个细粒度数据集，设计两种新评估方法及对应的损失函数。
AI.result: 新方法在细粒度OOD检测任务中取得更好性能，提供了区分细粒度与粗粒度OOD表现的评估工具。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论框架和新方法，本文为细粒度OOD检测提供了更有效的基线和评估体系，推动了该领域研究进展。

Therefore, it is essential that these models are able to ascertain what is in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD), to avoid this misclassification. In recent years, huge strides have been made in creating models that are robust to this distinction. As a result, the current state-of-the-art has reached near perfect performance on relatively coarse-grained OOD detection tasks, such as distinguishing horses from trucks, while struggling with finer-grained classification, like differentiating models of commercial aircraft. In this paper, we describe a new theoretical framework for understanding fine- and coarse-grained OOD detection, we re-conceptualize fine grained classification into a three part problem, and we propose a new baseline task for OOD models on two fine-grained hierarchical data sets, two new evaluation methods to differentiate fine- and coarse-grained OOD performance, along with a new loss function for models in this task. 在开放世界中部署的机器学习模型可能会遇到未经训练来识别的观察结果，并且它们可能会以高置信度对此类观察结果进行错误分类。因此，这些模型必须能够确定什么是分布内 (ID) 和分布外 (OOD)，以避免这种错误分类。近年来，在创建能够适应这种区别的模型方面取得了巨大进步。因此，当前最先进的技术在相对粗粒度的 OOD 检测任务（例如区分马和卡车）上已经达到了近乎完美的性能，但在更细粒度的分类（例如区分商用飞机的型号）方面却遇到了困难。在本文中，我们描述了一个用于理解细粒度和粗粒度 OOD 检测的新理论框架，我们将细粒度分类重新概念化为三部分问题，并提出了两个细粒度分层数据集上的 OOD 模型的新基线任务、两种区分细粒度和粗粒度 OOD 性能的新评估方法，以及该任务中模型的新损失函数。 本文提出了一种新的理论框架和方法TernaryMixOE，用于改进细粒度分布外检测（OOD）任务的基线性能。 Noah Fleischmann,Walter Bennette,Nathan Inkawhich cs.CV

authors_text: Alejandro Puente-Castro,Daniel Rivero,Eurico Pedrosa,Artur Pereira,Nuno Lau,Enrique Fernandez-Blanco
title: Q-Learning based system for path planning with unmanned aerial vehicles swarms in obstacle environments
title_zh: 基于 Q-Learning 的无人机群路径规划系统在障碍环境中的应用
abstract: Path Planning methods for autonomous control of Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms are on the rise because of all the advantages they bring. There are more and more scenarios where autonomous control of multiple UAVs is required. Most of these scenarios present a large number of obstacles, such as power lines or trees. If all UAVs can be operated autonomously, personnel expenses can be decreased. In addition, if their flight paths are optimal, energy consumption is reduced. This ensures that more battery time is left for other operations. In this paper, a Reinforcement Learning based system is proposed for solving this problem in environments with obstacles by making use of Q-Learning. This method allows a model, in this particular case an Artificial Neural Network, to self-adjust by learning from its mistakes and achievements. Regardless of the size of the map or the number of UAVs in the swarm, the goal of these paths is to ensure complete coverage of an area with fixed obstacles for tasks, like field prospecting. Setting goals or having any prior information aside from the provided map is not required. For experimentation, five maps of different sizes with different obstacles were used. The experiments were performed with different number of UAVs. For the calculation of the results, the number of actions taken by all UAVs to complete the task in each experiment is taken into account. The lower the number of actions, the shorter the path and the lower the energy consumption. The results are satisfactory, showing that the system obtains solutions in fewer movements the more UAVs there are. For a better presentation, these results have been compared to another state-of-the-art approach.

For a better presentation, these results have been compared to another state-of-the-art approach.
abstract_zh: 无人机群自主控制的路径规划方法由于其带来的所有优势而正在兴起。需要对多架无人机进行自主控制的场景越来越多。大多数这些场景都存在大量障碍物，例如电线或树木。如果所有无人机都可以自主操作，那么人员费用就可以减少。此外，如果它们的飞行路径是最佳的，那么能源消耗就会减少。这确保了有更多的电池时间用于其他操作。本文提出了一种基于强化学习的系统，利用 Q-Learning 来解决有障碍物环境中的这一问题。这种方法允许模型（在本例中为人工神经网络）通过从错误和成就中学习来进行自我调整。无论地图大小或集群中无人机的数量如何，这些路径的目标都是确保完全覆盖具有固定障碍的区域，以完成野外勘探等任务。除了提供的地图之外，不需要设定目标或拥有任何先前信息。为了进行实验，使用了五张具有不同障碍物的不同尺寸的地图。实验使用不同数量的无人机进行。为了计算结果，考虑了每次实验中所有无人机完成任务所采取的动作数量。动作次数越少，路径越短，能量消耗越低。结果令人满意，表明无人机数量越多，系统就能以越少的动作获得解决方案。为了更好地展示，这些结果与另一种最先进的方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Q学习的强化学习系统，用于在障碍物环境中实现无人机群的路径规划，以实现区域全覆盖任务。
AI.motivation: 多无人机自主控制场景需求增加，但障碍物环境下的路径规划面临能耗高、人工成本大的问题，需优化路径以提升效率。
AI.method: 采用Q学习算法结合人工神经网络，通过无人机群自主学习调整路径，无需先验目标信息，基于不同规模地图和无人机数量进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，随着无人机数量增加，系统完成任务的行动次数减少，路径更短且能耗更低，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能有效解决障碍物环境下的无人机群路径规划问题，为实际应用如地形勘探提供可行方案。

authors_text: Aman Madaan,Niket Tandon,Prakhar Gupta,Skyler Hallinan,Luyu Gao,Sarah Wiegreffe,Uri Alon,Nouha Dziri,Shrimai Prabhumoye,Yiming Yang,Shashank Gupta,Bodhisattwa Prasad Majumder,Katherine Hermann,Sean Welleck,Amir Yazdanbakhsh,Peter Clark
title: Self-Refine: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback
title_zh: 自我细化：通过自我反馈进行迭代细化
comment: Code, data, and demo at https://selfrefine.info/
comments: Code, data, and demo at https://selfrefine.info/
abstract: Like humans, large language models (LLMs) do not always generate the best output on their first try. Motivated by how humans refine their written text, we introduce Self-Refine, an approach for improving initial outputs from LLMs through iterative feedback and refinement. The main idea is to generate an initial output using an LLMs; then, the same LLMs provides feedback for its output and uses it to refine itself, iteratively. Self-Refine does not require any supervised training data, additional training, or reinforcement learning, and instead uses a single LLM as the generator, refiner, and feedback provider. We evaluate Self-Refine across 7 diverse tasks, ranging from dialog response generation to mathematical reasoning, using state-of-the-art (GPT-3.5, ChatGPT, and GPT-4) LLMs. Across all evaluated tasks, outputs generated with Self-Refine are preferred by humans and automatic metrics over those generated with the same LLM using conventional one-step generation, improving by ~20% absolute on average in task performance. Our work demonstrates that even state-of-the-art LLMs like GPT-4 can be further improved at test time using our simple, standalone approach.
summary: Like humans, large language models (LLMs) do not always generate the best output on their first try. Motivated by how humans refine their written text, we introduce Self-Refine, an approach for improving initial outputs from LLMs through iterative feedback and refinement. The main idea is to generate an initial output using an LLMs; then, the same LLMs provides feedback for its output and uses it to refine itself, iteratively. Self-Refine does not require any supervised training data, additional training, or reinforcement learning, and instead uses a single LLM as the generator, refiner, and feedback provider. We evaluate Self-Refine across 7 diverse tasks, ranging from dialog response generation to mathematical reasoning, using state-of-the-art (GPT-3.5, ChatGPT, and GPT-4) LLMs. Across all evaluated tasks, outputs generated with Self-Refine are preferred by humans and automatic metrics over those generated with the same LLM using conventional one-step generation, improving by ~20% absolute on average in task performance. Our work demonstrates that even state-of-the-art LLMs like GPT-4 can be further improved at test time using our simple, standalone approach.
abstract_zh: Like humans, large language models (LLMs) do not always generate the best output on their first try.受人类如何完善书面文本的启发，我们引入了 Self-Refine，这是一种通过迭代反馈和完善来改进法学硕士初始输出的方法。 The main idea is to generate an initial output using an LLMs; then, the same LLMs provides feedback for its output and uses it to refine itself, iteratively. Self-Refine 不需要任何监督训练数据、额外训练或强化学习，而是使用单个 LLM 作为生成器、优化器和反馈提供者。我们使用最先进的（GPT-3.5、ChatGPT 和 GPT-4）LLM 在 7 个不同的任务中评估 Self-Refine，从对话响应生成到数学推理。在所有评估的任务中，与使用传统一步生成的相同 LLM 生成的输出相比，通过 Self-Refine 生成的输出更受人类和自动指标的青睐，任务性能平均绝对提高约 20%。 Our work demonstrates that even state-of-the-art LLMs like GPT-4 can be further improved at test time using our simple, standalone approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Self-Refine的方法，通过迭代自我反馈机制提升大型语言模型（LLM）的输出质量，无需额外训练数据或强化学习。
AI.motivation: 人类在写作时会多次修改以优化结果，而现有LLM通常仅生成一次输出，无法自动迭代改进，且依赖监督数据或复杂训练过程。
AI.method: 使用单一LLM依次完成生成初始输出、提供自我反馈及迭代优化三个阶段，通过多轮自反馈循环逐步改进结果。
AI.result: 在7类任务（如对话生成、数学推理）中，Self-Refine生成的输出在人类评估和自动指标上均优于传统单步生成方法，平均性能提升约20%。
AI.conclusion: Self-Refine证明了通过简单迭代自反馈机制可有效提升包括GPT-4在内的先进LLM的测试时表现，无需额外训练或数据。

Self-Refine 不需要任何监督训练数据、额外训练或强化学习，而是使用单个 LLM 作为生成器、优化器和反馈提供者。我们使用最先进的（GPT-3.5、ChatGPT 和 GPT-4）LLM 在 7 个不同的任务中评估 Self-Refine，从对话响应生成到数学推理。在所有评估的任务中，与使用传统一步生成的相同 LLM 生成的输出相比，通过 Self-Refine 生成的输出更受人类和自动指标的青睐，任务性能平均绝对提高约 20%。 Our work demonstrates that even state-of-the-art LLMs like GPT-4 can be further improved at test time using our simple, standalone approach. 本文提出了一种名为Self-Refine的方法，通过迭代自我反馈机制提升大型语言模型（LLM）的输出质量，无需额外训练数据或强化学习。 Aman Madaan,Niket Tandon,Prakhar Gupta,Skyler Hallinan,Luyu Gao,Sarah Wiegreffe,Uri Alon,Nouha Dziri,Shrimai Prabhumoye,Yiming Yang,Shashank Gupta,Bodhisattwa Prasad Majumder,Katherine Hermann,Sean Welleck,Amir Yazdanbakhsh,Peter Clark cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Danyang Liu,Frank Keller
title: Detecting and Grounding Important Characters in Visual Stories
title_zh: 检测和奠定视觉故事中的重要人物
abstract: Characters are essential to the plot of any story. Establishing the characters before writing a story can improve the clarity of the plot and the overall flow of the narrative. However, previous work on visual storytelling tends to focus on detecting objects in images and discovering relationships between them. In this approach, characters are not distinguished from other objects when they are fed into the generation pipeline. The result is a coherent sequence of events rather than a character-centric story. In order to address this limitation, we introduce the VIST-Character dataset, which provides rich character-centric annotations, including visual and textual co-reference chains and importance ratings for characters. Based on this dataset, we propose two new tasks: important character detection and character grounding in visual stories. For both tasks, we develop simple, unsupervised models based on distributional similarity and pre-trained vision-and-language models. Our new dataset, together with these models, can serve as the foundation for subsequent work on analysing and generating stories from a character-centric perspective.
summary: Characters are essential to the plot of any story. Establishing the characters before writing a story can improve the clarity of the plot and the overall flow of the narrative. However, previous work on visual storytelling tends to focus on detecting objects in images and discovering relationships between them. In this approach, characters are not distinguished from other objects when they are fed into the generation pipeline. The result is a coherent sequence of events rather than a character-centric story. In order to address this limitation, we introduce the VIST-Character dataset, which provides rich character-centric annotations, including visual and textual co-reference chains and importance ratings for characters. Based on this dataset, we propose two new tasks: important character detection and character grounding in visual stories. For both tasks, we develop simple, unsupervised models based on distributional similarity and pre-trained vision-and-language models. Our new dataset, together with these models, can serve as the foundation for subsequent work on analysing and generating stories from a character-centric perspective.
abstract_zh: 人物对于任何故事的情节都是至关重要的。在写故事之前先确立人物角色可以提高情节的清晰度和叙事的整体流畅性。然而，之前关于视觉叙事的工作往往侧重于检测图像中的对象并发现它们之间的关系。在这种方法中，当字符被送入生成管道时，不会将它们与其他对象区分开。结果是一系列连贯的事件，而不是一个以人物为中心的故事。为了解决这个限制，我们引入了 VIST-Character 数据集，它提供了丰富的以字符为中心的注释，包括视觉和文本共引用链以及字符的重要性评级。基于这个数据集，我们提出了两个新任务：重要人物检测和视觉故事中的人物基础。对于这两项任务，我们基于分布相似性和预训练的视觉和语言模型开发简单的无监督模型。我们的新数据集与这些模型一起可以作为后续从以角色为中心的角度分析和生成故事的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个新任务：在视觉故事中检测和定位重要角色，并构建包含角色相关注释的VIST-Character数据集，开发基于分布相似性和预训练模型的无监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉故事研究未区分角色与其他物体，导致生成故事缺乏角色中心视角，需建立角色导向的分析基础。
AI.method: 构建包含视觉/文本共指链和角色重要性评分的VIST-Character数据集，设计基于分布相似性及预训练视觉-语言模型的无监督模型解决新任务。
AI.result: 提出重要角色检测与角色定位任务，开发对应模型，为后续角色中心的故事分析与生成提供数据和方法基础。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集与模型填补了视觉故事角色分析的空白，可作为未来角色导向叙事研究的基准框架。

authors_text: Abhishek Moitra,Abhiroop Bhattacharjee,Youngeun Kim,Priyadarshini Panda
title: XPert: Peripheral Circuit & Neural Architecture Co-search for Area and Energy-efficient Xbar-based Computing
title_zh: XPert：外围电路和神经架构联合搜索基于 Xbar 的面积和节能计算
comment: Accepted to Design and Automation Conference (DAC)
comments: Accepted to Design and Automation Conference (DAC)
abstract: The hardware-efficiency and accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) implemented on In-memory Computing (IMC) architectures primarily depend on the DNN architecture and the peripheral circuit parameters. It is therefore essential to holistically co-search the network and peripheral parameters to achieve optimal performance. To this end, we propose XPert, which co-searches network architecture in tandem with peripheral parameters such as the type and precision of analog-to-digital converters, crossbar column sharing and the layer-specific input precision using an optimization-based design space exploration. Compared to VGG16 baselines, XPert achieves 10.24x (4.7x) lower EDAP, 1.72x (1.62x) higher TOPS/W,1.93x (3x) higher TOPS/mm2 at 92.46% (56.7%) accuracy for CIFAR10 (TinyImagenet) datasets. The code for this paper is available at https://github.com/Intelligent-Computing-Lab-Yale/XPert.
summary: The hardware-efficiency and accuracy of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) implemented on In-memory Computing (IMC) architectures primarily depend on the DNN architecture and the peripheral circuit parameters. It is therefore essential to holistically co-search the network and peripheral parameters to achieve optimal performance. To this end, we propose XPert, which co-searches network architecture in tandem with peripheral parameters such as the type and precision of analog-to-digital converters, crossbar column sharing and the layer-specific input precision using an optimization-based design space exploration. Compared to VGG16 baselines, XPert achieves 10.24x (4.7x) lower EDAP, 1.72x (1.62x) higher TOPS/W,1.93x (3x) higher TOPS/mm2 at 92.46% (56.7%) accuracy for CIFAR10 (TinyImagenet) datasets. The code for this paper is available at https://github.com/Intelligent-Computing-Lab-Yale/XPert.
abstract_zh: 在内存计算（IMC）架构上实现的深度神经网络（DNN）的硬件效率和准确性主要取决于DNN架构和外围电路参数。因此，有必要对网络和外围参数进行整体共同搜索，以实现最佳性能。为此，我们提出了 XPert，它使用基于优化的设计空间探索来联合搜索网络架构与外围参数，例如模数转换器的类型和精度、交叉开关列共享和特定于层的输入精度。与 VGG16 基线相比，XPert 在 CIFAR10 (TinyImagenet) 数据集上的 EDAP 降低了 10.24 倍 (4.7 倍)，TOPS/W 提高了 1.72 倍 (1.62 倍)，TOPS/mm2 提高了 1.93 倍 (3 倍)，精度为 92.46% (56.7%)。本文的代码可从 https://github.com/Intelligent-Computing-Lab-Yale/XPert 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XPert方法，通过协同搜索神经网络架构与外围电路参数，优化基于交叉条的计算能效和面积效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于存内计算（IMC）的深度神经网络（DNN）实现中，硬件效率和精度受网络架构与外围电路参数的共同影响，但传统方法未对其联合优化，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 采用基于优化的设计空间探索方法，同时搜索网络架构（如层间输入精度）与外围参数（如ADC类型、交叉条列共享策略）以实现全局最优。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10和TinyImagenet数据集上，XPert相比VGG16基线实现EDAP降低10.24倍、TOPS/W提升1.72倍、TOPS/mm²提升1.93倍，同时保持92.46%和56.7%的高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 协同优化网络架构与外围参数可显著提升基于交叉条计算的能效与面积效率，为未来IMC系统设计提供有效方法论。

authors_text: Rhydian Windsor,Amir Jamaludin,Timor Kadir,Andrew Zisserman
title: Vision-Language Modelling For Radiological Imaging and Reports In The Low Data Regime
title_zh: 低数据条件下放射成像和报告的视觉语言建模
abstract: This paper explores training medical vision-language models (VLMs) -- where the visual and language inputs are embedded into a common space -- with a particular focus on scenarios where training data is limited, as is often the case in clinical datasets. We explore several candidate methods to improve low-data performance, including: (i) adapting generic pre-trained models to novel image and text domains (i.e. medical imaging and reports) via unimodal self-supervision; (ii) using local (e.g. GLoRIA) & global (e.g. InfoNCE) contrastive loss functions as well as a combination of the two; (iii) extra supervision during VLM training, via: (a) image- and text-only self-supervision, and (b) creating additional positive image-text pairs for training through augmentation and nearest-neighbour search. Using text-to-image retrieval as a benchmark, we evaluate the performance of these methods with variable sized training datasets of paired chest X-rays and radiological reports. Combined, they significantly improve retrieval compared to fine-tuning CLIP, roughly equivalent to training with the data. A similar pattern is found in the downstream task classification of CXR-related conditions with our method outperforming CLIP and also BioVIL, a strong CXR VLM benchmark, in the zero-shot and linear probing settings. We conclude with a set of recommendations for researchers aiming to train vision-language models on other medical imaging modalities when training data is scarce. To facilitate further research, we will make our code and models publicly available.
summary: This paper explores training medical vision-language models (VLMs) -- where the visual and language inputs are embedded into a common space -- with a particular focus on scenarios where training data is limited, as is often the case in clinical datasets. We explore several candidate methods to improve low-data performance, including: (i) adapting generic pre-trained models to novel image and text domains (i.e. medical imaging and reports) via unimodal self-supervision; (ii) using local (e.g. GLoRIA) & global (e.g. InfoNCE) contrastive loss functions as well as a combination of the two; (iii) extra supervision during VLM training, via: (a) image- and text-only self-supervision, and (b) creating additional positive image-text pairs for training through augmentation and nearest-neighbour search. Using text-to-image retrieval as a benchmark, we evaluate the performance of these methods with variable sized training datasets of paired chest X-rays and radiological reports. Combined, they significantly improve retrieval compared to fine-tuning CLIP, roughly equivalent to training with the data. A similar pattern is found in the downstream task classification of CXR-related conditions with our method outperforming CLIP and also BioVIL, a strong CXR VLM benchmark, in the zero-shot and linear probing settings. We conclude with a set of recommendations for researchers aiming to train vision-language models on other medical imaging modalities when training data is scarce. To facilitate further research, we will make our code and models publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了训练医学视觉语言模型（VLM）——其中视觉和语言输入被嵌入到一个公共空间中——特别关注训练数据有限的场景，就像临床数据集中经常出现的情况一样。我们探索了几种提高低数据性能的候选方法，包括：（i）通过单模态自我监督将通用的预训练模型适应新的图像和文本领域（即医学成像和报告）； (ii) 使用局部（例如 GLoRIA）和全局（例如 InfoNCE）对比损失函数以及两者的组合； (iii) VLM 训练期间的额外监督，通过：(a) 仅图像和文本自我监督，以及 (b) 通过增强和最近邻搜索创建额外的正图像文本对进行训练。使用文本到图像检索作为基准，我们使用配对胸部 X 射线和放射学报告的可变大小训练数据集来评估这些方法的性能。与微调 CLIP 相比，它们相结合显着改善了检索，大致相当于使用数据进行训练。在 CXR 相关条件的下游任务分类中发现了类似的模式，我们的方法在零样本和线性探测设置中优于 CLIP 和 BioVIL（强大的 CXR VLM 基准）。最后，我们为研究人员提出了一系列建议，旨在在训练数据稀缺的情况下在其他医学成像模式上训练视觉语言模型。为了促进进一步的研究，我们将公开我们的代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在低数据环境下训练医学视觉-语言模型（VLM），以处理放射影像和报告的关联任务。
AI.motivation: 临床数据集通常数据量有限，而现有预训练模型（如CLIP）在医学领域表现不足，需探索低数据场景下的有效训练方法。
AI.method: 通过单模态自监督适配预训练模型、结合局部与全局对比损失（如GLoRIA与InfoNCE）、引入图像/文本自监督及增强正样本生成等方法优化模型。
AI.result: 在胸部X光与报告的检索任务中，所提方法显著优于微调CLIP，且在零样本及线性探测分类任务中超越CLIP与BioVIL基准模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出低数据下训练医学VLM的可行策略，并公开代码与模型，为其他医学影像模态研究提供参考。

search_text: Vision-Language Modelling For Radiological Imaging and Reports In The Low Data Regime 低数据条件下放射成像和报告的视觉语言建模 This paper explores training medical vision-language models (VLMs) -- where the visual and language inputs are embedded into a common space -- with a particular focus on scenarios where training data is limited, as is often the case in clinical datasets. We explore several candidate methods to improve low-data performance, including: (i) adapting generic pre-trained models to novel image and text domains (i.e. medical imaging and reports) via unimodal self-supervision; (ii) using local (e.g. GLoRIA) & global (e.g. InfoNCE) contrastive loss functions as well as a combination of the two; (iii) extra supervision during VLM training, via: (a) image- and text-only self-supervision, and (b) creating additional positive image-text pairs for training through augmentation and nearest-neighbour search. Using text-to-image retrieval as a benchmark, we evaluate the performance of these methods with variable sized training datasets of paired chest X-rays and radiological reports. Combined, they significantly improve retrieval compared to fine-tuning CLIP, roughly equivalent to training with the data. A similar pattern is found in the downstream task classification of CXR-related conditions with our method outperforming CLIP and also BioVIL, a strong CXR VLM benchmark, in the zero-shot and linear probing settings. We conclude with a set of recommendations for researchers aiming to train vision-language models on other medical imaging modalities when training data is scarce. To facilitate further research, we will make our code and models publicly available. 本文探讨了训练医学视觉语言模型（VLM）——其中视觉和语言输入被嵌入到一个公共空间中——特别关注训练数据有限的场景，就像临床数据集中经常出现的情况一样。我们探索了几种提高低数据性能的候选方法，包括：（i）通过单模态自我监督将通用的预训练模型适应新的图像和文本领域（即医学成像和报告）； (ii) 使用局部（例如 GLoRIA）和全局（例如 InfoNCE）对比损失函数以及两者的组合； (iii) VLM 训练期间的额外监督，通过：(a) 仅图像和文本自我监督，以及 (b) 通过增强和最近邻搜索创建额外的正图像文本对进行训练。使用文本到图像检索作为基准，我们使用配对胸部 X 射线和放射学报告的可变大小训练数据集来评估这些方法的性能。与微调 CLIP 相比，它们相结合显着改善了检索，大致相当于使用数据进行训练。在 CXR 相关条件的下游任务分类中发现了类似的模式，我们的方法在零样本和线性探测设置中优于 CLIP 和 BioVIL（强大的 CXR VLM 基准）。最后，我们为研究人员提出了一系列建议，旨在在训练数据稀缺的情况下在其他医学成像模式上训练视觉语言模型。为了促进进一步的研究，我们将公开我们的代码和模型。 本文研究在低数据环境下训练医学视觉-语言模型（VLM），以处理放射影像和报告的关联任务。 Rhydian Windsor,Amir Jamaludin,Timor Kadir,Andrew Zisserman cs.CV

authors_text: Dominik Batić,Felix Holm,Ege Özsoy,Tobias Czempiel,Nassir Navab
title: Whether and When does Endoscopy Domain Pretraining Make Sense?
title_zh: 内窥镜领域预训练是否以及何时有意义？
abstract: Automated endoscopy video analysis is a challenging task in medical computer vision, with the primary objective of assisting surgeons during procedures. The difficulty arises from the complexity of surgical scenes and the lack of a sufficient amount of annotated data. In recent years, large-scale pretraining has shown great success in natural language processing and computer vision communities. These approaches reduce the need for annotated data, which is always a concern in the medical domain. However, most works on endoscopic video understanding use models pretrained on natural images, creating a domain gap between pretraining and finetuning. In this work, we investigate the need for endoscopy domain-specific pretraining based on downstream objectives. To this end, we first collect Endo700k, the largest publicly available corpus of endoscopic images, extracted from nine public Minimally Invasive Surgery (MIS) datasets. Endo700k comprises more than 700,000 unannotated raw images. Next, we introduce EndoViT, an endoscopy pretrained Vision Transformer (ViT). Through ablations, we demonstrate that domain-specific pretraining is particularly beneficial for more complex downstream tasks, such as Action Triplet Detection, and less effective and even unnecessary for simpler tasks, such as Surgical Phase Recognition. We will release both our code and pretrained models upon acceptance to facilitate further research in this direction.
summary: Automated endoscopy video analysis is a challenging task in medical computer vision, with the primary objective of assisting surgeons during procedures. The difficulty arises from the complexity of surgical scenes and the lack of a sufficient amount of annotated data. In recent years, large-scale pretraining has shown great success in natural language processing and computer vision communities. These approaches reduce the need for annotated data, which is always a concern in the medical domain. However, most works on endoscopic video understanding use models pretrained on natural images, creating a domain gap between pretraining and finetuning. In this work, we investigate the need for endoscopy domain-specific pretraining based on downstream objectives. To this end, we first collect Endo700k, the largest publicly available corpus of endoscopic images, extracted from nine public Minimally Invasive Surgery (MIS) datasets. Endo700k comprises more than 700,000 unannotated raw images. Next, we introduce EndoViT, an endoscopy pretrained Vision Transformer (ViT). Through ablations, we demonstrate that domain-specific pretraining is particularly beneficial for more complex downstream tasks, such as Action Triplet Detection, and less effective and even unnecessary for simpler tasks, such as Surgical Phase Recognition. We will release both our code and pretrained models upon acceptance to facilitate further research in this direction.
abstract_zh: 自动内窥镜视频分析是医学计算机视觉中的一项具有挑战性的任务，其主要目标是在手术过程中协助外科医生。困难源于手术场景的复杂性和缺乏足够量的注释数据。近年来，大规模预训练在自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域取得了巨大成功。这些方法减少了对带注释数据的需求，这一直是医学领域关注的问题。然而，大多数内窥镜视频理解工作都使用在自然图像上预训练的模型，在预训练和微调之间造成了领域差距。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于下游目标的内窥镜领域特定预训练的必要性。为此，我们首先收集 Endo700k，这是最大的公开内窥镜图像语料库，从九个公共微创手术 (MIS) 数据集中提取。 Endo700k 包含超过 700,000 张未注释的原始图像。接下来，我们介绍 EndoViT，一种内窥镜预训练视觉转换器 (ViT)。通过消融，我们证明了特定领域的预训练对于更复杂的下游任务（例如动作三联体检测）特别有益，而对于更简单的任务（例如手术阶段识别）则效果较差，甚至不必要。我们将在接受后发布我们的代码和预训练模型，以促进这一方向的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在内窥镜领域进行预训练是否必要及其适用场景，通过构建大规模数据集和预训练模型验证不同下游任务的效果差异。
AI.motivation: 内窥镜视频分析面临手术场景复杂和标注数据不足的挑战，现有基于自然图像预训练的模型存在领域差异，需探索领域特定预训练的有效性。
AI.method: 收集包含70万张未标注内窥镜图像的Endo700k数据集，提出内窥镜预训练视觉Transformer（EndoViT），并通过消融实验对比不同下游任务的性能差异。
AI.result: 领域特定预训练对复杂任务（如动作三元组检测）显著有效，但对简单任务（如手术阶段识别）效果有限甚至冗余。
AI.conclusion: 内窥镜领域预训练在复杂任务中具有价值，但需根据任务难度选择是否采用，避免不必要的计算成本。

authors_text: Pooja Prajod,Matteo Lavit Nicora,Matteo Malosio,Elisabeth André
title: Gaze-based Attention Recognition for Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 基于视线的人机协作注意力识别
abstract: Attention (and distraction) recognition is a key factor in improving human-robot collaboration. We present an assembly scenario where a human operator and a cobot collaborate equally to piece together a gearbox. The setup provides multiple opportunities for the cobot to adapt its behavior depending on the operator's attention, which can improve the collaboration experience and reduce psychological strain. As a first step, we recognize the areas in the workspace that the human operator is paying attention to, and consequently, detect when the operator is distracted. We propose a novel deep-learning approach to develop an attention recognition model. First, we train a convolutional neural network to estimate the gaze direction using a publicly available image dataset. Then, we use transfer learning with a small dataset to map the gaze direction onto pre-defined areas of interest. Models trained using this approach performed very well in leave-one-subject-out evaluation on the small dataset. We performed an additional validation of our models using the video snippets collected from participants working as an operator in the presented assembly scenario. Although the recall for the Distracted class was lower in this case, the models performed well in recognizing the areas the operator paid attention to. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that validated an attention recognition model using data from a setting that mimics industrial human-robot collaboration. Our findings highlight the need for validation of attention recognition solutions in such full-fledged, non-guided scenarios.
summary: Attention (and distraction) recognition is a key factor in improving human-robot collaboration. We present an assembly scenario where a human operator and a cobot collaborate equally to piece together a gearbox. The setup provides multiple opportunities for the cobot to adapt its behavior depending on the operator's attention, which can improve the collaboration experience and reduce psychological strain. As a first step, we recognize the areas in the workspace that the human operator is paying attention to, and consequently, detect when the operator is distracted. We propose a novel deep-learning approach to develop an attention recognition model. First, we train a convolutional neural network to estimate the gaze direction using a publicly available image dataset. Then, we use transfer learning with a small dataset to map the gaze direction onto pre-defined areas of interest. Models trained using this approach performed very well in leave-one-subject-out evaluation on the small dataset. We performed an additional validation of our models using the video snippets collected from participants working as an operator in the presented assembly scenario. Although the recall for the Distracted class was lower in this case, the models performed well in recognizing the areas the operator paid attention to. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that validated an attention recognition model using data from a setting that mimics industrial human-robot collaboration. Our findings highlight the need for validation of attention recognition solutions in such full-fledged, non-guided scenarios.
abstract_zh: 注意力（和分心）识别是改善人机协作的关键因素。我们提出了一个装配场景，其中人类操作员和协作机器人平等协作以组装变速箱。该设置为协作机器人提供了多种机会，根据操作员的注意力来调整其行为，这可以改善协作体验并减少心理压力。第一步，我们识别工作空间中操作员正在关注的区域，从而检测操作员何时分心。我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法来开发注意力识别模型。首先，我们训练一个卷积神经网络，使用公开的图像数据集来估计注视方向。然后，我们使用小数据集的迁移学习将注视方向映射到预定义的感兴趣区域。使用这种方法训练的模型在小数据集的留一主题评估中表现非常好。我们使用从所呈现的装配场景中作为操作员的参与者收集的视频片段对我们的模型进行了额外的验证。尽管在这种情况下，分心类别的召回率较低，但模型在识别操作员关注的区域方面表现良好。据我们所知，这是第一项使用来自模仿工业人机协作的环境的数据来验证注意力识别模型的工作。我们的研究结果强调了在这种成熟的、非引导的场景中验证注意力识别解决方案的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注视的注意力识别方法，用于提升人机协作效率。
AI.motivation: 通过识别操作人员注意力状态，机器人可动态调整行为以提升协作体验并降低心理负担，但现有方案缺乏工业场景验证。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络估计注视方向，结合迁移学习将 gaze 映射到预定义兴趣区域，并在装配场景中进行验证。
AI.result: 模型在小数据集上表现优异，能准确识别操作区域，但分心状态召回率较低，为首个工业级人机协作场景验证案例。
AI.conclusion: 强调需在真实工业场景中验证注意力识别方案，以推动其在人机协作中的实际应用。
