search_text: Gaze-based Attention Recognition for Human-Robot Collaboration 基于视线的人机协作注意力识别 Attention (and distraction) recognition is a key factor in improving human-robot collaboration. We present an assembly scenario where a human operator and a cobot collaborate equally to piece together a gearbox. The setup provides multiple opportunities for the cobot to adapt its behavior depending on the operator's attention, which can improve the collaboration experience and reduce psychological strain. As a first step, we recognize the areas in the workspace that the human operator is paying attention to, and consequently, detect when the operator is distracted. We propose a novel deep-learning approach to develop an attention recognition model. First, we train a convolutional neural network to estimate the gaze direction using a publicly available image dataset. Then, we use transfer learning with a small dataset to map the gaze direction onto pre-defined areas of interest. Models trained using this approach performed very well in leave-one-subject-out evaluation on the small dataset. We performed an additional validation of our models using the video snippets collected from participants working as an operator in the presented assembly scenario. Although the recall for the Distracted class was lower in this case, the models performed well in recognizing the areas the operator paid attention to. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that validated an attention recognition model using data from a setting that mimics industrial human-robot collaboration. Our findings highlight the need for validation of attention recognition solutions in such full-fledged, non-guided scenarios. 注意力（和分心）识别是改善人机协作的关键因素。我们提出了一个装配场景，其中人类操作员和协作机器人平等协作以组装变速箱。该设置为协作机器人提供了多种机会，根据操作员的注意力来调整其行为，这可以改善协作体验并减少心理压力。第一步，我们识别工作空间中操作员正在关注的区域，从而检测操作员何时分心。我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法来开发注意力识别模型。首先，我们训练一个卷积神经网络，使用公开的图像数据集来估计注视方向。然后，我们使用小数据集的迁移学习将注视方向映射到预定义的感兴趣区域。使用这种方法训练的模型在小数据集的留一主题评估中表现非常好。我们使用从所呈现的装配场景中作为操作员的参与者收集的视频片段对我们的模型进行了额外的验证。尽管在这种情况下，分心类别的召回率较低，但模型在识别操作员关注的区域方面表现良好。据我们所知，这是第一项使用来自模仿工业人机协作的环境的数据来验证注意力识别模型的工作。我们的研究结果强调了在这种成熟的、非引导的场景中验证注意力识别解决方案的必要性。 本文提出了一种基于注视的注意力识别方法，用于提升人机协作效率。 Pooja Prajod,Matteo Lavit Nicora,Matteo Malosio,Elisabeth André cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Chunzhi Yi,Xiaolei Sun,Chunyu Zhang,Wei Jin,Jianfei Zhu,Haiqi Zhu,Baichun Wei
title: Estimating Continuous Muscle Fatigue For Multi-Muscle Coordinated Exercise: A Pilot Study on Walking
title_zh: 估计多肌肉协调运动的持续肌肉疲劳：步行的初步研究
abstract: Assessing the progression of muscle fatigue for daily exercises provides vital indicators for precise rehabilitation, personalized training dose, especially under the context of Metaverse. Assessing fatigue of multi-muscle coordination-involved daily exercises requires the neuromuscular features that represent the fatigue-induced characteristics of spatiotemporal adaptions of multiple muscles and the estimator that captures the time-evolving progression of fatigue. In this paper, we propose to depict fatigue by the features of muscle compensation and spinal module activation changes and estimate continuous fatigue by a physiological rationale model. First, we extract muscle synergy fractionation and the variance of spinal module spikings as features inspired by the prior of fatigue-induced neuromuscular adaptations. Second, we treat the features as observations and develop a Bayesian Gaussian process to capture the time-evolving progression. Third, we solve the issue of lacking supervision information by mathematically formulating the time-evolving characteristics of fatigue as the loss function. Finally, we adapt the metrics that follow the physiological principles of fatigue to quantitatively evaluate the performance. Our extensive experiments present a 0.99 similarity between days, a over 0.7 similarity with other views of fatigue and a nearly 1 weak monotonicity, which outperform other methods. This study would aim the objective assessment of muscle fatigue.
summary: Assessing the progression of muscle fatigue for daily exercises provides vital indicators for precise rehabilitation, personalized training dose, especially under the context of Metaverse. Assessing fatigue of multi-muscle coordination-involved daily exercises requires the neuromuscular features that represent the fatigue-induced characteristics of spatiotemporal adaptions of multiple muscles and the estimator that captures the time-evolving progression of fatigue. In this paper, we propose to depict fatigue by the features of muscle compensation and spinal module activation changes and estimate continuous fatigue by a physiological rationale model. First, we extract muscle synergy fractionation and the variance of spinal module spikings as features inspired by the prior of fatigue-induced neuromuscular adaptations. Second, we treat the features as observations and develop a Bayesian Gaussian process to capture the time-evolving progression. Third, we solve the issue of lacking supervision information by mathematically formulating the time-evolving characteristics of fatigue as the loss function. Finally, we adapt the metrics that follow the physiological principles of fatigue to quantitatively evaluate the performance. Our extensive experiments present a 0.99 similarity between days, a over 0.7 similarity with other views of fatigue and a nearly 1 weak monotonicity, which outperform other methods. This study would aim the objective assessment of muscle fatigue.
abstract_zh: 评估日常锻炼的肌肉疲劳进展情况为精确康复、个性化训练剂量提供了重要指标，尤其是在 Metaverse 的背景下。评估涉及多肌肉协调的日常锻炼的疲劳需要代表多个肌肉时空适应的疲劳诱导特征的神经肌肉特征以及捕获疲劳随时间演变的进展的估计器。在本文中，我们建议通过肌肉代偿和脊柱模块激活变化的特征来描述疲劳，并通过生理学原理模型来估计持续疲劳。首先，我们提取肌肉协同分解和脊髓模块尖峰的方差作为受疲劳引起的神经肌肉适应先验启发的特征。其次，我们将这些特征视为观察结果，并开发贝叶斯高斯过程来捕获时间演变的过程。第三，我们通过数学公式化疲劳的时间演化特征作为损失函数来解决缺乏监督信息的问题。最后，我们采用遵循疲劳生理原理的指标来定量评估表现。我们广泛的实验表明，各天之间的相似度为 0.99，与其他疲劳观点的相似度超过 0.7，并且单调性接近 1，这优于其他方法。这项研究的目的是客观评估肌肉疲劳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种评估多肌肉协调运动中持续肌肉疲劳的方法，旨在为康复训练和个性化训练提供客观指标。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确捕捉多肌肉协调运动中疲劳的时空适应性特征，需开发基于生理机制的连续疲劳评估模型以支持精准康复和个性化训练需求。
AI.method: 提取肌肉协同分数化和脊髓模块尖峰方差作为特征，构建贝叶斯高斯过程模型捕捉疲劳时间演化规律，并通过生理原理驱动的损失函数解决监督信息缺失问题。
AI.result: 实验显示方法在跨天相似性达0.99，与其他疲劳评估视角相似性超0.7，单调性接近1，显著优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为多肌肉协调运动的客观疲劳评估提供了新方法，可应用于康复训练和元宇宙场景下的个性化运动指导。

authors_text: Daniel Campos,Alexandre Marques,Mark Kurtz,ChengXiang Zhai
title: oBERTa: Improving Sparse Transfer Learning via improved initialization, distillation, and pruning regimes
title_zh: oBERTa：通过改进初始化、蒸馏和修剪机制来改进稀疏迁移学习
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the range of oBERTa language models, an easy-to-use set of language models which allows Natural Language Processing (NLP) practitioners to obtain between 3.8 and 24.3 times faster models without expertise in model compression. Specifically, oBERTa extends existing work on pruning, knowledge distillation, and quantization and leverages frozen embeddings improves distillation and model initialization to deliver higher accuracy on a broad range of transfer tasks. In generating oBERTa, we explore how the highly optimized RoBERTa differs from the BERT for pruning during pre-training and finetuning. We find it less amenable to compression during fine-tuning. We explore the use of oBERTa on seven representative NLP tasks and find that the improved compression techniques allow a pruned oBERTa model to match the performance of BERTbase and exceed the performance of Prune OFA Large on the SQUAD V1.1 Question Answering dataset, despite being 8x and 2x, respectively faster in inference. We release our code, training regimes, and associated model for broad usage to encourage usage and experimentation
summary: In this paper, we introduce the range of oBERTa language models, an easy-to-use set of language models which allows Natural Language Processing (NLP) practitioners to obtain between 3.8 and 24.3 times faster models without expertise in model compression. Specifically, oBERTa extends existing work on pruning, knowledge distillation, and quantization and leverages frozen embeddings improves distillation and model initialization to deliver higher accuracy on a broad range of transfer tasks. In generating oBERTa, we explore how the highly optimized RoBERTa differs from the BERT for pruning during pre-training and finetuning. We find it less amenable to compression during fine-tuning. We explore the use of oBERTa on seven representative NLP tasks and find that the improved compression techniques allow a pruned oBERTa model to match the performance of BERTbase and exceed the performance of Prune OFA Large on the SQUAD V1.1 Question Answering dataset, despite being 8x and 2x, respectively faster in inference. We release our code, training regimes, and associated model for broad usage to encourage usage and experimentation
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 oBERTa 语言模型的范围，这是一组易于使用的语言模型，允许自然语言处理 (NLP) 从业者获得速度提高 3.8 至 24.3 倍的模型，而无需模型压缩方面的专业知识。具体来说，oBERTa 扩展了修剪、知识蒸馏和量化方面的现有工作，并利用冻结嵌入改进了蒸馏和模型初始化，以在广泛的传输任务上提供更高的准确性。 In generating oBERTa, we explore how the highly optimized RoBERTa differs from the BERT for pruning during pre-training and finetuning. We find it less amenable to compression during fine-tuning.我们探索了 oBERTa 在七个代表性 NLP 任务上的使用，发现改进的压缩技术允许修剪后的 oBERTa 模型与 BERTbase 的性能相匹配，并超过 Prune OFA Large 在 SQUAD V1.1 问答数据集上的性能，尽管推理速度分别快了 8 倍和 2 倍。 We release our code, training regimes, and associated model for broad usage to encourage usage and experimentation

AI.tldr: 本文提出oBERTa语言模型，通过改进初始化、蒸馏和剪枝方法，实现高效的模型压缩，提升迁移学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有模型压缩技术需专业知识，而oBERTa旨在让NLP从业者无需专业背景即可获得更高效、准确的模型。
AI.method: 结合改进的初始化策略、知识蒸馏及剪枝技术，利用冻结嵌入层优化蒸馏过程，并对比RoBERTa与BERT在剪枝中的差异。
AI.result: oBERTa在7个NLP任务中表现优异，剪枝后模型在SQUAD V1.1数据集上超越Prune OFA Large，推理速度分别快8倍和2倍。
AI.conclusion: oBERTa验证了改进压缩技术的有效性，其方法可复用，开源资源将推动模型压缩领域的进一步研究。

search_text: oBERTa: Improving Sparse Transfer Learning via improved initialization, distillation, and pruning regimes oBERTa：通过改进初始化、蒸馏和修剪机制来改进稀疏迁移学习 In this paper, we introduce the range of oBERTa language models, an easy-to-use set of language models which allows Natural Language Processing (NLP) practitioners to obtain between 3.8 and 24.3 times faster models without expertise in model compression. Specifically, oBERTa extends existing work on pruning, knowledge distillation, and quantization and leverages frozen embeddings improves distillation and model initialization to deliver higher accuracy on a broad range of transfer tasks. In generating oBERTa, we explore how the highly optimized RoBERTa differs from the BERT for pruning during pre-training and finetuning. We find it less amenable to compression during fine-tuning. We explore the use of oBERTa on seven representative NLP tasks and find that the improved compression techniques allow a pruned oBERTa model to match the performance of BERTbase and exceed the performance of Prune OFA Large on the SQUAD V1.1 Question Answering dataset, despite being 8x and 2x, respectively faster in inference. We release our code, training regimes, and associated model for broad usage to encourage usage and experimentation 在本文中，我们介绍了 oBERTa 语言模型的范围，这是一组易于使用的语言模型，允许自然语言处理 (NLP) 从业者获得速度提高 3.8 至 24.3 倍的模型，而无需模型压缩方面的专业知识。具体来说，oBERTa 扩展了修剪、知识蒸馏和量化方面的现有工作，并利用冻结嵌入改进了蒸馏和模型初始化，以在广泛的传输任务上提供更高的准确性。 In generating oBERTa, we explore how the highly optimized RoBERTa differs from the BERT for pruning during pre-training and finetuning. We find it less amenable to compression during fine-tuning.我们探索了 oBERTa 在七个代表性 NLP 任务上的使用，发现改进的压缩技术允许修剪后的 oBERTa 模型与 BERTbase 的性能相匹配，并超过 Prune OFA Large 在 SQUAD V1.1 问答数据集上的性能，尽管推理速度分别快了 8 倍和 2 倍。 We release our code, training regimes, and associated model for broad usage to encourage usage and experimentation 本文提出oBERTa语言模型，通过改进初始化、蒸馏和剪枝方法，实现高效的模型压缩，提升迁移学习效果。 Daniel Campos,Alexandre Marques,Mark Kurtz,ChengXiang Zhai cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yujin Wu,Mohamed Daoudi,Ali Amad
title: Transformer-based Self-supervised Multimodal Representation Learning for Wearable Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的可穿戴情绪识别自监督多模态表示学习
comment: Accepted IEEE Transactions On Affective Computing
comments: Accepted IEEE Transactions On Affective Computing
abstract: Recently, wearable emotion recognition based on peripheral physiological signals has drawn massive attention due to its less invasive nature and its applicability in real-life scenarios. However, how to effectively fuse multimodal data remains a challenging problem. Moreover, traditional fully-supervised based approaches suffer from overfitting given limited labeled data. To address the above issues, we propose a novel self-supervised learning (SSL) framework for wearable emotion recognition, where efficient multimodal fusion is realized with temporal convolution-based modality-specific encoders and a transformer-based shared encoder, capturing both intra-modal and inter-modal correlations. Extensive unlabeled data is automatically assigned labels by five signal transforms, and the proposed SSL model is pre-trained with signal transformation recognition as a pretext task, allowing the extraction of generalized multimodal representations for emotion-related downstream tasks. For evaluation, the proposed SSL model was first pre-trained on a large-scale self-collected physiological dataset and the resulting encoder was subsequently frozen or fine-tuned on three public supervised emotion recognition datasets. Ultimately, our SSL-based method achieved state-of-the-art results in various emotion classification tasks. Meanwhile, the proposed model proved to be more accurate and robust compared to fully-supervised methods on low data regimes.
summary: Recently, wearable emotion recognition based on peripheral physiological signals has drawn massive attention due to its less invasive nature and its applicability in real-life scenarios. However, how to effectively fuse multimodal data remains a challenging problem. Moreover, traditional fully-supervised based approaches suffer from overfitting given limited labeled data. To address the above issues, we propose a novel self-supervised learning (SSL) framework for wearable emotion recognition, where efficient multimodal fusion is realized with temporal convolution-based modality-specific encoders and a transformer-based shared encoder, capturing both intra-modal and inter-modal correlations. Extensive unlabeled data is automatically assigned labels by five signal transforms, and the proposed SSL model is pre-trained with signal transformation recognition as a pretext task, allowing the extraction of generalized multimodal representations for emotion-related downstream tasks. For evaluation, the proposed SSL model was first pre-trained on a large-scale self-collected physiological dataset and the resulting encoder was subsequently frozen or fine-tuned on three public supervised emotion recognition datasets. Ultimately, our SSL-based method achieved state-of-the-art results in various emotion classification tasks. Meanwhile, the proposed model proved to be more accurate and robust compared to fully-supervised methods on low data regimes.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于外围生理信号的可穿戴情感识别由于其侵入性较小且适用于现实生活场景而引起了广泛关注。然而，如何有效融合多模态数据仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。此外，传统的基于完全监督的方法在给定有限的标记数据的情况下会出现过度拟合的问题。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种用于可穿戴情感识别的新型自监督学习（SSL）框架，其中通过基于时间卷积的模态特定编码器和基于变压器的共享编码器实现高效的多模态融合，捕获模内和模间相关性。大量未标记数据通过五个信号变换自动分配标签，并且所提出的 SSL 模型以信号变换识别为借口任务进行预训练，允许提取情感相关下游任务的广义多模态表示。为了进行评估，所提出的 SSL 模型首先在大规模自我收集的生理数据集上进行预训练，随后在三个公共监督情绪识别数据集上对所得编码器进行冻结或微调。最终，我们基于 SSL 的方法在各种情绪分类任务中取得了最先进的结果。同时，事实证明，与低数据情况下的完全监督方法相比，所提出的模型更加准确和鲁棒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的自监督多模态表征学习框架，用于可穿戴设备的情绪识别，通过有效融合多模态生理信号解决传统方法在小样本下的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有可穿戴情绪识别方法面临多模态数据融合困难及传统全监督方法因标注数据有限导致的过拟合问题，需探索更高效的数据利用方式。
AI.method: 设计基于时间卷积的模态特定编码器与共享Transformer编码器，结合五种信号变换自动生成伪标签，通过预训练任务学习多模态表征，并在公共数据集上进行微调。
AI.result: 在多个公开情绪数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在低数据场景下相较全监督方法具有更高准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习框架能有效捕捉多模态关联性，为可穿戴设备的情绪识别提供更高效的数据利用方案，尤其适用于标注数据稀缺的场景。

authors_text: Nina Marhamati,Sena Clara Creston
title: Visual Response to Emotional State of User Interaction
title_zh: 对用户交互情绪状态的视觉反应
comment: Presented at the 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ICAI'21). Conference details available from https://www.american-cse.org/csce2021/conferences-ICAI. Abstract available from https://www.american-cse.org/static/CSCE21%20book%20abstracts.pdf
comments: Presented at the 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ICAI'21). Conference details available from https://www.american-cse.org/csce2021/conferences-ICAI. Abstract available from https://www.american-cse.org/static/CSCE21%20book%20abstracts.pdf
abstract: This work proposes an interactive art installation "Mood spRing" designed to reflect the mood of the environment through interpretation of language and tone. Mood spRing consists of an AI program that controls an immersive 3D animation of the seasons. If the AI program perceives the language and tone of the users as pleasant, the animation progresses through idealized renditions of seasons. Otherwise, it slips into unpleasant weather and natural disasters of the season. To interpret the language and tone of the user interaction, hybrid state-of-the-art emotion detection methods are applied to the user audio and text inputs. The emotional states detected separately from tone and language are fused by a novel approach that aims at minimizing the possible model disparity across diverse demographic groups.
summary: This work proposes an interactive art installation "Mood spRing" designed to reflect the mood of the environment through interpretation of language and tone. Mood spRing consists of an AI program that controls an immersive 3D animation of the seasons. If the AI program perceives the language and tone of the users as pleasant, the animation progresses through idealized renditions of seasons. Otherwise, it slips into unpleasant weather and natural disasters of the season. To interpret the language and tone of the user interaction, hybrid state-of-the-art emotion detection methods are applied to the user audio and text inputs. The emotional states detected separately from tone and language are fused by a novel approach that aims at minimizing the possible model disparity across diverse demographic groups.
abstract_zh: 该作品提出了一种互动艺术装置“Mood spRing”，旨在通过语言和语气的诠释来反映环境的情绪。 Mood spRing 由一个人工智能程序组成，可以控制季节的沉浸式 3D 动画。如果人工智能程序认为用户的语言和语气令人愉快，动画就会通过理想化的季节演绎来进展。否则，就会陷入该季节的恶劣天气和自然灾害。为了解释用户交互的语言和语气，将最先进的混合情绪检测方法应用于用户音频和文本输入。与语气和语言分开检测到的情绪状态通过一种新颖的方法融合在一起，该方法旨在最大限度地减少不同人口群体之间可能的模型差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Mood spRing'的交互式艺术装置，通过分析用户的语言和语调来控制季节主题的3D动画，以反映环境情绪。
AI.motivation: 旨在探索情绪检测技术与艺术装置的结合，创造能够动态响应用户情绪的沉浸式体验，并减少不同群体间的模型偏差。
AI.method: 采用混合的前沿情绪检测方法分析用户音频和文本输入，通过新型融合策略整合语调与语言检测结果，驱动季节动画的视觉变化。
AI.result: 成功开发出'Mood spRing'装置，实现用户情绪与季节动画的实时互动，并验证了跨群体情绪检测融合方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了情绪计算在艺术领域的创新应用，提出的融合方法为多模态情绪分析提供了新的技术路径。

ai_content_json.result: 成功开发出'Mood spRing'装置，实现用户情绪与季节动画的实时互动，并验证了跨群体情绪检测融合方法的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该研究展示了情绪计算在艺术领域的创新应用，提出的融合方法为多模态情绪分析提供了新的技术路径。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Mood spRing'的交互式艺术装置，通过分析用户的语言和语调来控制季节主题的3D动画，以反映环境情绪。

search_text: Visual Response to Emotional State of User Interaction 对用户交互情绪状态的视觉反应 This work proposes an interactive art installation "Mood spRing" designed to reflect the mood of the environment through interpretation of language and tone. Mood spRing consists of an AI program that controls an immersive 3D animation of the seasons. If the AI program perceives the language and tone of the users as pleasant, the animation progresses through idealized renditions of seasons. Otherwise, it slips into unpleasant weather and natural disasters of the season. To interpret the language and tone of the user interaction, hybrid state-of-the-art emotion detection methods are applied to the user audio and text inputs. The emotional states detected separately from tone and language are fused by a novel approach that aims at minimizing the possible model disparity across diverse demographic groups. 该作品提出了一种互动艺术装置“Mood spRing”，旨在通过语言和语气的诠释来反映环境的情绪。 Mood spRing 由一个人工智能程序组成，可以控制季节的沉浸式 3D 动画。如果人工智能程序认为用户的语言和语气令人愉快，动画就会通过理想化的季节演绎来进展。否则，就会陷入该季节的恶劣天气和自然灾害。为了解释用户交互的语言和语气，将最先进的混合情绪检测方法应用于用户音频和文本输入。与语气和语言分开检测到的情绪状态通过一种新颖的方法融合在一起，该方法旨在最大限度地减少不同人口群体之间可能的模型差异。 本文提出了一种名为'Mood spRing'的交互式艺术装置，通过分析用户的语言和语调来控制季节主题的3D动画，以反映环境情绪。 Nina Marhamati,Sena Clara Creston cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Lizhi Xin,Kevin Xin,Houwen Xin
title: Machine learning for discovering laws of nature
title_zh: 机器学习发现自然规律
abstract: Based on Darwin's natural selection, we developed "machine scientists" to discover the laws of nature by learning from raw data. "Machine scientists" construct physical theories by applying a logic tree (state Decision Tree) and a value tree (observation Function Tree); the logical tree determines the state of the entity, and the value tree determines the absolute value between the two observations of the entity. A logic Tree and a value tree together can reconstruct an entity's trajectory and make predictions about its future outcomes. Our proposed algorithmic model has an emphasis on machine learning - where "machine scientists" builds up its experience by being rewarded or punished for each decision they make - eventually leading to rediscovering Newton's equation (classical physics) and the Born's rule (quantum mechanics).
summary: Based on Darwin's natural selection, we developed "machine scientists" to discover the laws of nature by learning from raw data. "Machine scientists" construct physical theories by applying a logic tree (state Decision Tree) and a value tree (observation Function Tree); the logical tree determines the state of the entity, and the value tree determines the absolute value between the two observations of the entity. A logic Tree and a value tree together can reconstruct an entity's trajectory and make predictions about its future outcomes. Our proposed algorithmic model has an emphasis on machine learning - where "machine scientists" builds up its experience by being rewarded or punished for each decision they make - eventually leading to rediscovering Newton's equation (classical physics) and the Born's rule (quantum mechanics).
abstract_zh: 基于达尔文的自然选择，我们培养了“机器科学家”，通过从原始数据中学习来发现自然规律。 “机器科学家”通过应用逻辑树（状态决策树）和值树（观察函数树）构建物理理论；逻辑树决定实体的状态，值树决定实体的两个观察值之间的绝对值。逻辑树和价值树一起可以重建实体的轨迹并对其未来结果进行预测。我们提出的算法模型强调机器学习——“机器科学家”通过对他们做出的每个决定进行奖励或惩罚来积累经验——最终导致重新发现牛顿方程（经典物理学）和玻恩定律（量子力学）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于机器学习的'机器科学家'方法，通过逻辑树和值树结构从原始数据中自动发现自然定律。
AI.motivation: 传统科学定律发现依赖人类先验知识且耗时，需开发自动化方法从数据中直接推导物理规律。
AI.method: 构建包含状态决策树（逻辑树）和观察函数树（值树）的双树结构，通过强化学习机制使系统在奖励/惩罚中积累经验，自动构建物理理论模型。
AI.result: 算法成功重新发现了牛顿运动定律（经典物理）和玻恩规则（量子力学），验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习为科学定律发现提供了新范式，可加速基础科学探索并可能揭示新物理规律。

authors_text: Ruixiang Jiang,Can Wang,Jingbo Zhang,Menglei Chai,Mingming He,Dongdong Chen,Jing Liao
title: AvatarCraft: Transforming Text into Neural Human Avatars with Parameterized Shape and Pose Control
title_zh: AvatarCraft：通过参数化形状和姿势控制将文本转换为神经人类头像
abstract: Neural implicit fields are powerful for representing 3D scenes and generating high-quality novel views, but it remains challenging to use such implicit representations for creating a 3D human avatar with a specific identity and artistic style that can be easily animated. Our proposed method, AvatarCraft, addresses this challenge by using diffusion models to guide the learning of geometry and texture for a neural avatar based on a single text prompt. We carefully design the optimization framework of neural implicit fields, including a coarse-to-fine multi-bounding box training strategy, shape regularization, and diffusion-based constraints, to produce high-quality geometry and texture. Additionally, we make the human avatar animatable by deforming the neural implicit field with an explicit warping field that maps the target human mesh to a template human mesh, both represented using parametric human models. This simplifies animation and reshaping of the generated avatar by controlling pose and shape parameters. Extensive experiments on various text descriptions show that AvatarCraft is effective and robust in creating human avatars and rendering novel views, poses, and shapes. Our project page is: https://avatar-craft.github.io/.
summary: Neural implicit fields are powerful for representing 3D scenes and generating high-quality novel views, but it remains challenging to use such implicit representations for creating a 3D human avatar with a specific identity and artistic style that can be easily animated. Our proposed method, AvatarCraft, addresses this challenge by using diffusion models to guide the learning of geometry and texture for a neural avatar based on a single text prompt. We carefully design the optimization framework of neural implicit fields, including a coarse-to-fine multi-bounding box training strategy, shape regularization, and diffusion-based constraints, to produce high-quality geometry and texture. Additionally, we make the human avatar animatable by deforming the neural implicit field with an explicit warping field that maps the target human mesh to a template human mesh, both represented using parametric human models. This simplifies animation and reshaping of the generated avatar by controlling pose and shape parameters. Extensive experiments on various text descriptions show that AvatarCraft is effective and robust in creating human avatars and rendering novel views, poses, and shapes. Our project page is: https://avatar-craft.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 神经隐式场对于表示 3D 场景和生成高质量的新颖视图非常强大，但使用这种隐式表示来创建具有特定身份和艺术风格且可以轻松制作动画的 3D 人类化身仍然具有挑战性。我们提出的方法 AvatarCraft 通过使用扩散模型来指导基于单个文本提示的神经化身的几何和纹理学习，从而解决了这一挑战。我们精心设计了神经隐式场的优化框架，包括从粗到细的多边界框训练策略、形状正则化和基于扩散的约束，以产生高质量的几何和纹理。此外，我们通过使用显式扭曲场使神经隐式场变形，将目标人类网格映射到模板人类网格，从而使人类头像可动画化，两者都使用参数化人类模型表示。这通过控制姿势和形状参数简化了生成的头像的动画和重塑。对各种文本描述的大量实验表明，AvatarCraft 在创建人类头像以及渲染新颖的视图、姿势和形状方面是有效且稳健的。我们的项目页面是：https://avatar-craft.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AvatarCraft方法，通过单个文本提示生成可动画化的神经人类化身，支持参数化形状和姿态控制。
AI.motivation: 神经隐式场虽能生成高质量3D场景，但难以基于文本创建具有特定身份和艺术风格且易于动画化的3D人类化身。
AI.method: 结合扩散模型引导几何与纹理学习，设计多边界框训练策略、形状正则化及扩散约束，并通过显式变形场实现姿态和形状参数控制。
AI.result: 在多种文本描述上验证了AvatarCraft在生成人类化身及渲染新视角、姿态和形状方面的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AvatarCraft为文本到神经人类化身的生成提供了参数化控制方案，简化了动画与重塑流程。

authors_text: Xuanyao Chen,Zhijian Liu,Haotian Tang,Li Yi,Hang Zhao,Song Han
title: SparseViT: Revisiting Activation Sparsity for Efficient High-Resolution Vision Transformer
title_zh: SparseViT：重新审视高效高分辨率视觉变压器的激活稀疏性
comment: CVPR 2023. The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Project page: https://sparsevit.mit.edu
comments: CVPR 2023. The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Project page: https://sparsevit.mit.edu
abstract: High-resolution images enable neural networks to learn richer visual representations. However, this improved performance comes at the cost of growing computational complexity, hindering their usage in latency-sensitive applications. As not all pixels are equal, skipping computations for less-important regions offers a simple and effective measure to reduce the computation. This, however, is hard to be translated into actual speedup for CNNs since it breaks the regularity of the dense convolution workload. In this paper, we introduce SparseViT that revisits activation sparsity for recent window-based vision transformers (ViTs). As window attentions are naturally batched over blocks, actual speedup with window activation pruning becomes possible: i.e., ~50% latency reduction with 60% sparsity. Different layers should be assigned with different pruning ratios due to their diverse sensitivities and computational costs. We introduce sparsity-aware adaptation and apply the evolutionary search to efficiently find the optimal layerwise sparsity configuration within the vast search space. SparseViT achieves speedups of 1.5x, 1.4x, and 1.3x compared to its dense counterpart in monocular 3D object detection, 2D instance segmentation, and 2D semantic segmentation, respectively, with negligible to no loss of accuracy.
summary: High-resolution images enable neural networks to learn richer visual representations. However, this improved performance comes at the cost of growing computational complexity, hindering their usage in latency-sensitive applications. As not all pixels are equal, skipping computations for less-important regions offers a simple and effective measure to reduce the computation. This, however, is hard to be translated into actual speedup for CNNs since it breaks the regularity of the dense convolution workload. In this paper, we introduce SparseViT that revisits activation sparsity for recent window-based vision transformers (ViTs). As window attentions are naturally batched over blocks, actual speedup with window activation pruning becomes possible: i.e., ~50% latency reduction with 60% sparsity. Different layers should be assigned with different pruning ratios due to their diverse sensitivities and computational costs. We introduce sparsity-aware adaptation and apply the evolutionary search to efficiently find the optimal layerwise sparsity configuration within the vast search space. SparseViT achieves speedups of 1.5x, 1.4x, and 1.3x compared to its dense counterpart in monocular 3D object detection, 2D instance segmentation, and 2D semantic segmentation, respectively, with negligible to no loss of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率图像使神经网络能够学习更丰富的视觉表示。然而，这种性能的提高是以计算复杂性不断增加为代价的，阻碍了它们在延迟敏感的应用程序中的使用。由于并非所有像素都相等，因此跳过不太重要区域的计算提供了一种简单而有效的减少计算量的措施。然而，这很难转化为 CNN 的实际加速，因为它打破了密集卷积工作负载的规律性。在本文中，我们介绍了 SparseViT，它重新审视了最近基于窗口的视觉变换器（ViT）的激活稀疏性。由于窗口注意力自然地在块上进行批处理，因此窗口激活修剪的实际加速成为可能：即，在稀疏度为 60% 的情况下，延迟减少了约 50%。由于不同的层具有不同的敏感性和计算成本，因此应为不同的层分配不同的剪枝率。我们引入稀疏感知适应并应用进化搜索来在广阔的搜索空间中有效地找到最佳的分层稀疏配置。与密集对应的单目 3D 对象检测、2D 实例分割和 2D 语义分割相比，SparseViT 的速度分别提高了 1.5 倍、1.4 倍和 1.3 倍，并且精度损失可以忽略不计甚至没有损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SparseViT，通过重新审视激活稀疏性，提高高分辨率视觉Transformer的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率图像虽能提升视觉表征能力，但计算复杂度增加阻碍了其在延迟敏感场景的应用。传统CNN难以通过跳过不重要区域的计算实现加速，而基于窗口的视觉Transformer（ViT）可通过激活稀疏性实现有效加速。
AI.method: 引入基于窗口注意力的激活剪枝，结合稀疏性感知自适应和进化搜索，为不同层分配差异化剪枝比例，优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在单目3D目标检测、2D实例分割和语义分割任务中分别实现1.5x、1.4x和1.3x加速，且精度损失可忽略。
AI.conclusion: SparseViT通过激活稀疏性有效降低计算量，在保持精度的同时提升了高分辨率ViT的实用性。

search_text: SparseViT: Revisiting Activation Sparsity for Efficient High-Resolution Vision Transformer SparseViT：重新审视高效高分辨率视觉变压器的激活稀疏性 High-resolution images enable neural networks to learn richer visual representations. However, this improved performance comes at the cost of growing computational complexity, hindering their usage in latency-sensitive applications. As not all pixels are equal, skipping computations for less-important regions offers a simple and effective measure to reduce the computation. This, however, is hard to be translated into actual speedup for CNNs since it breaks the regularity of the dense convolution workload. In this paper, we introduce SparseViT that revisits activation sparsity for recent window-based vision transformers (ViTs). As window attentions are naturally batched over blocks, actual speedup with window activation pruning becomes possible: i.e., ~50% latency reduction with 60% sparsity. Different layers should be assigned with different pruning ratios due to their diverse sensitivities and computational costs. We introduce sparsity-aware adaptation and apply the evolutionary search to efficiently find the optimal layerwise sparsity configuration within the vast search space. SparseViT achieves speedups of 1.5x, 1.4x, and 1.3x compared to its dense counterpart in monocular 3D object detection, 2D instance segmentation, and 2D semantic segmentation, respectively, with negligible to no loss of accuracy. 高分辨率图像使神经网络能够学习更丰富的视觉表示。然而，这种性能的提高是以计算复杂性不断增加为代价的，阻碍了它们在延迟敏感的应用程序中的使用。由于并非所有像素都相等，因此跳过不太重要区域的计算提供了一种简单而有效的减少计算量的措施。然而，这很难转化为 CNN 的实际加速，因为它打破了密集卷积工作负载的规律性。在本文中，我们介绍了 SparseViT，它重新审视了最近基于窗口的视觉变换器（ViT）的激活稀疏性。由于窗口注意力自然地在块上进行批处理，因此窗口激活修剪的实际加速成为可能：即，在稀疏度为 60% 的情况下，延迟减少了约 50%。由于不同的层具有不同的敏感性和计算成本，因此应为不同的层分配不同的剪枝率。我们引入稀疏感知适应并应用进化搜索来在广阔的搜索空间中有效地找到最佳的分层稀疏配置。与密集对应的单目 3D 对象检测、2D 实例分割和 2D 语义分割相比，SparseViT 的速度分别提高了 1.5 倍、1.4 倍和 1.3 倍，并且精度损失可以忽略不计甚至没有损失。 本文提出SparseViT，通过重新审视激活稀疏性，提高高分辨率视觉Transformer的计算效率。 Xuanyao Chen,Zhijian Liu,Haotian Tang,Li Yi,Hang Zhao,Song Han cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Bolya,Judy Hoffman
title: Token Merging for Fast Stable Diffusion
title_zh: 代币合并实现快速稳定扩散
comment: Check out the code at https://github.com/dbolya/tomesd
comments: Check out the code at https://github.com/dbolya/tomesd
abstract: The landscape of image generation has been forever changed by open vocabulary diffusion models. However, at their core these models use transformers, which makes generation slow. Better implementations to increase the throughput of these transformers have emerged, but they still evaluate the entire model. In this paper, we instead speed up diffusion models by exploiting natural redundancy in generated images by merging redundant tokens. After making some diffusion-specific improvements to Token Merging (ToMe), our ToMe for Stable Diffusion can reduce the number of tokens in an existing Stable Diffusion model by up to 60% while still producing high quality images without any extra training. In the process, we speed up image generation by up to 2x and reduce memory consumption by up to 5.6x. Furthermore, this speed-up stacks with efficient implementations such as xFormers, minimally impacting quality while being up to 5.4x faster for large images. Code is available at https://github.com/dbolya/tomesd.
summary: The landscape of image generation has been forever changed by open vocabulary diffusion models. However, at their core these models use transformers, which makes generation slow. Better implementations to increase the throughput of these transformers have emerged, but they still evaluate the entire model. In this paper, we instead speed up diffusion models by exploiting natural redundancy in generated images by merging redundant tokens. After making some diffusion-specific improvements to Token Merging (ToMe), our ToMe for Stable Diffusion can reduce the number of tokens in an existing Stable Diffusion model by up to 60% while still producing high quality images without any extra training. In the process, we speed up image generation by up to 2x and reduce memory consumption by up to 5.6x. Furthermore, this speed-up stacks with efficient implementations such as xFormers, minimally impacting quality while being up to 5.4x faster for large images. Code is available at https://github.com/dbolya/tomesd.
abstract_zh: 开放词汇扩散模型永远改变了图像生成的格局。然而，这些模型的核心使用变压器，这使得生成速度变慢。提高这些变压器吞吐量的更好实现已经出现，但他们仍然评估整个模型。在本文中，我们通过合并冗余标记来利用生成图像中的自然冗余来加速扩散模型。在对令牌合并 (ToMe) 进行一些特定于扩散的改进后，我们的 ToMe for Stable Diffusion 可以将现有稳定扩散模型中的令牌数量减少多达 60%，同时仍然可以生成高质量的图像，而无需任何额外的训练。在此过程中，我们将图像生成速度提高了 2 倍，并将内存消耗减少了 5.6 倍。 Furthermore, this speed-up stacks with efficient implementations such as xFormers, minimally impacting quality while being up to 5.4x faster for large images.代码可在 https://github.com/dbolya/tomesd 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过合并冗余token来加速Stable Diffusion模型图像生成的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管开放词汇扩散模型在图像生成领域取得了巨大成功，但其核心基于Transformer架构，导致生成速度较慢。现有的优化方法虽然提高了吞吐量，但仍然需要评估整个模型。
AI.method: 本文改进了Token Merging（ToMe）方法，针对Stable Diffusion模型进行优化，通过合并生成图像中的冗余token来减少计算量。
AI.result: 该方法可将Stable Diffusion模型中的token数量减少多达60%，同时保持图像质量，图像生成速度提高至2倍，内存消耗减少至5.6倍。此外，该方法与xFormers等高效实现结合使用时，可进一步提升速度达5.4倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的ToMe方法有效加速了Stable Diffusion模型的图像生成过程，同时保持了高质量输出，为扩散模型的优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fabio Tosi,Alessio Tonioni,Daniele De Gregorio,Matteo Poggi
title: NeRF-Supervised Deep Stereo
title_zh: NeRF 监督的深度立体声
abstract: We introduce a novel framework for training deep stereo networks effortlessly and without any ground-truth. By leveraging state-of-the-art neural rendering solutions, we generate stereo training data from image sequences collected with a single handheld camera. On top of them, a NeRF-supervised training procedure is carried out, from which we exploit rendered stereo triplets to compensate for occlusions and depth maps as proxy labels. This results in stereo networks capable of predicting sharp and detailed disparity maps. Experimental results show that models trained under this regime yield a 30-40% improvement over existing self-supervised methods on the challenging Middlebury dataset, filling the gap to supervised models and, most times, outperforming them at zero-shot generalization.
summary: We introduce a novel framework for training deep stereo networks effortlessly and without any ground-truth. By leveraging state-of-the-art neural rendering solutions, we generate stereo training data from image sequences collected with a single handheld camera. On top of them, a NeRF-supervised training procedure is carried out, from which we exploit rendered stereo triplets to compensate for occlusions and depth maps as proxy labels. This results in stereo networks capable of predicting sharp and detailed disparity maps. Experimental results show that models trained under this regime yield a 30-40% improvement over existing self-supervised methods on the challenging Middlebury dataset, filling the gap to supervised models and, most times, outperforming them at zero-shot generalization.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的框架，可以轻松地训练深度立体网络，并且无需任何基础事实。通过利用最先进的神经渲染解决方案，我们从使用单个手持相机收集的图像序列生成立体训练数据。在它们之上，执行 NeRF 监督的训练过程，从中我们利用渲染的立体三元组来补偿遮挡和深度图作为代理标签。这使得立体网络能够预测清晰且详细的视差图。实验结果表明，在这种机制下训练的模型在具有挑战性的 Middlebury 数据集上比现有的自监督方法提高了 30-40%，填补了监督模型的空白，并且在大多数情况下，在零样本泛化方面优于监督模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需真实标签的深度立体网络训练框架，通过神经渲染生成立体训练数据并利用NeRF监督训练以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督立体匹配方法性能有限，而监督方法依赖昂贵的真实标签数据，本文旨在提出无需真实标签的高效训练方案。
AI.method: 使用单目相机拍摄的图像序列生成NeRF模型，通过渲染立体三元组和深度图作为代理标签，补偿遮挡并训练立体网络。
AI.result: 在Middlebury数据集上较自监督方法提升30-40%，零样本泛化能力接近甚至超越监督模型。
AI.conclusion: NeRF监督框架有效弥补了监督与自监督方法间的性能差距，实现了无需真实标签的高质量立体匹配。

motivation: 现有自监督立体匹配方法性能有限，而监督方法依赖昂贵的真实标签数据，本文旨在提出无需真实标签的高效训练方案。
method: 使用单目相机拍摄的图像序列生成NeRF模型，通过渲染立体三元组和深度图作为代理标签，补偿遮挡并训练立体网络。
result: 在Middlebury数据集上较自监督方法提升30-40%，零样本泛化能力接近甚至超越监督模型。
conclusion: NeRF监督框架有效弥补了监督与自监督方法间的性能差距，实现了无需真实标签的高质量立体匹配。
search_text: NeRF-Supervised Deep Stereo NeRF 监督的深度立体声 We introduce a novel framework for training deep stereo networks effortlessly and without any ground-truth. By leveraging state-of-the-art neural rendering solutions, we generate stereo training data from image sequences collected with a single handheld camera. On top of them, a NeRF-supervised training procedure is carried out, from which we exploit rendered stereo triplets to compensate for occlusions and depth maps as proxy labels. This results in stereo networks capable of predicting sharp and detailed disparity maps. Experimental results show that models trained under this regime yield a 30-40% improvement over existing self-supervised methods on the challenging Middlebury dataset, filling the gap to supervised models and, most times, outperforming them at zero-shot generalization. 我们引入了一种新颖的框架，可以轻松地训练深度立体网络，并且无需任何基础事实。通过利用最先进的神经渲染解决方案，我们从使用单个手持相机收集的图像序列生成立体训练数据。在它们之上，执行 NeRF 监督的训练过程，从中我们利用渲染的立体三元组来补偿遮挡和深度图作为代理标签。这使得立体网络能够预测清晰且详细的视差图。实验结果表明，在这种机制下训练的模型在具有挑战性的 Middlebury 数据集上比现有的自监督方法提高了 30-40%，填补了监督模型的空白，并且在大多数情况下，在零样本泛化方面优于监督模型。 本文提出一种无需真实标签的深度立体网络训练框架，通过神经渲染生成立体训练数据并利用NeRF监督训练以提升性能。 Fabio Tosi,Alessio Tonioni,Daniele De Gregorio,Matteo Poggi cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Weihua Chen,Xianzhe Xu,Jian Jia,Hao luo,Yaohua Wang,Fan Wang,Rong Jin,Xiuyu Sun
title: Beyond Appearance: a Semantic Controllable Self-Supervised Learning Framework for Human-Centric Visual Tasks
title_zh: 超越外观：用于以人为中心的视觉任务的语义可控自我监督学习框架
abstract: Human-centric visual tasks have attracted increasing research attention due to their widespread applications. In this paper, we aim to learn a general human representation from massive unlabeled human images which can benefit downstream human-centric tasks to the maximum extent. We call this method SOLIDER, a Semantic cOntrollable seLf-supervIseD lEaRning framework. Unlike the existing self-supervised learning methods, prior knowledge from human images is utilized in SOLIDER to build pseudo semantic labels and import more semantic information into the learned representation. Meanwhile, we note that different downstream tasks always require different ratios of semantic information and appearance information. For example, human parsing requires more semantic information, while person re-identification needs more appearance information for identification purpose. So a single learned representation cannot fit for all requirements. To solve this problem, SOLIDER introduces a conditional network with a semantic controller. After the model is trained, users can send values to the controller to produce representations with different ratios of semantic information, which can fit different needs of downstream tasks. Finally, SOLIDER is verified on six downstream human-centric visual tasks. It outperforms state of the arts and builds new baselines for these tasks. The code is released in https://github.com/tinyvision/SOLIDER.
summary: Human-centric visual tasks have attracted increasing research attention due to their widespread applications. In this paper, we aim to learn a general human representation from massive unlabeled human images which can benefit downstream human-centric tasks to the maximum extent. We call this method SOLIDER, a Semantic cOntrollable seLf-supervIseD lEaRning framework. Unlike the existing self-supervised learning methods, prior knowledge from human images is utilized in SOLIDER to build pseudo semantic labels and import more semantic information into the learned representation. Meanwhile, we note that different downstream tasks always require different ratios of semantic information and appearance information. For example, human parsing requires more semantic information, while person re-identification needs more appearance information for identification purpose. So a single learned representation cannot fit for all requirements. To solve this problem, SOLIDER introduces a conditional network with a semantic controller. After the model is trained, users can send values to the controller to produce representations with different ratios of semantic information, which can fit different needs of downstream tasks. Finally, SOLIDER is verified on six downstream human-centric visual tasks. It outperforms state of the arts and builds new baselines for these tasks. The code is released in https://github.com/tinyvision/SOLIDER.
abstract_zh: 以人为中心的视觉任务由于其广泛的应用而引起了越来越多的研究关注。在本文中，我们的目标是从大量未标记的人类图像中学习一般的人类表示，这可以最大程度地有利于下游以人类为中心的任务。我们将这种方法称为 SOLIDER，一种语义可控的自我监督学习框架。与现有的自监督学习方法不同，SOLIDER 利用人类图像的先验知识来构建伪语义标签，并将更多语义信息导入到学习的表示中。同时，我们注意到不同的下游任务总是需要不同的语义信息和外观信息的比例。例如，人体解析需要更多的语义信息，而人物重新识别则需要更多的外观信息以用于识别目的。因此，单一的学习表示无法满足所有要求。为了解决这个问题，SOLIDER 引入了带有语义控制器的条件网络。模型训练完成后，用户可以向控制器发送值，以产生具有不同语义信息比例的表示，以适应下游任务的不同需求。最后，SOLIDER 在六个下游以人为中心的视觉任务上得到验证。它超越了最先进的技术，并为这些任务建立了新的基线。代码发布于 https://github.com/tinyvision/SOLIDER。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义可控的自监督学习框架SOLIDER，用于学习通用的人类表征以提升下游人体相关视觉任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法无法适应不同下游任务对语义信息与外观信息的不同需求，例如人体解析需要更多语义信息而行人重识别更依赖外观特征。
AI.method: 通过引入语义控制器的条件网络，利用伪语义标签注入更多语义信息，并在推理时通过控制器调节表征中语义与外观信息的比例。
AI.result: 在六个下游人体视觉任务中均优于现有方法，建立了新的基准线。
AI.conclusion: SOLIDER通过动态控制语义信息比例有效提升了模型对多样化任务的适应能力，验证了语义可控表征学习的有效性。

authors_text: Zichen Zhang,Luca Weihs
title: When Learning Is Out of Reach, Reset: Generalization in Autonomous Visuomotor Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 当学习遥不可及时，重置：自主视觉运动强化学习的泛化
abstract: Episodic training, where an agent's environment is reset after every success or failure, is the de facto standard when training embodied reinforcement learning (RL) agents. The underlying assumption that the environment can be easily reset is limiting both practically, as resets generally require human effort in the real world and can be computationally expensive in simulation, and philosophically, as we'd expect intelligent agents to be able to continuously learn without intervention. Work in learning without any resets, i.e{.} Reset-Free RL (RF-RL), is promising but is plagued by the problem of irreversible transitions (e.g{.} an object breaking) which halt learning. Moreover, the limited state diversity and instrument setup encountered during RF-RL means that works studying RF-RL largely do not require their models to generalize to new environments. In this work, we instead look to minimize, rather than completely eliminate, resets while building visual agents that can meaningfully generalize. As studying generalization has previously not been a focus of benchmarks designed for RF-RL, we propose a new Stretch Pick-and-Place benchmark designed for evaluating generalizations across goals, cosmetic variations, and structural changes. Moreover, towards building performant reset-minimizing RL agents, we propose unsupervised metrics to detect irreversible transitions and a single-policy training mechanism to enable generalization. Our proposed approach significantly outperforms prior episodic, reset-free, and reset-minimizing approaches achieving higher success rates with fewer resets in Stretch-P\&P and another popular RF-RL benchmark. Finally, we find that our proposed approach can dramatically reduce the number of resets required for training other embodied tasks, in particular for RoboTHOR ObjectNav we obtain higher success rates than episodic approaches using 99.97\% fewer resets.
summary: Episodic training, where an agent's environment is reset after every success or failure, is the de facto standard when training embodied reinforcement learning (RL) agents. The underlying assumption that the environment can be easily reset is limiting both practically, as resets generally require human effort in the real world and can be computationally expensive in simulation, and philosophically, as we'd expect intelligent agents to be able to continuously learn without intervention. Work in learning without any resets, i.e{.} Reset-Free RL (RF-RL), is promising but is plagued by the problem of irreversible transitions (e.g{.} an object breaking) which halt learning. Moreover, the limited state diversity and instrument setup encountered during RF-RL means that works studying RF-RL largely do not require their models to generalize to new environments. In this work, we instead look to minimize, rather than completely eliminate, resets while building visual agents that can meaningfully generalize. As studying generalization has previously not been a focus of benchmarks designed for RF-RL, we propose a new Stretch Pick-and-Place benchmark designed for evaluating generalizations across goals, cosmetic variations, and structural changes. Moreover, towards building performant reset-minimizing RL agents, we propose unsupervised metrics to detect irreversible transitions and a single-policy training mechanism to enable generalization. Our proposed approach significantly outperforms prior episodic, reset-free, and reset-minimizing approaches achieving higher success rates with fewer resets in Stretch-P\&P and another popular RF-RL benchmark. Finally, we find that our proposed approach can dramatically reduce the number of resets required for training other embodied tasks, in particular for RoboTHOR ObjectNav we obtain higher success rates than episodic approaches using 99.97\% fewer resets.
abstract_zh: 情景训练（即每次成功或失败后都会重置智能体的环境）是训练具体强化学习（RL）智能体时的事实上的标准。环境可以轻松重置的基本假设在实践上和哲学上都受到限制，因为重置通常需要现实世界中的人类努力，并且在模拟中可能需要大量的计算成本，因为我们期望智能代理能够在没有干预的情况下持续学习。无需任何重置的学习工作，即无重置强化学习 (RF-RL)，前景广阔，但受到不可逆转换（例如物体损坏）问题的困扰，从而导致学习停止。此外，RF-RL 过程中遇到的有限状态多样性和仪器设置意味着研究 RF-RL 的工作很大程度上不需要他们的模型推广到新环境。在这项工作中，我们希望在构建可以有意义地泛化的视觉代理时尽量减少而不是完全消除重置。由于研究泛化此前并不是为 RF-RL 设计的基准的重点，因此我们提出了一个新的 Stretch Pick-and-Place 基准，旨在评估跨目标、外观变化和结构变化的泛化。此外，为了构建高性能的重置最小化 RL 代理，我们提出了无监督指标来检测不可逆的转换，并提出了单策略训练机制来实现泛化。我们提出的方法明显优于之前的情景式、免重置和重置最小化方法，在 Stretch-P\&P 和另一个流行的 RF-RL 基准测试中以更少的重置实现了更高的成功率。最后，我们发现我们提出的方法可以大大减少训练其他具体任务所需的重置次数，特别是对于 RoboTHOR ObjectNav，我们比情景方法使用更少的 99.97% 的重置获得了更高的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种减少重置次数的强化学习方法，旨在提升视觉运动控制代理在不同环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统基于重置的强化学习训练方式存在实际成本高和哲学局限性，而无重置学习面临不可逆状态阻碍和泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计Stretch Pick-and-Place基准测试泛化能力，提出无监督不可逆状态检测指标与单策略训练机制。
AI.result: 在Stretch-P&P和RoboTHOR基准中显著超越现有方法，RoboTHOR任务重置次数减少99.97%且成功率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡重置次数与泛化能力，为持续学习的具身智能体提供了可行解决方案。

Finally, we find that our proposed approach can dramatically reduce the number of resets required for training other embodied tasks, in particular for RoboTHOR ObjectNav we obtain higher success rates than episodic approaches using 99.97\% fewer resets. 情景训练（即每次成功或失败后都会重置智能体的环境）是训练具体强化学习（RL）智能体时的事实上的标准。环境可以轻松重置的基本假设在实践上和哲学上都受到限制，因为重置通常需要现实世界中的人类努力，并且在模拟中可能需要大量的计算成本，因为我们期望智能代理能够在没有干预的情况下持续学习。无需任何重置的学习工作，即无重置强化学习 (RF-RL)，前景广阔，但受到不可逆转换（例如物体损坏）问题的困扰，从而导致学习停止。此外，RF-RL 过程中遇到的有限状态多样性和仪器设置意味着研究 RF-RL 的工作很大程度上不需要他们的模型推广到新环境。在这项工作中，我们希望在构建可以有意义地泛化的视觉代理时尽量减少而不是完全消除重置。由于研究泛化此前并不是为 RF-RL 设计的基准的重点，因此我们提出了一个新的 Stretch Pick-and-Place 基准，旨在评估跨目标、外观变化和结构变化的泛化。此外，为了构建高性能的重置最小化 RL 代理，我们提出了无监督指标来检测不可逆的转换，并提出了单策略训练机制来实现泛化。我们提出的方法明显优于之前的情景式、免重置和重置最小化方法，在 Stretch-P\&P 和另一个流行的 RF-RL 基准测试中以更少的重置实现了更高的成功率。最后，我们发现我们提出的方法可以大大减少训练其他具体任务所需的重置次数，特别是对于 RoboTHOR ObjectNav，我们比情景方法使用更少的 99.97% 的重置获得了更高的成功率。 本文提出了一种减少重置次数的强化学习方法，旨在提升视觉运动控制代理在不同环境中的泛化能力。 Zichen Zhang,Luca Weihs cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Wen Wang,Yan Jiang,Kangyang Xie,Zide Liu,Hao Chen,Yue Cao,Xinlong Wang,Chunhua Shen
title: Zero-Shot Video Editing Using Off-The-Shelf Image Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用现成的图像扩散模型进行零镜头视频编辑
comment: Add customized video editing. Under Review
comments: Add customized video editing. Under Review
abstract: Large-scale text-to-image diffusion models achieve unprecedented success in image generation and editing. However, how to extend such success to video editing is unclear. Recent initial attempts at video editing require significant text-to-video data and computation resources for training, which is often not accessible. In this work, we propose vid2vid-zero, a simple yet effective method for zero-shot video editing. Our vid2vid-zero leverages off-the-shelf image diffusion models, and doesn't require training on any video. At the core of our method is a null-text inversion module for text-to-video alignment, a cross-frame modeling module for temporal consistency, and a spatial regularization module for fidelity to the original video. Without any training, we leverage the dynamic nature of the attention mechanism to enable bi-directional temporal modeling at test time. Experiments and analyses show promising results in editing attributes, subjects, places, etc., in real-world videos. Code is made available at \url{https://github.com/baaivision/vid2vid-zero}.
summary: Large-scale text-to-image diffusion models achieve unprecedented success in image generation and editing. However, how to extend such success to video editing is unclear. Recent initial attempts at video editing require significant text-to-video data and computation resources for training, which is often not accessible. In this work, we propose vid2vid-zero, a simple yet effective method for zero-shot video editing. Our vid2vid-zero leverages off-the-shelf image diffusion models, and doesn't require training on any video. At the core of our method is a null-text inversion module for text-to-video alignment, a cross-frame modeling module for temporal consistency, and a spatial regularization module for fidelity to the original video. Without any training, we leverage the dynamic nature of the attention mechanism to enable bi-directional temporal modeling at test time. Experiments and analyses show promising results in editing attributes, subjects, places, etc., in real-world videos. Code is made available at \url{https://github.com/baaivision/vid2vid-zero}.
abstract_zh: 大规模文本到图像的扩散模型在图像生成和编辑方面取得了前所未有的成功。然而，如何将这种成功扩展到视频编辑尚不清楚。最近对视频编辑的初步尝试需要大量的文本到视频数据和计算资源来进行训练，而这些资源通常是无法访问的。在这项工作中，我们提出了 vid2vid-zero，一种简单而有效的零镜头视频编辑方法。我们的 vid2vid-zero 利用现成的图像扩散模型，不需要对任何视频进行训练。我们方法的核心是用于文本到视频对齐的空文本反转模块、用于时间一致性的跨帧建模模块以及用于保真原始视频的空间正则化模块。无需任何训练，我们就利用注意力机制的动态特性在测试时实现双向时间建模。实验和分析表明，在现实视频中编辑属性、主题、地点等方面取得了有希望的结果。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/baaivision/vid2vid-zero} 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的视频编辑方法，利用现成图像扩散模型进行零样本视频编辑
AI.motivation: 现有方法需大量数据和计算资源，难以普及，因此需要一种无需训练、利用现有模型的视频编辑方法
AI.method: 结合null-text inversion、cross-frame建模和空间正则化模块，利用注意力机制实现双向时间建模，无需训练
AI.result: 在真实视频的属性、主体、地点等编辑任务中取得有希望的结果
AI.conclusion: 证明了无需训练的视频编辑可行性，未来可优化模块提升效果

authors_text: Hung-Yu Tseng,Qinbo Li,Changil Kim,Suhib Alsisan,Jia-Bin Huang,Johannes Kopf
title: Consistent View Synthesis with Pose-Guided Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用姿势引导扩散模型进行一致的视图合成
abstract: Novel view synthesis from a single image has been a cornerstone problem for many Virtual Reality applications that provide immersive experiences. However, most existing techniques can only synthesize novel views within a limited range of camera motion or fail to generate consistent and high-quality novel views under significant camera movement. In this work, we propose a pose-guided diffusion model to generate a consistent long-term video of novel views from a single image. We design an attention layer that uses epipolar lines as constraints to facilitate the association between different viewpoints. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed diffusion model against state-of-the-art transformer-based and GAN-based approaches.
summary: Novel view synthesis from a single image has been a cornerstone problem for many Virtual Reality applications that provide immersive experiences. However, most existing techniques can only synthesize novel views within a limited range of camera motion or fail to generate consistent and high-quality novel views under significant camera movement. In this work, we propose a pose-guided diffusion model to generate a consistent long-term video of novel views from a single image. We design an attention layer that uses epipolar lines as constraints to facilitate the association between different viewpoints. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed diffusion model against state-of-the-art transformer-based and GAN-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 来自单个图像的新颖视图合成一直是许多提供沉浸式体验的虚拟现实应用程序的基石问题。然而，大多数现有技术只能在有限的相机运动范围内合成新颖的视图，或者无法在显着的相机运动下生成一致且高质量的新颖视图。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种姿势引导扩散模型，用于从单个图像生成新颖视图的一致的长期视频。我们设计了一个注意力层，使用极线作为约束来促进不同观点之间的关联。合成数据集和真实数据集的实验结果证明了所提出的扩散模型相对于最先进的基于 Transformer 和基于 GAN 的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种姿态引导的扩散模型，用于从单张图像生成具有大范围相机运动的连贯新视角视频。
AI.motivation: 现有新视角合成技术在相机运动较大时难以生成一致且高质量的视图，限制了虚拟现实等应用的沉浸感。
AI.method: 设计基于极线约束的注意力层，结合姿态引导的扩散模型，实现多视角视图的一致性关联。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上优于现有Transformer和GAN方法，能生成更连贯高质量的长时视频。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大范围相机运动下的视角合成问题，为VR应用提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Lingdong Kong,Youquan Liu,Xin Li,Runnan Chen,Wenwei Zhang,Jiawei Ren,Liang Pan,Kai Chen,Ziwei Liu
title: Robo3D: Towards Robust and Reliable 3D Perception against Corruptions
title_zh: Robo3D：实现稳健可靠的反腐败 3D 感知
comment: ICCV 2023; 34 pages, 26 figures, 26 tables; Code at https://github.com/ldkong1205/Robo3D
comments: ICCV 2023; 34 pages, 26 figures, 26 tables; Code at https://github.com/ldkong1205/Robo3D
abstract: The robustness of 3D perception systems under natural corruptions from environments and sensors is pivotal for safety-critical applications. Existing large-scale 3D perception datasets often contain data that are meticulously cleaned. Such configurations, however, cannot reflect the reliability of perception models during the deployment stage. In this work, we present Robo3D, the first comprehensive benchmark heading toward probing the robustness of 3D detectors and segmentors under out-of-distribution scenarios against natural corruptions that occur in real-world environments. Specifically, we consider eight corruption types stemming from severe weather conditions, external disturbances, and internal sensor failure. We uncover that, although promising results have been progressively achieved on standard benchmarks, state-of-the-art 3D perception models are at risk of being vulnerable to corruptions. We draw key observations on the use of data representations, augmentation schemes, and training strategies, that could severely affect the model's performance. To pursue better robustness, we propose a density-insensitive training framework along with a simple flexible voxelization strategy to enhance the model resiliency. We hope our benchmark and approach could inspire future research in designing more robust and reliable 3D perception models. Our robustness benchmark suite is publicly available.
summary: The robustness of 3D perception systems under natural corruptions from environments and sensors is pivotal for safety-critical applications. Existing large-scale 3D perception datasets often contain data that are meticulously cleaned. Such configurations, however, cannot reflect the reliability of perception models during the deployment stage. In this work, we present Robo3D, the first comprehensive benchmark heading toward probing the robustness of 3D detectors and segmentors under out-of-distribution scenarios against natural corruptions that occur in real-world environments. Specifically, we consider eight corruption types stemming from severe weather conditions, external disturbances, and internal sensor failure. We uncover that, although promising results have been progressively achieved on standard benchmarks, state-of-the-art 3D perception models are at risk of being vulnerable to corruptions. We draw key observations on the use of data representations, augmentation schemes, and training strategies, that could severely affect the model's performance. To pursue better robustness, we propose a density-insensitive training framework along with a simple flexible voxelization strategy to enhance the model resiliency. We hope our benchmark and approach could inspire future research in designing more robust and reliable 3D perception models. Our robustness benchmark suite is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 3D 感知系统在环境和传感器自然损坏下的鲁棒性对于安全关键型应用至关重要。现有的大规模 3D 感知数据集通常包含经过精心清理的数据。然而，这种配置无法反映感知模型在部署阶段的可靠性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Robo3D，这是第一个全面的基准测试，旨在探讨 3D 检测器和分割器在分布外场景下针对现实环境中发生的自然损坏的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们考虑了由恶劣天气条件、外部干扰和内部传感器故障引起的八种损坏类型。我们发现，尽管在标准基准上已经逐步取得了有希望的结果，但最先进的 3D 感知模型仍面临着容易受到损坏的风险。我们对数据表示、增强方案和训练策略的使用进行了关键观察，这些可能会严重影响模型的性能。为了追求更好的鲁棒性，我们提出了一个密度不敏感的训练框架以及一个简单灵活的体素化策略来增强模型的弹性。我们希望我们的基准和方法能够激发未来的研究，设计更强大、更可靠的 3D 感知模型。我们的稳健性基准套件是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Robo3D基准，用于评估3D感知模型在真实环境中的鲁棒性，针对传感器和环境引起的八种自然干扰进行测试。
AI.motivation: 现有3D感知数据集数据过于干净，无法反映模型在部署阶段面对真实环境干扰时的可靠性问题。
AI.method: 构建包含八种干扰类型的基准数据集，设计密度无关训练框架及灵活体素化策略，分析数据表示、增强方案和训练策略对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现当前先进模型在干扰下表现脆弱，提出的框架和策略能有效提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Robo3D基准及方法为未来设计更鲁棒的3D感知模型提供了研究方向和实验支持。

search_text: Robo3D: Towards Robust and Reliable 3D Perception against Corruptions Robo3D：实现稳健可靠的反腐败 3D 感知 The robustness of 3D perception systems under natural corruptions from environments and sensors is pivotal for safety-critical applications. Existing large-scale 3D perception datasets often contain data that are meticulously cleaned. Such configurations, however, cannot reflect the reliability of perception models during the deployment stage. In this work, we present Robo3D, the first comprehensive benchmark heading toward probing the robustness of 3D detectors and segmentors under out-of-distribution scenarios against natural corruptions that occur in real-world environments. Specifically, we consider eight corruption types stemming from severe weather conditions, external disturbances, and internal sensor failure. We uncover that, although promising results have been progressively achieved on standard benchmarks, state-of-the-art 3D perception models are at risk of being vulnerable to corruptions. We draw key observations on the use of data representations, augmentation schemes, and training strategies, that could severely affect the model's performance. To pursue better robustness, we propose a density-insensitive training framework along with a simple flexible voxelization strategy to enhance the model resiliency. We hope our benchmark and approach could inspire future research in designing more robust and reliable 3D perception models. Our robustness benchmark suite is publicly available. 3D 感知系统在环境和传感器自然损坏下的鲁棒性对于安全关键型应用至关重要。现有的大规模 3D 感知数据集通常包含经过精心清理的数据。然而，这种配置无法反映感知模型在部署阶段的可靠性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Robo3D，这是第一个全面的基准测试，旨在探讨 3D 检测器和分割器在分布外场景下针对现实环境中发生的自然损坏的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们考虑了由恶劣天气条件、外部干扰和内部传感器故障引起的八种损坏类型。我们发现，尽管在标准基准上已经逐步取得了有希望的结果，但最先进的 3D 感知模型仍面临着容易受到损坏的风险。我们对数据表示、增强方案和训练策略的使用进行了关键观察，这些可能会严重影响模型的性能。为了追求更好的鲁棒性，我们提出了一个密度不敏感的训练框架以及一个简单灵活的体素化策略来增强模型的弹性。我们希望我们的基准和方法能够激发未来的研究，设计更强大、更可靠的 3D 感知模型。我们的稳健性基准套件是公开可用的。 本文提出Robo3D基准，用于评估3D感知模型在真实环境中的鲁棒性，针对传感器和环境引起的八种自然干扰进行测试。 Lingdong Kong,Youquan Liu,Xin Li,Runnan Chen,Wenwei Zhang,Jiawei Ren,Liang Pan,Kai Chen,Ziwei Liu cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Dongyoon Han,Junsuk Choe,Seonghyeok Chun,John Joon Young Chung,Minsuk Chang,Sangdoo Yun,Jean Y. Song,Seong Joon Oh
title: Neglected Free Lunch -- Learning Image Classifiers Using Annotation Byproducts
title_zh: 被忽视的免费午餐——使用注释副产品学习图像分类器
comment: Code & data at https://github.com/naver-ai/NeglectedFreeLunch. To be presented at ICCV'23
comments: Code & data at https://github.com/naver-ai/NeglectedFreeLunch. To be presented at ICCV'23
abstract: Supervised learning of image classifiers distills human knowledge into a parametric model through pairs of images and corresponding labels (X,Y). We argue that this simple and widely used representation of human knowledge neglects rich auxiliary information from the annotation procedure, such as the time-series of mouse traces and clicks left after image selection. Our insight is that such annotation byproducts Z provide approximate human attention that weakly guides the model to focus on the foreground cues, reducing spurious correlations and discouraging shortcut learning. To verify this, we create ImageNet-AB and COCO-AB. They are ImageNet and COCO training sets enriched with sample-wise annotation byproducts, collected by replicating the respective original annotation tasks. We refer to the new paradigm of training models with annotation byproducts as learning using annotation byproducts (LUAB). We show that a simple multitask loss for regressing Z together with Y already improves the generalisability and robustness of the learned models. Compared to the original supervised learning, LUAB does not require extra annotation costs. ImageNet-AB and COCO-AB are at https://github.com/naver-ai/NeglectedFreeLunch.
summary: Supervised learning of image classifiers distills human knowledge into a parametric model through pairs of images and corresponding labels (X,Y). We argue that this simple and widely used representation of human knowledge neglects rich auxiliary information from the annotation procedure, such as the time-series of mouse traces and clicks left after image selection. Our insight is that such annotation byproducts Z provide approximate human attention that weakly guides the model to focus on the foreground cues, reducing spurious correlations and discouraging shortcut learning. To verify this, we create ImageNet-AB and COCO-AB. They are ImageNet and COCO training sets enriched with sample-wise annotation byproducts, collected by replicating the respective original annotation tasks. We refer to the new paradigm of training models with annotation byproducts as learning using annotation byproducts (LUAB). We show that a simple multitask loss for regressing Z together with Y already improves the generalisability and robustness of the learned models. Compared to the original supervised learning, LUAB does not require extra annotation costs. ImageNet-AB and COCO-AB are at https://github.com/naver-ai/NeglectedFreeLunch.
abstract_zh: 图像分类器的监督学习通过图像对和相应的标签 (X,Y) 将人类知识提炼成参数模型。我们认为，这种简单且广泛使用的人类知识表示忽略了注释过程中丰富的辅助信息，例如鼠标轨迹的时间序列和图像选择后留下的点击。我们的见解是，这种注释副产品 Z 提供了近似人类的注意力，弱地引导模型关注前景线索，减少虚假相关性并阻止捷径学习。为了验证这一点，我们创建了 ImageNet-AB 和 COCO-AB。它们是 ImageNet 和 COCO 训练集，富含样本注释副产品，通过复制各自的原始注释任务来收集。我们将带有注释副产品的训练模型的新范式称为使用注释副产品学习（LUAB）。我们表明，将 Z 与 Y 一起回归的简单多任务损失已经提高了学习模型的通用性和鲁棒性。与原来的监督学习相比，LUAB不需要额外的标注成本。 ImageNet-AB 和 COCO-AB 位于 https://github.com/naver-ai/NeglectedFreeLunch。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用图像标注过程中产生的副产品信息（如鼠标轨迹和点击记录）来提升图像分类模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习仅使用图像和标签对（X,Y）进行训练，忽视了标注过程中产生的丰富辅助信息（如鼠标轨迹和点击记录），这可能导致模型依赖捷径学习而非真正理解图像内容。
AI.method: 通过构建包含标注副产品的扩展数据集（ImageNet-AB和COCO-AB），并采用多任务损失函数同时回归标注副产品Z和标签Y，从而引导模型关注关键特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上提升了模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性，且无需额外标注成本。
AI.conclusion: 利用标注副产品信息能够有效提升图像分类模型的性能，同时保持与传统方法相当的标注成本。

We argue that this simple and widely used representation of human knowledge neglects rich auxiliary information from the annotation procedure, such as the time-series of mouse traces and clicks left after image selection. Our insight is that such annotation byproducts Z provide approximate human attention that weakly guides the model to focus on the foreground cues, reducing spurious correlations and discouraging shortcut learning. authors_text: Renhong Zhang,Tianheng Cheng,Shusheng Yang,Haoyi Jiang,Shuai Zhang,Jiancheng Lyu,Xin Li,Xiaowen Ying,Dashan Gao,Wenyu Liu,Xinggang Wang
title: MobileInst: Video Instance Segmentation on the Mobile
title_zh: MobileInst：移动设备上的视频实例分割
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2024 Main Track; Code will be released
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2024 Main Track; Code will be released
abstract: Video instance segmentation on mobile devices is an important yet very challenging edge AI problem. It mainly suffers from (1) heavy computation and memory costs for frame-by-frame pixel-level instance perception and (2) complicated heuristics for tracking objects. To address those issues, we present MobileInst, a lightweight and mobile-friendly framework for video instance segmentation on mobile devices. Firstly, MobileInst adopts a mobile vision transformer to extract multi-level semantic features and presents an efficient query-based dual-transformer instance decoder for mask kernels and a semantic-enhanced mask decoder to generate instance segmentation per frame. Secondly, MobileInst exploits simple yet effective kernel reuse and kernel association to track objects for video instance segmentation. Further, we propose temporal query passing to enhance the tracking ability for kernels. We conduct experiments on COCO and YouTube-VIS datasets to demonstrate the superiority of MobileInst and evaluate the inference latency on one single CPU core of Snapdragon 778G Mobile Platform, without other methods of acceleration. On the COCO dataset, MobileInst achieves 31.2 mask AP and 433 ms on the mobile CPU, which reduces the latency by 50% compared to the previous SOTA. For video instance segmentation, MobileInst achieves 35.0 AP on YouTube-VIS 2019 and 30.1 AP on YouTube-VIS 2021. Code will be available to facilitate real-world applications and future research.
summary: Video instance segmentation on mobile devices is an important yet very challenging edge AI problem. It mainly suffers from (1) heavy computation and memory costs for frame-by-frame pixel-level instance perception and (2) complicated heuristics for tracking objects. To address those issues, we present MobileInst, a lightweight and mobile-friendly framework for video instance segmentation on mobile devices. Firstly, MobileInst adopts a mobile vision transformer to extract multi-level semantic features and presents an efficient query-based dual-transformer instance decoder for mask kernels and a semantic-enhanced mask decoder to generate instance segmentation per frame. Secondly, MobileInst exploits simple yet effective kernel reuse and kernel association to track objects for video instance segmentation. Further, we propose temporal query passing to enhance the tracking ability for kernels. We conduct experiments on COCO and YouTube-VIS datasets to demonstrate the superiority of MobileInst and evaluate the inference latency on one single CPU core of Snapdragon 778G Mobile Platform, without other methods of acceleration. On the COCO dataset, MobileInst achieves 31.2 mask AP and 433 ms on the mobile CPU, which reduces the latency by 50% compared to the previous SOTA. For video instance segmentation, MobileInst achieves 35.0 AP on YouTube-VIS 2019 and 30.1 AP on YouTube-VIS 2021. Code will be available to facilitate real-world applications and future research.
abstract_zh: 移动设备上的视频实例分割是一个重要但非常具有挑战性的边缘人工智能问题。它主要面临以下问题：（1）逐帧像素级实例感知的大量计算和内存成本以及（2）跟踪对象的复杂启发式方法。为了解决这些问题，我们推出了 MobileInst，这是一个轻量级且适合移动设备的框架，用于移动设备上的视频实例分割。首先，MobileInst 采用移动视觉转换器来提取多级语义特征，并提出了一种高效的基于查询的双转换器实例解码器，用于掩码内核和语义增强掩码解码器，以生成每帧的实例分割。其次，MobileInst 利用简单而有效的内核重用和内核关联来跟踪视频实例分割的对象。此外，我们提出时间查询传递来增强内核的跟踪能力。我们在 COCO 和 YouTube-VIS 数据集上进行实验，以展示 MobileInst 的优越性，并评估 Snapdragon 778G 移动平台单个 CPU 核心上的推理延迟，无需其他加速方法。在 COCO 数据集上，MobileInst 在移动 CPU 上实现了 31.2 mask AP 和 433 ms，与之前的 SOTA 相比，延迟降低了 50%。对于视频实例分割，MobileInst 在 YouTube-VIS 2019 上实现了 35.0 AP，在 YouTube-VIS 2021 上实现了 30.1 AP。代码将可用于促进实际应用和未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MobileInst，一种轻量级的移动端视频实例分割框架。
AI.motivation: 视频实例分割在移动端面临计算量大、内存消耗高及跟踪策略复杂等挑战，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用移动端视觉Transformer提取多级语义特征，设计高效查询双Transformer解码器与语义增强掩码解码器，并通过内核复用、关联及时间查询传递优化跟踪能力。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到31.2 mask AP且延迟433ms（较SOTA降低50%），在YouTube-VIS 2019/2021分别取得35.0/30.1 AP。
AI.conclusion: MobileInst在保持精度的同时显著提升移动端视频实例分割效率，为实际应用提供可行方案。

It mainly suffers from (1) heavy computation and memory costs for frame-by-frame pixel-level instance perception and (2) complicated heuristics for tracking objects. To address those issues, we present MobileInst, a lightweight and mobile-friendly framework for video instance segmentation on mobile devices. Firstly, MobileInst adopts a mobile vision transformer to extract multi-level semantic features and presents an efficient query-based dual-transformer instance decoder for mask kernels and a semantic-enhanced mask decoder to generate instance segmentation per frame. Secondly, MobileInst exploits simple yet effective kernel reuse and kernel association to track objects for video instance segmentation. Further, we propose temporal query passing to enhance the tracking ability for kernels. We conduct experiments on COCO and YouTube-VIS datasets to demonstrate the superiority of MobileInst and evaluate the inference latency on one single CPU core of Snapdragon 778G Mobile Platform, without other methods of acceleration. On the COCO dataset, MobileInst achieves 31.2 mask AP and 433 ms on the mobile CPU, which reduces the latency by 50% compared to the previous SOTA. For video instance segmentation, MobileInst achieves 35.0 AP on YouTube-VIS 2019 and 30.1 AP on YouTube-VIS 2021. Code will be available to facilitate real-world applications and future research. 移动设备上的视频实例分割是一个重要但非常具有挑战性的边缘人工智能问题。它主要面临以下问题：（1）逐帧像素级实例感知的大量计算和内存成本以及（2）跟踪对象的复杂启发式方法。为了解决这些问题，我们推出了 MobileInst，这是一个轻量级且适合移动设备的框架，用于移动设备上的视频实例分割。首先，MobileInst 采用移动视觉转换器来提取多级语义特征，并提出了一种高效的基于查询的双转换器实例解码器，用于掩码内核和语义增强掩码解码器，以生成每帧的实例分割。其次，MobileInst 利用简单而有效的内核重用和内核关联来跟踪视频实例分割的对象。此外，我们提出时间查询传递来增强内核的跟踪能力。我们在 COCO 和 YouTube-VIS 数据集上进行实验，以展示 MobileInst 的优越性，并评估 Snapdragon 778G 移动平台单个 CPU 核心上的推理延迟，无需其他加速方法。在 COCO 数据集上，MobileInst 在移动 CPU 上实现了 31.2 mask AP 和 433 ms，与之前的 SOTA 相比，延迟降低了 50%。对于视频实例分割，MobileInst 在 YouTube-VIS 2019 上实现了 35.0 AP，在 YouTube-VIS 2021 上实现了 30.1 AP。代码将可用于促进实际应用和未来研究。 本文提出MobileInst，一种轻量级的移动端视频实例分割框架。 Renhong Zhang,Tianheng Cheng,Shusheng Yang,Haoyi Jiang,Shuai Zhang,Jiancheng Lyu,Xin Li,Xiaowen Ying,Dashan Gao,Wenyu Liu,Xinggang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Florin Condrea,Saikiran Rapaka,Lucian Itu,Puneet Sharma,Jonathan Sperl,A Mohamed Ali,Marius Leordeanu
title: Anatomically aware dual-hop learning for pulmonary embolism detection in CT pulmonary angiograms
title_zh: CT 肺血管造影中肺栓塞检测的解剖学感知双跳学习
comment: Accepted to Computers in Biology and Medicine journal
comments: Accepted to Computers in Biology and Medicine journal
abstract: Pulmonary Embolisms (PE) represent a leading cause of cardiovascular death. While medical imaging, through computed tomographic pulmonary angiography (CTPA), represents the gold standard for PE diagnosis, it is still susceptible to misdiagnosis or significant diagnosis delays, which may be fatal for critical cases. Despite the recently demonstrated power of deep learning to bring a significant boost in performance in a wide range of medical imaging tasks, there are still very few published researches on automatic pulmonary embolism detection. Herein we introduce a deep learning based approach, which efficiently combines computer vision and deep neural networks for pulmonary embolism detection in CTPA. Our method features novel improvements along three orthogonal axes: 1) automatic detection of anatomical structures; 2) anatomical aware pretraining, and 3) a dual-hop deep neural net for PE detection. We obtain state-of-the-art results on the publicly available multicenter large-scale RSNA dataset.
summary: Pulmonary Embolisms (PE) represent a leading cause of cardiovascular death. While medical imaging, through computed tomographic pulmonary angiography (CTPA), represents the gold standard for PE diagnosis, it is still susceptible to misdiagnosis or significant diagnosis delays, which may be fatal for critical cases. Despite the recently demonstrated power of deep learning to bring a significant boost in performance in a wide range of medical imaging tasks, there are still very few published researches on automatic pulmonary embolism detection. Herein we introduce a deep learning based approach, which efficiently combines computer vision and deep neural networks for pulmonary embolism detection in CTPA. Our method features novel improvements along three orthogonal axes: 1) automatic detection of anatomical structures; 2) anatomical aware pretraining, and 3) a dual-hop deep neural net for PE detection. We obtain state-of-the-art results on the publicly available multicenter large-scale RSNA dataset.
abstract_zh: 肺栓塞（PE）是心血管死亡的主要原因。虽然通过计算机断层肺血管造影 (CTPA) 进行的医学影像代表了 PE 诊断的金标准，但它仍然容易误诊或严重延误诊断，这对于危重病例可能是致命的。尽管最近证明了深度学习的力量可以显着提高各种医学成像任务的性能，但关于自动肺栓塞检测的已发表研究仍然很少。在此，我们介绍一种基于深度学习的方法，该方法有效地将计算机视觉和深度神经网络结合起来，用于 CTPA 中的肺栓塞检测。我们的方法在三个正交轴上进行了新颖的改进：1）自动检测解剖结构； 2）解剖感知预训练，3）用于 PE 检测的双跳深度神经网络。我们在公开的多中心大规模 RSNA 数据集上获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于解剖结构感知的双跳学习方法，用于在CT肺动脉造影（CTPA）中自动检测肺栓塞（PE）。
AI.motivation: 肺栓塞是心血管死亡的主要原因之一，尽管CTPA是诊断金标准，但仍存在误诊和诊断延迟问题。现有研究缺乏针对自动PE检测的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 方法包含三个改进：1）自动检测解剖结构；2）基于解剖的预训练；3）双跳深度神经网络（先检测解剖结构，再进行PE检测）。
AI.result: 在公开的RSNA多中心大规模数据集上取得最先进的检测结果。
AI.conclusion: 结合计算机视觉与深度学习的解剖感知方法显著提升了PE检测性能，验证了双跳学习框架的有效性。

authors_text: Sammy Christen,Wei Yang,Claudia Pérez-D'Arpino,Otmar Hilliges,Dieter Fox,Yu-Wei Chao
title: Learning Human-to-Robot Handovers from Point Clouds
title_zh: 从点云学习人机切换
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2023 as highlight. Project page at https://handover-sim2real.github.io
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2023 as highlight. Project page at https://handover-sim2real.github.io
abstract: We propose the first framework to learn control policies for vision-based human-to-robot handovers, a critical task for human-robot interaction. While research in Embodied AI has made significant progress in training robot agents in simulated environments, interacting with humans remains challenging due to the difficulties of simulating humans. Fortunately, recent research has developed realistic simulated environments for human-to-robot handovers. Leveraging this result, we introduce a method that is trained with a human-in-the-loop via a two-stage teacher-student framework that uses motion and grasp planning, reinforcement learning, and self-supervision. We show significant performance gains over baselines on a simulation benchmark, sim-to-sim transfer and sim-to-real transfer.
summary: We propose the first framework to learn control policies for vision-based human-to-robot handovers, a critical task for human-robot interaction. While research in Embodied AI has made significant progress in training robot agents in simulated environments, interacting with humans remains challenging due to the difficulties of simulating humans. Fortunately, recent research has developed realistic simulated environments for human-to-robot handovers. Leveraging this result, we introduce a method that is trained with a human-in-the-loop via a two-stage teacher-student framework that uses motion and grasp planning, reinforcement learning, and self-supervision. We show significant performance gains over baselines on a simulation benchmark, sim-to-sim transfer and sim-to-real transfer.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个框架来学习基于视觉的人机切换的控制策略，这是人机交互的一项关键任务。虽然嵌入式人工智能的研究在模拟环境中训练机器人代理方面取得了重大进展，但由于模拟人类的困难，与人类的交互仍然具有挑战性。幸运的是，最近的研究已经开发出了用于人机切换的真实模拟环境。利用这一结果，我们引入了一种通过两阶段师生框架进行人机循环训练的方法，该框架使用运动和抓握规划、强化学习和自我监督。我们在模拟基准、模拟到模拟传输和模拟到真实传输方面显示出比基线显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个基于点云数据学习视觉驱动的人机交接控制策略的框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管具身AI在模拟环境训练机器人取得进展，但人机交互中模拟人类行为仍具挑战性，而现有模拟环境难以准确复现真实交接场景。
AI.method: 采用带有人类在环的两阶段教师-学生框架，结合运动规划、抓取策略、强化学习和自监督学习方法进行训练。
AI.result: 在模拟基准测试中显著优于基线方法，实现模拟环境间及模拟到现实环境的交接任务迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了人机交接控制问题，验证了跨环境迁移能力，为人机协作提供了新思路。
