search_text: WavCaps: A ChatGPT-Assisted Weakly-Labelled Audio Captioning Dataset for Audio-Language Multimodal Research WavCaps：用于音频语言多模态研究的 ChatGPT 辅助弱标记音频字幕数据集 The advancement of audio-language (AL) multimodal learning tasks has been significant in recent years. However, researchers face challenges due to the costly and time-consuming collection process of existing audio-language datasets, which are limited in size. To address this data scarcity issue, we introduce WavCaps, the first large-scale weakly-labelled audio captioning dataset, comprising approximately 400k audio clips with paired captions. We sourced audio clips and their raw descriptions from web sources and a sound event detection dataset. However, the online-harvested raw descriptions are highly noisy and unsuitable for direct use in tasks such as automated audio captioning. To overcome this issue, we propose a three-stage processing pipeline for filtering noisy data and generating high-quality captions, where ChatGPT, a large language model, is leveraged to filter and transform raw descriptions automatically. We conduct a comprehensive analysis of the characteristics of WavCaps dataset and evaluate it on multiple downstream audio-language multimodal learning tasks. The systems trained on WavCaps outperform previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) models by a significant margin. Our aspiration is for the WavCaps dataset we have proposed to facilitate research in audio-language multimodal learning and demonstrate the potential of utilizing ChatGPT to enhance academic research. Our dataset and codes are available at https://github.com/XinhaoMei/WavCaps. 近年来，音频语言（AL）多模式学习任务取得了显着的进步。然而，由于现有音频语言数据集的收集过程成本高昂且耗时，且规模有限，研究人员面临着挑战。为了解决这个数据稀缺问题，我们引入了 WavCaps，这是第一个大规模弱标记音频字幕数据集，包含大约 40 万个带有配对字幕的音频剪辑。我们从网络资源和声音事件检测数据集中获取音频剪辑及其原始描述。然而，在线获取的原始描述噪声很大，不适合直接用于自动音频字幕等任务。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一个三阶段处理管道，用于过滤噪声数据并生成高质量的字幕，其中利用大型语言模型 ChatGPT 自动过滤和转换原始描述。我们对 WavCaps 数据集的特征进行了全面分析，并在多个下游音频语言多模态学习任务上对其进行了评估。在 WavCap 上训练的系统明显优于之前最先进的 (SOTA) 模型。我们的愿望是我们提出的 WavCaps 数据集能够促进音频语言多模式学习的研究，并展示利用 ChatGPT 加强学术研究的潜力。我们的数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/XinhaoMei/WavCaps 获取。 本文提出WavCaps数据集，利用ChatGPT处理网络来源的弱标注音频描述，解决音频-语言多模态研究中的数据稀缺问题。 Xinhao Mei,Chutong Meng,Haohe Liu,Qiuqiang Kong,Tom Ko,Chengqi Zhao,Mark D. authors_text: Nan Pu,Zhun Zhong,Nicu Sebe
title: Dynamic Conceptional Contrastive Learning for Generalized Category Discovery
title_zh: 用于广义类别发现的动态概念对比学习
abstract: Generalized category discovery (GCD) is a recently proposed open-world problem, which aims to automatically cluster partially labeled data. The main challenge is that the unlabeled data contain instances that are not only from known categories of the labeled data but also from novel categories. This leads traditional novel category discovery (NCD) methods to be incapacitated for GCD, due to their assumption of unlabeled data are only from novel categories. One effective way for GCD is applying self-supervised learning to learn discriminate representation for unlabeled data. However, this manner largely ignores underlying relationships between instances of the same concepts (e.g., class, super-class, and sub-class), which results in inferior representation learning. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Conceptional Contrastive Learning (DCCL) framework, which can effectively improve clustering accuracy by alternately estimating underlying visual conceptions and learning conceptional representation. In addition, we design a dynamic conception generation and update mechanism, which is able to ensure consistent conception learning and thus further facilitate the optimization of DCCL. Extensive experiments show that DCCL achieves new state-of-the-art performances on six generic and fine-grained visual recognition datasets, especially on fine-grained ones. For example, our method significantly surpasses the best competitor by 16.2% on the new classes for the CUB-200 dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/TPCD/DCCL.
summary: Generalized category discovery (GCD) is a recently proposed open-world problem, which aims to automatically cluster partially labeled data. The main challenge is that the unlabeled data contain instances that are not only from known categories of the labeled data but also from novel categories. This leads traditional novel category discovery (NCD) methods to be incapacitated for GCD, due to their assumption of unlabeled data are only from novel categories. One effective way for GCD is applying self-supervised learning to learn discriminate representation for unlabeled data. However, this manner largely ignores underlying relationships between instances of the same concepts (e.g., class, super-class, and sub-class), which results in inferior representation learning. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Conceptional Contrastive Learning (DCCL) framework, which can effectively improve clustering accuracy by alternately estimating underlying visual conceptions and learning conceptional representation. In addition, we design a dynamic conception generation and update mechanism, which is able to ensure consistent conception learning and thus further facilitate the optimization of DCCL. Extensive experiments show that DCCL achieves new state-of-the-art performances on six generic and fine-grained visual recognition datasets, especially on fine-grained ones. For example, our method significantly surpasses the best competitor by 16.2% on the new classes for the CUB-200 dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/TPCD/DCCL.
abstract_zh: 广义类别发现（GCD）是最近提出的开放世界问题，旨在自动聚类部分标记的数据。主要挑战是未标记数据包含的实例不仅来自标记数据的已知类别，而且还来自新类别。这导致传统的新类别发现 (NCD) 方法无法进行 GCD，因为它们假设未标记的数据仅来自新类别。 GCD 的一种有效方法是应用自我监督学习来学习未标记数据的判别表示。然而，这种方式在很大程度上忽略了相同概念（例如，类、超类和子类）实例之间的潜在关系，这导致表示学习效果较差。在本文中，我们提出了一种动态概念对比学习（DCCL）框架，该框架可以通过交替估计底层视觉概念和学习概念表示来有效提高聚类精度。此外，我们设计了动态概念生成和更新机制，能够确保概念学习的一致性，从而进一步促进 DCCL 的优化。大量的实验表明，DCCL 在六个通用和细粒度的视觉识别数据集上，特别是在细粒度的视觉识别数据集上，实现了新的最先进的性能。例如，我们的方法在 CUB-200 数据集的新类别上显着超过了最佳竞争对手 16.2%。代码可在 https://github.com/TPCD/DCCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态概念对比学习框架DCCL，用于解决广义类别发现（GCD）问题，旨在提升对部分标记数据的聚类准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统新型类别发现方法假设未标记数据仅包含新类别，无法处理GCD中同时存在已知和新类别的场景；自监督学习方法未充分挖掘同类实例间的概念关联，导致表示学习效果不足。
AI.method: 设计动态概念生成与更新机制，通过交替估计视觉概念和学习概念表示，建立概念层次关系以增强表征能力，确保概念学习一致性。
AI.result: 在六个通用及细粒度视觉数据集上取得新SOTA性能，尤其在CUB-200数据集的新类别任务上超越最佳竞品16.2%。
AI.conclusion: DCCL通过概念层次建模与动态优化机制有效提升GCD聚类性能，验证了概念关联学习对开放世界场景的重要性。

authors_text: Jesse Ables,Thomas Kirby,Sudip Mittal,Ioana Banicescu,Shahram Rahimi,William Anderson,Maria Seale
title: Explainable Intrusion Detection Systems Using Competitive Learning Techniques
title_zh: 使用竞争性学习技术的可解释入侵检测系统
abstract: The current state of the art systems in Artificial Intelligence (AI) enabled intrusion detection use a variety of black box methods. These black box methods are generally trained using Error Based Learning (EBL) techniques with a focus on creating accurate models. These models have high performative costs and are not easily explainable. A white box Competitive Learning (CL) based eXplainable Intrusion Detection System (X-IDS) offers a potential solution to these problem. CL models utilize an entirely different learning paradigm than EBL approaches. This different learning process makes the CL family of algorithms innately explainable and less resource intensive. In this paper, we create an X-IDS architecture that is based on DARPA's recommendation for explainable systems. In our architecture we leverage CL algorithms like, Self Organizing Maps (SOM), Growing Self Organizing Maps (GSOM), and Growing Hierarchical Self Organizing Map (GHSOM). The resulting models can be data-mined to create statistical and visual explanations. Our architecture is tested using NSL-KDD and CIC-IDS-2017 benchmark datasets, and produces accuracies that are 1% - 3% less than EBL models. However, CL models are much more explainable than EBL models. Additionally, we use a pruning process that is able to significantly reduce the size of these CL based models. By pruning our models, we are able to increase prediction speeds. Lastly, we analyze the statistical and visual explanations generated by our architecture, and we give a strategy that users could use to help navigate the set of explanations. These explanations will help users build trust with an Intrusion Detection System (IDS), and allow users to discover ways to increase the IDS's potency.

Lastly, we analyze the statistical and visual explanations generated by our architecture, and we give a strategy that users could use to help navigate the set of explanations. These explanations will help users build trust with an Intrusion Detection System (IDS), and allow users to discover ways to increase the IDS's potency.
abstract_zh: 当前最先进的人工智能 (AI) 系统使用各种黑匣子方法进行入侵检测。这些黑盒方法通常使用基于错误的学习 (EBL) 技术进行训练，重点是创建准确的模型。这些模型的执行成本很高并且不容易解释。基于白盒竞争学习 (CL) 的可解释入侵检测系统 (X-IDS) 为这些问题提供了潜在的解决方案。 CL 模型采用与 EBL 方法完全不同的学习范式。这种不同的学习过程使得 CL 系列算法本质上是可解释的，并且资源密集程度较低。在本文中，我们创建了一个基于 DARPA 对可解释系统的建议的 X-IDS 架构。在我们的架构中，我们利用 CL 算法，例如自组织映射 (SOM)、增长自组织映射 (GSOM) 和增长分层自组织映射 (GHSOM)。可以对生成的模型进行数据挖掘以创建统计和视觉解释。我们的架构使用 NSL-KDD 和 CIC-IDS-2017 基准数据集进行测试，产生的精度比 EBL 模型低 1% - 3%。然而，CL 模型比 EBL 模型更容易解释。此外，我们使用修剪过程能够显着减小这些基于 CL 的模型的大小。通过修剪我们的模型，我们能够提高预测速度。最后，我们分析了我们的架构生成的统计和视觉解释，并给出了用户可以用来帮助导航这组解释的策略。这些解释将帮助用户建立对入侵检测系统 (IDS) 的信任，并允许用户发现提高 IDS 效力的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于竞争学习技术的可解释入侵检测系统（X-IDS），以解决传统黑箱模型的高成本和低可解释性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于人工智能的入侵检测系统多采用黑箱方法，虽准确性高但缺乏可解释性且资源消耗大，需探索更高效且可解释的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于DARPA可解释系统框架，采用自组织映射（SOM）、增长型自组织映射（GSOM）等竞争学习算法构建X-IDS架构，并通过模型剪枝优化性能。
AI.result: 实验表明CL模型在NSL-KDD和CIC-IDS-2017数据集上的准确率较传统方法低1%-3%，但可解释性显著提升，且剪枝后预测速度加快。
AI.conclusion: 竞争学习技术为入侵检测提供了兼顾可解释性与效率的解决方案，其生成的统计与可视化解释有助于用户建立信任并优化系统效能。

search_text: Explainable Intrusion Detection Systems Using Competitive Learning Techniques 使用竞争性学习技术的可解释入侵检测系统 The current state of the art systems in Artificial Intelligence (AI) enabled intrusion detection use a variety of black box methods. These black box methods are generally trained using Error Based Learning (EBL) techniques with a focus on creating accurate models. These models have high performative costs and are not easily explainable. A white box Competitive Learning (CL) based eXplainable Intrusion Detection System (X-IDS) offers a potential solution to these problem. CL models utilize an entirely different learning paradigm than EBL approaches. This different learning process makes the CL family of algorithms innately explainable and less resource intensive. In this paper, we create an X-IDS architecture that is based on DARPA's recommendation for explainable systems. In our architecture we leverage CL algorithms like, Self Organizing Maps (SOM), Growing Self Organizing Maps (GSOM), and Growing Hierarchical Self Organizing Map (GHSOM). The resulting models can be data-mined to create statistical and visual explanations. Our architecture is tested using NSL-KDD and CIC-IDS-2017 benchmark datasets, and produces accuracies that are 1% - 3% less than EBL models. However, CL models are much more explainable than EBL models. Additionally, we use a pruning process that is able to significantly reduce the size of these CL based models. By pruning our models, we are able to increase prediction speeds. Lastly, we analyze the statistical and visual explanations generated by our architecture, and we give a strategy that users could use to help navigate the set of explanations. These explanations will help users build trust with an Intrusion Detection System (IDS), and allow users to discover ways to increase the IDS's potency. 当前最先进的人工智能 (AI) 系统使用各种黑匣子方法进行入侵检测。这些黑盒方法通常使用基于错误的学习 (EBL) 技术进行训练，重点是创建准确的模型。这些模型的执行成本很高并且不容易解释。基于白盒竞争学习 (CL) 的可解释入侵检测系统 (X-IDS) 为这些问题提供了潜在的解决方案。 CL 模型采用与 EBL 方法完全不同的学习范式。这种不同的学习过程使得 CL 系列算法本质上是可解释的，并且资源密集程度较低。在本文中，我们创建了一个基于 DARPA 对可解释系统的建议的 X-IDS 架构。在我们的架构中，我们利用 CL 算法，例如自组织映射 (SOM)、增长自组织映射 (GSOM) 和增长分层自组织映射 (GHSOM)。可以对生成的模型进行数据挖掘以创建统计和视觉解释。我们的架构使用 NSL-KDD 和 CIC-IDS-2017 基准数据集进行测试，产生的精度比 EBL 模型低 1% - 3%。然而，CL 模型比 EBL 模型更容易解释。此外，我们使用修剪过程能够显着减小这些基于 CL 的模型的大小。通过修剪我们的模型，我们能够提高预测速度。最后，我们分析了我们的架构生成的统计和视觉解释，并给出了用户可以用来帮助导航这组解释的策略。这些解释将帮助用户建立对入侵检测系统 (IDS) 的信任，并允许用户发现提高 IDS 效力的方法。 本文提出一种基于竞争学习技术的可解释入侵检测系统（X-IDS），以解决传统黑箱模型的高成本和低可解释性问题。 Jesse Ables,Thomas Kirby,Sudip Mittal,Ioana Banicescu,Shahram Rahimi,William Anderson,Maria Seale cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ukcheol Shin,Kyunghyun Lee,In So Kweon,Jean Oh
title: Complementary Random Masking for RGB-Thermal Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: RGB 热语义分割的互补随机掩码
comment: ICRA 2024, Our source code is available at https://github.com/UkcheolShin/CRM_RGBTSeg
comments: ICRA 2024, Our source code is available at https://github.com/UkcheolShin/CRM_RGBTSeg
abstract: RGB-thermal semantic segmentation is one potential solution to achieve reliable semantic scene understanding in adverse weather and lighting conditions. However, the previous studies mostly focus on designing a multi-modal fusion module without consideration of the nature of multi-modality inputs. Therefore, the networks easily become over-reliant on a single modality, making it difficult to learn complementary and meaningful representations for each modality. This paper proposes 1) a complementary random masking strategy of RGB-T images and 2) self-distillation loss between clean and masked input modalities. The proposed masking strategy prevents over-reliance on a single modality. It also improves the accuracy and robustness of the neural network by forcing the network to segment and classify objects even when one modality is partially available. Also, the proposed self-distillation loss encourages the network to extract complementary and meaningful representations from a single modality or complementary masked modalities. Based on the proposed method, we achieve state-of-the-art performance over three RGB-T semantic segmentation benchmarks. Our source code is available at https://github.com/UkcheolShin/CRM_RGBTSeg.
summary: RGB-thermal semantic segmentation is one potential solution to achieve reliable semantic scene understanding in adverse weather and lighting conditions. However, the previous studies mostly focus on designing a multi-modal fusion module without consideration of the nature of multi-modality inputs. Therefore, the networks easily become over-reliant on a single modality, making it difficult to learn complementary and meaningful representations for each modality. This paper proposes 1) a complementary random masking strategy of RGB-T images and 2) self-distillation loss between clean and masked input modalities. The proposed masking strategy prevents over-reliance on a single modality. It also improves the accuracy and robustness of the neural network by forcing the network to segment and classify objects even when one modality is partially available. Also, the proposed self-distillation loss encourages the network to extract complementary and meaningful representations from a single modality or complementary masked modalities. Based on the proposed method, we achieve state-of-the-art performance over three RGB-T semantic segmentation benchmarks. Our source code is available at https://github.com/UkcheolShin/CRM_RGBTSeg.
abstract_zh: RGB 热语义分割是在恶劣天气和照明条件下实现可靠​​语义场景理解的一种潜在解决方案。然而，先前的研究主要集中于设计多模态融合模块，而没有考虑多模态输入的性质。因此，网络很容易过度依赖单一模态，从而很难学习每种模态的互补且有意义的表示。本文提出了 1）RGB-T 图像的互补随机掩蔽策略和 2）干净输入模态和掩蔽输入模态之间的自蒸馏损失。所提出的屏蔽策略可防止过度依赖单一模式。即使一种模态部分可用，它还可以强制网络对对象进行分割和分类，从而提高神经网络的准确性和鲁棒性。此外，所提出的自蒸馏损失鼓励网络从单一模态或互补的屏蔽模态中提取互补且有意义的表示。基于所提出的方法，我们在三个 RGB-T 语义分割基准上实现了最先进的性能。我们的源代码位于 https://github.com/UkcheolShin/CRM_RGBTSeg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种互补随机掩码策略和自蒸馏损失函数，用于改进RGB-热成像语义分割中的多模态表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度依赖单一模态的多模态融合模块，导致难以学习到互补的有意义的模态表示，影响分割性能。
AI.method: 设计互补随机掩码策略强制网络在部分模态缺失时学习鲁棒表示，并引入清洁与掩码模态间的自蒸馏损失以增强特征互补性。
AI.result: 在三个RGB-T语义分割基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过强制模态互补性学习和自蒸馏机制，有效提升了网络在恶劣条件下的分割准确率与鲁棒性。

However, the previous studies mostly focus on designing a multi-modal fusion module without consideration of the nature of multi-modality inputs. Therefore, the networks easily become over-reliant on a single modality, making it difficult to learn complementary and meaningful representations for each modality. This paper proposes 1) a complementary random masking strategy of RGB-T images and 2) self-distillation loss between clean and masked input modalities. The proposed masking strategy prevents over-reliance on a single modality. It also improves the accuracy and robustness of the neural network by forcing the network to segment and classify objects even when one modality is partially available. Also, the proposed self-distillation loss encourages the network to extract complementary and meaningful representations from a single modality or complementary masked modalities. authors_text: Bo Zhang,Cong Huang,Haixu Zhang,Xiaoshan Bai
title: Switching Pushing Skill Combined MPC and Deep Reinforcement Learning for Planar Non-prehensile Manipulation
title_zh: 结合 MPC 和深度强化学习的平面非抓取操纵的切换推动技能
abstract: In this paper, a novel switching pushing skill algorithm is proposed to improve the efficiency of planar non-prehensile manipulation, which draws inspiration from human pushing actions and comprises two sub-problems, i.e., discrete decision-making of pushing point and continuous feedback control of pushing action. In order to solve the sub-problems above, a combination of Model Predictive Control (MPC) and Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) method is employed. Firstly, the selection of pushing point is modeled as a Markov decision process,and an off-policy DRL method is used by reshaping the reward function to train the decision-making model for selecting pushing point from a pre-constructed set based on the current state. Secondly, a motion constraint region (MCR) is constructed for the specific pushing point based on the distance from the target, followed by utilizing the MPC controller to regulate the motion of the object within the MCR towards the target pose. The trigger condition for switching the pushing point occurs when the object reaches the boundary of the MCR under the pushing action. Subsequently, the pushing point and the controller are updated iteratively until the target pose is reached. We conducted pushing experiments on four distinct object shapes in both simulated and physical environments to evaluate our method. The results indicate that our method achieves a significantly higher training efficiency, with a training time that is only about 20% of the baseline method while maintaining around the same success rate. Moreover, our method outperforms the baseline method in terms of both training and execution efficiency of pushing operations, allowing for rapid learning of robot pushing skills.
summary: In this paper, a novel switching pushing skill algorithm is proposed to improve the efficiency of planar non-prehensile manipulation, which draws inspiration from human pushing actions and comprises two sub-problems, i.e., discrete decision-making of pushing point and continuous feedback control of pushing action. In order to solve the sub-problems above, a combination of Model Predictive Control (MPC) and Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) method is employed. Firstly, the selection of pushing point is modeled as a Markov decision process,and an off-policy DRL method is used by reshaping the reward function to train the decision-making model for selecting pushing point from a pre-constructed set based on the current state. Secondly, a motion constraint region (MCR) is constructed for the specific pushing point based on the distance from the target, followed by utilizing the MPC controller to regulate the motion of the object within the MCR towards the target pose. The trigger condition for switching the pushing point occurs when the object reaches the boundary of the MCR under the pushing action. Subsequently, the pushing point and the controller are updated iteratively until the target pose is reached. We conducted pushing experiments on four distinct object shapes in both simulated and physical environments to evaluate our method. The results indicate that our method achieves a significantly higher training efficiency, with a training time that is only about 20% of the baseline method while maintaining around the same success rate. Moreover, our method outperforms the baseline method in terms of both training and execution efficiency of pushing operations, allowing for rapid learning of robot pushing skills.
abstract_zh: 本文从人类推动动作中汲取灵感，提出了一种新颖的切换推动技能算法来提高平面非抓取操作的效率，该算法包含两个子问题，即推动点的离散决策和推动动作的连续反馈控制。为了解决上述子问题，采用了模型预测控制（MPC）和深度强化学习（DRL）方法的结合。首先，将推动点的选择建模为马尔可夫决策过程，并通过重塑奖励函数，使用离策略DRL方法来训练基于当前状态的预构造集合中选择推动点的决策模型。其次，根据距目标的距离为特定推动点构建运动约束区域（MCR），然后利用MPC控制器来调节MCR内物体朝向目标位姿的运动。当物体在推动作用下到达 MCR 边界时，触发切换推动点的条件发生。随后，迭代更新推动点和控制器，直到达到目标位姿。我们在模拟和物理环境中对四种不同的物体形状进行了推动实验，以评估我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法实现了显着更高的训练效率，训练时间仅为基线方法的 20% 左右，同时保持了大约相同的成功率。此外，我们的方法在推动操作的训练和执行效率方面都优于基线方法，可以快速学习机器人推动技能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合模型预测控制（MPC）和深度强化学习（DRL）的切换推挤技能算法，用于提升平面非抓取操作的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在平面非抓取操作中效率较低，需模仿人类推挤动作并结合离散决策与连续控制以提高效率。
AI.method: 将推挤点选择建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用离线策略DRL优化奖励函数进行决策；基于目标距离构建运动约束区域（MCR），利用MPC控制器调节物体运动；当物体接触MCR边界时切换推挤点并迭代更新控制器。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法训练时间仅为基线方法的20%，成功率相近，且在训练和执行效率上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过结合DRL与MPC实现了高效的推挤技能学习，为机器人平面非抓取操作提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Switching Pushing Skill Combined MPC and Deep Reinforcement Learning for Planar Non-prehensile Manipulation 结合 MPC 和深度强化学习的平面非抓取操纵的切换推动技能 In this paper, a novel switching pushing skill algorithm is proposed to improve the efficiency of planar non-prehensile manipulation, which draws inspiration from human pushing actions and comprises two sub-problems, i.e., discrete decision-making of pushing point and continuous feedback control of pushing action. In order to solve the sub-problems above, a combination of Model Predictive Control (MPC) and Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) method is employed. Firstly, the selection of pushing point is modeled as a Markov decision process,and an off-policy DRL method is used by reshaping the reward function to train the decision-making model for selecting pushing point from a pre-constructed set based on the current state. Secondly, a motion constraint region (MCR) is constructed for the specific pushing point based on the distance from the target, followed by utilizing the MPC controller to regulate the motion of the object within the MCR towards the target pose. The trigger condition for switching the pushing point occurs when the object reaches the boundary of the MCR under the pushing action. Subsequently, the pushing point and the controller are updated iteratively until the target pose is reached. We conducted pushing experiments on four distinct object shapes in both simulated and physical environments to evaluate our method. The results indicate that our method achieves a significantly higher training efficiency, with a training time that is only about 20% of the baseline method while maintaining around the same success rate. Moreover, our method outperforms the baseline method in terms of both training and execution efficiency of pushing operations, allowing for rapid learning of robot pushing skills. 本文从人类推动动作中汲取灵感，提出了一种新颖的切换推动技能算法来提高平面非抓取操作的效率，该算法包含两个子问题，即推动点的离散决策和推动动作的连续反馈控制。为了解决上述子问题，采用了模型预测控制（MPC）和深度强化学习（DRL）方法的结合。首先，将推动点的选择建模为马尔可夫决策过程，并通过重塑奖励函数，使用离策略DRL方法来训练基于当前状态的预构造集合中选择推动点的决策模型。其次，根据距目标的距离为特定推动点构建运动约束区域（MCR），然后利用MPC控制器来调节MCR内物体朝向目标位姿的运动。当物体在推动作用下到达 MCR 边界时，触发切换推动点的条件发生。随后，迭代更新推动点和控制器，直到达到目标位姿。我们在模拟和物理环境中对四种不同的物体形状进行了推动实验，以评估我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法实现了显着更高的训练效率，训练时间仅为基线方法的 20% 左右，同时保持了大约相同的成功率。此外，我们的方法在推动操作的训练和执行效率方面都优于基线方法，可以快速学习机器人推动技能。 本文提出一种结合模型预测控制（MPC）和深度强化学习（DRL）的切换推挤技能算法，用于提升平面非抓取操作的效率。 Bo Zhang,Cong Huang,Haixu Zhang,Xiaoshan Bai cs.RO

authors_text: Lucas Beyer,Bo Wan,Gagan Madan,Filip Pavetic,Andreas Steiner,Alexander Kolesnikov,André Susano Pinto,Emanuele Bugliarello,Xiao Wang,Qihang Yu,Liang-Chieh Chen,Xiaohua Zhai
title: A Study of Autoregressive Decoders for Multi-Tasking in Computer Vision
title_zh: 计算机视觉中多任务自回归解码器的研究
abstract: There has been a recent explosion of computer vision models which perform many tasks and are composed of an image encoder (usually a ViT) and an autoregressive decoder (usually a Transformer). However, most of this work simply presents one system and its results, leaving many questions regarding design decisions and trade-offs of such systems unanswered. In this work, we aim to provide such answers. We take a close look at autoregressive decoders for multi-task learning in multimodal computer vision, including classification, captioning, visual question answering, and optical character recognition. Through extensive systematic experiments, we study the effects of task and data mixture, training and regularization hyperparameters, conditioning type and specificity, modality combination, and more. Importantly, we compare these to well-tuned single-task baselines to highlight the cost incurred by multi-tasking. A key finding is that a small decoder learned on top of a frozen pretrained encoder works surprisingly well. We call this setup locked-image tuning with decoder (LiT-decoder). It can be seen as teaching a decoder to interact with a pretrained vision model via natural language.
summary: There has been a recent explosion of computer vision models which perform many tasks and are composed of an image encoder (usually a ViT) and an autoregressive decoder (usually a Transformer). However, most of this work simply presents one system and its results, leaving many questions regarding design decisions and trade-offs of such systems unanswered. In this work, we aim to provide such answers. We take a close look at autoregressive decoders for multi-task learning in multimodal computer vision, including classification, captioning, visual question answering, and optical character recognition. Through extensive systematic experiments, we study the effects of task and data mixture, training and regularization hyperparameters, conditioning type and specificity, modality combination, and more. Importantly, we compare these to well-tuned single-task baselines to highlight the cost incurred by multi-tasking. A key finding is that a small decoder learned on top of a frozen pretrained encoder works surprisingly well. We call this setup locked-image tuning with decoder (LiT-decoder). It can be seen as teaching a decoder to interact with a pretrained vision model via natural language.
abstract_zh: 最近，计算机视觉模型出现了爆炸式增长，这些模型执行许多任务，并由图像编码器（通常是 ViT）和自回归解码器（通常是 Transformer）组成。然而，这项工作的大部分内容只是介绍一个系统及其结果，而有关此类系统的设计决策和权衡的许多问题都没有得到解答。在这项工作中，我们的目标是提供这样的答案。我们仔细研究了多模态计算机视觉中多任务学习的自回归解码器，包括分类、字幕、视觉问答和光学字符识别。通过广泛的系统实验，我们研究了任务和数据混合、训练和正则化超参数、调节类型和特异性、模态组合等的影响。重要的是，我们将这些与精心调整的单任务基线进行比较，以突出多任务处理所产生的成本。一个重要的发现是，在冻结的预训练编码器之上学习的小型解码器效果出奇地好。我们将此设置称为带解码器的锁定图像调整（LiT 解码器）。它可以被视为教导解码器通过自然语言与预训练的视觉模型进行交互。

AI.tldr: 研究自回归解码器在计算机视觉多任务学习中的设计决策与权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对多任务系统设计选择及权衡的系统分析，需明确多任务学习的代价与优化方向。
AI.method: 通过系统实验分析任务混合、训练参数、条件类型等变量，对比单任务基线，提出冻结预训练编码器并微调小解码器的LiT-decoder方法。
AI.result: 发现LiT-decoder在多任务中表现优异，证明冻结编码器微调解码器的有效性，且能实现与预训练视觉模型的自然语言交互。
AI.conclusion: LiT-decoder为多任务学习提供新思路，揭示了解码器与预训练模型协同的潜力，需进一步探索其适用边界与优化策略。

authors_text: Zhitao Yang,Zhongang Cai,Haiyi Mei,Shuai Liu,Zhaoxi Chen,Weiye Xiao,Yukun Wei,Zhongfei Qing,Chen Wei,Bo Dai,Wayne Wu,Chen Qian,Dahua Lin,Ziwei Liu,Lei Yang
title: SynBody: Synthetic Dataset with Layered Human Models for 3D Human Perception and Modeling
title_zh: SynBody：具有分层人体模型的综合数据集，用于 3D 人类感知和建模
comment: Accepted by ICCV 2023. Project webpage: https://synbody.github.io/
comments: Accepted by ICCV 2023. Project webpage: https://synbody.github.io/
abstract: Synthetic data has emerged as a promising source for 3D human research as it offers low-cost access to large-scale human datasets. To advance the diversity and annotation quality of human models, we introduce a new synthetic dataset, SynBody, with three appealing features: 1) a clothed parametric human model that can generate a diverse range of subjects; 2) the layered human representation that naturally offers high-quality 3D annotations to support multiple tasks; 3) a scalable system for producing realistic data to facilitate real-world tasks. The dataset comprises 1.2M images with corresponding accurate 3D annotations, covering 10,000 human body models, 1,187 actions, and various viewpoints. The dataset includes two subsets for human pose and shape estimation as well as human neural rendering. Extensive experiments on SynBody indicate that it substantially enhances both SMPL and SMPL-X estimation. Furthermore, the incorporation of layered annotations offers a valuable training resource for investigating the Human Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF).
summary: Synthetic data has emerged as a promising source for 3D human research as it offers low-cost access to large-scale human datasets. To advance the diversity and annotation quality of human models, we introduce a new synthetic dataset, SynBody, with three appealing features: 1) a clothed parametric human model that can generate a diverse range of subjects; 2) the layered human representation that naturally offers high-quality 3D annotations to support multiple tasks; 3) a scalable system for producing realistic data to facilitate real-world tasks. The dataset comprises 1.2M images with corresponding accurate 3D annotations, covering 10,000 human body models, 1,187 actions, and various viewpoints. The dataset includes two subsets for human pose and shape estimation as well as human neural rendering. Extensive experiments on SynBody indicate that it substantially enhances both SMPL and SMPL-X estimation. Furthermore, the incorporation of layered annotations offers a valuable training resource for investigating the Human Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF).
abstract_zh: 合成数据已成为 3D 人体研究的一个有前途的来源，因为它提供了对大规模人体数据集的低成本访问。为了提高人体模型的多样性和注释质量，我们引入了一个新的合成数据集 SynBody，它具有三个吸引人的功能：1）可以生成各种主题的穿着参数化人体模型； 2) 分层的人类表示自然地提供高质量的 3D 注释来支持多项任务； 3）一个可扩展的系统，用于生成现实数据以促进现实世界的任务。该数据集包含 120 万张图像以及相应的精确 3D 注释，涵盖 10,000 个人体模型、1,187 个动作和各种视角。该数据集包括两个用于人体姿势和形状估计以及人体神经渲染的子集。 SynBody 上的大量实验表明它大大增强了 SMPL 和 SMPL-X 估计。此外，分层注释的结合为研究人类神经辐射场（NeRF）提供了宝贵的培训资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SynBody合成数据集，用于提升3D人体感知与建模研究。
AI.motivation: 现有真实数据在人体多样性、标注质量和场景覆盖上存在局限，而合成数据能低成本生成大规模高质量数据，推动3D人体研究发展。
AI.method: 构建包含1.2M张图像的SynBody数据集，包含参数化穿衣人体模型、分层注释结构及可扩展生成系统，覆盖10,000个模型、1,187种动作及多视角数据，并划分两个子集用于姿态估计与神经渲染。
AI.result: 实验表明SynBody显著提升SMPL/SMPL-X估计精度，并为Human NeRF研究提供有效的分层注释训练资源。
AI.conclusion: SynBody通过多样化合成数据与高质量注释，为3D人体感知、建模及神经渲染提供了重要基准与研究工具。

search_text: SynBody: Synthetic Dataset with Layered Human Models for 3D Human Perception and Modeling SynBody：具有分层人体模型的综合数据集，用于 3D 人类感知和建模 Synthetic data has emerged as a promising source for 3D human research as it offers low-cost access to large-scale human datasets. To advance the diversity and annotation quality of human models, we introduce a new synthetic dataset, SynBody, with three appealing features: 1) a clothed parametric human model that can generate a diverse range of subjects; 2) the layered human representation that naturally offers high-quality 3D annotations to support multiple tasks; 3) a scalable system for producing realistic data to facilitate real-world tasks. The dataset comprises 1.2M images with corresponding accurate 3D annotations, covering 10,000 human body models, 1,187 actions, and various viewpoints. The dataset includes two subsets for human pose and shape estimation as well as human neural rendering. Extensive experiments on SynBody indicate that it substantially enhances both SMPL and SMPL-X estimation. Furthermore, the incorporation of layered annotations offers a valuable training resource for investigating the Human Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF). 合成数据已成为 3D 人体研究的一个有前途的来源，因为它提供了对大规模人体数据集的低成本访问。为了提高人体模型的多样性和注释质量，我们引入了一个新的合成数据集 SynBody，它具有三个吸引人的功能：1）可以生成各种主题的穿着参数化人体模型； 2) 分层的人类表示自然地提供高质量的 3D 注释来支持多项任务； 3）一个可扩展的系统，用于生成现实数据以促进现实世界的任务。该数据集包含 120 万张图像以及相应的精确 3D 注释，涵盖 10,000 个人体模型、1,187 个动作和各种视角。该数据集包括两个用于人体姿势和形状估计以及人体神经渲染的子集。 SynBody 上的大量实验表明它大大增强了 SMPL 和 SMPL-X 估计。此外，分层注释的结合为研究人类神经辐射场（NeRF）提供了宝贵的培训资源。 本文提出SynBody合成数据集，用于提升3D人体感知与建模研究。 Zhitao Yang,Zhongang Cai,Haiyi Mei,Shuai Liu,Zhaoxi Chen,Weiye Xiao,Yukun Wei,Zhongfei Qing,Chen Wei,Bo Dai,Wayne Wu,Chen Qian,Dahua Lin,Ziwei Liu,Lei Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Bo Li
title: Invertible Convolution with Symmetric Paddings
title_zh: 具有对称填充的可逆卷积
abstract: We show that symmetrically padded convolution can be analytically inverted via DFT. We comprehensively analyze several different symmetric and anti-symmetric padding modes and show that multiple cases exist where the inversion can be achieved. The implementation is available at \url{https://github.com/prclibo/iconv_dft}.
summary: We show that symmetrically padded convolution can be analytically inverted via DFT. We comprehensively analyze several different symmetric and anti-symmetric padding modes and show that multiple cases exist where the inversion can be achieved. The implementation is available at \url{https://github.com/prclibo/iconv_dft}.
abstract_zh: 我们证明对称填充卷积可以通过 DFT 进行解析反转。我们综合分析了几种不同的对称和反对称填充模式，并表明存在多种可以实现反转的情况。该实现可在 \url{https://github.com/prclibo/iconv_dft} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过离散傅里叶变换（DFT）实现对称填充卷积的解析逆运算，并分析了多种对称和反对称填充模式的可逆性。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积操作通常不可逆，限制了其在生成模型等需要可逆操作的场景中的应用。本文旨在探索通过特定填充方式使卷积操作可逆的可能性。
AI.method: 基于DFT的数学性质，分析对称填充卷积的逆运算条件，并验证不同填充模式（如对称/反对称）下的可逆性。
AI.result: 发现多种填充模式下卷积可逆，提供了基于DFT的实现代码，并证明了理论分析的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 对称填充卷积可通过DFT实现解析逆运算，为设计可逆神经网络提供了新方法，代码已开源供验证与应用。

authors_text: Vishnu Rajendran S,Willow Mandil,Simon Parsons,Amir Ghalamzan E
title: Acoustic Soft Tactile Skin (AST Skin)
title_zh: 声学软触觉皮肤（AST Skin）
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2024 (accepted)
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2024 (accepted)
abstract: This paper presents a novel soft tactile skin (STS) technology operating with sound waves. In this innovative approach, the sound waves generated by a speaker travel in channels embedded in a soft membrane and get modulated due to a deformation of the channel when pressed by an external force and received by a microphone at the end of the channel. The sensor leverages regression and classification methods for estimating the normal force and its contact location. Our sensor can be affixed to any robot part, e.g., end effectors or arm. We tested several regression and classifier methods to learn the relation between sound wave modulation, the applied force, and its location, respectively and picked the best-performing models for force and location predictions. Our novel tactile sensor yields 93% of the force estimation within 1.5 N tolerances for a range of 0-30+1 N and estimates contact locations with over 96% accuracy. We also demonstrated the performance of STS technology for a real-time gripping force control application.
summary: This paper presents a novel soft tactile skin (STS) technology operating with sound waves. In this innovative approach, the sound waves generated by a speaker travel in channels embedded in a soft membrane and get modulated due to a deformation of the channel when pressed by an external force and received by a microphone at the end of the channel. The sensor leverages regression and classification methods for estimating the normal force and its contact location. Our sensor can be affixed to any robot part, e.g., end effectors or arm. We tested several regression and classifier methods to learn the relation between sound wave modulation, the applied force, and its location, respectively and picked the best-performing models for force and location predictions. Our novel tactile sensor yields 93% of the force estimation within 1.5 N tolerances for a range of 0-30+1 N and estimates contact locations with over 96% accuracy. We also demonstrated the performance of STS technology for a real-time gripping force control application.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种利用声波操作的新型软触觉皮肤（STS）技术。在这种创新方法中，扬声器产生的声波在嵌入软膜的通道中传播，并因受外力按压时通道变形而受到调制，并被通道末端的麦克风接收。该传感器利用回归和分类方法来估计法向力及其接触位置。我们的传感器可以固定在任何机器人部件上，例如末端执行器或手臂。我们测试了几种回归和分类方法，以分别了解声波调制、施加的力及其位置之间的关系，并挑选出性能最佳的力和位置预测模型。我们的新型触觉传感器在 0-30+1 N 范围内产生 93% 的力估计，误差范围在 1.5 N 内，并且估计接触位置的准确度超过 96%。我们还展示了 STS 技术在实时夹持力控制应用中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于声波的新型柔性触觉皮肤（AST Skin）技术，用于机器人感知外部压力和接触位置。
AI.motivation: 传统触觉传感器存在刚性、成本高或灵敏度不足的问题，需开发一种柔性、低成本且高精度的触觉感知方案以提升机器人操作能力。
AI.method: 通过嵌入软膜中的声波通道传递声音，利用外部压力引起的通道形变调制声波信号，结合回归和分类算法建立声波调制与力值、接触位置的映射关系。
AI.result: 力估计在0-30+1N范围内误差小于1.5N（93%精度），接触位置识别准确率超96%，成功应用于实时抓取力控制。
AI.conclusion: 该声波触觉传感器具有高精度和柔性优势，可广泛集成于机器人末端执行器或机械臂，为触觉感知提供了创新解决方案。

authors_text: Wenping Jin,Fei Guo,Li Zhu
title: ISSTAD: Incremental Self-Supervised Learning Based on Transformer for Anomaly Detection and Localization
title_zh: ISSTAD：基于 Transformer 的增量自监督学习，用于异常检测和定位
abstract: In the realm of machine learning, the study of anomaly detection and localization within image data has gained substantial traction, particularly for practical applications such as industrial defect detection. While the majority of existing methods predominantly use Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) as their primary network architecture, we introduce a novel approach based on the Transformer backbone network. Our method employs a two-stage incremental learning strategy. During the first stage, we train a Masked Autoencoder (MAE) model solely on normal images. In the subsequent stage, we apply pixel-level data augmentation techniques to generate corrupted normal images and their corresponding pixel labels. This process allows the model to learn how to repair corrupted regions and classify the status of each pixel. Ultimately, the model generates a pixel reconstruction error matrix and a pixel anomaly probability matrix. These matrices are then combined to produce an anomaly scoring matrix that effectively detects abnormal regions. When benchmarked against several state-of-the-art CNN-based methods, our approach exhibits superior performance on the MVTec AD dataset, achieving an impressive 97.6% AUC.
summary: In the realm of machine learning, the study of anomaly detection and localization within image data has gained substantial traction, particularly for practical applications such as industrial defect detection. While the majority of existing methods predominantly use Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) as their primary network architecture, we introduce a novel approach based on the Transformer backbone network. Our method employs a two-stage incremental learning strategy. During the first stage, we train a Masked Autoencoder (MAE) model solely on normal images. In the subsequent stage, we apply pixel-level data augmentation techniques to generate corrupted normal images and their corresponding pixel labels. This process allows the model to learn how to repair corrupted regions and classify the status of each pixel. Ultimately, the model generates a pixel reconstruction error matrix and a pixel anomaly probability matrix. These matrices are then combined to produce an anomaly scoring matrix that effectively detects abnormal regions. When benchmarked against several state-of-the-art CNN-based methods, our approach exhibits superior performance on the MVTec AD dataset, achieving an impressive 97.6% AUC.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习领域，图像数据中的异常检测和定位研究已经获得了巨大的关注，特别是对于工业缺陷检测等实际应用。虽然大多数现有方法主要使用卷积神经网络（CNN）作为主要网络架构，但我们引入了一种基于 Transformer 主干网络的新颖方法。我们的方法采用两阶段增量学习策略。在第一阶段，我们仅在正常图像上训练蒙版自动编码器（MAE）模型。在后续阶段，我们应用像素级数据增强技术来生成损坏的正常图像及其相应的像素标签。此过程允许模型学习如何修复损坏的区域并对每个像素的状态进行分类。最终，该模型生成像素重建误差矩阵和像素异常概率矩阵。然后将这些矩阵组合起来生成异常评分矩阵，可有效检测异常区域。当与几种最先进的基于 CNN 的方法进行基准测试时，我们的方法在 MVTec AD 数据集上表现出卓越的性能，实现了令人印象深刻的 97.6% AUC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的增量自监督学习方法ISSTAD，用于图像异常检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 传统方法多依赖CNN，而Transformer在视觉任务中展现更强建模能力，但现有工作未充分挖掘其在异常检测中的潜力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段增量学习：阶段一仅用正常图像训练MAE模型；阶段二通过像素级数据增强生成损坏图像，学习修复与像素分类，最终结合重建误差矩阵与异常概率矩阵生成异常评分矩阵。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD数据集上达到97.6% AUC，优于现有CNN基方法。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构结合增量自监督学习能有效提升异常检测性能，验证了方法在工业缺陷检测等场景的优越性。

search_text: ISSTAD: Incremental Self-Supervised Learning Based on Transformer for Anomaly Detection and Localization ISSTAD：基于 Transformer 的增量自监督学习，用于异常检测和定位 In the realm of machine learning, the study of anomaly detection and localization within image data has gained substantial traction, particularly for practical applications such as industrial defect detection. While the majority of existing methods predominantly use Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) as their primary network architecture, we introduce a novel approach based on the Transformer backbone network. Our method employs a two-stage incremental learning strategy. During the first stage, we train a Masked Autoencoder (MAE) model solely on normal images. In the subsequent stage, we apply pixel-level data augmentation techniques to generate corrupted normal images and their corresponding pixel labels. This process allows the model to learn how to repair corrupted regions and classify the status of each pixel. Ultimately, the model generates a pixel reconstruction error matrix and a pixel anomaly probability matrix. These matrices are then combined to produce an anomaly scoring matrix that effectively detects abnormal regions. When benchmarked against several state-of-the-art CNN-based methods, our approach exhibits superior performance on the MVTec AD dataset, achieving an impressive 97.6% AUC. 在机器学习领域，图像数据中的异常检测和定位研究已经获得了巨大的关注，特别是对于工业缺陷检测等实际应用。虽然大多数现有方法主要使用卷积神经网络（CNN）作为主要网络架构，但我们引入了一种基于 Transformer 主干网络的新颖方法。我们的方法采用两阶段增量学习策略。在第一阶段，我们仅在正常图像上训练蒙版自动编码器（MAE）模型。在后续阶段，我们应用像素级数据增强技术来生成损坏的正常图像及其相应的像素标签。此过程允许模型学习如何修复损坏的区域并对每个像素的状态进行分类。最终，该模型生成像素重建误差矩阵和像素异常概率矩阵。然后将这些矩阵组合起来生成异常评分矩阵，可有效检测异常区域。当与几种最先进的基于 CNN 的方法进行基准测试时，我们的方法在 MVTec AD 数据集上表现出卓越的性能，实现了令人印象深刻的 97.6% AUC。 本文提出基于Transformer的增量自监督学习方法ISSTAD，用于图像异常检测与定位。 Wenping Jin,Fei Guo,Li Zhu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Niklas Berndt,Henri Lotze
title: Advice Complexity bounds for Online Delayed F-Node-, H-Node- and H-Edge-Deletion Problems
title_zh: 在线延迟 F 节点、H 节点和 H 边删除问题的建议复杂性界限
abstract: Let F be a fixed finite obstruction set of graphs and G be a graph revealed in an online fashion, node by node. The online Delayed F-Node-Deletion Problem (F-Edge-Deletion Problem}) is to keep G free of every H in F by deleting nodes (edges) until no induced subgraph isomorphic to any graph in F can be found in G. The task is to keep the number of deletions minimal. Advice complexity is a model in which an online algorithm has access to a binary tape of infinite length, on which an oracle can encode information to increase the performance of the algorithm. We are interested in the minimum number of advice bits that are necessary and sufficient to solve a deletion problem optimally. In this work, we first give essentially tight bounds on the advice complexity of the Delayed F-Node-Deletion Problem and F-Edge-Deletion Problem where F consists of a single, arbitrary graph H. We then show that the gadget used to prove these results can be utilized to give tight bounds in the case of node deletions if F consists of either only disconnected graphs or only connected graphs. Finally, we show that the number of advice bits that is necessary and sufficient to solve the general Delayed F-Node-Deletion Problem is heavily dependent on the obstruction set F. To this end, we provide sets for which this number is either constant, logarithmic or linear in the optimal number of deletions.
summary: Let F be a fixed finite obstruction set of graphs and G be a graph revealed in an online fashion, node by node. The online Delayed F-Node-Deletion Problem (F-Edge-Deletion Problem}) is to keep G free of every H in F by deleting nodes (edges) until no induced subgraph isomorphic to any graph in F can be found in G. The task is to keep the number of deletions minimal. Advice complexity is a model in which an online algorithm has access to a binary tape of infinite length, on which an oracle can encode information to increase the performance of the algorithm. We are interested in the minimum number of advice bits that are necessary and sufficient to solve a deletion problem optimally. In this work, we first give essentially tight bounds on the advice complexity of the Delayed F-Node-Deletion Problem and F-Edge-Deletion Problem where F consists of a single, arbitrary graph H. We then show that the gadget used to prove these results can be utilized to give tight bounds in the case of node deletions if F consists of either only disconnected graphs or only connected graphs. Finally, we show that the number of advice bits that is necessary and sufficient to solve the general Delayed F-Node-Deletion Problem is heavily dependent on the obstruction set F. To this end, we provide sets for which this number is either constant, logarithmic or linear in the optimal number of deletions.
abstract_zh: 令 F 为图的固定有限阻塞集，G 为以在线方式逐个节点显示的图。在线延迟F节点删除问题（F-边删除问题}）是通过删除节点（边）来保持G不受F中每个H的影响，直到在G中找不到与F中任何图同构的诱导子图。任务是保持删除次数最少。建议复杂性是一种模型，其中在线算法可以访问无限长度的二进制磁带，预言机可以在该磁带上对信息进行编码以提高算法的性能。我们感兴趣的是最佳地解决删除问题所必需且充分的建议位的最小数量。在这项工作中，我们首先对延迟 F 节点删除问题和 F 边删除问题的建议复杂性给出本质上的严格界限，其中 F 由单个任意图 H 组成。然后，我们表明，如果 F 仅由断开的图或仅由连通图组成，则用于证明这些结果的小工具可用于在节点删除的情况下给出严格界限。最后，我们表明，解决一般延迟 F 节点删除问题所必需且充分的建议位数量在很大程度上取决于阻塞集 F。为此，我们提供了该数量在最佳删除数量中为常数、对数或线性的集合。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线延迟F-节点删除、H-节点删除和H-边删除问题的建议复杂度界限，旨在确定解决这些删除问题所需的最少建议位数。
AI.motivation: 在线算法中，建议复杂度模型通过提供额外信息来优化性能，但针对不同障碍集F的删除问题，其建议复杂度界限尚不明确，需进一步研究。
AI.method: 通过分析建议复杂度模型，结合构造性证明和紧界分析，针对不同障碍集F的结构（如连通性）进行分类讨论，确定所需建议位数的上下限。
AI.result: 确定了单个障碍图H情况下的建议复杂度紧界，证明了工具在处理仅含离散或连通图的障碍集时的有效性，并表明建议位数与障碍集F的结构密切相关，存在常数、对数或线性级别的差异。
AI.conclusion: 建议复杂度的确定高度依赖于障碍集F的结构特性，为在线延迟删除问题提供了理论上的界限，有助于指导算法设计和优化。

To this end, we provide sets for which this number is either constant, logarithmic or linear in the optimal number of deletions. 令 F 为图的固定有限阻塞集，G 为以在线方式逐个节点显示的图。在线延迟F节点删除问题（F-边删除问题}）是通过删除节点（边）来保持G不受F中每个H的影响，直到在G中找不到与F中任何图同构的诱导子图。任务是保持删除次数最少。建议复杂性是一种模型，其中在线算法可以访问无限长度的二进制磁带，预言机可以在该磁带上对信息进行编码以提高算法的性能。我们感兴趣的是最佳地解决删除问题所必需且充分的建议位的最小数量。在这项工作中，我们首先对延迟 F 节点删除问题和 F 边删除问题的建议复杂性给出本质上的严格界限，其中 F 由单个任意图 H 组成。然后，我们表明，如果 F 仅由断开的图或仅由连通图组成，则用于证明这些结果的小工具可用于在节点删除的情况下给出严格界限。最后，我们表明，解决一般延迟 F 节点删除问题所必需且充分的建议位数量在很大程度上取决于阻塞集 F。为此，我们提供了该数量在最佳删除数量中为常数、对数或线性的集合。 本文研究在线延迟F-节点删除、H-节点删除和H-边删除问题的建议复杂度界限，旨在确定解决这些删除问题所需的最少建议位数。 Niklas Berndt,Henri Lotze cs.DS

authors_text: Shengjie Zhu,Xiaoming Liu
title: PMatch: Paired Masked Image Modeling for Dense Geometric Matching
title_zh: PMatch：用于密集几何匹配的配对蒙版图像建模
abstract: Dense geometric matching determines the dense pixel-wise correspondence between a source and support image corresponding to the same 3D structure. Prior works employ an encoder of transformer blocks to correlate the two-frame features. However, existing monocular pretraining tasks, e.g., image classification, and masked image modeling (MIM), can not pretrain the cross-frame module, yielding less optimal performance. To resolve this, we reformulate the MIM from reconstructing a single masked image to reconstructing a pair of masked images, enabling the pretraining of transformer module. Additionally, we incorporate a decoder into pretraining for improved upsampling results. Further, to be robust to the textureless area, we propose a novel cross-frame global matching module (CFGM). Since the most textureless area is planar surfaces, we propose a homography loss to further regularize its learning. Combined together, we achieve the State-of-The-Art (SoTA) performance on geometric matching. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/ShngJZ/PMatch.
summary: Dense geometric matching determines the dense pixel-wise correspondence between a source and support image corresponding to the same 3D structure. Prior works employ an encoder of transformer blocks to correlate the two-frame features. However, existing monocular pretraining tasks, e.g., image classification, and masked image modeling (MIM), can not pretrain the cross-frame module, yielding less optimal performance. To resolve this, we reformulate the MIM from reconstructing a single masked image to reconstructing a pair of masked images, enabling the pretraining of transformer module. Additionally, we incorporate a decoder into pretraining for improved upsampling results. Further, to be robust to the textureless area, we propose a novel cross-frame global matching module (CFGM). Since the most textureless area is planar surfaces, we propose a homography loss to further regularize its learning. Combined together, we achieve the State-of-The-Art (SoTA) performance on geometric matching. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/ShngJZ/PMatch.
abstract_zh: 密集几何匹配确定对应于相同 3D 结构的源图像和支持图像之间的密集像素级对应关系。先前的工作采用变压器块的编码器来关联两帧特征。然而，现有的单目预训练任务，例如图像分类和掩模图像建模（MIM），无法预训练跨帧模块，从而产生不太理想的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们将 MIM 从重建单个掩模图像重新构建为重建一对掩模图像，从而实现 Transformer 模块的预训练。此外，我们将解码器纳入预训练中，以改进上采样结果。 Further, to be robust to the textureless area, we propose a novel cross-frame global matching module (CFGM).由于最无纹理的区域是平面，我们提出单应性损失来进一步规范其学习。结合在一起，我们在几何匹配方面实现了最先进的 (SoTA) 性能。 Codes and models are available at https://github.com/ShngJZ/PMatch.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PMatch的配对掩码图像建模方法，用于实现密集几何匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有的单目预训练任务（如图像分类和掩码图像建模）无法预训练跨帧模块，导致性能不理想。
AI.method: 本文将MIM任务从重建单个掩码图像扩展到重建一对掩码图像，并引入解码器进行上采样，同时提出一种新的跨帧全局匹配模块（CFGM）和同源性损失以增强对无纹理区域的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 该方法在几何匹配任务中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: PMatch通过改进预训练任务和引入新的模块，在几何匹配方面取得了显著的成果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PMatch的配对掩码图像建模方法，用于实现密集几何匹配。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的单目预训练任务（如图像分类和掩码图像建模）无法预训练跨帧模块，导致性能不理想。
ai_content.method: 本文将MIM任务从重建单个掩码图像扩展到重建一对掩码图像，并引入解码器进行上采样，同时提出一种新的跨帧全局匹配模块（CFGM）和同源性损失以增强对无纹理区域的鲁棒性。
ai_content.result: 该方法在几何匹配任务中取得了最先进的性能。
ai_content.conclusion: PMatch通过改进预训练任务和引入新的模块，在几何匹配方面取得了显著的成果。

search_text: PMatch: Paired Masked Image Modeling for Dense Geometric Matching PMatch：用于密集几何匹配的配对蒙版图像建模 Dense geometric matching determines the dense pixel-wise correspondence between a source and support image corresponding to the same 3D structure. Prior works employ an encoder of transformer blocks to correlate the two-frame features. However, existing monocular pretraining tasks, e.g., image classification, and masked image modeling (MIM), can not pretrain the cross-frame module, yielding less optimal performance. To resolve this, we reformulate the MIM from reconstructing a single masked image to reconstructing a pair of masked images, enabling the pretraining of transformer module. Additionally, we incorporate a decoder into pretraining for improved upsampling results. Further, to be robust to the textureless area, we propose a novel cross-frame global matching module (CFGM). Since the most textureless area is planar surfaces, we propose a homography loss to further regularize its learning. Combined together, we achieve the State-of-The-Art (SoTA) performance on geometric matching. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/ShngJZ/PMatch. 密集几何匹配确定对应于相同 3D 结构的源图像和支持图像之间的密集像素级对应关系。先前的工作采用变压器块的编码器来关联两帧特征。然而，现有的单目预训练任务，例如图像分类和掩模图像建模（MIM），无法预训练跨帧模块，从而产生不太理想的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们将 MIM 从重建单个掩模图像重新构建为重建一对掩模图像，从而实现 Transformer 模块的预训练。此外，我们将解码器纳入预训练中，以改进上采样结果。 Further, to be robust to the textureless area, we propose a novel cross-frame global matching module (CFGM).由于最无纹理的区域是平面，我们提出单应性损失来进一步规范其学习。结合在一起，我们在几何匹配方面实现了最先进的 (SoTA) 性能。 Codes and models are available at https://github.com/ShngJZ/PMatch. 本文提出了一种名为PMatch的配对掩码图像建模方法，用于实现密集几何匹配。 Shengjie Zhu,Xiaoming Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Kaya Turgut,Helin Dutagaci
title: Local region-learning modules for point cloud classification
title_zh: 用于点云分类的局部区域学习模块
abstract: Data organization via forming local regions is an integral part of deep learning networks that process 3D point clouds in a hierarchical manner. At each level, the point cloud is sampled to extract representative points and these points are used to be centers of local regions. The organization of local regions is of considerable importance since it determines the location and size of the receptive field at a particular layer of feature aggregation. In this paper, we present two local region-learning modules: Center Shift Module to infer the appropriate shift for each center point, and Radius Update Module to alter the radius of each local region. The parameters of the modules are learned through optimizing the loss associated with the particular task within an end-to-end network. We present alternatives for these modules through various ways of modeling the interactions of the features and locations of 3D points in the point cloud. We integrated both modules independently and together to the PointNet++ and PointCNN object classification architectures, and demonstrated that the modules contributed to a significant increase in classification accuracy for the ScanObjectNN data set consisting of scans of real-world objects. Our further experiments on ShapeNet data set showed that the modules are also effective on 3D CAD models.
summary: Data organization via forming local regions is an integral part of deep learning networks that process 3D point clouds in a hierarchical manner. At each level, the point cloud is sampled to extract representative points and these points are used to be centers of local regions. The organization of local regions is of considerable importance since it determines the location and size of the receptive field at a particular layer of feature aggregation. In this paper, we present two local region-learning modules: Center Shift Module to infer the appropriate shift for each center point, and Radius Update Module to alter the radius of each local region. The parameters of the modules are learned through optimizing the loss associated with the particular task within an end-to-end network. We present alternatives for these modules through various ways of modeling the interactions of the features and locations of 3D points in the point cloud. We integrated both modules independently and together to the PointNet++ and PointCNN object classification architectures, and demonstrated that the modules contributed to a significant increase in classification accuracy for the ScanObjectNN data set consisting of scans of real-world objects. Our further experiments on ShapeNet data set showed that the modules are also effective on 3D CAD models.
abstract_zh: 通过形成局部区域来组织数据是深度学习网络的一个组成部分，它以分层方式处理 3D 点云。在每个级别，对点云进行采样以提取代表点，并将这些点用作局部区域的中心。局部区域的组织非常重要，因为它决定了特征聚合特定层的感受野的位置和大小。在本文中，我们提出了两个局部区域学习模块：中心移位模块用于推断每个中心点的适当移位，半径更新模块用于改变每个局部区域的半径。模块的参数是通过优化与端到端网络中特定任务相关的损失来学习的。我们通过各种方式对点云中 3D 点的特征和位置的交互进行建模，为这些模块提供了替代方案。我们将这两个模块独立集成到 PointNet++ 和 PointCNN 对象分类架构中，并证明这些模块有助于显着提高由真实世界对象扫描组成的 ScanObjectNN 数据集的分类准确性。我们在 ShapeNet 数据集上的进一步实验表明，这些模块对 3D CAD 模型也有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种局部区域学习模块（Center Shift Module和Radius Update Module），通过动态调整点云分类中局部区域的中心位置和半径，提升分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 局部区域的组织方式直接影响点云特征聚合层的感受野范围，而传统方法固定区域参数难以适应复杂场景，需通过学习动态优化区域参数。
AI.method: 设计Center Shift Module预测中心点偏移量，Radius Update Module动态调整区域半径，将模块集成至PointNet++和PointCNN架构中，并通过端到端训练优化参数。
AI.result: 在ScanObjectNN真实物体数据集和ShapeNet CAD模型数据集上，分类准确率均显著提升，验证了模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态调整局部区域参数的模块能有效增强点云分类性能，适用于不同类型的3D数据集。

authors_text: Xinxin Hu,Haotian Chen,Junjie Zhang,Hongchang Chen,Shuxin Liu,Xing Li,Yahui Wang,Xiangyang Xue
title: GAT-COBO: Cost-Sensitive Graph Neural Network for Telecom Fraud Detection
title_zh: GAT-COBO：用于电信欺诈检测的成本敏感型图神经网络
abstract: Along with the rapid evolution of mobile communication technologies, such as 5G, there has been a drastically increase in telecom fraud, which significantly dissipates individual fortune and social wealth. In recent years, graph mining techniques are gradually becoming a mainstream solution for detecting telecom fraud. However, the graph imbalance problem, caused by the Pareto principle, brings severe challenges to graph data mining. This is a new and challenging problem, but little previous work has been noticed. In this paper, we propose a Graph ATtention network with COst-sensitive BOosting (GAT-COBO) for the graph imbalance problem. First, we design a GAT-based base classifier to learn the embeddings of all nodes in the graph. Then, we feed the embeddings into a well-designed cost-sensitive learner for imbalanced learning. Next, we update the weights according to the misclassification cost to make the model focus more on the minority class. Finally, we sum the node embeddings obtained by multiple cost-sensitive learners to obtain a comprehensive node representation, which is used for the downstream anomaly detection task. Extensive experiments on two real-world telecom fraud detection datasets demonstrate that our proposed method is effective for the graph imbalance problem, outperforming the state-of-the-art GNNs and GNN-based fraud detectors. In addition, our model is also helpful for solving the widespread over-smoothing problem in GNNs. The GAT-COBO code and datasets are available at https://github.com/xxhu94/GAT-COBO.
summary: Along with the rapid evolution of mobile communication technologies, such as 5G, there has been a drastically increase in telecom fraud, which significantly dissipates individual fortune and social wealth. In recent years, graph mining techniques are gradually becoming a mainstream solution for detecting telecom fraud. However, the graph imbalance problem, caused by the Pareto principle, brings severe challenges to graph data mining. This is a new and challenging problem, but little previous work has been noticed. In this paper, we propose a Graph ATtention network with COst-sensitive BOosting (GAT-COBO) for the graph imbalance problem. First, we design a GAT-based base classifier to learn the embeddings of all nodes in the graph. Then, we feed the embeddings into a well-designed cost-sensitive learner for imbalanced learning. Next, we update the weights according to the misclassification cost to make the model focus more on the minority class. Finally, we sum the node embeddings obtained by multiple cost-sensitive learners to obtain a comprehensive node representation, which is used for the downstream anomaly detection task. Extensive experiments on two real-world telecom fraud detection datasets demonstrate that our proposed method is effective for the graph imbalance problem, outperforming the state-of-the-art GNNs and GNN-based fraud detectors. In addition, our model is also helpful for solving the widespread over-smoothing problem in GNNs. The GAT-COBO code and datasets are available at https://github.com/xxhu94/GAT-COBO.
abstract_zh: 随着5G等移动通信技术的快速发展，电信诈骗案件急剧增加，极大地消耗了个人财富和社会财富。近年来，图挖掘技术逐渐成为检测电信欺诈的主流解决方案。然而，帕累托原理引起的图不平衡问题给图数据挖掘带来了严峻的挑战。这是一个新的、具有挑战性的问题，但之前的工作很少被注意到。在本文中，我们针对图不平衡问题提出了一种具有 COst 敏感 BOosting 的图注意力网络（GAT-COBO）。首先，我们设计一个基于 GAT 的基分类器来学习图中所有节点的嵌入。然后，我们将嵌入输入到精心设计的成本敏感学习器中，以实现不平衡学习。接下来，我们根据错误分类成本更新权重，使模型更加关注少数类别。最后，我们将多个成本敏感学习器获得的节点嵌入求和，以获得全面的节点表示，用于下游异常检测任务。对两个现实世界电信欺诈检测数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法对于图不平衡问题是有效的，优于最先进的 GNN 和基于 GNN 的欺诈检测器。此外，我们的模型也有助于解决 GNN 中普遍存在的过度平滑问题。 GAT-COBO 代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/xxhu94/GAT-COBO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAT-COBO模型，通过成本敏感机制解决电信诈骗检测中的图不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 随着5G技术发展，电信诈骗激增且存在图数据不平衡问题，传统方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: 设计基于GAT的分类器学习节点嵌入，结合成本敏感学习器调整误分类权重，融合多学习器结果生成综合表示。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上优于现有GNN方法，同时缓解了GNN的过度平滑问题。
AI.conclusion: GAT-COBO有效解决了图不平衡与过平滑问题，为电信诈骗检测提供新思路。

Extensive experiments on two real-world telecom fraud detection datasets demonstrate that our proposed method is effective for the graph imbalance problem, outperforming the state-of-the-art GNNs and GNN-based fraud detectors. In addition, our model is also helpful for solving the widespread over-smoothing problem in GNNs. The GAT-COBO code and datasets are available at https://github.com/xxhu94/GAT-COBO. 随着5G等移动通信技术的快速发展，电信诈骗案件急剧增加，极大地消耗了个人财富和社会财富。近年来，图挖掘技术逐渐成为检测电信欺诈的主流解决方案。然而，帕累托原理引起的图不平衡问题给图数据挖掘带来了严峻的挑战。这是一个新的、具有挑战性的问题，但之前的工作很少被注意到。在本文中，我们针对图不平衡问题提出了一种具有 COst 敏感 BOosting 的图注意力网络（GAT-COBO）。首先，我们设计一个基于 GAT 的基分类器来学习图中所有节点的嵌入。然后，我们将嵌入输入到精心设计的成本敏感学习器中，以实现不平衡学习。接下来，我们根据错误分类成本更新权重，使模型更加关注少数类别。最后，我们将多个成本敏感学习器获得的节点嵌入求和，以获得全面的节点表示，用于下游异常检测任务。对两个现实世界电信欺诈检测数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法对于图不平衡问题是有效的，优于最先进的 GNN 和基于 GNN 的欺诈检测器。此外，我们的模型也有助于解决 GNN 中普遍存在的过度平滑问题。 GAT-COBO 代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/xxhu94/GAT-COBO 获取。 本文提出GAT-COBO模型，通过成本敏感机制解决电信诈骗检测中的图不平衡问题。 Xinxin Hu,Haotian Chen,Junjie Zhang,Hongchang Chen,Shuxin Liu,Xing Li,Yahui Wang,Xiangyang Xue cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Edward G. A. Henderson,Marcel van Herk,Eliana M. Vasquez Osorio
title: The impact of training dataset size and ensemble inference strategies on head and neck auto-segmentation
title_zh: 训练数据集大小和集成推理策略对头颈自动分割的影响
comment: Accepted in 20th IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI 2023)
comments: Accepted in 20th IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI 2023)
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are increasingly being used to automate segmentation of organs-at-risk in radiotherapy. Since large sets of highly curated data are scarce, we investigated how much data is required to train accurate and robust head and neck auto-segmentation models. For this, an established 3D CNN was trained from scratch with different sized datasets (25-1000 scans) to segment the brainstem, parotid glands and spinal cord in CTs. Additionally, we evaluated multiple ensemble techniques to improve the performance of these models. The segmentations improved with training set size up to 250 scans and the ensemble methods significantly improved performance for all organs. The impact of the ensemble methods was most notable in the smallest datasets, demonstrating their potential for use in cases where large training datasets are difficult to obtain.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are increasingly being used to automate segmentation of organs-at-risk in radiotherapy. Since large sets of highly curated data are scarce, we investigated how much data is required to train accurate and robust head and neck auto-segmentation models. For this, an established 3D CNN was trained from scratch with different sized datasets (25-1000 scans) to segment the brainstem, parotid glands and spinal cord in CTs. Additionally, we evaluated multiple ensemble techniques to improve the performance of these models. The segmentations improved with training set size up to 250 scans and the ensemble methods significantly improved performance for all organs. The impact of the ensemble methods was most notable in the smallest datasets, demonstrating their potential for use in cases where large training datasets are difficult to obtain.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 越来越多地用于自动分割放射治疗中的危险器官。由于大量精心策划的数据非常稀缺，我们研究了需要多少数据来训练准确且稳健的头颈自动分割模型。为此，我们使用不同大小的数据集（25-1000 次扫描）从头开始训练已建立的 3D CNN，以在 CT 中分割脑干、腮腺和脊髓。此外，我们评估了多种集成技术来提高这些模型的性能。训练集大小高达 250 次扫描后，分割得到了改善，集成方法显着提高了所有器官的性能。集成方法的影响在最小的数据集中最为显着，证明了它们在难以获得大型训练数据集的情况下的使用潜力。

AI.tldr: 研究训练数据集规模和集成推理策略对头颈自动分割模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 放射治疗中关键器官的自动分割需要高精度模型，但高质量标注数据稀缺，需探索小数据集下的有效训练方法。
AI.method: 基于3D卷积神经网络，使用25-1000例CT扫描数据训练模型，并测试多种集成学习策略优化分割效果。
AI.result: 数据集增至250例时模型性能最佳，集成方法在所有器官分割中均显著提升效果，尤其在小数据集（≤250例）中作用突出。
AI.conclusion: 集成学习策略可有效缓解医学图像分割中数据不足的问题，为临床实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Huiyu Duan,Wei Shen,Xiongkuo Min,Danyang Tu,Long Teng,Jia Wang,Guangtao Zhai
title: Masked Autoencoders as Image Processors
title_zh: 作为图像处理器的屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Transformers have shown significant effectiveness for various vision tasks including both high-level vision and low-level vision. Recently, masked autoencoders (MAE) for feature pre-training have further unleashed the potential of Transformers, leading to state-of-the-art performances on various high-level vision tasks. However, the significance of MAE pre-training on low-level vision tasks has not been sufficiently explored. In this paper, we show that masked autoencoders are also scalable self-supervised learners for image processing tasks. We first present an efficient Transformer model considering both channel attention and shifted-window-based self-attention termed CSformer. Then we develop an effective MAE architecture for image processing (MAEIP) tasks. Extensive experimental results show that with the help of MAEIP pre-training, our proposed CSformer achieves state-of-the-art performance on various image processing tasks, including Gaussian denoising, real image denoising, single-image motion deblurring, defocus deblurring, and image deraining.
summary: Transformers have shown significant effectiveness for various vision tasks including both high-level vision and low-level vision. Recently, masked autoencoders (MAE) for feature pre-training have further unleashed the potential of Transformers, leading to state-of-the-art performances on various high-level vision tasks. However, the significance of MAE pre-training on low-level vision tasks has not been sufficiently explored. In this paper, we show that masked autoencoders are also scalable self-supervised learners for image processing tasks. We first present an efficient Transformer model considering both channel attention and shifted-window-based self-attention termed CSformer. Then we develop an effective MAE architecture for image processing (MAEIP) tasks. Extensive experimental results show that with the help of MAEIP pre-training, our proposed CSformer achieves state-of-the-art performance on various image processing tasks, including Gaussian denoising, real image denoising, single-image motion deblurring, defocus deblurring, and image deraining.
abstract_zh: Transformers 对于各种视觉任务（包括高级视觉和低级视觉）都显示出显着的有效性。最近，用于特征预训练的掩模自动编码器（MAE）进一步释放了 Transformer 的潜力，在各种高级视觉任务上实现了最先进的性能。然而，MAE 预训练对低级视觉任务的意义尚未得到充分探讨。在本文中，我们证明了蒙版自动编码器也是用于图像处理任务的可扩展自监督学习器。我们首先提出了一个同时考虑通道注意力和基于移位窗口的自注意力的高效 Transformer 模型，称为 CSformer。然后，我们为图像处理（MAEIP）任务开发了一种有效的 MAE 架构。大量的实验结果表明，借助 MAEIP 预训练，我们提出的 CSformer 在各种图像处理任务上实现了最先进的性能，包括高斯去噪、真实图像去噪、单图像运动去模糊、散焦去模糊和图像去雨。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了掩码自编码器（MAE）在低级图像处理任务中的应用潜力，并提出了新的模型和方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在高级视觉任务中表现优异，但其在低级视觉任务（如去噪、去模糊）中的预训练价值尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 设计结合通道注意力和移位窗口自注意力的高效Transformer模型CSformer，并开发针对图像处理任务的MAE架构（MAEIP）。
AI.result: 通过MAEIP预训练，CSformer在高斯去噪、真实图像去噪、运动模糊消除等任务中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 掩码自编码器预训练能有效提升低级视觉任务性能，提出的CSformer和MAEIP方法具有显著优势。

Recently, masked autoencoders (MAE) for feature pre-training have further unleashed the potential of Transformers, leading to state-of-the-art performances on various high-level vision tasks. However, the significance of MAE pre-training on low-level vision tasks has not been sufficiently explored. In this paper, we show that masked autoencoders are also scalable self-supervised learners for image processing tasks. Then we develop an effective MAE architecture for image processing (MAEIP) tasks. authors_text: Zijian Zhu,Yichi Zhang,Hai Chen,Yinpeng Dong,Shu Zhao,Wenbo Ding,Jiachen Zhong,Shibao Zheng
title: Understanding the Robustness of 3D Object Detection with Bird's-Eye-View Representations in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 了解自动驾驶中鸟瞰图表示的 3D 物体检测的鲁棒性
abstract: 3D object detection is an essential perception task in autonomous driving to understand the environments. The Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) representations have significantly improved the performance of 3D detectors with camera inputs on popular benchmarks. However, there still lacks a systematic understanding of the robustness of these vision-dependent BEV models, which is closely related to the safety of autonomous driving systems. In this paper, we evaluate the natural and adversarial robustness of various representative models under extensive settings, to fully understand their behaviors influenced by explicit BEV features compared with those without BEV. In addition to the classic settings, we propose a 3D consistent patch attack by applying adversarial patches in the 3D space to guarantee the spatiotemporal consistency, which is more realistic for the scenario of autonomous driving. With substantial experiments, we draw several findings: 1) BEV models tend to be more stable than previous methods under different natural conditions and common corruptions due to the expressive spatial representations; 2) BEV models are more vulnerable to adversarial noises, mainly caused by the redundant BEV features; 3) Camera-LiDAR fusion models have superior performance under different settings with multi-modal inputs, but BEV fusion model is still vulnerable to adversarial noises of both point cloud and image. These findings alert the safety issue in the applications of BEV detectors and could facilitate the development of more robust models.
summary: 3D object detection is an essential perception task in autonomous driving to understand the environments. The Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) representations have significantly improved the performance of 3D detectors with camera inputs on popular benchmarks. However, there still lacks a systematic understanding of the robustness of these vision-dependent BEV models, which is closely related to the safety of autonomous driving systems. In this paper, we evaluate the natural and adversarial robustness of various representative models under extensive settings, to fully understand their behaviors influenced by explicit BEV features compared with those without BEV. In addition to the classic settings, we propose a 3D consistent patch attack by applying adversarial patches in the 3D space to guarantee the spatiotemporal consistency, which is more realistic for the scenario of autonomous driving. With substantial experiments, we draw several findings: 1) BEV models tend to be more stable than previous methods under different natural conditions and common corruptions due to the expressive spatial representations; 2) BEV models are more vulnerable to adversarial noises, mainly caused by the redundant BEV features; 3) Camera-LiDAR fusion models have superior performance under different settings with multi-modal inputs, but BEV fusion model is still vulnerable to adversarial noises of both point cloud and image. These findings alert the safety issue in the applications of BEV detectors and could facilitate the development of more robust models.
abstract_zh: 3D object detection is an essential perception task in autonomous driving to understand the environments. The Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) representations have significantly improved the performance of 3D detectors with camera inputs on popular benchmarks.然而，对于这些依赖于视觉的纯电动汽车模型的鲁棒性仍然缺乏系统的理解，这与自动驾驶系统的安全性密切相关。在本文中，我们评估了各种代表性模型在广泛设置下的自然鲁棒性和对抗鲁棒性，以充分理解与没有 BEV 特征相比，它们受显式 BEV 特征影响的行为。除了经典设置之外，我们还提出了3D一致性补丁攻击，通过在3D空间中应用对抗性补丁来保证时空一致性，这对于自动驾驶场景来说更加现实。通过大量实验，我们得出了几个发现：1）由于表达性空间表示，BEV 模型在不同的自然条件和常见损坏下往往比以前的方法更稳定； 2) BEV models are more vulnerable to adversarial noises, mainly caused by the redundant BEV features; 3）相机-LiDAR融合模型在多模态输入的不同设置下具有优越的性能，但BEV融合模型仍然容易受到点云和图像的对抗性噪声的影响。 These findings alert the safety issue in the applications of BEV detectors and could facilitate the development of more robust models.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了自动驾驶中基于鸟瞰图（BEV）表示的3D目标检测模型的鲁棒性，分析其在自然和对抗性条件下的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管BEV表示显著提升了3D检测性能，但其鲁棒性尚未被系统研究，而这对自动驾驶系统的安全性至关重要。
AI.method: 通过大量实验对比BEV与非BEV模型，提出3D时空一致的对抗性补丁攻击方法，测试自然条件和对抗噪声下的模型行为。
AI.result: BEV模型在自然条件下更稳定，但易受冗余特征影响的对抗噪声攻击；多模态融合模型表现更优，但仍存在对抗噪声脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: BEV检测器存在安全风险，需进一步研究以提升其鲁棒性，保障自动驾驶可靠性。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文评估了自动驾驶中基于鸟瞰图（BEV）表示的3D目标检测模型的鲁棒性，分析其在自然和对抗性条件下的表现。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管BEV表示显著提升了3D检测性能，但其鲁棒性尚未被系统研究，而这对自动驾驶系统的安全性至关重要。
ai_content.method: 通过大量实验对比BEV与非BEV模型，提出3D时空一致的对抗性补丁攻击方法，测试自然条件和对抗噪声下的模型行为。
ai_content.result: BEV模型在自然条件下更稳定，但易受冗余特征影响的对抗噪声攻击；多模态融合模型表现更优，但仍存在对抗噪声脆弱性。
ai_content.conclusion: BEV检测器存在安全风险，需进一步研究以提升其鲁棒性，保障自动驾驶可靠性。

search_text: Understanding the Robustness of 3D Object Detection with Bird's-Eye-View Representations in Autonomous Driving 了解自动驾驶中鸟瞰图表示的 3D 物体检测的鲁棒性 3D object detection is an essential perception task in autonomous driving to understand the environments. The Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) representations have significantly improved the performance of 3D detectors with camera inputs on popular benchmarks. However, there still lacks a systematic understanding of the robustness of these vision-dependent BEV models, which is closely related to the safety of autonomous driving systems. In this paper, we evaluate the natural and adversarial robustness of various representative models under extensive settings, to fully understand their behaviors influenced by explicit BEV features compared with those without BEV. In addition to the classic settings, we propose a 3D consistent patch attack by applying adversarial patches in the 3D space to guarantee the spatiotemporal consistency, which is more realistic for the scenario of autonomous driving. With substantial experiments, we draw several findings: 1) BEV models tend to be more stable than previous methods under different natural conditions and common corruptions due to the expressive spatial representations; 2) BEV models are more vulnerable to adversarial noises, mainly caused by the redundant BEV features; 3) Camera-LiDAR fusion models have superior performance under different settings with multi-modal inputs, but BEV fusion model is still vulnerable to adversarial noises of both point cloud and image. These findings alert the safety issue in the applications of BEV detectors and could facilitate the development of more robust models. 3D object detection is an essential perception task in autonomous driving to understand the environments. The Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) representations have significantly improved the performance of 3D detectors with camera inputs on popular benchmarks.然而，对于这些依赖于视觉的纯电动汽车模型的鲁棒性仍然缺乏系统的理解，这与自动驾驶系统的安全性密切相关。在本文中，我们评估了各种代表性模型在广泛设置下的自然鲁棒性和对抗鲁棒性，以充分理解与没有 BEV 特征相比，它们受显式 BEV 特征影响的行为。除了经典设置之外，我们还提出了3D一致性补丁攻击，通过在3D空间中应用对抗性补丁来保证时空一致性，这对于自动驾驶场景来说更加现实。通过大量实验，我们得出了几个发现：1）由于表达性空间表示，BEV 模型在不同的自然条件和常见损坏下往往比以前的方法更稳定； 2) BEV models are more vulnerable to adversarial noises, mainly caused by the redundant BEV features; 3）相机-LiDAR融合模型在多模态输入的不同设置下具有优越的性能，但BEV融合模型仍然容易受到点云和图像的对抗性噪声的影响。 These findings alert the safety issue in the applications of BEV detectors and could facilitate the development of more robust models. 该论文评估了自动驾驶中基于鸟瞰图（BEV）表示的3D目标检测模型的鲁棒性，分析其在自然和对抗性条件下的表现。 Zijian Zhu,Yichi Zhang,Hai Chen,Yinpeng Dong,Shu Zhao,Wenbo Ding,Jiachen Zhong,Shibao Zheng cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Yifu Liu,Xiaoxia Li,Zhiling Luo,Wei Zhou
title: JCDNet: Joint of Common and Definite phases Network for Weakly Supervised Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: JCDNet：弱监督时间动作本地化的共同阶段和确定阶段网络的联合
abstract: Weakly-supervised temporal action localization aims to localize action instances in untrimmed videos with only video-level supervision. We witness that different actions record common phases, e.g., the run-up in the HighJump and LongJump. These different actions are defined as conjoint actions, whose rest parts are definite phases, e.g., leaping over the bar in a HighJump. Compared with the common phases, the definite phases are more easily localized in existing researches. Most of them formulate this task as a Multiple Instance Learning paradigm, in which the common phases are tended to be confused with the background, and affect the localization completeness of the conjoint actions. To tackle this challenge, we propose a Joint of Common and Definite phases Network (JCDNet) by improving feature discriminability of the conjoint actions. Specifically, we design a Class-Aware Discriminative module to enhance the contribution of the common phases in classification by the guidance of the coarse definite-phase features. Besides, we introduce a temporal attention module to learn robust action-ness scores via modeling temporal dependencies, distinguishing the common phases from the background. Extensive experiments on three datasets (THUMOS14, ActivityNetv1.2, and a conjoint-action subset) demonstrate that JCDNet achieves competitive performance against the state-of-the-art methods. Keywords: weakly-supervised learning, temporal action localization, conjoint action
summary: Weakly-supervised temporal action localization aims to localize action instances in untrimmed videos with only video-level supervision. We witness that different actions record common phases, e.g., the run-up in the HighJump and LongJump. These different actions are defined as conjoint actions, whose rest parts are definite phases, e.g., leaping over the bar in a HighJump. Compared with the common phases, the definite phases are more easily localized in existing researches. Most of them formulate this task as a Multiple Instance Learning paradigm, in which the common phases are tended to be confused with the background, and affect the localization completeness of the conjoint actions. To tackle this challenge, we propose a Joint of Common and Definite phases Network (JCDNet) by improving feature discriminability of the conjoint actions. Specifically, we design a Class-Aware Discriminative module to enhance the contribution of the common phases in classification by the guidance of the coarse definite-phase features. Besides, we introduce a temporal attention module to learn robust action-ness scores via modeling temporal dependencies, distinguishing the common phases from the background. Extensive experiments on three datasets (THUMOS14, ActivityNetv1.2, and a conjoint-action subset) demonstrate that JCDNet achieves competitive performance against the state-of-the-art methods. Keywords: weakly-supervised learning, temporal action localization, conjoint action
abstract_zh: 弱监督时间动作定位旨在仅通过视频级监督来定位未修剪视频中的动作实例。我们见证了不同的动作记录了共同的阶段，例如跳高和跳远的助跑。这些不同的动作被定义为联合动作，其其余部分是明确的阶段，例如，在跳高中跳过横杆。与普通相相比，现有研究中确定相更容易定位。他们中的大多数人将此任务表述为多实例学习范式，其中公共阶段往往与背景混淆，并影响联合动作的定位完整性。为了应对这一挑战，我们通过提高联合动作的特征可辨别性，提出了公共和确定阶段联合网络（JCDNet）。具体来说，我们设计了一个类感知判别模块，通过粗略确定阶段特征的指导来增强公共阶段在分类中的贡献。此外，我们引入了一个时间注意力模块，通过建模时间依赖性来学习鲁棒的动作分数，区分常见阶段和背景。对三个数据集（THUMOS14、ActivityNetv1.2 和联合动作子集）的大量实验表明，JCDNet 实现了与最先进方法相比的竞争性能。关键词：弱监督学习，时间动作定位，联合动作

AI.tldr: 本文提出JCDNet网络，用于在弱监督条件下实现未剪辑视频中的时序动作定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理共用阶段（如跳高和跳远的助跑）时易与背景混淆，导致联合动作定位不完整，需提升共用阶段的特征判别能力。
AI.method: 设计类感知判别模块增强共用阶段分类贡献，并引入时序注意力模块建模时序依赖以区分共用阶段与背景。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14、ActivityNetv1.2及联合动作子集三个数据集上，JCDNet性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: JCDNet通过联合优化共用与确定性阶段特征，有效提升了弱监督时序动作定位的准确性。
