authors_text: Pilhyeon Lee,Taeoh Kim,Minho Shim,Dongyoon Wee,Hyeran Byun
title: Decomposed Cross-modal Distillation for RGB-based Temporal Action Detection
title_zh: 用于基于 RGB 的时间动作检测的分解跨模态蒸馏
abstract: Temporal action detection aims to predict the time intervals and the classes of action instances in the video. Despite the promising performance, existing two-stream models exhibit slow inference speed due to their reliance on computationally expensive optical flow. In this paper, we introduce a decomposed cross-modal distillation framework to build a strong RGB-based detector by transferring knowledge of the motion modality. Specifically, instead of direct distillation, we propose to separately learn RGB and motion representations, which are in turn combined to perform action localization. The dual-branch design and the asymmetric training objectives enable effective motion knowledge transfer while preserving RGB information intact. In addition, we introduce a local attentive fusion to better exploit the multimodal complementarity. It is designed to preserve the local discriminability of the features that is important for action localization. Extensive experiments on the benchmarks verify the effectiveness of the proposed method in enhancing RGB-based action detectors. Notably, our framework is agnostic to backbones and detection heads, bringing consistent gains across different model combinations.
summary: Temporal action detection aims to predict the time intervals and the classes of action instances in the video. Despite the promising performance, existing two-stream models exhibit slow inference speed due to their reliance on computationally expensive optical flow. In this paper, we introduce a decomposed cross-modal distillation framework to build a strong RGB-based detector by transferring knowledge of the motion modality. Specifically, instead of direct distillation, we propose to separately learn RGB and motion representations, which are in turn combined to perform action localization. The dual-branch design and the asymmetric training objectives enable effective motion knowledge transfer while preserving RGB information intact. In addition, we introduce a local attentive fusion to better exploit the multimodal complementarity. It is designed to preserve the local discriminability of the features that is important for action localization. Extensive experiments on the benchmarks verify the effectiveness of the proposed method in enhancing RGB-based action detectors. Notably, our framework is agnostic to backbones and detection heads, bringing consistent gains across different model combinations.
abstract_zh: 时间动作检测旨在预测视频中动作实例的时间间隔和类别。尽管性能很有前景，但现有的双流模型由于依赖于计算成本高昂的光流，因此推理速度较慢。在本文中，我们引入了一种分解的跨模态蒸馏框架，通过传递运动模态的知识来构建强大的基于 RGB 的检测器。具体来说，我们建议单独学习 RGB 和运动表示，而不是直接蒸馏，然后将它们组合起来执行动作定位。双分支设计和不对称训练目标可实现有效的运动知识传输，同时完整保留 RGB 信息。此外，我们引入了局部注意融合，以更好地利用多模态互补性。它旨在保留对于动作定位很重要的特征的局部可辨别性。对基准的大量实验验证了所提出的方法在增强基于 RGB 的动作检测器方面的有效性。值得注意的是，我们的框架与主干网和检测头无关，可以在不同的模型组合中带来一致的增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分解的跨模态蒸馏框架，用于提升基于RGB的时序动作检测性能，通过知识迁移解决传统双流模型依赖光流导致的计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有双流模型因依赖光流计算导致推理速度慢，而单纯使用RGB信息难以捕捉运动特征。需设计无需光流但能有效利用运动信息的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用双分支结构分别学习RGB和运动表示，通过不对称训练目标实现跨模态知识迁移，并引入局部注意力融合机制增强多模态特征互补性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，框架对骨干网络和检测头具有普适性，不同模型组合均取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 分解跨模态蒸馏框架成功实现了运动信息向RGB检测器的知识迁移，在保持高效性的同时提升了时序动作检测精度，具有广泛适用性。

method: 采用双分支结构分别学习RGB和运动表示，通过不对称训练目标实现跨模态知识迁移，并引入局部注意力融合机制增强多模态特征互补性。
result: 在基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，框架对骨干网络和检测头具有普适性，不同模型组合均取得性能提升。
conclusion: 分解跨模态蒸馏框架成功实现了运动信息向RGB检测器的知识迁移，在保持高效性的同时提升了时序动作检测精度，具有广泛适用性。
search_text: Decomposed Cross-modal Distillation for RGB-based Temporal Action Detection 用于基于 RGB 的时间动作检测的分解跨模态蒸馏 Temporal action detection aims to predict the time intervals and the classes of action instances in the video. Despite the promising performance, existing two-stream models exhibit slow inference speed due to their reliance on computationally expensive optical flow. In this paper, we introduce a decomposed cross-modal distillation framework to build a strong RGB-based detector by transferring knowledge of the motion modality. Specifically, instead of direct distillation, we propose to separately learn RGB and motion representations, which are in turn combined to perform action localization. The dual-branch design and the asymmetric training objectives enable effective motion knowledge transfer while preserving RGB information intact. In addition, we introduce a local attentive fusion to better exploit the multimodal complementarity. It is designed to preserve the local discriminability of the features that is important for action localization. Extensive experiments on the benchmarks verify the effectiveness of the proposed method in enhancing RGB-based action detectors. Notably, our framework is agnostic to backbones and detection heads, bringing consistent gains across different model combinations. 时间动作检测旨在预测视频中动作实例的时间间隔和类别。尽管性能很有前景，但现有的双流模型由于依赖于计算成本高昂的光流，因此推理速度较慢。在本文中，我们引入了一种分解的跨模态蒸馏框架，通过传递运动模态的知识来构建强大的基于 RGB 的检测器。具体来说，我们建议单独学习 RGB 和运动表示，而不是直接蒸馏，然后将它们组合起来执行动作定位。双分支设计和不对称训练目标可实现有效的运动知识传输，同时完整保留 RGB 信息。此外，我们引入了局部注意融合，以更好地利用多模态互补性。它旨在保留对于动作定位很重要的特征的局部可辨别性。对基准的大量实验验证了所提出的方法在增强基于 RGB 的动作检测器方面的有效性。值得注意的是，我们的框架与主干网和检测头无关，可以在不同的模型组合中带来一致的增益。 本文提出一种分解的跨模态蒸馏框架，用于提升基于RGB的时序动作检测性能，通过知识迁移解决传统双流模型依赖光流导致的计算效率问题。 Pilhyeon Lee,Taeoh Kim,Minho Shim,Dongyoon Wee,Hyeran Byun cs.CV

authors_text: Philipp Koralus,Vincent Wang-Maścianica
title: Humans in Humans Out: On GPT Converging Toward Common Sense in both Success and Failure
title_zh: 人进人出：论 GPT 在成功和失败中趋向常识
abstract: Increase in computational scale and fine-tuning has seen a dramatic improvement in the quality of outputs of large language models (LLMs) like GPT. Given that both GPT-3 and GPT-4 were trained on large quantities of human-generated text, we might ask to what extent their outputs reflect patterns of human thinking, both for correct and incorrect cases. The Erotetic Theory of Reason (ETR) provides a symbolic generative model of both human success and failure in thinking, across propositional, quantified, and probabilistic reasoning, as well as decision-making. We presented GPT-3, GPT-3.5, and GPT-4 with 61 central inference and judgment problems from a recent book-length presentation of ETR, consisting of experimentally verified data-points on human judgment and extrapolated data-points predicted by ETR, with correct inference patterns as well as fallacies and framing effects (the ETR61 benchmark). ETR61 includes classics like Wason's card task, illusory inferences, the decoy effect, and opportunity-cost neglect, among others. GPT-3 showed evidence of ETR-predicted outputs for 59% of these examples, rising to 77% in GPT-3.5 and 75% in GPT-4. Remarkably, the production of human-like fallacious judgments increased from 18% in GPT-3 to 33% in GPT-3.5 and 34% in GPT-4. This suggests that larger and more advanced LLMs may develop a tendency toward more human-like mistakes, as relevant thought patterns are inherent in human-produced training data. According to ETR, the same fundamental patterns are involved both in successful and unsuccessful ordinary reasoning, so that the "bad" cases could paradoxically be learned from the "good" cases. We further present preliminary evidence that ETR-inspired prompt engineering could reduce instances of these mistakes.

ETR61 includes classics like Wason's card task, illusory inferences, the decoy effect, and opportunity-cost neglect, among others. abstract_zh: 计算规模和微调的增加使得 GPT 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 的输出质量有了显着提高。鉴于 GPT-3 和 GPT-4 都接受了大量人类生成文本的训练，我们可能会问它们的输出在多大程度上反映了人类思维模式，无论是正确还是错误的情况。理性情欲理论 (ETR) 提供了人类思维成功和失败的符号生成模型，涵盖命题、量化和概率推理以及决策。我们提出了 GPT-3、GPT-3.5 和 GPT-4，其中包含来自 ETR 最近一本书的介绍中的 61 个中心推理和判断问题，其中包括经过实验验证的人类判断数据点和 ETR 预测的外推数据点，具有正确的推理模式以及谬误和框架效应（ETR61 基准）。 ETR61 包括沃森的纸牌任务、虚幻推论、诱饵效应和机会成本忽视等经典内容。 GPT-3 显示了这些示例中 59% 的 ETR 预测输出的证据，在 GPT-3.5 中上升到 77%，在 GPT-4 中上升到 75%。值得注意的是，类似人类的错误判断的产生从 GPT-3 中的 18% 增加到 GPT-3.5 中的 33% 和 GPT-4 中的 34%。这表明，规模更大、更先进的法学硕士可能会出现更多类似人类错误的倾向，因为相关的思维模式是人类生成的训练数据中固有的。根据 ETR 的说法，成功和不成功的普通推理都涉及相同的基本模式，因此可以从“好”案例中矛盾地学到“坏”案例。我们进一步提供了初步证据，表明受 ETR 启发的即时工程可以减少这些错误的发生。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了GPT-3、GPT-3.5和GPT-4在人类推理模式（包括正确和错误判断）上的表现，使用ETR61基准测试分析其输出是否反映人类思维特征。
AI.motivation: 研究大型语言模型（LLMs）在训练数据中学习到的人类推理模式，包括成功与失败案例，以探讨其是否趋近人类常识性思维。
AI.method: 基于 Erotetic Theory of Reason (ETR) 构建ETR61基准测试，包含61个经典推理问题（如沃森卡片任务、错觉推理等），测试GPT系列模型在正确推理和错误判断上的表现。
AI.result: GPT-3、GPT-3.5和GPT-4在ETR预测的正确推理中分别达到59%、77%和75%，而人类错误判断（如谬误）的生成率从18%上升至33%-34%，显示模型更接近人类思维模式。
AI.conclusion: 更大规模的LLMs可能因训练数据中的人类思维模式而产生更接近人类的推理错误，ETR启发的提示工程或可减少此类错误。

authors_text: Markus Chimani,Max Ilsen
title: Directed Capacity-Preserving Subgraphs: Hardness and Exact Polynomial Algorithms
title_zh: 有向容量保持子图：硬度和精确多项式算法
comment: This is the definitive version of a paper published in Acta Informatica; the journal version contains mistakes that were introduced by Springer typesetting and not fixed upon our request before publication. A preliminary version named "Capacity-Preserving Subgraphs of Directed Flow Networks" appeared at the 34th International Workshop on Combinatorial Algorithms (IWOCA 2023)
comments: This is the definitive version of a paper published in Acta Informatica; the journal version contains mistakes that were introduced by Springer typesetting and not fixed upon our request before publication. A preliminary version named "Capacity-Preserving Subgraphs of Directed Flow Networks" appeared at the 34th International Workshop on Combinatorial Algorithms (IWOCA 2023)
abstract: We introduce and discuss the Minimum Capacity-Preserving Subgraph (MCPS) problem: given a directed graph and a retention ratio $α\in (0,1)$, find the smallest subgraph that, for each pair of vertices $(u,v)$, preserves at least a fraction $α$ of a maximum $u$-$v$-flow's value. This problem originates from the practical setting of reducing the power consumption in a computer network: it models turning off as many links as possible while retaining the ability to transmit at least $α$ times the traffic compared to the original network. First we prove that MCPS is NP-hard already on a restricted set of directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) with unit edge capacities. Our reduction also shows that a closely related problem (which only considers the arguably most complicated core of the problem in the objective function) is NP-hard to approximate within a sublogarithmic factor already on DAGs. In terms of positive results, we present two algorithms that solve MCPS optimally on directed series-parallel graphs (DSPs): a simple linear-time algorithm for the special case of unit edge capacities and a cubic-time dynamic programming algorithm for the general case of non-uniform edge capacities. Further, we introduce the family of laminar series-parallel graphs (LSPs), a generalization of DSPs that also includes cyclic and very dense graphs. Their properties allow us to solve MCPS on LSPs by employing our DSP-algorithms as subroutines. In addition, we give a separate quadratic-time algorithm for MCPS on LSPs with unit edge capacities that also yields straightforward quadratic time algorithms for several related problems such as Minimum Equivalent Digraph and Directed Hamiltonian Cycle on LSPs.
summary: We introduce and discuss the Minimum Capacity-Preserving Subgraph (MCPS) problem: given a directed graph and a retention ratio $α\in (0,1)$, find the smallest subgraph that, for each pair of vertices $(u,v)$, preserves at least a fraction $α$ of a maximum $u$-$v$-flow's value. This problem originates from the practical setting of reducing the power consumption in a computer network: it models turning off as many links as possible while retaining the ability to transmit at least $α$ times the traffic compared to the original network. First we prove that MCPS is NP-hard already on a restricted set of directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) with unit edge capacities. Our reduction also shows that a closely related problem (which only considers the arguably most complicated core of the problem in the objective function) is NP-hard to approximate within a sublogarithmic factor already on DAGs. In terms of positive results, we present two algorithms that solve MCPS optimally on directed series-parallel graphs (DSPs): a simple linear-time algorithm for the special case of unit edge capacities and a cubic-time dynamic programming algorithm for the general case of non-uniform edge capacities. Further, we introduce the family of laminar series-parallel graphs (LSPs), a generalization of DSPs that also includes cyclic and very dense graphs. Their properties allow us to solve MCPS on LSPs by employing our DSP-algorithms as subroutines. In addition, we give a separate quadratic-time algorithm for MCPS on LSPs with unit edge capacities that also yields straightforward quadratic time algorithms for several related problems such as Minimum Equivalent Digraph and Directed Hamiltonian Cycle on LSPs.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍并讨论最小容量保留子图 (MCPS) 问题：给定有向图和保留率 $α\in (0,1)$，找到最小子图，对于每对顶点 $(u,v)$，至少保留最大 $u$-$v$ 流值的一小部分 $α$。这个问题源于降低计算机网络功耗的实际设置：它模拟关闭尽可能多的链路，同时保留传输与原始网络相比至少 $α$ 倍流量的能力。首先，我们证明 MCPS 在一组具有单位边容量的受限有向无环图 (DAG) 上已经是 NP 难的。我们的简化还表明，一个密切相关的问题（仅考虑目标函数中可以说是最复杂的问题核心）是 NP 难于在 DAG 上已有的次对数因子内近似的。就积极结果而言，我们提出了两种在有向串并图 (DSP) 上最优求解 MCPS 的算法：针对单位边缘容量特殊情况的简单线性时间算法和针对非均匀边缘容量一般情况的立方时间动态规划算法。此外，我们还介绍了层流串并联图 (LSP) 系列，这是 DSP 的推广，还包括循环图和非常密集的图。它们的特性使我们能够通过使用 DSP 算法作为子例程来解决 LSP 上的 MCPS。此外，我们还为具有单位边缘容量的 LSP 上的 MCPS 提供了一个单独的二次时间算法，该算法还为几个相关问题（例如 LSP 上的最小等效有向图和有向哈密顿循环）生成了简单的二次时间算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了最小容量保持子图（MCPS）问题，旨在找到在保留至少α比例最大流值的前提下，最小化有向图的子图规模。
AI.motivation: 该问题源于计算机网络中降低功耗的实际需求，即在关闭尽可能多链路的同时，确保网络传输能力不低于原网络的α倍。
AI.method: 通过证明MCPS在特定DAG上的NP难性，提出针对有向系列并行图（DSP）的线性时间算法和一般情况的动态规划算法，并扩展到更广义的层叠系列并行图（LSP）类。
AI.result: 证明MCPS在单位容量DAG上NP难，提出解决DSP和LSP的多项式时间算法，包括单位容量下的二次时间算法及多个相关问题的高效解法。
AI.conclusion: 尽管MCPS在一般图上难以求解，但针对特定图类（如DSP/LSP）的多项式算法为实际网络优化提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了最小容量保持子图（MCPS）问题，旨在找到在保留至少α比例最大流值的前提下，最小化有向图的子图规模。
ai_content.motivation: 该问题源于计算机网络中降低功耗的实际需求，即在关闭尽可能多链路的同时，确保网络传输能力不低于原网络的α倍。
ai_content.method: 通过证明MCPS在特定DAG上的NP难性，提出针对有向系列并行图（DSP）的线性时间算法和一般情况的动态规划算法，并扩展到更广义的层叠系列并行图（LSP）类。
ai_content.result: 证明MCPS在单位容量DAG上NP难，提出解决DSP和LSP的多项式时间算法，包括单位容量下的二次时间算法及多个相关问题的高效解法。
ai_content.conclusion: 尽管MCPS在一般图上难以求解，但针对特定图类（如DSP/LSP）的多项式算法为实际网络优化提供了可行方案。

search_text: Directed Capacity-Preserving Subgraphs: Hardness and Exact Polynomial Algorithms 有向容量保持子图：硬度和精确多项式算法 We introduce and discuss the Minimum Capacity-Preserving Subgraph (MCPS) problem: given a directed graph and a retention ratio $α\in (0,1)$, find the smallest subgraph that, for each pair of vertices $(u,v)$, preserves at least a fraction $α$ of a maximum $u$-$v$-flow's value. This problem originates from the practical setting of reducing the power consumption in a computer network: it models turning off as many links as possible while retaining the ability to transmit at least $α$ times the traffic compared to the original network. First we prove that MCPS is NP-hard already on a restricted set of directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) with unit edge capacities. Our reduction also shows that a closely related problem (which only considers the arguably most complicated core of the problem in the objective function) is NP-hard to approximate within a sublogarithmic factor already on DAGs. In terms of positive results, we present two algorithms that solve MCPS optimally on directed series-parallel graphs (DSPs): a simple linear-time algorithm for the special case of unit edge capacities and a cubic-time dynamic programming algorithm for the general case of non-uniform edge capacities. Further, we introduce the family of laminar series-parallel graphs (LSPs), a generalization of DSPs that also includes cyclic and very dense graphs. Their properties allow us to solve MCPS on LSPs by employing our DSP-algorithms as subroutines. In addition, we give a separate quadratic-time algorithm for MCPS on LSPs with unit edge capacities that also yields straightforward quadratic time algorithms for several related problems such as Minimum Equivalent Digraph and Directed Hamiltonian Cycle on LSPs. 我们介绍并讨论最小容量保留子图 (MCPS) 问题：给定有向图和保留率 $α\in (0,1)$，找到最小子图，对于每对顶点 $(u,v)$，至少保留最大 $u$-$v$ 流值的一小部分 $α$。这个问题源于降低计算机网络功耗的实际设置：它模拟关闭尽可能多的链路，同时保留传输与原始网络相比至少 $α$ 倍流量的能力。首先，我们证明 MCPS 在一组具有单位边容量的受限有向无环图 (DAG) 上已经是 NP 难的。我们的简化还表明，一个密切相关的问题（仅考虑目标函数中可以说是最复杂的问题核心）是 NP 难于在 DAG 上已有的次对数因子内近似的。就积极结果而言，我们提出了两种在有向串并图 (DSP) 上最优求解 MCPS 的算法：针对单位边缘容量特殊情况的简单线性时间算法和针对非均匀边缘容量一般情况的立方时间动态规划算法。此外，我们还介绍了层流串并联图 (LSP) 系列，这是 DSP 的推广，还包括循环图和非常密集的图。它们的特性使我们能够通过使用 DSP 算法作为子例程来解决 LSP 上的 MCPS。此外，我们还为具有单位边缘容量的 LSP 上的 MCPS 提供了一个单独的二次时间算法，该算法还为几个相关问题（例如 LSP 上的最小等效有向图和有向哈密顿循环）生成了简单的二次时间算法。 本文研究了最小容量保持子图（MCPS）问题，旨在找到在保留至少α比例最大流值的前提下，最小化有向图的子图规模。 Markus Chimani,Max Ilsen cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Salvatore F. Pileggi
title: Ontology in Hybrid Intelligence: a concise literature review
title_zh: 混合智能本体论：简明文献综述
abstract: In a context of constant evolution and proliferation of AI technology,Hybrid Intelligence is gaining popularity to refer a balanced coexistence between human and artificial intelligence. The term has been extensively used in the past two decades to define models of intelligence involving more than one technology. This paper aims to provide (i) a concise and focused overview of the adoption of Ontology in the broad context of Hybrid Intelligence regardless of its definition and (ii) a critical discussion on the possible role of Ontology to reduce the gap between human and artificial intelligence within hybrid intelligent systems. Beside the typical benefits provided by an effective use of ontologies, at a conceptual level, the conducted analysis has pointed out a significant contribution of Ontology to improve quality and accuracy, as well as a more specific role to enable extended interoperability, system engineering and explainable/transparent systems. Additionally, an application-oriented analysis has shown a significant role in present systems (70+% of the cases) and, potentially, in future systems. However, despite the relatively consistent number of papers on the topic, a proper holistic discussion on the establishment of the next generation of hybrid-intelligent environments with a balanced co-existence of human and artificial intelligence is fundamentally missed in literature. Last but not the least, there is currently a relatively low explicit focus on automatic reasoning and inference in hybrid intelligent systems.

The term has been extensively used in the past two decades to define models of intelligence involving more than one technology. This paper aims to provide (i) a concise and focused overview of the adoption of Ontology in the broad context of Hybrid Intelligence regardless of its definition and (ii) a critical discussion on the possible role of Ontology to reduce the gap between human and artificial intelligence within hybrid intelligent systems. Beside the typical benefits provided by an effective use of ontologies, at a conceptual level, the conducted analysis has pointed out a significant contribution of Ontology to improve quality and accuracy, as well as a more specific role to enable extended interoperability, system engineering and explainable/transparent systems. Additionally, an application-oriented analysis has shown a significant role in present systems (70+% of the cases) and, potentially, in future systems. However, despite the relatively consistent number of papers on the topic, a proper holistic discussion on the establishment of the next generation of hybrid-intelligent environments with a balanced co-existence of human and artificial intelligence is fundamentally missed in literature. Last but not the least, there is currently a relatively low explicit focus on automatic reasoning and inference in hybrid intelligent systems.
abstract_zh: 在人工智能技术不断发展和扩散的背景下，混合智能越来越受欢迎，它指的是人类与人工智能之间的平衡共存。该术语在过去二十年中被广泛使用来定义涉及多种技术的智能模型。本文旨在提供（i）在混合智能的广泛背景下对本体论的采用进行简明而集中的概述，无论其定义如何，以及（ii）对本体论在混合智能系统中缩小人类与人工智能之间的差距的可能作用进行批判性讨论。除了有效使用本体所带来的典型好处之外，在概念层面上，进行的分析还指出了本体对提高质量和准确性的重大贡献，以及在实现扩展互操作性、系统工程和可解释/透明系统方面的更具体的作用。此外，面向应用的分析已显示出在当前系统（70% 以上的案例）以及潜在的未来系统中的重要作用。然而，尽管有关该主题的论文数量相对一致，但文献中根本没有对建立人类和人工智能平衡共存的下一代混合智能环境进行适当的整体讨论。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，目前对混合智能系统中的自动推理和推理的明确关注度相对较低。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在概述本体论在混合智能领域的应用现状，并探讨其在缩小人机智能差距中的潜在作用。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术发展，混合智能成为研究热点，但现有文献缺乏对本体论在该领域系统性应用的讨论，且自动推理等关键问题未被充分重视。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析本体论在混合智能系统中的概念贡献与实际应用案例，评估其在系统工程、互操作性及可解释性等方面的作用。
AI.result: 本体论在70%以上现有系统中发挥重要作用，可提升系统准确性与透明度，但文献中缺乏对下一代混合智能环境的系统性构建讨论，且自动推理研究不足。
AI.conclusion: 本体论对混合智能发展具有重要价值，但未来需加强其在自动推理等核心领域的研究，并推动人机协同环境的系统化设计。

authors_text: Jie Gui,Xiaofeng Cong,Chengwei Peng,Yuan Yan Tang,James Tin-Yau Kwok
title: Fooling the Image Dehazing Models by First Order Gradient
title_zh: 通过一阶梯度欺骗图像去雾模型
comment: This paper is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
comments: This paper is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
abstract: The research on the single image dehazing task has been widely explored. However, as far as we know, no comprehensive study has been conducted on the robustness of the well-trained dehazing models. Therefore, there is no evidence that the dehazing networks can resist malicious attacks. In this paper, we focus on designing a group of attack methods based on first order gradient to verify the robustness of the existing dehazing algorithms. By analyzing the general purpose of image dehazing task, four attack methods are proposed, which are predicted dehazed image attack, hazy layer mask attack, haze-free image attack and haze-preserved attack. The corresponding experiments are conducted on six datasets with different scales. Further, the defense strategy based on adversarial training is adopted for reducing the negative effects caused by malicious attacks. In summary, this paper defines a new challenging problem for the image dehazing area, which can be called as adversarial attack on dehazing networks (AADN). Code and Supplementary Material are available at https://github.com/Xiaofeng-life/AADN Dehazing.
summary: The research on the single image dehazing task has been widely explored. However, as far as we know, no comprehensive study has been conducted on the robustness of the well-trained dehazing models. Therefore, there is no evidence that the dehazing networks can resist malicious attacks. In this paper, we focus on designing a group of attack methods based on first order gradient to verify the robustness of the existing dehazing algorithms. By analyzing the general purpose of image dehazing task, four attack methods are proposed, which are predicted dehazed image attack, hazy layer mask attack, haze-free image attack and haze-preserved attack. The corresponding experiments are conducted on six datasets with different scales. Further, the defense strategy based on adversarial training is adopted for reducing the negative effects caused by malicious attacks. In summary, this paper defines a new challenging problem for the image dehazing area, which can be called as adversarial attack on dehazing networks (AADN). Code and Supplementary Material are available at https://github.com/Xiaofeng-life/AADN Dehazing.
abstract_zh: 单图像去雾任务的研究已经被广泛探索。然而，据我们所知，尚未对训练有素的去雾模型的鲁棒性进行全面的研究。因此，没有证据表明去雾网络可以抵抗恶意攻击。在本文中，我们重点设计了一组基于一阶梯度的攻击方法来验证现有去雾算法的鲁棒性。通过分析图像去雾任务的一般目的，提出了四种攻击方法：预测去雾图像攻击、有雾层掩模攻击、无雾图像攻击和雾度保留攻击。在六个不同尺度的数据集上进行了相应的实验。进一步，采用基于对抗性训练的防御策略，减少恶意攻击带来的负面影响。总之，本文定义了图像去雾领域的一个新的挑战性问题，可以称为去雾网络的对抗性攻击（AADN）。代码和补充材料可在 https://github.com/Xiaofeng-life/AADN Dehazing 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于一阶梯度的攻击方法，验证图像去雾模型的鲁棒性，并设计防御策略。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾模型的鲁棒性未被系统研究，缺乏对恶意攻击的抵抗力，需探索其潜在漏洞。
AI.method: 提出四种基于一阶梯度的攻击方法（预测去雾图像攻击、雾霾层掩码攻击等），并在六个数据集上实验，采用对抗训练作为防御策略。
AI.result: 成功攻击现有去雾算法，揭示其脆弱性；对抗训练可缓解攻击影响。
AI.conclusion: 定义了去雾网络对抗攻击（AADN）新问题，强调提升模型鲁棒性的必要性。

method: 提出四种基于一阶梯度的攻击方法（预测去雾图像攻击、雾霾层掩码攻击等），并在六个数据集上实验，采用对抗训练作为防御策略。

search_text: Fooling the Image Dehazing Models by First Order Gradient 通过一阶梯度欺骗图像去雾模型 The research on the single image dehazing task has been widely explored. However, as far as we know, no comprehensive study has been conducted on the robustness of the well-trained dehazing models. Therefore, there is no evidence that the dehazing networks can resist malicious attacks. In this paper, we focus on designing a group of attack methods based on first order gradient to verify the robustness of the existing dehazing algorithms. By analyzing the general purpose of image dehazing task, four attack methods are proposed, which are predicted dehazed image attack, hazy layer mask attack, haze-free image attack and haze-preserved attack. The corresponding experiments are conducted on six datasets with different scales. Further, the defense strategy based on adversarial training is adopted for reducing the negative effects caused by malicious attacks. In summary, this paper defines a new challenging problem for the image dehazing area, which can be called as adversarial attack on dehazing networks (AADN). Code and Supplementary Material are available at https://github.com/Xiaofeng-life/AADN Dehazing. 单图像去雾任务的研究已经被广泛探索。然而，据我们所知，尚未对训练有素的去雾模型的鲁棒性进行全面的研究。因此，没有证据表明去雾网络可以抵抗恶意攻击。在本文中，我们重点设计了一组基于一阶梯度的攻击方法来验证现有去雾算法的鲁棒性。通过分析图像去雾任务的一般目的，提出了四种攻击方法：预测去雾图像攻击、有雾层掩模攻击、无雾图像攻击和雾度保留攻击。在六个不同尺度的数据集上进行了相应的实验。进一步，采用基于对抗性训练的防御策略，减少恶意攻击带来的负面影响。总之，本文定义了图像去雾领域的一个新的挑战性问题，可以称为去雾网络的对抗性攻击（AADN）。代码和补充材料可在 https://github.com/Xiaofeng-life/AADN Dehazing 获取。 本文提出基于一阶梯度的攻击方法，验证图像去雾模型的鲁棒性，并设计防御策略。 Jie Gui,Xiaofeng Cong,Chengwei Peng,Yuan Yan Tang,James Tin-Yau Kwok cs.CV,cs.CR,eess.IV

authors_text: Yiheng Chi,Xingguang Zhang,Stanley H. Chan
title: HDR Imaging with Spatially Varying Signal-to-Noise Ratios
title_zh: 具有空间变化信噪比的 HDR 成像
abstract: While today's high dynamic range (HDR) image fusion algorithms are capable of blending multiple exposures, the acquisition is often controlled so that the dynamic range within one exposure is narrow. For HDR imaging in photon-limited situations, the dynamic range can be enormous and the noise within one exposure is spatially varying. Existing image denoising algorithms and HDR fusion algorithms both fail to handle this situation, leading to severe limitations in low-light HDR imaging. This paper presents two contributions. Firstly, we identify the source of the problem. We find that the issue is associated with the co-existence of (1) spatially varying signal-to-noise ratio, especially the excessive noise due to very dark regions, and (2) a wide luminance range within each exposure. We show that while the issue can be handled by a bank of denoisers, the complexity is high. Secondly, we propose a new method called the spatially varying high dynamic range (SV-HDR) fusion network to simultaneously denoise and fuse images. We introduce a new exposure-shared block within our custom-designed multi-scale transformer framework. In a variety of testing conditions, the performance of the proposed SV-HDR is better than the existing methods.
summary: While today's high dynamic range (HDR) image fusion algorithms are capable of blending multiple exposures, the acquisition is often controlled so that the dynamic range within one exposure is narrow. For HDR imaging in photon-limited situations, the dynamic range can be enormous and the noise within one exposure is spatially varying. Existing image denoising algorithms and HDR fusion algorithms both fail to handle this situation, leading to severe limitations in low-light HDR imaging. This paper presents two contributions. Firstly, we identify the source of the problem. We find that the issue is associated with the co-existence of (1) spatially varying signal-to-noise ratio, especially the excessive noise due to very dark regions, and (2) a wide luminance range within each exposure. We show that while the issue can be handled by a bank of denoisers, the complexity is high. Secondly, we propose a new method called the spatially varying high dynamic range (SV-HDR) fusion network to simultaneously denoise and fuse images. We introduce a new exposure-shared block within our custom-designed multi-scale transformer framework. In a variety of testing conditions, the performance of the proposed SV-HDR is better than the existing methods.
abstract_zh: 虽然当今的高动态范围 (HDR) 图像融合算法能够混合多次曝光，但通常会控制采集以使一次曝光内的动态范围变窄。对于光子受限情况下的 HDR 成像，动态范围可能很大，并且一次曝光内的噪声在空间上变化。现有的图像去噪算法和HDR融合算法都无法处理这种情况，导致低光HDR成像受到严重限制。本文提出了两项​​贡献。首先，我们确定问题的根源。我们发现该问题与以下因素的共存有关：(1) 空间变化的信噪比，特别是由于非常暗的区域而导致的过多噪声，以及 (2) 每次曝光内的宽亮度范围。我们表明，虽然这个问题可以通过一组降噪器来处理，但复杂性很高。其次，我们提出了一种称为空间变化高动态范围（SV-HDR）融合网络的新方法，可以同时对图像进行去噪和融合。我们在定制设计的多尺度变压器框架中引入了一个新的曝光共享块。在各种测试条件下，所提出的SV-HDR的性能优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的空间可变高动态范围（SV-HDR）融合网络，用于解决低光环境下HDR成像中空间噪声与宽动态范围共存的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有HDR融合算法和去噪方法无法有效处理低光场景下噪声空间分布不均与单次曝光宽亮度范围共存的挑战，导致成像质量受限。
AI.method: 设计包含曝光共享模块的多尺度Transformer框架，通过自定义网络结构同时实现去噪与HDR融合，应对空间可变信噪比问题。
AI.result: 在多种测试条件下，SV-HDR方法的性能优于现有算法，有效提升了低光HDR成像质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合去噪与融合过程，提出的SV-HDR框架成功解决了空间噪声与宽动态范围共存带来的技术难题。

authors_text: Venus Pasandi,Daniele Pucci
title: Torque Control with Joints Position and Velocity Limits Avoidance
title_zh: 避免关节位置和速度限制的扭矩控制
comment: To be published in IEEE-ICRA 2023 proceedings, 7 pages with 6 figures
comments: To be published in IEEE-ICRA 2023 proceedings, 7 pages with 6 figures
abstract: The design of a control architecture for providing the desired motion along with the realization of the joint limitation of a robotic system is still an open challenge in control and robotics. This paper presents a torque control architecture for fully actuated manipulators for tracking the desired time-varying trajectory while ensuring the joints position and velocity limits. The presented architecture stems from the parametrization of the feasible joints position and velocity space by exogenous states. The proposed parametrization transforms the control problem with constrained states to an un-constrained one by replacing the joints position and velocity with the exogenous states. With the help of Lyapunov-based arguments, we prove that the proposed control architecture ensures the stability and convergence of the desired joint trajectory along with the joints position and velocity limits avoidance. We validate the performance of proposed architecture through various simulations on a simple two-degree-of-freedom manipulator and the humanoid robot iCub.
summary: The design of a control architecture for providing the desired motion along with the realization of the joint limitation of a robotic system is still an open challenge in control and robotics. This paper presents a torque control architecture for fully actuated manipulators for tracking the desired time-varying trajectory while ensuring the joints position and velocity limits. The presented architecture stems from the parametrization of the feasible joints position and velocity space by exogenous states. The proposed parametrization transforms the control problem with constrained states to an un-constrained one by replacing the joints position and velocity with the exogenous states. With the help of Lyapunov-based arguments, we prove that the proposed control architecture ensures the stability and convergence of the desired joint trajectory along with the joints position and velocity limits avoidance. We validate the performance of proposed architecture through various simulations on a simple two-degree-of-freedom manipulator and the humanoid robot iCub.
abstract_zh: 用于提供所需运动并实现机器人系统的关节限制的控制架构的设计仍然是控制和机器人技术中的一个开放挑战。本文提出了一种用于全驱动机械臂的扭矩控制架构，用于跟踪所需的时变轨迹，同时确保关节位置和速度限制。所提出的架构源于外生状态对可行关节位置和速度空间的参数化。所提出的参数化通过用外生状态替换关节位置和速度，将受约束状态的控制问题转换为无约束状态的控制问题。借助基于李亚普诺夫的论证，我们证明所提出的控制架构确保了所需关节轨迹的稳定性和收敛性，以及避免关节位置和速度限制。我们通过对简单的二自由度机械臂和人形机器人 iCub 进行各种模拟来验证所提出的架构的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于全驱动机械臂的扭矩控制架构，在跟踪期望轨迹的同时避免关节位置和速度限制。
AI.motivation: 现有控制方法在确保机器人关节位置和速度限制的同时实现期望运动仍存在挑战，需设计兼顾轨迹跟踪与约束满足的控制架构。
AI.method: 通过外生状态参数化关节位置和速度可行空间，将约束控制问题转化为无约束问题，并基于李雅普诺夫理论证明稳定性。
AI.result: 在二维自由度机械臂和人形机器人iCub上的仿真验证了该架构的有效性，实现了轨迹收敛与约束规避。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过参数化转化有效解决了关节约束问题，为复杂机械系统提供了稳定可靠的控制方案。

authors_text: Stefano Cresci,Kai-Cheng Yang,Angelo Spognardi,Roberto Di Pietro,Filippo Menczer,Marinella Petrocchi
title: Demystifying Misconceptions in Social Bots Research
title_zh: 揭秘社交机器人研究中的误解
abstract: Research on social bots aims at advancing knowledge and providing solutions to one of the most debated forms of online manipulation. Yet, social bot research is plagued by widespread biases, hyped results, and misconceptions that set the stage for ambiguities, unrealistic expectations, and seemingly irreconcilable findings. Overcoming such issues is instrumental towards ensuring reliable solutions and reaffirming the validity of the scientific method. Here, we discuss a broad set of consequential methodological and conceptual issues that affect current social bots research, illustrating each with examples drawn from recent studies. More importantly, we demystify common misconceptions, addressing fundamental points on how social bots research is discussed. Our analysis surfaces the need to discuss research about online disinformation and manipulation in a rigorous, unbiased, and responsible way. This article bolsters such effort by identifying and refuting common fallacious arguments used by both proponents and opponents of social bots research, as well as providing directions toward sound methodologies for future research.

abstract_zh: 对社交机器人的研究旨在增进知识并为最受争议的在线操纵形式之一提供解决方案。然而，社交机器人研究受到广泛的偏见、夸大的结果和误解的困扰，这些都为含糊不清、不切实际的期望和看似不可调和的发现奠定了基础。克服这些问题有助于确保可靠的解决方案并重申科学方法的有效性。在这里，我们讨论了一系列影响当前社交机器人研究的重要方法论和概念问题，并用最近研究中的例子来说明每个问题。更重要的是，我们揭开了常见的误解，解决了如何讨论社交机器人研究的基本要点。我们的分析表明需要以严格、公正和负责任的方式讨论有关在线虚假信息和操纵的研究。本文通过识别和反驳社交机器人研究的支持者和反对者所使用的常见错误论点，并为未来研究的合理方法提供方向，来支持这种努力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在讨论并澄清社交机器人研究中的方法论和概念性问题，通过分析现有研究中的误区，提出更严谨的研究方向。
AI.motivation: 当前社交机器人研究存在偏见、夸大结果和概念混淆，导致科学结论不可靠，需纠正以确保研究有效性。
AI.method: 通过分析近期研究案例，识别方法论和概念性问题，并系统反驳支持与反对社交机器人研究的常见错误论点。
AI.result: 揭示了研究中的关键误区，指出需以更严谨方式讨论在线操纵问题，并为未来研究提供方法论指导。
AI.conclusion: 强调必须以负责任的态度推进社交机器人研究，避免偏见，确保科学方法的可靠性与研究结论的可重复性。

authors_text: Milad Moradi,Ke Yan,David Colwell,Matthias Samwald,Rhona Asgari
title: Model-agnostic explainable artificial intelligence for object detection in image data
title_zh: 与模型无关的可解释人工智能，用于图像数据中的对象检测
abstract: In recent years, deep neural networks have been widely used for building high-performance Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems for computer vision applications. Object detection is a fundamental task in computer vision, which has been greatly progressed through developing large and intricate AI models. However, the lack of transparency is a big challenge that may not allow the widespread adoption of these models. Explainable artificial intelligence is a field of research where methods are developed to help users understand the behavior, decision logics, and vulnerabilities of AI systems. Previously, few explanation methods were developed for object detection based on random masking. However, random masks may raise some issues regarding the actual importance of pixels within an image. In this paper, we design and implement a black-box explanation method named Black-box Object Detection Explanation by Masking (BODEM) through adopting a hierarchical random masking approach for object detection systems. We propose a hierarchical random masking framework in which coarse-grained masks are used in lower levels to find salient regions within an image, and fine-grained mask are used to refine the salient regions in higher levels. Experimentations on various object detection datasets and models showed that BODEM can effectively explain the behavior of object detectors. Moreover, our method outperformed Detector Randomized Input Sampling for Explanation (D-RISE) and Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations (LIME) with respect to different quantitative measures of explanation effectiveness. The experimental results demonstrate that BODEM can be an effective method for explaining and validating object detection systems in black-box testing scenarios.

Experimentations on various object detection datasets and models showed that BODEM can effectively explain the behavior of object detectors. abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络已广泛用于构建计算机视觉应用的高性能人工智能（AI）系统。物体检测是计算机视觉的一项基本任务，通过开发大型且复杂的人工智能模型，它已经取得了巨大的进步。然而，缺乏透明度是一个巨大的挑战，可能无法广泛采用这些模型。可解释的人工智能是一个研究领域，开发方法来帮助用户理解人工智能系统的行为、决策逻辑和漏洞。此前，针对基于随机掩蔽的目标检测开发的解释方法很少。然而，随机掩模可能会引起一些关于图像中像素的实际重要性的问题。在本文中，我们通过对目标检测系统采用分层随机屏蔽方法，设计并实现了一种名为黑盒目标检测屏蔽解释（BODEM）的黑盒解释方法。我们提出了一种分层随机掩码框架，其中在较低级别中使用粗粒度掩码来查找图像内的显着区域，并使用细粒度掩码来细化较高级别中的显着区域。对各种目标检测数据集和模型的实验表明，BODEM 可以有效解释目标检测器的行为。此外，在解释有效性的不同定量测量方面，我们的方法优于检测器随机输入采样解释（D-RISE）和局部可解释模型不可知解释（LIME）。实验结果表明，BODEM 可以成为解释和验证黑盒测试场景中目标检测系统的有效方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BODEM的黑盒解释方法，通过分层随机掩码技术对目标检测系统进行可解释性分析。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在目标检测任务中缺乏透明度，现有随机掩码方法难以准确反映像素的实际重要性，需开发更有效的解释技术。
AI.method: 设计分层随机掩码框架，通过粗粒度掩码定位显著区域，再利用细粒度掩码优化结果，实现模型无关的黑盒解释。
AI.result: 实验表明BODEM在多个数据集和模型上优于D-RISE和LIME，能有效解释目标检测器行为并适用于黑盒测试场景。
AI.conclusion: BODEM为对象检测系统提供了有效的解释方法，在定量指标上优于现有技术，可作为黑盒测试的验证工具。

ai_content.result: 实验表明BODEM在多个数据集和模型上优于D-RISE和LIME，能有效解释目标检测器行为并适用于黑盒测试场景。

authors_text: Yuhang Lu,Touradj Ebrahimi
title: Impact of Video Processing Operations in Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 视频处理操作对 Deepfake 检测的影响
abstract: The detection of digital face manipulation in video has attracted extensive attention due to the increased risk to public trust. To counteract the malicious usage of such techniques, deep learning-based deepfake detection methods have been developed and have shown impressive results. However, the performance of these detectors is often evaluated using benchmarks that hardly reflect real-world situations. For example, the impact of various video processing operations on detection accuracy has not been systematically assessed. To address this gap, this paper first analyzes numerous real-world influencing factors and typical video processing operations. Then, a more systematic assessment methodology is proposed, which allows for a quantitative evaluation of a detector's robustness under the influence of different processing operations. Moreover, substantial experiments have been carried out on three popular deepfake detectors, which give detailed analyses on the impact of each operation and bring insights to foster future research.
summary: The detection of digital face manipulation in video has attracted extensive attention due to the increased risk to public trust. To counteract the malicious usage of such techniques, deep learning-based deepfake detection methods have been developed and have shown impressive results. However, the performance of these detectors is often evaluated using benchmarks that hardly reflect real-world situations. For example, the impact of various video processing operations on detection accuracy has not been systematically assessed. To address this gap, this paper first analyzes numerous real-world influencing factors and typical video processing operations. Then, a more systematic assessment methodology is proposed, which allows for a quantitative evaluation of a detector's robustness under the influence of different processing operations. Moreover, substantial experiments have been carried out on three popular deepfake detectors, which give detailed analyses on the impact of each operation and bring insights to foster future research.
abstract_zh: 由于公众信任风险的增加，视频中数字人脸操纵的检测引起了广泛的关注。为了对抗此类技术的恶意使用，基于深度学习的 Deepfake 检测方法已经被开发出来，并取得了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，这些检测器的性能通常是使用很难反映现实情况的基准来评估的。例如，各种视频处理操作对检测精度的影响尚未得到系统评估。为了解决这一差距，本文首先分析了众多现实世界的影响因素和典型的视频处理操作。然后，提出了一种更系统的评估方法，可以定量评估探测器在不同处理操作的影响下的鲁棒性。此外，我们还在三种流行的 Deepfake 检测器上进行了大量实验，对每个操作的影响进行了详细分析，并为未来的研究带来了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文分析视频处理操作对深度伪造检测的影响，并提出系统评估方法以提升检测器鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测基准未能反映真实场景中视频处理操作对检测精度的影响，需系统评估检测器在实际应用中的稳定性。
AI.method: 分析现实影响因素与典型视频处理操作，提出量化评估检测器鲁棒性的方法，并在三个主流检测器上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验详细揭示不同视频处理操作对检测器性能的影响，为改进检测算法和评估体系提供关键洞察。
AI.conclusion: 当前检测器在真实场景下易受视频处理操作影响，需建立更全面的评估框架以推动鲁棒检测技术的发展。

search_text: Impact of Video Processing Operations in Deepfake Detection 视频处理操作对 Deepfake 检测的影响 The detection of digital face manipulation in video has attracted extensive attention due to the increased risk to public trust. To counteract the malicious usage of such techniques, deep learning-based deepfake detection methods have been developed and have shown impressive results. However, the performance of these detectors is often evaluated using benchmarks that hardly reflect real-world situations. For example, the impact of various video processing operations on detection accuracy has not been systematically assessed. To address this gap, this paper first analyzes numerous real-world influencing factors and typical video processing operations. Then, a more systematic assessment methodology is proposed, which allows for a quantitative evaluation of a detector's robustness under the influence of different processing operations. Moreover, substantial experiments have been carried out on three popular deepfake detectors, which give detailed analyses on the impact of each operation and bring insights to foster future research. 由于公众信任风险的增加，视频中数字人脸操纵的检测引起了广泛的关注。为了对抗此类技术的恶意使用，基于深度学习的 Deepfake 检测方法已经被开发出来，并取得了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，这些检测器的性能通常是使用很难反映现实情况的基准来评估的。例如，各种视频处理操作对检测精度的影响尚未得到系统评估。为了解决这一差距，本文首先分析了众多现实世界的影响因素和典型的视频处理操作。然后，提出了一种更系统的评估方法，可以定量评估探测器在不同处理操作的影响下的鲁棒性。此外，我们还在三种流行的 Deepfake 检测器上进行了大量实验，对每个操作的影响进行了详细分析，并为未来的研究带来了见解。 本文分析视频处理操作对深度伪造检测的影响，并提出系统评估方法以提升检测器鲁棒性。 Yuhang Lu,Touradj Ebrahimi cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jie Xu,Yazhou Ren,Xiaolong Wang,Lei Feng,Zheng Zhang,Gang Niu,Xiaofeng Zhu
title: Investigating and Mitigating the Side Effects of Noisy Views for Self-Supervised Clustering Algorithms in Practical Multi-View Scenarios
title_zh: 研究并减轻实际多视图场景中自监督聚类算法的噪声视图的副作用
abstract: Multi-view clustering (MVC) aims at exploring category structures among multi-view data in self-supervised manners. Multiple views provide more information than single views and thus existing MVC methods can achieve satisfactory performance. However, their performance might seriously degenerate when the views are noisy in practical multi-view scenarios. In this paper, we formally investigate the drawback of noisy views and then propose a theoretically grounded deep MVC method (namely MVCAN) to address this issue. Specifically, we propose a novel MVC objective that enables un-shared parameters and inconsistent clustering predictions across multiple views to reduce the side effects of noisy views. Furthermore, a two-level multi-view iterative optimization is designed to generate robust learning targets for refining individual views' representation learning. Theoretical analysis reveals that MVCAN works by achieving the multi-view consistency, complementarity, and noise robustness. Finally, experiments on extensive public datasets demonstrate that MVCAN outperforms state-of-the-art methods and is robust against the existence of noisy views.
summary: Multi-view clustering (MVC) aims at exploring category structures among multi-view data in self-supervised manners. Multiple views provide more information than single views and thus existing MVC methods can achieve satisfactory performance. However, their performance might seriously degenerate when the views are noisy in practical multi-view scenarios. In this paper, we formally investigate the drawback of noisy views and then propose a theoretically grounded deep MVC method (namely MVCAN) to address this issue. Specifically, we propose a novel MVC objective that enables un-shared parameters and inconsistent clustering predictions across multiple views to reduce the side effects of noisy views. Furthermore, a two-level multi-view iterative optimization is designed to generate robust learning targets for refining individual views' representation learning. Theoretical analysis reveals that MVCAN works by achieving the multi-view consistency, complementarity, and noise robustness. Finally, experiments on extensive public datasets demonstrate that MVCAN outperforms state-of-the-art methods and is robust against the existence of noisy views.
abstract_zh: 多视图聚类（MVC）旨在以自监督的方式探索多视图数据之间的类别结构。多个视图比单个视图提供更多信息，因此现有的 MVC 方法可以获得令人满意的性能。然而，当实际的多视图场景中视图有噪声时，它们的性能可能会严重下降。在本文中，我们正式研究了噪声视图的缺点，然后提出了一种有理论基础的深层 MVC 方法（即 MVCAN）来解决这个问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的 MVC 目标，该目标支持跨多个视图的非共享参数和不一致的聚类预测，以减少噪声视图的副作用。此外，设计了两级多视图迭代优化来生成稳健的学习目标，以细化各个视图的表示学习。理论分析表明，MVCAN 的工作原理是实现多视图一致性、互补性和噪声鲁棒性。最后，对大量公共数据集的实验表明，MVCAN 的性能优于最先进的方法，并且对于噪声视图的存在具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MVCAN的深度多视图聚类方法，旨在解决实际多视图场景中噪声视图对自监督聚类算法的负面影响。
AI.motivation: 现有多视图聚类方法在噪声视图存在时性能显著下降，而实际应用中噪声视图普遍存在，因此需要有效缓解噪声视图带来的副作用。
AI.method: 设计了一种新颖的多视图目标函数，通过引入未共享参数和不一致聚类预测降低噪声影响，并采用两阶段多视图迭代优化生成鲁棒的学习目标，理论分析表明该方法实现了多视图一致性、互补性和噪声鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上的实验表明，MVCAN优于现有最先进方法，并在噪声视图存在时表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MVCAN通过理论支撑的多视图优化机制有效缓解了噪声视图问题，为实际多视图聚类任务提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Mathias S. Feinler,Bernadette N. Hahn
title: Retrospective Motion Correction in Gradient Echo MRI by Explicit Motion Estimation Using Deep CNNs
title_zh: 通过使用深度 CNN 的显式运动估计对梯度回波 MRI 进行回顾性运动校正
abstract: Magnetic Resonance Imaging allows high resolution data acquisition with the downside of motion sensitivity due to relatively long acquisition times. Even during the acquisition of a single 2D slice, motion can severely corrupt the image. Retrospective motion correction strategies do not interfere during acquisition time but operate on the motion affected data. Known methods suited to this scenario are compressed sensing (CS), generative adversarial networks (GANs), and motion estimation. In this paper we propose a strategy to correct for motion artifacts using Deep Convolutional Neuronal Networks (Deep CNNs) in a reliable and verifiable manner by explicit motion estimation. The sensitivity encoding (SENSE) redundancy that multiple receiver coils provide, has in the past been used for acceleration, noise reduction and rigid motion compensation. We show that using Deep CNNs the concepts of rigid motion compensation can be generalized to more complex motion fields. Using a simulated synthetic data set, our proposed supervised network is evaluated on motion corrupted MRIs of abdomen and head. We compare our results with rigid motion compensation and GANs.
summary: Magnetic Resonance Imaging allows high resolution data acquisition with the downside of motion sensitivity due to relatively long acquisition times. Even during the acquisition of a single 2D slice, motion can severely corrupt the image. Retrospective motion correction strategies do not interfere during acquisition time but operate on the motion affected data. Known methods suited to this scenario are compressed sensing (CS), generative adversarial networks (GANs), and motion estimation. In this paper we propose a strategy to correct for motion artifacts using Deep Convolutional Neuronal Networks (Deep CNNs) in a reliable and verifiable manner by explicit motion estimation. The sensitivity encoding (SENSE) redundancy that multiple receiver coils provide, has in the past been used for acceleration, noise reduction and rigid motion compensation. We show that using Deep CNNs the concepts of rigid motion compensation can be generalized to more complex motion fields. Using a simulated synthetic data set, our proposed supervised network is evaluated on motion corrupted MRIs of abdomen and head. We compare our results with rigid motion compensation and GANs.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像可实现高分辨率数据采集，但由于采集时间相对较长，因此存在运动敏感性的缺点。即使在采集单个 2D 切片期间，运动也会严重损坏图像。回顾性运动校正策略不会在采集期间产生干扰，而是对受运动影响的数据进行操作。适合这种场景的已知方法有压缩感知 (CS)、生成对抗网络 (GAN) 和运动估计。在本文中，我们提出了一种策略，通过显式运动估计，以可靠且可验证的方式使用深度卷积神经网络（深度 CNN）来校正运动伪影。多个接收器线圈提供的灵敏度编码 (SENSE) 冗余过去已用于加速、降噪和刚性运动补偿。我们证明，使用深度 CNN，刚性运动补偿的概念可以推广到更复杂的运动领域。使用模拟合成数据集，我们提出的监督网络在腹部和头部运动损坏的 MRI 上进行评估。我们将我们的结果与刚性运动补偿和 GAN 进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度卷积神经网络（Deep CNN）的显式运动估计方法，用于校正梯度回波MRI中的运动伪影。
AI.motivation: MRI因采集时间长易受运动影响，现有方法如压缩感知和GANs在处理复杂运动时效果有限，需更可靠且可验证的校正策略。
AI.method: 利用多接收线圈的SENSE冗余，结合深度CNN进行显式运动估计，推广刚性运动补偿至复杂运动场，并通过合成数据集验证方法。
AI.result: 在腹部和头部运动伪影MRI数据上，所提方法较刚性补偿和GANs表现出更优的校正效果。
AI.conclusion: 深度CNN能有效推广至复杂运动场，为回顾性运动校正提供可靠且可验证的新方案。

search_text: Retrospective Motion Correction in Gradient Echo MRI by Explicit Motion Estimation Using Deep CNNs 通过使用深度 CNN 的显式运动估计对梯度回波 MRI 进行回顾性运动校正 Magnetic Resonance Imaging allows high resolution data acquisition with the downside of motion sensitivity due to relatively long acquisition times. Even during the acquisition of a single 2D slice, motion can severely corrupt the image. Retrospective motion correction strategies do not interfere during acquisition time but operate on the motion affected data. Known methods suited to this scenario are compressed sensing (CS), generative adversarial networks (GANs), and motion estimation. In this paper we propose a strategy to correct for motion artifacts using Deep Convolutional Neuronal Networks (Deep CNNs) in a reliable and verifiable manner by explicit motion estimation. The sensitivity encoding (SENSE) redundancy that multiple receiver coils provide, has in the past been used for acceleration, noise reduction and rigid motion compensation. We show that using Deep CNNs the concepts of rigid motion compensation can be generalized to more complex motion fields. Using a simulated synthetic data set, our proposed supervised network is evaluated on motion corrupted MRIs of abdomen and head. We compare our results with rigid motion compensation and GANs. 磁共振成像可实现高分辨率数据采集，但由于采集时间相对较长，因此存在运动敏感性的缺点。即使在采集单个 2D 切片期间，运动也会严重损坏图像。回顾性运动校正策略不会在采集期间产生干扰，而是对受运动影响的数据进行操作。适合这种场景的已知方法有压缩感知 (CS)、生成对抗网络 (GAN) 和运动估计。在本文中，我们提出了一种策略，通过显式运动估计，以可靠且可验证的方式使用深度卷积神经网络（深度 CNN）来校正运动伪影。多个接收器线圈提供的灵敏度编码 (SENSE) 冗余过去已用于加速、降噪和刚性运动补偿。我们证明，使用深度 CNN，刚性运动补偿的概念可以推广到更复杂的运动领域。使用模拟合成数据集，我们提出的监督网络在腹部和头部运动损坏的 MRI 上进行评估。我们将我们的结果与刚性运动补偿和 GAN 进行比较。 本文提出一种基于深度卷积神经网络（Deep CNN）的显式运动估计方法，用于校正梯度回波MRI中的运动伪影。 Mathias S. Feinler,Bernadette N. Hahn cs.CV,math.NA

authors_text: Yucheng Zhao,Chong Luo,Chuanxin Tang,Dongdong Chen,Noel Codella,Zheng-Jun Zha
title: Streaming Video Model
title_zh: 流媒体视频模型
abstract: Video understanding tasks have traditionally been modeled by two separate architectures, specially tailored for two distinct tasks. Sequence-based video tasks, such as action recognition, use a video backbone to directly extract spatiotemporal features, while frame-based video tasks, such as multiple object tracking (MOT), rely on single fixed-image backbone to extract spatial features. In contrast, we propose to unify video understanding tasks into one novel streaming video architecture, referred to as Streaming Vision Transformer (S-ViT). S-ViT first produces frame-level features with a memory-enabled temporally-aware spatial encoder to serve the frame-based video tasks. Then the frame features are input into a task-related temporal decoder to obtain spatiotemporal features for sequence-based tasks. The efficiency and efficacy of S-ViT is demonstrated by the state-of-the-art accuracy in the sequence-based action recognition task and the competitive advantage over conventional architecture in the frame-based MOT task. We believe that the concept of streaming video model and the implementation of S-ViT are solid steps towards a unified deep learning architecture for video understanding. Code will be available at https://github.com/yuzhms/Streaming-Video-Model.
summary: Video understanding tasks have traditionally been modeled by two separate architectures, specially tailored for two distinct tasks. Sequence-based video tasks, such as action recognition, use a video backbone to directly extract spatiotemporal features, while frame-based video tasks, such as multiple object tracking (MOT), rely on single fixed-image backbone to extract spatial features. In contrast, we propose to unify video understanding tasks into one novel streaming video architecture, referred to as Streaming Vision Transformer (S-ViT). S-ViT first produces frame-level features with a memory-enabled temporally-aware spatial encoder to serve the frame-based video tasks. Then the frame features are input into a task-related temporal decoder to obtain spatiotemporal features for sequence-based tasks. The efficiency and efficacy of S-ViT is demonstrated by the state-of-the-art accuracy in the sequence-based action recognition task and the competitive advantage over conventional architecture in the frame-based MOT task. We believe that the concept of streaming video model and the implementation of S-ViT are solid steps towards a unified deep learning architecture for video understanding. Code will be available at https://github.com/yuzhms/Streaming-Video-Model.
abstract_zh: 传统上，视频理解任务由两个独立的架构建模，专门为两个不同的任务量身定制。基于序列的视频任务（例如动作识别）使用视频主干来直接提取时空特征，而基于帧的视频任务（例如多对象跟踪（MOT））则依赖于单个固定图像主干来提取空间特征。相比之下，我们建议将视频理解任务统一到一种新颖的流视频架构中，称为流视觉变换器（S-ViT）。 S-ViT 首先使用支持内存的时间感知空间编码器生成帧级特征，以服务于基于帧的视频任务。然后将帧特征输入到与任务相关的时间解码器中，以获得基于序列的任务的时空特征。 S-ViT 的效率和功效体现在基于序列的动作识别任务中最先进的准确性以及基于帧的 MOT 任务中相对于传统架构的竞争优势。我们相信，流视频模型的概念和 S-ViT 的实施是迈向视频理解统一深度学习架构的坚实一步。代码可在 https://github.com/yuzhms/Streaming-Video-Model 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一视频理解任务的新型流式视频架构Streaming Vision Transformer (S-ViT)，同时处理基于序列和基于帧的视频任务。
AI.motivation: 传统视频理解任务需要分别使用两种独立架构处理序列任务（如动作识别）和帧任务（如多目标跟踪），存在效率低下和模型冗余问题。
AI.method: S-ViT包含两个核心模块：1）内存增强的时序感知空间编码器提取帧级特征；2）任务相关的时序解码器生成时空特征，通过统一架构实现多任务处理。
AI.result: 在动作识别任务中达到最先进精度，在多目标跟踪任务中优于传统架构，验证了模型的效率和有效性。
AI.conclusion: S-ViT为视频理解提供了统一的深度学习架构范式，代码已开源，是视频模型发展的重要进展。

authors_text: Jie Qin,Jie Wu,Pengxiang Yan,Ming Li,Ren Yuxi,Xuefeng Xiao,Yitong Wang,Rui Wang,Shilei Wen,Xin Pan,Xingang Wang
title: FreeSeg: Unified, Universal and Open-Vocabulary Image Segmentation
title_zh: FreeSeg：统一、通用和开放词汇的图像分割
abstract: Recently, open-vocabulary learning has emerged to accomplish segmentation for arbitrary categories of text-based descriptions, which popularizes the segmentation system to more general-purpose application scenarios. However, existing methods devote to designing specialized architectures or parameters for specific segmentation tasks. These customized design paradigms lead to fragmentation between various segmentation tasks, thus hindering the uniformity of segmentation models. Hence in this paper, we propose FreeSeg, a generic framework to accomplish Unified, Universal and Open-Vocabulary Image Segmentation. FreeSeg optimizes an all-in-one network via one-shot training and employs the same architecture and parameters to handle diverse segmentation tasks seamlessly in the inference procedure. Additionally, adaptive prompt learning facilitates the unified model to capture task-aware and category-sensitive concepts, improving model robustness in multi-task and varied scenarios. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that FreeSeg establishes new state-of-the-art results in performance and generalization on three segmentation tasks, which outperforms the best task-specific architectures by a large margin: 5.5% mIoU on semantic segmentation, 17.6% mAP on instance segmentation, 20.1% PQ on panoptic segmentation for the unseen class on COCO.
summary: Recently, open-vocabulary learning has emerged to accomplish segmentation for arbitrary categories of text-based descriptions, which popularizes the segmentation system to more general-purpose application scenarios. However, existing methods devote to designing specialized architectures or parameters for specific segmentation tasks. These customized design paradigms lead to fragmentation between various segmentation tasks, thus hindering the uniformity of segmentation models. Hence in this paper, we propose FreeSeg, a generic framework to accomplish Unified, Universal and Open-Vocabulary Image Segmentation. FreeSeg optimizes an all-in-one network via one-shot training and employs the same architecture and parameters to handle diverse segmentation tasks seamlessly in the inference procedure. Additionally, adaptive prompt learning facilitates the unified model to capture task-aware and category-sensitive concepts, improving model robustness in multi-task and varied scenarios. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that FreeSeg establishes new state-of-the-art results in performance and generalization on three segmentation tasks, which outperforms the best task-specific architectures by a large margin: 5.5% mIoU on semantic segmentation, 17.6% mAP on instance segmentation, 20.1% PQ on panoptic segmentation for the unseen class on COCO.
abstract_zh: 最近，开放词汇学习的出现可以实现对基于文本的描述的任意类别的分割，这将分割系统推广到更通用的应用场景。然而，现有的方法致力于为特定的分割任务设计专门的架构或参数。这些定制的设计范式导致各种分割任务之间的碎片化，从而阻碍了分割模型的统一性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 FreeSeg，一个实现统一、通用和开放词汇图像分割的通用框架。 FreeSeg 通过一次性训练优化一体化网络，并采用相同的架构和参数在推理过程中无缝处理不同的分割任务。此外，自适应提示学习有助于统一模型捕获任务感知和类别敏感概念，提高模型在多任务和不同场景中的鲁棒性。大量的实验结果表明，FreeSeg 在三个分割任务上的性能和泛化方面取得了新的最先进的结果，其性能大大优于最佳的特定任务架构：语义分割的 mIoU 为 5.5%，实例分割的 mAP 为 17.6%，COCO 上未见类的全景分割的 PQ 为 20.1%。

AI.tldr: 提出FreeSeg框架，实现统一、通用和开放词汇的图像分割
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法因专用架构设计导致任务碎片化，阻碍模型统一性与泛化能力
AI.method: 通过单次训练优化一体化网络，采用统一架构参数处理多任务，并引入自适应提示学习增强任务感知能力
AI.result: 在COCO数据集未见类别上，语义分割mIoU提升5.5%，实例分割mAP提升17.6%，全景分割PQ提升20.1%
AI.conclusion: FreeSeg在性能和跨任务泛化能力上显著优于现有任务专用架构

search_text: FreeSeg: Unified, Universal and Open-Vocabulary Image Segmentation FreeSeg：统一、通用和开放词汇的图像分割 Recently, open-vocabulary learning has emerged to accomplish segmentation for arbitrary categories of text-based descriptions, which popularizes the segmentation system to more general-purpose application scenarios. However, existing methods devote to designing specialized architectures or parameters for specific segmentation tasks. These customized design paradigms lead to fragmentation between various segmentation tasks, thus hindering the uniformity of segmentation models. Hence in this paper, we propose FreeSeg, a generic framework to accomplish Unified, Universal and Open-Vocabulary Image Segmentation. FreeSeg optimizes an all-in-one network via one-shot training and employs the same architecture and parameters to handle diverse segmentation tasks seamlessly in the inference procedure. Additionally, adaptive prompt learning facilitates the unified model to capture task-aware and category-sensitive concepts, improving model robustness in multi-task and varied scenarios. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that FreeSeg establishes new state-of-the-art results in performance and generalization on three segmentation tasks, which outperforms the best task-specific architectures by a large margin: 5.5% mIoU on semantic segmentation, 17.6% mAP on instance segmentation, 20.1% PQ on panoptic segmentation for the unseen class on COCO. 最近，开放词汇学习的出现可以实现对基于文本的描述的任意类别的分割，这将分割系统推广到更通用的应用场景。然而，现有的方法致力于为特定的分割任务设计专门的架构或参数。这些定制的设计范式导致各种分割任务之间的碎片化，从而阻碍了分割模型的统一性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 FreeSeg，一个实现统一、通用和开放词汇图像分割的通用框架。 FreeSeg 通过一次性训练优化一体化网络，并采用相同的架构和参数在推理过程中无缝处理不同的分割任务。此外，自适应提示学习有助于统一模型捕获任务感知和类别敏感概念，提高模型在多任务和不同场景中的鲁棒性。大量的实验结果表明，FreeSeg 在三个分割任务上的性能和泛化方面取得了新的最先进的结果，其性能大大优于最佳的特定任务架构：语义分割的 mIoU 为 5.5%，实例分割的 mAP 为 17.6%，COCO 上未见类的全景分割的 PQ 为 20.1%。 提出FreeSeg框架，实现统一、通用和开放词汇的图像分割 Jie Qin,Jie Wu,Pengxiang Yan,Ming Li,Ren Yuxi,Xuefeng Xiao,Yitong Wang,Rui Wang,Shilei Wen,Xin Pan,Xingang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Matthieu Delmas,Renaud Seguier
title: LatentForensics: Towards frugal deepfake detection in the StyleGAN latent space
title_zh: 潜在取证：在 StyleGAN 潜在空间中实现节俭的深度伪造检测
abstract: The classification of forged videos has been a challenge for the past few years. Deepfake classifiers can now reliably predict whether or not video frames have been tampered with. However, their performance is tied to both the dataset used for training and the analyst's computational power. We propose a deepfake detection method that operates in the latent space of a state-of-the-art generative adversarial network (GAN) trained on high-quality face images. The proposed method leverages the structure of the latent space of StyleGAN to learn a lightweight binary classification model. Experimental results on standard datasets reveal that the proposed approach outperforms other state-of-the-art deepfake classification methods, especially in contexts where the data available to train the models is rare, such as when a new manipulation method is introduced. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study showing the interest of the latent space of StyleGAN for deepfake classification. Combined with other recent studies on the interpretation and manipulation of this latent space, we believe that the proposed approach can further help in developing frugal deepfake classification methods based on interpretable high-level properties of face images.
summary: The classification of forged videos has been a challenge for the past few years. Deepfake classifiers can now reliably predict whether or not video frames have been tampered with. However, their performance is tied to both the dataset used for training and the analyst's computational power. We propose a deepfake detection method that operates in the latent space of a state-of-the-art generative adversarial network (GAN) trained on high-quality face images. The proposed method leverages the structure of the latent space of StyleGAN to learn a lightweight binary classification model. Experimental results on standard datasets reveal that the proposed approach outperforms other state-of-the-art deepfake classification methods, especially in contexts where the data available to train the models is rare, such as when a new manipulation method is introduced. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study showing the interest of the latent space of StyleGAN for deepfake classification. Combined with other recent studies on the interpretation and manipulation of this latent space, we believe that the proposed approach can further help in developing frugal deepfake classification methods based on interpretable high-level properties of face images.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，伪造视频的分类一直是一个挑战。 Deepfake 分类器现在可以可靠地预测视频帧是否已被篡改。然而，它们的性能与用于训练的数据集和分析师的计算能力有关。我们提出了一种深度伪造检测方法，该方法在最先进的生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在空间中运行，该网络经过高质量人脸图像的训练。该方法利用 StyleGAN 的潜在空间结构来学习轻量级二元分类模型。标准数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于其他最先进的深度伪造分类方法，特别是在可用于训练模型的数据很少的情况下，例如引入新的操作方法时。据我们所知，这是第一项显示 StyleGAN 潜在空间对深度伪造分类的兴趣的研究。结合最近关于解释和操纵这一潜在空间的其他研究，我们相信所提出的方法可以进一步帮助开发基于人脸图像可解释的高级属性的节俭的深度伪造分类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN潜在空间的轻量级深度伪造检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法依赖训练数据和计算资源，难以应对新出现的伪造技术及数据稀缺场景。
AI.method: 利用StyleGAN生成的高质量人脸图像潜在空间结构，构建轻量二分类模型进行伪造检测。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在训练数据稀缺时表现更优，是首个探索StyleGAN潜在空间用于伪造检测的研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释的潜在空间特性，为资源高效的深度伪造检测提供了新方向。

search_text: LatentForensics: Towards frugal deepfake detection in the StyleGAN latent space 潜在取证：在 StyleGAN 潜在空间中实现节俭的深度伪造检测 The classification of forged videos has been a challenge for the past few years. Deepfake classifiers can now reliably predict whether or not video frames have been tampered with. However, their performance is tied to both the dataset used for training and the analyst's computational power. We propose a deepfake detection method that operates in the latent space of a state-of-the-art generative adversarial network (GAN) trained on high-quality face images. The proposed method leverages the structure of the latent space of StyleGAN to learn a lightweight binary classification model. Experimental results on standard datasets reveal that the proposed approach outperforms other state-of-the-art deepfake classification methods, especially in contexts where the data available to train the models is rare, such as when a new manipulation method is introduced. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study showing the interest of the latent space of StyleGAN for deepfake classification. Combined with other recent studies on the interpretation and manipulation of this latent space, we believe that the proposed approach can further help in developing frugal deepfake classification methods based on interpretable high-level properties of face images. 过去几年，伪造视频的分类一直是一个挑战。 Deepfake 分类器现在可以可靠地预测视频帧是否已被篡改。然而，它们的性能与用于训练的数据集和分析师的计算能力有关。我们提出了一种深度伪造检测方法，该方法在最先进的生成对抗网络（GAN）的潜在空间中运行，该网络经过高质量人脸图像的训练。该方法利用 StyleGAN 的潜在空间结构来学习轻量级二元分类模型。标准数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于其他最先进的深度伪造分类方法，特别是在可用于训练模型的数据很少的情况下，例如引入新的操作方法时。据我们所知，这是第一项显示 StyleGAN 潜在空间对深度伪造分类的兴趣的研究。结合最近关于解释和操纵这一潜在空间的其他研究，我们相信所提出的方法可以进一步帮助开发基于人脸图像可解释的高级属性的节俭的深度伪造分类方法。 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN潜在空间的轻量级深度伪造检测方法。 Matthieu Delmas,Renaud Seguier cs.CV

authors_text: Long Chen,Yuchen Li,Chao Huang,Bai Li,Yang Xing,Daxin Tian,Li Li,Zhongxu Hu,Xiaoxiang Na,Zixuan Li,Siyu Teng,Chen Lv,Jinjun Wang,Dongpu Cao,Nanning Zheng,Fei-Yue Wang
title: Milestones in Autonomous Driving and Intelligent Vehicles: Survey of Surveys
title_zh: 自动驾驶和智能汽车的里程碑：调查中的调查
abstract: Interest in autonomous driving (AD) and intelligent vehicles (IVs) is growing at a rapid pace due to the convenience, safety, and economic benefits. Although a number of surveys have reviewed research achievements in this field, they are still limited in specific tasks, lack of systematic summary and research directions in the future. Here we propose a Survey of Surveys (SoS) for total technologies of AD and IVs that reviews the history, summarizes the milestones, and provides the perspectives, ethics, and future research directions. To our knowledge, this article is the first SoS with milestones in AD and IVs, which constitutes our complete research work together with two other technical surveys. We anticipate that this article will bring novel and diverse insights to researchers and abecedarians, and serve as a bridge between past and future.
summary: Interest in autonomous driving (AD) and intelligent vehicles (IVs) is growing at a rapid pace due to the convenience, safety, and economic benefits. Although a number of surveys have reviewed research achievements in this field, they are still limited in specific tasks, lack of systematic summary and research directions in the future. Here we propose a Survey of Surveys (SoS) for total technologies of AD and IVs that reviews the history, summarizes the milestones, and provides the perspectives, ethics, and future research directions. To our knowledge, this article is the first SoS with milestones in AD and IVs, which constitutes our complete research work together with two other technical surveys. We anticipate that this article will bring novel and diverse insights to researchers and abecedarians, and serve as a bridge between past and future.
abstract_zh: 由于其便利性、安全性和经济效益，人们对自动驾驶（AD）和智能汽车（IV）的兴趣正在快速增长。尽管已有多项调查回顾了该领域的研究成果，但仍局限于具体任务，缺乏系统总结和未来研究方向。在这里，我们提出了对 AD 和 IV 总体技术的调查中的调查 (SoS)，回顾历史，总结里程碑，并提供观点、伦理和未来的研究方向。据我们所知，本文是第一篇在 AD 和 IV 方面具有里程碑意义的 SoS，它与其他两项技术调查一起构成了我们完整的研究工作。我们预计这篇文章将为研究人员和初学者带来新颖和多样化的见解，并成为过去和未来之间的桥梁。

AI.tldr: 本文通过综述现有研究，系统总结自动驾驶和智能车辆领域的发展历程、里程碑及未来研究方向，提出首个‘综述的综述’（SoS）框架。
AI.motivation: 现有综述多局限于具体任务，缺乏对技术发展的系统性总结和未来方向的深入探讨，亟需全面梳理该领域历史脉络与研究空白。
AI.method: 采用‘综述的综述’方法，整合历史文献与技术进展，提炼关键里程碑，并结合伦理与技术视角分析未来研究方向。
AI.result: 构建了首个覆盖自动驾驶与智能车辆全技术链的SoS框架，明确了技术演进路径、当前挑战及跨学科研究机遇。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为研究者提供了系统性知识图谱与未来研究方向指引，推动自动驾驶领域从技术积累向伦理与应用深度融合的发展。

authors_text: Petros Toupas,Alexander Montgomerie-Corcoran,Christos-Savvas Bouganis,Dimitrios Tzovaras
title: HARFLOW3D: A Latency-Oriented 3D-CNN Accelerator Toolflow for HAR on FPGA Devices
title_zh: HARFLOW3D：面向延迟的 3D-CNN 加速器工具流程，适用于 FPGA 设备上的 HAR
abstract: For Human Action Recognition tasks (HAR), 3D Convolutional Neural Networks have proven to be highly effective, achieving state-of-the-art results. This study introduces a novel streaming architecture based toolflow for mapping such models onto FPGAs considering the model's inherent characteristics and the features of the targeted FPGA device. The HARFLOW3D toolflow takes as input a 3D CNN in ONNX format and a description of the FPGA characteristics, generating a design that minimizes the latency of the computation. The toolflow is comprised of a number of parts, including i) a 3D CNN parser, ii) a performance and resource model, iii) a scheduling algorithm for executing 3D models on the generated hardware, iv) a resource-aware optimization engine tailored for 3D models, v) an automated mapping to synthesizable code for FPGAs. The ability of the toolflow to support a broad range of models and devices is shown through a number of experiments on various 3D CNN and FPGA system pairs. Furthermore, the toolflow has produced high-performing results for 3D CNN models that have not been mapped to FPGAs before, demonstrating the potential of FPGA-based systems in this space. Overall, HARFLOW3D has demonstrated its ability to deliver competitive latency compared to a range of state-of-the-art hand-tuned approaches being able to achieve up to 5$\times$ better performance compared to some of the existing works.
summary: For Human Action Recognition tasks (HAR), 3D Convolutional Neural Networks have proven to be highly effective, achieving state-of-the-art results. This study introduces a novel streaming architecture based toolflow for mapping such models onto FPGAs considering the model's inherent characteristics and the features of the targeted FPGA device. The HARFLOW3D toolflow takes as input a 3D CNN in ONNX format and a description of the FPGA characteristics, generating a design that minimizes the latency of the computation. The toolflow is comprised of a number of parts, including i) a 3D CNN parser, ii) a performance and resource model, iii) a scheduling algorithm for executing 3D models on the generated hardware, iv) a resource-aware optimization engine tailored for 3D models, v) an automated mapping to synthesizable code for FPGAs. The ability of the toolflow to support a broad range of models and devices is shown through a number of experiments on various 3D CNN and FPGA system pairs. Furthermore, the toolflow has produced high-performing results for 3D CNN models that have not been mapped to FPGAs before, demonstrating the potential of FPGA-based systems in this space. Overall, HARFLOW3D has demonstrated its ability to deliver competitive latency compared to a range of state-of-the-art hand-tuned approaches being able to achieve up to 5$\times$ better performance compared to some of the existing works.
abstract_zh: 对于人类动作识别任务 (HAR)，3D 卷积神经网络已被证明非常有效，可以实现最先进的结果。本研究引入了一种基于新型流架构的工具流，用于将此类模型映射到 FPGA 上，同时考虑到模型的固有特性和目标 FPGA 器件的特性。 HARFLOW3D 工具流程将 ONNX 格式的 3D CNN 和 FPGA 特性的描述作为输入，生成可最大限度减少计算延迟的设计。该工具流程由多个部分组成，包括 i) 3D CNN 解析器，ii) 性能和资源模型，iii) 用于在生成的硬件上执行 3D 模型的调度算法，iv) 专为 3D 模型定制的资源感知优化引擎，v) 到 FPGA 可合成代码的自动映射。通过对各种 3D CNN 和 FPGA 系统对进行的大量实验，证明了该工具流支持广泛模型和设备的能力。此外，该工具流程还为之前未映射到 FPGA 的 3D CNN 模型生成了高性能结果，展示了基于 FPGA 的系统在该领域的潜力。总体而言，与一系列最先进的手动调整方法相比，HARFLOW3D 已经证明了其提供具有竞争力的延迟的能力，与某些现有作品相比，能够实现高达 5 美元\倍的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HARFLOW3D工具流，用于在FPGA设备上高效部署3D卷积神经网络（CNN）以实现人体动作识别（HAR），重点优化计算延迟。
AI.motivation: 3D CNN在HAR任务中表现优异，但现有方法在FPGA上的部署存在延迟高、资源利用不足的问题，亟需针对性工具流支持。
AI.method: 设计包含3D CNN解析器、性能资源模型、调度算法、资源感知优化引擎及FPGA代码映射模块的工具流，结合模型特性与FPGA硬件特征进行端到端优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，HARFLOW3D在多种3D CNN模型与FPGA平台组合中实现最低延迟，相比现有方法性能提升最高达5倍，并成功部署了此前未在FPGA上实现的模型。
AI.conclusion: HARFLOW3D验证了FPGA在HAR领域的潜力，其工具流能有效平衡性能与资源，为3D CNN的硬件加速提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，HARFLOW3D在多种3D CNN模型与FPGA平台组合中实现最低延迟，相比现有方法性能提升最高达5倍，并成功部署了此前未在FPGA上实现的模型。

search_text: HARFLOW3D: A Latency-Oriented 3D-CNN Accelerator Toolflow for HAR on FPGA Devices HARFLOW3D：面向延迟的 3D-CNN 加速器工具流程，适用于 FPGA 设备上的 HAR For Human Action Recognition tasks (HAR), 3D Convolutional Neural Networks have proven to be highly effective, achieving state-of-the-art results. This study introduces a novel streaming architecture based toolflow for mapping such models onto FPGAs considering the model's inherent characteristics and the features of the targeted FPGA device. The HARFLOW3D toolflow takes as input a 3D CNN in ONNX format and a description of the FPGA characteristics, generating a design that minimizes the latency of the computation. The toolflow is comprised of a number of parts, including i) a 3D CNN parser, ii) a performance and resource model, iii) a scheduling algorithm for executing 3D models on the generated hardware, iv) a resource-aware optimization engine tailored for 3D models, v) an automated mapping to synthesizable code for FPGAs. The ability of the toolflow to support a broad range of models and devices is shown through a number of experiments on various 3D CNN and FPGA system pairs. Furthermore, the toolflow has produced high-performing results for 3D CNN models that have not been mapped to FPGAs before, demonstrating the potential of FPGA-based systems in this space. Overall, HARFLOW3D has demonstrated its ability to deliver competitive latency compared to a range of state-of-the-art hand-tuned approaches being able to achieve up to 5$\times$ better performance compared to some of the existing works. 对于人类动作识别任务 (HAR)，3D 卷积神经网络已被证明非常有效，可以实现最先进的结果。本研究引入了一种基于新型流架构的工具流，用于将此类模型映射到 FPGA 上，同时考虑到模型的固有特性和目标 FPGA 器件的特性。 HARFLOW3D 工具流程将 ONNX 格式的 3D CNN 和 FPGA 特性的描述作为输入，生成可最大限度减少计算延迟的设计。该工具流程由多个部分组成，包括 i) 3D CNN 解析器，ii) 性能和资源模型，iii) 用于在生成的硬件上执行 3D 模型的调度算法，iv) 专为 3D 模型定制的资源感知优化引擎，v) 到 FPGA 可合成代码的自动映射。通过对各种 3D CNN 和 FPGA 系统对进行的大量实验，证明了该工具流支持广泛模型和设备的能力。此外，该工具流程还为之前未映射到 FPGA 的 3D CNN 模型生成了高性能结果，展示了基于 FPGA 的系统在该领域的潜力。总体而言，与一系列最先进的手动调整方法相比，HARFLOW3D 已经证明了其提供具有竞争力的延迟的能力，与某些现有作品相比，能够实现高达 5 美元\倍的性能提升。 本文提出HARFLOW3D工具流，用于在FPGA设备上高效部署3D卷积神经网络（CNN）以实现人体动作识别（HAR），重点优化计算延迟。 Petros Toupas,Alexander Montgomerie-Corcoran,Christos-Savvas Bouganis,Dimitrios Tzovaras cs.AR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xingzhe He,Gaurav Bharaj,David Ferman,Helge Rhodin,Pablo Garrido
title: Few-shot Geometry-Aware Keypoint Localization
title_zh: 少样本几何感知关键点定位
abstract: Supervised keypoint localization methods rely on large manually labeled image datasets, where objects can deform, articulate, or occlude. However, creating such large keypoint labels is time-consuming and costly, and is often error-prone due to inconsistent labeling. Thus, we desire an approach that can learn keypoint localization with fewer yet consistently annotated images. To this end, we present a novel formulation that learns to localize semantically consistent keypoint definitions, even for occluded regions, for varying object categories. We use a few user-labeled 2D images as input examples, which are extended via self-supervision using a larger unlabeled dataset. Unlike unsupervised methods, the few-shot images act as semantic shape constraints for object localization. Furthermore, we introduce 3D geometry-aware constraints to uplift keypoints, achieving more accurate 2D localization. Our general-purpose formulation paves the way for semantically conditioned generative modeling and attains competitive or state-of-the-art accuracy on several datasets, including human faces, eyes, animals, cars, and never-before-seen mouth interior (teeth) localization tasks, not attempted by the previous few-shot methods. Project page: https://xingzhehe.github.io/FewShot3DKP/}{https://xingzhehe.github.io/FewShot3DKP/

abstract_zh: 有监督的关键点定位方法依赖于大型手动标记的图像数据集，其中对象可能变形、连接或遮挡。然而，创建如此大的关键点标签既耗时又昂贵，并且由于标签不一致而经常容易出错。因此，我们希望有一种方法可以用更少但一致注释的图像来学习关键点定位。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的公式，可以学习本地化语义一致的关键点定义，即使对于遮挡区域、不同的对象类别也是如此。我们使用一些用户标记的 2D 图像作为输入示例，这些示例通过使用更大的未标记数据集的自我监督进行扩展。与无监督方法不同，少量图像充当对象定位的语​​义形状约束。此外，我们引入了 3D 几何感知约束来提升关键点，从而实现更准确的 2D 定位。我们的通用公式为语义条件生成建模铺平了道路，并在多个数据集上获得了有竞争力或最先进的准确性，包括人脸、眼睛、动物、汽车和前所未见的口腔内部（牙齿）定位任务，这是以前的几次方法无法尝试的。项目页面：https://xingzhehe.github.io/FewShot3DKP/}{https://xingzhehe.github.io/FewShot3DKP/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于少量标注图像的几何感知关键点定位方法，通过自监督学习和3D几何约束提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统关键点定位方法依赖大量人工标注数据，但标注过程耗时昂贵且易出错，亟需减少标注量同时保持准确性。
AI.method: 利用少量用户标注的2D图像作为语义约束，结合大规模未标注数据进行自监督扩展，并引入3D几何约束优化关键点定位。
AI.result: 在人脸、动物、车辆等数据集及新任务（如牙齿内部定位）中达到竞争性或最先进的精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为语义条件生成建模提供了通用框架，在少量样本下实现了跨类别、跨场景的高精度关键点定位。

authors_text: Arbish Akram,Nazar Khan
title: SARGAN: Spatial Attention-based Residuals for Facial Expression Manipulation
title_zh: SARGAN：基于空间注意力的面部表情处理残差
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT), 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT), 2023
abstract: Encoder-decoder based architecture has been widely used in the generator of generative adversarial networks for facial manipulation. However, we observe that the current architecture fails to recover the input image color, rich facial details such as skin color or texture and introduces artifacts as well. In this paper, we present a novel method named SARGAN that addresses the above-mentioned limitations from three perspectives. First, we employed spatial attention-based residual block instead of vanilla residual blocks to properly capture the expression-related features to be changed while keeping the other features unchanged. Second, we exploited a symmetric encoder-decoder network to attend facial features at multiple scales. Third, we proposed to train the complete network with a residual connection which relieves the generator of pressure to generate the input face image thereby producing the desired expression by directly feeding the input image towards the end of the generator. Both qualitative and quantitative experimental results show that our proposed model performs significantly better than state-of-the-art methods. In addition, existing models require much larger datasets for training but their performance degrades on out-of-distribution images. In contrast, SARGAN can be trained on smaller facial expressions datasets, which generalizes well on out-of-distribution images including human photographs, portraits, avatars and statues.
summary: Encoder-decoder based architecture has been widely used in the generator of generative adversarial networks for facial manipulation. However, we observe that the current architecture fails to recover the input image color, rich facial details such as skin color or texture and introduces artifacts as well. In this paper, we present a novel method named SARGAN that addresses the above-mentioned limitations from three perspectives. First, we employed spatial attention-based residual block instead of vanilla residual blocks to properly capture the expression-related features to be changed while keeping the other features unchanged. Second, we exploited a symmetric encoder-decoder network to attend facial features at multiple scales. Third, we proposed to train the complete network with a residual connection which relieves the generator of pressure to generate the input face image thereby producing the desired expression by directly feeding the input image towards the end of the generator. Both qualitative and quantitative experimental results show that our proposed model performs significantly better than state-of-the-art methods. In addition, existing models require much larger datasets for training but their performance degrades on out-of-distribution images. In contrast, SARGAN can be trained on smaller facial expressions datasets, which generalizes well on out-of-distribution images including human photographs, portraits, avatars and statues.
abstract_zh: 基于编码器-解码器的架构已广泛应用于面部操纵的生成对抗网络的生成器中。然而，我们观察到当前的架构无法恢复输入图像的颜色、丰富的面部细节（例如肤色或纹理），并且还引入了伪影。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SARGAN 的新方法，从三个角度解决了上述局限性。首先，我们采用基于空间注意力的残差块而不是普通残差块来正确捕获要更改的与表达相关的特征，同时保持其他特征不变。其次，我们利用对称编码器-解码器网络来处理多个尺度的面部特征。第三，我们建议使用残差连接来训练完整的网络，这可以减轻生成器生成输入面部图像的压力，从而通过直接将输入图像馈送到生成器的末端来产生所需的表情。定性和定量实验结果表明，我们提出的模型的性能明显优于最先进的方法。此外，现有模型需要更大的数据集进行训练，但它们在分布外图像上的性能会下降。相比之下，SARGAN 可以在较小的面部表情数据集上进行训练，该数据集可以很好地概括非分布图像，包括人类照片、肖像、头像和雕像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SARGAN方法，通过改进生成对抗网络的架构和训练策略，解决面部表情操作中的颜色恢复、细节保留及泛化能力问题。
AI.motivation: 现有编码器-解码器架构在生成面部表情时存在颜色失真、细节丢失和伪影问题，且依赖大规模数据集且泛化能力差。
AI.method: 采用空间注意力残差块捕捉表情特征，设计对称多尺度编码器-解码器网络，并通过残差连接训练降低生成器压力。
AI.result: 实验表明SARGAN在定性和定量指标上优于现有方法，且能在小数据集训练下良好泛化至照片、雕像等非分布图像。
AI.conclusion: SARGAN通过架构改进和训练优化，有效提升了面部表情操作的质量与泛化能力，为小数据场景提供新解决方案。

However, we observe that the current architecture fails to recover the input image color, rich facial details such as skin color or texture and introduces artifacts as well. Third, we proposed to train the complete network with a residual connection which relieves the generator of pressure to generate the input face image thereby producing the desired expression by directly feeding the input image towards the end of the generator. Both qualitative and quantitative experimental results show that our proposed model performs significantly better than state-of-the-art methods. In addition, existing models require much larger datasets for training but their performance degrades on out-of-distribution images. In contrast, SARGAN can be trained on smaller facial expressions datasets, which generalizes well on out-of-distribution images including human photographs, portraits, avatars and statues. 基于编码器-解码器的架构已广泛应用于面部操纵的生成对抗网络的生成器中。然而，我们观察到当前的架构无法恢复输入图像的颜色、丰富的面部细节（例如肤色或纹理），并且还引入了伪影。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SARGAN 的新方法，从三个角度解决了上述局限性。首先，我们采用基于空间注意力的残差块而不是普通残差块来正确捕获要更改的与表达相关的特征，同时保持其他特征不变。其次，我们利用对称编码器-解码器网络来处理多个尺度的面部特征。第三，我们建议使用残差连接来训练完整的网络，这可以减轻生成器生成输入面部图像的压力，从而通过直接将输入图像馈送到生成器的末端来产生所需的表情。定性和定量实验结果表明，我们提出的模型的性能明显优于最先进的方法。此外，现有模型需要更大的数据集进行训练，但它们在分布外图像上的性能会下降。相比之下，SARGAN 可以在较小的面部表情数据集上进行训练，该数据集可以很好地概括非分布图像，包括人类照片、肖像、头像和雕像。 本文提出SARGAN方法，通过改进生成对抗网络的架构和训练策略，解决面部表情操作中的颜色恢复、细节保留及泛化能力问题。 Arbish Akram,Nazar Khan cs.CV
